authors_text: Zhankui He,Handong Zhao,Tong Yu,Sungchul Kim,Fan Du,Julian McAuley
title: Bundle MCR: Towards Conversational Bundle Recommendation
title_zh: Bundle MCR：迈向对话式捆绑推荐
abstract: Bundle recommender systems recommend sets of items (e.g., pants, shirt, and shoes) to users, but they often suffer from two issues: significant interaction sparsity and a large output space. In this work, we extend multi-round conversational recommendation (MCR) to alleviate these issues. MCR, which uses a conversational paradigm to elicit user interests by asking user preferences on tags (e.g., categories or attributes) and handling user feedback across multiple rounds, is an emerging recommendation setting to acquire user feedback and narrow down the output space, but has not been explored in the context of bundle recommendation. In this work, we propose a novel recommendation task named Bundle MCR. We first propose a new framework to formulate Bundle MCR as Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) with multiple agents, for user modeling, consultation and feedback handling in bundle contexts. Under this framework, we propose a model architecture, called Bundle Bert (Bunt) to (1) recommend items, (2) post questions and (3) manage conversations based on bundle-aware conversation states. Moreover, to train Bunt effectively, we propose a two-stage training strategy. In an offline pre-training stage, Bunt is trained using multiple cloze tasks to mimic bundle interactions in conversations. Then in an online fine-tuning stage, Bunt agents are enhanced by user interactions. Our experiments on multiple offline datasets as well as the human evaluation show the value of extending MCR frameworks to bundle settings and the effectiveness of our Bunt design.

In this work, we extend multi-round conversational recommendation (MCR) to alleviate these issues. In this work, we propose a novel recommendation task named Bundle MCR. We first propose a new framework to formulate Bundle MCR as Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) with multiple agents, for user modeling, consultation and feedback handling in bundle contexts. Under this framework, we propose a model architecture, called Bundle Bert (Bunt) to (1) recommend items, (2) post questions and (3) manage conversations based on bundle-aware conversation states. Then in an online fine-tuning stage, Bunt agents are enhanced by user interactions. Our experiments on multiple offline datasets as well as the human evaluation show the value of extending MCR frameworks to bundle settings and the effectiveness of our Bunt design.
abstract_zh: 捆绑推荐系统向用户推荐一组物品（例如裤子、衬衫和鞋子），但它们经常遇到两个问题：显着的交互稀疏性和较大的输出空间。在这项工作中，我们扩展了多轮对话推荐（MCR）来缓解这些问题。 MCR 使用会话范式通过询问用户对标签的偏好（例如类别或属性）并处理多轮用户反馈来引发用户兴趣，是一种新兴的推荐设置，旨在获取用户反馈并缩小输出空间，但尚未在捆绑推荐的背景下进行探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的推荐任务，名为 Bundle MCR。我们首先提出了一个新的框架，将 Bundle MCR 制定为具有多个代理的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），用于捆绑上下文中的用户建模、咨询和反馈处理。在此框架下，我们提出了一种模型架构，称为 Bundle Bert (Bunt)，用于 (1) 推荐项目、(2) 发布问题和 (3) 基于捆绑感知对话状态管理对话。此外，为了有效地训练短打，我们提出了两阶段训练策略。在离线预训练阶段，Bunt 使用多个完形填空任务来训练，以模仿对话中的捆绑交互。然后在在线微调阶段，Bunt 代理通过用户交互得到增强。我们对多个离线数据集的实验以及人工评估显示了将 MCR 框架扩展到捆绑设置的价值以及我们的 Bunt 设计的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Bundle MCR框架，通过多轮对话机制解决捆绑推荐中的交互稀疏性和输出空间大的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统捆绑推荐系统面临用户交互数据稀疏和推荐组合空间过大的挑战，而多轮对话推荐（MCR）尚未在捆绑场景中应用。
AI.method: 将Bundle MCR建模为多智能体马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），设计Bundle Bert（Bunt）模型实现物品推荐、提问生成和对话管理，并采用两阶段训练策略（离线预训练+在线微调）。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和人工评估中验证了Bundle MCR框架的有效性，证明其能显著提升捆绑推荐性能。
AI.conclusion: 将多轮对话推荐扩展到捆绑场景具有重要价值，提出的Bunt模型设计有效解决了捆绑推荐的核心问题。

authors_text: Weidong Chen,Dexiang Hong,Yuankai Qi,Zhenjun Han,Shuhui Wang,Laiyun Qing,Qingming Huang,Guorong Li
title: Multi-Attention Network for Compressed Video Referring Object Segmentation
title_zh: 用于压缩视频参考对象分割的多注意网络
abstract: Referring video object segmentation aims to segment the object referred by a given language expression. Existing works typically require compressed video bitstream to be decoded to RGB frames before being segmented, which increases computation and storage requirements and ultimately slows the inference down. This may hamper its application in real-world computing resource limited scenarios, such as autonomous cars and drones. To alleviate this problem, in this paper, we explore the referring object segmentation task on compressed videos, namely on the original video data flow. Besides the inherent difficulty of the video referring object segmentation task itself, obtaining discriminative representation from compressed video is also rather challenging. To address this problem, we propose a multi-attention network which consists of dual-path dual-attention module and a query-based cross-modal Transformer module. Specifically, the dual-path dual-attention module is designed to extract effective representation from compressed data in three modalities, i.e., I-frame, Motion Vector and Residual. The query-based cross-modal Transformer firstly models the correlation between linguistic and visual modalities, and then the fused multi-modality features are used to guide object queries to generate a content-aware dynamic kernel and to predict final segmentation masks. Different from previous works, we propose to learn just one kernel, which thus removes the complicated post mask-matching procedure of existing methods. Extensive promising experimental results on three challenging datasets show the effectiveness of our method compared against several state-of-the-art methods which are proposed for processing RGB data. Source code is available at: https://github.com/DexiangHong/MANet.
summary: Referring video object segmentation aims to segment the object referred by a given language expression. Existing works typically require compressed video bitstream to be decoded to RGB frames before being segmented, which increases computation and storage requirements and ultimately slows the inference down. This may hamper its application in real-world computing resource limited scenarios, such as autonomous cars and drones. To alleviate this problem, in this paper, we explore the referring object segmentation task on compressed videos, namely on the original video data flow. Besides the inherent difficulty of the video referring object segmentation task itself, obtaining discriminative representation from compressed video is also rather challenging. To address this problem, we propose a multi-attention network which consists of dual-path dual-attention module and a query-based cross-modal Transformer module. Specifically, the dual-path dual-attention module is designed to extract effective representation from compressed data in three modalities, i.e., I-frame, Motion Vector and Residual. The query-based cross-modal Transformer firstly models the correlation between linguistic and visual modalities, and then the fused multi-modality features are used to guide object queries to generate a content-aware dynamic kernel and to predict final segmentation masks. Different from previous works, we propose to learn just one kernel, which thus removes the complicated post mask-matching procedure of existing methods. Extensive promising experimental results on three challenging datasets show the effectiveness of our method compared against several state-of-the-art methods which are proposed for processing RGB data. Source code is available at: https://github.com/DexiangHong/MANet.
abstract_zh: 引用视频对象分割旨在分割给定语言表达所引用的对象。现有的工作通常需要在分段之前将压缩视频比特流解码为 RGB 帧，这增加了计算和存储要求，并最终减慢了推理速度。这可能会阻碍其在现实世界计算资源有限的场景中的应用，例如自动驾驶汽车和无人机。为了缓解这个问题，在本文中，我们探索了压缩视频（即原始视频数据流）上的参考对象分割任务。除了视频参考对象分割任务本身固有的困难之外，从压缩视频中获得判别性表示也相当具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个多注意力网络，它由双路径双注意力模块和基于查询的跨模态 Transformer 模块组成。具体来说，双路径双注意力模块旨在以三种模式（即 I 帧、运动向量和残差）从压缩数据中提取有效表示。基于查询的跨模态 Transformer 首先对语言模态和视觉模态之间的相关性进行建模，然后使用融合的多模态特征来指导对象查询以生成内容感知的动态内核并预测最终的分割掩模。与之前的工作不同，我们建议只学习一个内核，从而消除了现有方法中复杂的后掩模匹配过程。在三个具有挑战性的数据集上进行的广泛有希望的实验结果表明，与提出的几种用于处理 RGB 数据的最先进方法相比，我们的方法是有效的。源代码位于：https://github.com/Defanghong/MANet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多注意网络（MANet），用于在压缩视频上直接进行参照对象分割，无需解码为RGB帧。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需将压缩视频解码为RGB帧再进行分割，导致计算和存储开销大，难以满足自动驾驶和无人机等实时场景需求。
AI.method: 设计双路径双注意模块提取I帧、运动矢量和残差三模态特征，并引入基于查询的跨模态Transformer模块，融合语言与视觉信息生成动态分割核。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上实验表明，该方法较现有RGB处理方法更有效，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 直接处理压缩视频可降低计算负载，所提方法在保持性能的同时提升了实时性，适用于资源受限场景。

authors_text: Xuhui Tian,Xinran Lin,Fan Zhong,Xueying Qin
title: Large-displacement 3D Object Tracking with Hybrid Non-local Optimization
title_zh: 采用混合非局部优化的大位移 3D 物体跟踪
abstract: Optimization-based 3D object tracking is known to be precise and fast, but sensitive to large inter-frame displacements. In this paper we propose a fast and effective non-local 3D tracking method. Based on the observation that erroneous local minimum are mostly due to the out-of-plane rotation, we propose a hybrid approach combining non-local and local optimizations for different parameters, resulting in efficient non-local search in the 6D pose space. In addition, a precomputed robust contour-based tracking method is proposed for the pose optimization. By using long search lines with multiple candidate correspondences, it can adapt to different frame displacements without the need of coarse-to-fine search. After the pre-computation, pose updates can be conducted very fast, enabling the non-local optimization to run in real time. Our method outperforms all previous methods for both small and large displacements. For large displacements, the accuracy is greatly improved ($81.7\% \;\text{v.s.}\; 19.4\%$). At the same time, real-time speed ($>$50fps) can be achieved with only CPU. The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/cvbubbles/nonlocal-3dtracking}.

By using long search lines with multiple candidate correspondences, it can adapt to different frame displacements without the need of coarse-to-fine search. abstract_zh: 基于优化的 3D 对象跟踪众所周知是精确且快速的，但对大的帧间位移很敏感。在本文中，我们提出了一种快速有效的非局部 3D 跟踪方法。基于观察到错误的局部最小值主要是由于平面外旋转造成的，我们提出了一种针对不同参数结合非局部和局部优化的混合方法，从而在 6D 位姿空间中实现有效的非局部搜索。此外，还提出了一种基于预计算的鲁棒轮廓跟踪方法来进行位姿优化。通过使用具有多个候选对应关系的长搜索线，它可以适应不同的帧位移，而不需要从粗到细的搜索。预计算后，位姿更新可以非常快地进行，从而使非局部优化能够实时运行。我们的方法在小位移和大位移方面都优于以前的所有方法。对于大位移，精度大大提高（$81.7\%\;\text{v.s.}\;19.4\%$）。同时，仅用CPU就可以实现实时速度（$>$50fps）。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/cvbubbles/nonlocal-3dtracking} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合非局部与局部优化的混合方法，用于解决大位移场景下的3D目标跟踪问题。
AI.motivation: 基于优化的3D跟踪方法在大帧间位移时易陷入局部最优，导致精度下降，需提升鲁棒性与实时性。
AI.method: 通过区分参数采用非局部与局部优化，在6D姿态空间实现高效搜索；提出预计算的基于轮廓的跟踪方法，利用长搜索线与多候选对应关系适应不同位移。
AI.result: 在大位移场景下精度提升至81.7%（对比19.4%），CPU实现实时性（>50fps）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在小位移与大位移场景均优于现有技术，兼顾高精度与实时性。

search_text: Large-displacement 3D Object Tracking with Hybrid Non-local Optimization 采用混合非局部优化的大位移 3D 物体跟踪 Optimization-based 3D object tracking is known to be precise and fast, but sensitive to large inter-frame displacements. In this paper we propose a fast and effective non-local 3D tracking method. Based on the observation that erroneous local minimum are mostly due to the out-of-plane rotation, we propose a hybrid approach combining non-local and local optimizations for different parameters, resulting in efficient non-local search in the 6D pose space. In addition, a precomputed robust contour-based tracking method is proposed for the pose optimization. By using long search lines with multiple candidate correspondences, it can adapt to different frame displacements without the need of coarse-to-fine search. After the pre-computation, pose updates can be conducted very fast, enabling the non-local optimization to run in real time. Our method outperforms all previous methods for both small and large displacements. For large displacements, the accuracy is greatly improved ($81.7\% \;\text{v.s.}\; 19.4\%$). At the same time, real-time speed ($>$50fps) can be achieved with only CPU. The source code is available at \url{https://github.com/cvbubbles/nonlocal-3dtracking}. 基于优化的 3D 对象跟踪众所周知是精确且快速的，但对大的帧间位移很敏感。在本文中，我们提出了一种快速有效的非局部 3D 跟踪方法。基于观察到错误的局部最小值主要是由于平面外旋转造成的，我们提出了一种针对不同参数结合非局部和局部优化的混合方法，从而在 6D 位姿空间中实现有效的非局部搜索。此外，还提出了一种基于预计算的鲁棒轮廓跟踪方法来进行位姿优化。通过使用具有多个候选对应关系的长搜索线，它可以适应不同的帧位移，而不需要从粗到细的搜索。预计算后，位姿更新可以非常快地进行，从而使非局部优化能够实时运行。我们的方法在小位移和大位移方面都优于以前的所有方法。对于大位移，精度大大提高（$81.7\%\;\text{v.s.}\;19.4\%$）。同时，仅用CPU就可以实现实时速度（$>$50fps）。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/cvbubbles/nonlocal-3dtracking} 获取。 本文提出一种结合非局部与局部优化的混合方法，用于解决大位移场景下的3D目标跟踪问题。 Xuhui Tian,Xinran Lin,Fan Zhong,Xueying Qin cs.CV

authors_text: Yiqiao Li,Jianlong Zhou,Sunny Verma,Fang Chen
title: A Survey of Explainable Graph Neural Networks: Taxonomy and Evaluation Metrics
title_zh: 可解释图神经网络调查：分类和评估指标
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have demonstrated a significant boost in prediction performance on graph data. At the same time, the predictions made by these models are often hard to interpret. In that regard, many efforts have been made to explain the prediction mechanisms of these models from perspectives such as GNNExplainer, XGNN and PGExplainer. Although such works present systematic frameworks to interpret GNNs, a holistic review for explainable GNNs is unavailable. In this survey, we present a comprehensive review of explainability techniques developed for GNNs. We focus on explainable graph neural networks and categorize them based on the use of explainable methods. We further provide the common performance metrics for GNNs explanations and point out several future research directions.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have demonstrated a significant boost in prediction performance on graph data. At the same time, the predictions made by these models are often hard to interpret. In that regard, many efforts have been made to explain the prediction mechanisms of these models from perspectives such as GNNExplainer, XGNN and PGExplainer. Although such works present systematic frameworks to interpret GNNs, a holistic review for explainable GNNs is unavailable. In this survey, we present a comprehensive review of explainability techniques developed for GNNs. We focus on explainable graph neural networks and categorize them based on the use of explainable methods. We further provide the common performance metrics for GNNs explanations and point out several future research directions.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）已证明图数据的预测性能显着提升。与此同时，这些模型做出的预测往往难以解释。在这方面，人们已经做出了很多努力，从 GNNExplainer、XGNN 和 PGExplainer 等角度解释这些模型的预测机制。尽管这些工作提出了解释 GNN 的系统框架，但无法对可解释的 GNN 进行全面审查。在本次调查中，我们对为 GNN 开发的可解释性技术进行了全面回顾。我们专注于可解释的图神经网络，并根据可解释方法的使用对它们进行分类。我们进一步提供了 GNN 解释的通用性能指标，并指出了几个未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 综述可解释图神经网络的技术，分类方法并提出评估指标与未来方向
AI.motivation: 现有方法缺乏系统性综述，需整合现有技术并指导未来研究
AI.method: 按解释方法分类现有技术，总结评估指标，并提出未来研究方向
AI.result: 系统分类可解释GNN方法，总结常用评估指标，指出研究不足与未来方向
AI.conclusion: 可解释性对GNN发展至关重要，当前方法需进一步系统化，并加强实际应用验证

authors_text: Jonathan Ho,Tim Salimans
title: Classifier-Free Diffusion Guidance
title_zh: 无分类器扩散指导
comment: A short version of this paper appeared in the NeurIPS 2021 Workshop on Deep Generative Models and Downstream Applications: https://openreview.net/pdf?id=qw8AKxfYbI
comments: A short version of this paper appeared in the NeurIPS 2021 Workshop on Deep Generative Models and Downstream Applications: https://openreview.net/pdf?id=qw8AKxfYbI
abstract: Classifier guidance is a recently introduced method to trade off mode coverage and sample fidelity in conditional diffusion models post training, in the same spirit as low temperature sampling or truncation in other types of generative models. Classifier guidance combines the score estimate of a diffusion model with the gradient of an image classifier and thereby requires training an image classifier separate from the diffusion model. It also raises the question of whether guidance can be performed without a classifier. We show that guidance can be indeed performed by a pure generative model without such a classifier: in what we call classifier-free guidance, we jointly train a conditional and an unconditional diffusion model, and we combine the resulting conditional and unconditional score estimates to attain a trade-off between sample quality and diversity similar to that obtained using classifier guidance.
summary: Classifier guidance is a recently introduced method to trade off mode coverage and sample fidelity in conditional diffusion models post training, in the same spirit as low temperature sampling or truncation in other types of generative models. Classifier guidance combines the score estimate of a diffusion model with the gradient of an image classifier and thereby requires training an image classifier separate from the diffusion model. It also raises the question of whether guidance can be performed without a classifier. We show that guidance can be indeed performed by a pure generative model without such a classifier: in what we call classifier-free guidance, we jointly train a conditional and an unconditional diffusion model, and we combine the resulting conditional and unconditional score estimates to attain a trade-off between sample quality and diversity similar to that obtained using classifier guidance.
abstract_zh: 分类器指导是最近引入的一种方法，用于权衡训练后条件扩散模型中的模式覆盖率和样本保真度，与其他类型的生成模型中的低温采样或截断的精神相同。分类器指导将扩散模型的分数估计与图像分类器的梯度相结合，因此需要与扩散模型分开训练图像分类器。它还提出了一个问题：是否可以在没有分类器的情况下进行指导。我们证明，指导确实可以通过没有这样的分类器的纯生成模型来执行：在我们所谓的无分类器指导中，我们联合训练有条件和无条件扩散模型，并将所得的条件和无条件分数估计结合起来，以实现样本质量和多样性之间的权衡，类似于使用分类器指导获得的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需分类器的扩散模型引导方法，通过联合训练条件和无条件扩散模型来实现样本质量和多样性的平衡。
AI.motivation: 传统分类器引导方法需要额外训练图像分类器，且存在是否能脱离分类器进行引导的疑问。
AI.method: 联合训练条件扩散模型与无条件扩散模型，并结合两者的分数估计实现引导。
AI.result: 实现了与分类器引导相似的样本质量与多样性权衡，且无需独立分类器。
AI.conclusion: 分类器无关引导方法有效，为扩散模型提供了更简洁的条件控制方案。

authors_text: Jing Geng,Li'e Ma,Xiaoquan Li,Yijun Yan
title: PTGCF: Printing Texture Guided Color Fusion for Impressionism Oil Painting Style Rendering
title_zh: PTGCF：用于印象派油画风格渲染的打印纹理引导色彩融合
abstract: As a major branch of Non-Photorealistic Rendering (NPR), image stylization mainly uses the computer algorithms to render a photo into an artistic painting. Recent work has shown that the extraction of style information such as stroke texture and color of the target style image is the key to image stylization. Given its stroke texture and color characteristics, a new stroke rendering method is proposed, which fully considers the tonal characteristics and the representative color of the original oil painting, in order to fit the tone of the original oil painting image into the stylized image and make it close to the artist's creative effect. The experiments have validated the efficacy of the proposed model. This method would be more suitable for the works of pointillism painters with a relatively uniform sense of direction, especially for natural scenes. When the original painting brush strokes have a clearer sense of direction, using this method to simulate brushwork texture features can be less satisfactory.
summary: As a major branch of Non-Photorealistic Rendering (NPR), image stylization mainly uses the computer algorithms to render a photo into an artistic painting. Recent work has shown that the extraction of style information such as stroke texture and color of the target style image is the key to image stylization. Given its stroke texture and color characteristics, a new stroke rendering method is proposed, which fully considers the tonal characteristics and the representative color of the original oil painting, in order to fit the tone of the original oil painting image into the stylized image and make it close to the artist's creative effect. The experiments have validated the efficacy of the proposed model. This method would be more suitable for the works of pointillism painters with a relatively uniform sense of direction, especially for natural scenes. When the original painting brush strokes have a clearer sense of direction, using this method to simulate brushwork texture features can be less satisfactory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于印刷纹理引导的颜色融合方法（PTGCF），用于生成印象派油画风格的图像渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有图像风格化方法在提取笔触纹理和颜色信息时，未能充分考虑原始油画的色调特征和代表性颜色，导致风格化效果与艺术家创作存在差距。
AI.method: 通过提取目标风格图像的笔触纹理与颜色特征，结合原始油画的色调信息，设计颜色融合算法以生成符合印象派风格的渲染结果。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在自然场景和点彩派画作中的有效性，但对笔触方向感强烈的画作模拟效果欠佳。
AI.conclusion: PTGCF方法能有效还原印象派油画的色调与色彩特征，但需进一步优化以处理具有明确笔触方向的画作风格化需求。

authors_text: Patrick Rodler
title: How should I compute my candidates? A taxonomy and classification of diagnosis computation algorithms
title_zh: 我应该如何计算我的候选人？诊断计算算法的分类和分类
comment: Updated version including a reference to the published peer-reviewed version of this work, which appeared in the proceedings of the European Conference on Artificial Intelligence (ECAI) 2023
comments: Updated version including a reference to the published peer-reviewed version of this work, which appeared in the proceedings of the European Conference on Artificial Intelligence (ECAI) 2023
abstract: This work proposes a taxonomy for diagnosis computation methods which allows their standardized assessment, classification and comparison. The aim is to (i) give researchers and practitioners an impression of the diverse landscape of available diagnostic techniques, (ii) allow them to easily retrieve the main features as well as pros and cons of the approaches, (iii) enable an easy and clear comparison of the techniques based on their characteristics wrt. a list of important and well-defined properties, and (iv) facilitate the selection of the "right" algorithm to adopt for a particular problem case, e.g., in practical diagnostic settings, for comparison in experimental evaluations, or for reuse, modification, extension, or improvement in the course of research.
summary: This work proposes a taxonomy for diagnosis computation methods which allows their standardized assessment, classification and comparison. The aim is to (i) give researchers and practitioners an impression of the diverse landscape of available diagnostic techniques, (ii) allow them to easily retrieve the main features as well as pros and cons of the approaches, (iii) enable an easy and clear comparison of the techniques based on their characteristics wrt. a list of important and well-defined properties, and (iv) facilitate the selection of the "right" algorithm to adopt for a particular problem case, e.g., in practical diagnostic settings, for comparison in experimental evaluations, or for reuse, modification, extension, or improvement in the course of research.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种诊断计算方法的分类法，允许对其进行标准化评估、分类和比较。目的是（i）让研究人员和从业者对可用诊断技术的多样性有一个印象，（ii）使他们能够轻松检索这些方法的主要特征以及优缺点，（iii）能够根据其特征对技术进行简单而清晰的比较。重要且明确定义的属性列表，以及（iv）促进为特定问题案例选择“正确”算法，例如，在实际诊断设置中，用于实验评估中的比较，或用于研究过程中的重用、修改、扩展或改进。

AI.tldr: 提出一种诊断计算方法的分类体系，以标准化评估、分类和比较不同算法
AI.motivation: 现有诊断算法多样且缺乏统一评估标准，需系统化分类以促进选择和比较
AI.method: 通过构建基于关键属性的分类体系，对诊断算法进行系统化分类和比较
AI.result: 形成标准化的分类框架，实现算法特征对比及适用场景分析
AI.conclusion: 分类体系有效支持算法选择与比较，推动诊断技术研究与应用

authors_text: Jiahui Zhang,Shitao Tang,Kejie Qiu,Rui Huang,Chuan Fang,Le Cui,Zilong Dong,Siyu Zhu,Ping Tan
title: RenderNet: Visual Relocalization Using Virtual Viewpoints in Large-Scale Indoor Environments
title_zh: RenderNet：在大型室内环境中使用虚拟视点进行视觉重新定位
abstract: Visual relocalization has been a widely discussed problem in 3D vision: given a pre-constructed 3D visual map, the 6 DoF (Degrees-of-Freedom) pose of a query image is estimated. Relocalization in large-scale indoor environments enables attractive applications such as augmented reality and robot navigation. However, appearance changes fast in such environments when the camera moves, which is challenging for the relocalization system. To address this problem, we propose a virtual view synthesis-based approach, RenderNet, to enrich the database and refine poses regarding this particular scenario. Instead of rendering real images which requires high-quality 3D models, we opt to directly render the needed global and local features of virtual viewpoints and apply them in the subsequent image retrieval and feature matching operations respectively. The proposed method can largely improve the performance in large-scale indoor environments, e.g., achieving an improvement of 7.1\% and 12.2\% on the Inloc dataset.
summary: Visual relocalization has been a widely discussed problem in 3D vision: given a pre-constructed 3D visual map, the 6 DoF (Degrees-of-Freedom) pose of a query image is estimated. Relocalization in large-scale indoor environments enables attractive applications such as augmented reality and robot navigation. However, appearance changes fast in such environments when the camera moves, which is challenging for the relocalization system. To address this problem, we propose a virtual view synthesis-based approach, RenderNet, to enrich the database and refine poses regarding this particular scenario. Instead of rendering real images which requires high-quality 3D models, we opt to directly render the needed global and local features of virtual viewpoints and apply them in the subsequent image retrieval and feature matching operations respectively. The proposed method can largely improve the performance in large-scale indoor environments, e.g., achieving an improvement of 7.1\% and 12.2\% on the Inloc dataset.
abstract_zh: 视觉重定位一直是 3D 视觉中广泛讨论的问题：给定预先构建的 3D 视觉图，估计查询图像的 6 DoF（自由度）姿态。大规模室内环境中的重新定位可实现增强现实和机器人导航等有吸引力的应用。然而，在这种环境中，当相机移动时，外观会快速变化，这对重定位系统来说是一个挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于虚拟视图合成的方法 RenderNet，以丰富数据库并细化有关此特定场景的姿势。我们没有渲染需要高质量3D模型的真实图像，而是选择直接渲染虚拟视点所需的全局和局部特征，并将它们分别应用于后续的图像检索和特征匹配操作。所提出的方法可以极大地提高大规模室内环境中的性能，例如，在 Inloc 数据集上实现了 7.1\% 和 12.2\% 的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RenderNet方法，通过虚拟视角合成技术解决大规模室内环境中的视觉重定位问题。
AI.motivation: 大规模室内环境中相机移动导致外观快速变化，传统方法难以有效进行视觉重定位。
AI.method: 直接渲染虚拟视角的全局和局部特征，分别用于图像检索和特征匹配，无需依赖高质量3D模型。
AI.result: 在Inloc数据集上实现7.1%和12.2%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: RenderNet通过虚拟视图合成有效提升了大规模室内环境下的视觉重定位性能。

authors_text: Cailin Winston,Caleb Winston,Chloe Winston,Claris Winston,Cleah Winston
title: A Retrospective on ICSE 2022
title_zh: ICSE 2022回顾
abstract: The 44th International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE 2022) was held in person from May 22 to May 27, 2022 in Pittsburgh, PA, USA. Here, we summarize themes of research and the direction of research in the field of software engineering and testing that we observed at the conference.
summary: The 44th International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE 2022) was held in person from May 22 to May 27, 2022 in Pittsburgh, PA, USA. Here, we summarize themes of research and the direction of research in the field of software engineering and testing that we observed at the conference.
abstract_zh: 第44届软件工程国际会议（ICSE 2022）于2022年5月22日至5月27日在美国宾夕法尼亚州匹兹堡举行。在这里，我们总结了我们在会议上观察到的软件工程和测试领域的研究主题和研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾并总结了ICSE 2022会议上软件工程与测试领域的研究主题及方向。
AI.motivation: 通过总结ICSE 2022的研究动态，为软件工程领域提供研究趋势洞察。
AI.method: 对ICSE 2022会议内容进行回顾性分析，提炼核心研究主题。
AI.result: 识别出软件工程与测试领域的关键研究方向及未来趋势。
AI.conclusion: 会议反映了当前软件工程研究的热点，并为后续研究提供了参考方向。

search_text: A Retrospective on ICSE 2022 ICSE 2022回顾 The 44th International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE 2022) was held in person from May 22 to May 27, 2022 in Pittsburgh, PA, USA. Here, we summarize themes of research and the direction of research in the field of software engineering and testing that we observed at the conference. 第44届软件工程国际会议（ICSE 2022）于2022年5月22日至5月27日在美国宾夕法尼亚州匹兹堡举行。在这里，我们总结了我们在会议上观察到的软件工程和测试领域的研究主题和研究方向。 本文回顾并总结了ICSE 2022会议上软件工程与测试领域的研究主题及方向。 Cailin Winston,Caleb Winston,Chloe Winston,Claris Winston,Cleah Winston cs.SE,cs.HC,cs.LG,cs.PL

authors_text: Yushu Wu,Yifan Gong,Pu Zhao,Yanyu Li,Zheng Zhan,Wei Niu,Hao Tang,Minghai Qin,Bin Ren,Yanzhi Wang
title: Compiler-Aware Neural Architecture Search for On-Mobile Real-time Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于移动实时超分辨率的编译器感知神经架构搜索
abstract: Deep learning-based super-resolution (SR) has gained tremendous popularity in recent years because of its high image quality performance and wide application scenarios. However, prior methods typically suffer from large amounts of computations and huge power consumption, causing difficulties for real-time inference, especially on resource-limited platforms such as mobile devices. To mitigate this, we propose a compiler-aware SR neural architecture search (NAS) framework that conducts depth search and per-layer width search with adaptive SR blocks. The inference speed is directly taken into the optimization along with the SR loss to derive SR models with high image quality while satisfying the real-time inference requirement. Instead of measuring the speed on mobile devices at each iteration during the search process, a speed model incorporated with compiler optimizations is leveraged to predict the inference latency of the SR block with various width configurations for faster convergence. With the proposed framework, we achieve real-time SR inference for implementing 720p resolution with competitive SR performance (in terms of PSNR and SSIM) on GPU/DSP of mobile platforms (Samsung Galaxy S21).
summary: Deep learning-based super-resolution (SR) has gained tremendous popularity in recent years because of its high image quality performance and wide application scenarios. However, prior methods typically suffer from large amounts of computations and huge power consumption, causing difficulties for real-time inference, especially on resource-limited platforms such as mobile devices. To mitigate this, we propose a compiler-aware SR neural architecture search (NAS) framework that conducts depth search and per-layer width search with adaptive SR blocks. The inference speed is directly taken into the optimization along with the SR loss to derive SR models with high image quality while satisfying the real-time inference requirement. Instead of measuring the speed on mobile devices at each iteration during the search process, a speed model incorporated with compiler optimizations is leveraged to predict the inference latency of the SR block with various width configurations for faster convergence. With the proposed framework, we achieve real-time SR inference for implementing 720p resolution with competitive SR performance (in terms of PSNR and SSIM) on GPU/DSP of mobile platforms (Samsung Galaxy S21).
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的超分辨率（SR）由于其高图像质量性能和广泛的应用场景，近年来获得了巨大的普及。然而，现有方法通常存在大量计算量和巨大功耗，导致实时推理困难，特别是在移动设备等资源有限的平台上。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种编译器感知的 SR 神经架构搜索 (NAS) 框架，该框架使用自适应 SR 块进行深度搜索和每层宽度搜索。推理速度与SR损失一起直接纳入优化，以得到具有高图像质量的SR模型，同​​时满足实时推理要求。不是在搜索过程中每次迭代时测量移动设备上的速度，而是利用与编译器优化相结合的速度模型来预测具有各种宽度配置的 SR 块的推理延迟，以实现更快的收敛。利用所提出的框架，我们在移动平台（三星 Galaxy S21）的 GPU/DSP 上实现了实时 SR 推理，以实现 720p 分辨率，并具有具有竞争力的 SR 性能（在 PSNR 和 SSIM 方面）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种编译器感知的神经架构搜索框架，用于在移动设备上实现实时超分辨率。
AI.motivation: 传统超分辨率方法计算量大且功耗高，难以在资源受限的移动设备上实现实时推理。
AI.method: 通过结合编译器优化的速度模型预测推理延迟，同时优化超分辨率损失和推理速度，进行深度和层宽搜索。
AI.result: 在三星Galaxy S21移动平台的GPU/DSP上实现了720p实时超分辨率，保持了较高的PSNR和SSIM指标。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效平衡了图像质量与推理速度，为移动设备实时超分辨率提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Yonatan Bitton,Nitzan Bitton Guetta,Ron Yosef,Yuval Elovici,Mohit Bansal,Gabriel Stanovsky,Roy Schwartz
title: WinoGAViL: Gamified Association Benchmark to Challenge Vision-and-Language Models
title_zh: WinoGAViL：挑战视觉和语言模型的游戏化协会基准
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022, Datasets and Benchmarks. Website: https://winogavil.github.io/
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022, Datasets and Benchmarks. Website: https://winogavil.github.io/
abstract: While vision-and-language models perform well on tasks such as visual question answering, they struggle when it comes to basic human commonsense reasoning skills. In this work, we introduce WinoGAViL: an online game of vision-and-language associations (e.g., between werewolves and a full moon), used as a dynamic evaluation benchmark. Inspired by the popular card game Codenames, a spymaster gives a textual cue related to several visual candidates, and another player tries to identify them. Human players are rewarded for creating associations that are challenging for a rival AI model but still solvable by other human players. We use the game to collect 3.5K instances, finding that they are intuitive for humans (>90% Jaccard index) but challenging for state-of-the-art AI models, where the best model (ViLT) achieves a score of 52%, succeeding mostly where the cue is visually salient. Our analysis as well as the feedback we collect from players indicate that the collected associations require diverse reasoning skills, including general knowledge, common sense, abstraction, and more. We release the dataset, the code and the interactive game, allowing future data collection that can be used to develop models with better association abilities.
summary: While vision-and-language models perform well on tasks such as visual question answering, they struggle when it comes to basic human commonsense reasoning skills. In this work, we introduce WinoGAViL: an online game of vision-and-language associations (e.g., between werewolves and a full moon), used as a dynamic evaluation benchmark. Inspired by the popular card game Codenames, a spymaster gives a textual cue related to several visual candidates, and another player tries to identify them. Human players are rewarded for creating associations that are challenging for a rival AI model but still solvable by other human players. We use the game to collect 3.5K instances, finding that they are intuitive for humans (>90% Jaccard index) but challenging for state-of-the-art AI models, where the best model (ViLT) achieves a score of 52%, succeeding mostly where the cue is visually salient. Our analysis as well as the feedback we collect from players indicate that the collected associations require diverse reasoning skills, including general knowledge, common sense, abstraction, and more. We release the dataset, the code and the interactive game, allowing future data collection that can be used to develop models with better association abilities.
abstract_zh: 虽然视觉和语言模型在视觉问答等任务上表现良好，但在基本的人类常识推理技能方面却表现不佳。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 WinoGAViL：一种视觉和语言关联的在线游戏（例如，狼人和满月之间），用作动态评估基准。受流行纸牌游戏《代号》的启发，间谍大师给出了与几个视觉候选者相关的文本提示，而另一名玩家则试图识别它们。人类玩家因创建对竞争对手人工智能模型具有挑战性但仍可由其他人类玩家解决的关联而获得奖励。我们使用该游戏收集了 3.5K 个实例，发现它们对人类来说很直观（>90% Jaccard 指数），但对最先进的 AI 模型来说具有挑战性，其中最佳模型 (ViLT) 获得了 52% 的分数，主要在提示视觉上显着的情况下取得成功。我们的分析以及从玩家那里收集的反馈表明，收集到的联想需要不同的推理技能，包括常识、常识、抽象等等。我们发布了数据集、代码和互动游戏，允许未来收集数据，用于开发具有更好关联能力的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WinoGAViL，一个通过游戏化关联任务评估视觉-语言模型常识推理能力的动态基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在常识推理任务上表现不足，需设计更贴近人类思维的评估方式。
AI.method: 基于Codenames游戏机制，通过玩家生成视觉-文本关联实例，收集3.5K个样本并测试模型表现。
AI.result: 人类玩家解决准确率达90%以上，而最佳模型ViLT仅得52分，主要依赖视觉显著性线索。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集需多元推理能力，可推动开发更擅长关联推理的视觉-语言模型。

authors_text: Ruocheng Wang,Yunzhi Zhang,Jiayuan Mao,Chin-Yi Cheng,Jiajun Wu
title: Translating a Visual LEGO Manual to a Machine-Executable Plan
title_zh: 将视觉乐高手册转化为机器可执行的计划
abstract: We study the problem of translating an image-based, step-by-step assembly manual created by human designers into machine-interpretable instructions. We formulate this problem as a sequential prediction task: at each step, our model reads the manual, locates the components to be added to the current shape, and infers their 3D poses. This task poses the challenge of establishing a 2D-3D correspondence between the manual image and the real 3D object, and 3D pose estimation for unseen 3D objects, since a new component to be added in a step can be an object built from previous steps. To address these two challenges, we present a novel learning-based framework, the Manual-to-Executable-Plan Network (MEPNet), which reconstructs the assembly steps from a sequence of manual images. The key idea is to integrate neural 2D keypoint detection modules and 2D-3D projection algorithms for high-precision prediction and strong generalization to unseen components. The MEPNet outperforms existing methods on three newly collected LEGO manual datasets and a Minecraft house dataset.
summary: We study the problem of translating an image-based, step-by-step assembly manual created by human designers into machine-interpretable instructions. We formulate this problem as a sequential prediction task: at each step, our model reads the manual, locates the components to be added to the current shape, and infers their 3D poses. This task poses the challenge of establishing a 2D-3D correspondence between the manual image and the real 3D object, and 3D pose estimation for unseen 3D objects, since a new component to be added in a step can be an object built from previous steps. To address these two challenges, we present a novel learning-based framework, the Manual-to-Executable-Plan Network (MEPNet), which reconstructs the assembly steps from a sequence of manual images. The key idea is to integrate neural 2D keypoint detection modules and 2D-3D projection algorithms for high-precision prediction and strong generalization to unseen components. The MEPNet outperforms existing methods on three newly collected LEGO manual datasets and a Minecraft house dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们研究将人类设计师创建的基于图像的分步装配手册转换为机器可解释的指令的问题。我们将此问题表述为顺序预测任务：在每一步，我们的模型都会读取手册，找到要添加到当前形状的组件，并推断它们的 3D 姿势。此任务提出了在手动图像和真实 3D 对象之间建立 2D-3D 对应关系以及对未见过的 3D 对象进行 3D 姿态估计的挑战，因为要在步骤中添加的新组件可能是从先前步骤构建的对象。为了解决这两个挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的基于学习的框架，即手动到可执行计划网络（MEPNet），它从一系列手动图像重建组装步骤。关键思想是集成神经 2D 关键点检测模块和 2D-​​3D 投影算法，以实现高精度预测和对不可见组件的强泛化。 MEPNet 在三个新收集的乐高手动数据集和 Minecraft 房屋数据集上的性能优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究将人类设计的基于图像的乐高组装手册转化为机器可执行指令的任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理2D图像与3D物体的对应关系及未见过组件的3D姿态估计，限制了自动化组装的发展。
AI.method: 提出Manual-to-Executable-Plan Network（MEPNet），结合神经2D关键点检测模块与2D-3D投影算法，实现高精度预测与泛化能力。
AI.result: 在三个乐高手册数据集和一个Minecraft房屋数据集上，MEPNet优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了2D-3D对应与未知组件姿态估计问题，为自动化组装提供了新思路。

search_text: Translating a Visual LEGO Manual to a Machine-Executable Plan 将视觉乐高手册转化为机器可执行的计划 We study the problem of translating an image-based, step-by-step assembly manual created by human designers into machine-interpretable instructions. We formulate this problem as a sequential prediction task: at each step, our model reads the manual, locates the components to be added to the current shape, and infers their 3D poses. This task poses the challenge of establishing a 2D-3D correspondence between the manual image and the real 3D object, and 3D pose estimation for unseen 3D objects, since a new component to be added in a step can be an object built from previous steps. To address these two challenges, we present a novel learning-based framework, the Manual-to-Executable-Plan Network (MEPNet), which reconstructs the assembly steps from a sequence of manual images. The key idea is to integrate neural 2D keypoint detection modules and 2D-3D projection algorithms for high-precision prediction and strong generalization to unseen components. The MEPNet outperforms existing methods on three newly collected LEGO manual datasets and a Minecraft house dataset. 我们研究将人类设计师创建的基于图像的分步装配手册转换为机器可解释的指令的问题。我们将此问题表述为顺序预测任务：在每一步，我们的模型都会读取手册，找到要添加到当前形状的组件，并推断它们的 3D 姿势。此任务提出了在手动图像和真实 3D 对象之间建立 2D-3D 对应关系以及对未见过的 3D 对象进行 3D 姿态估计的挑战，因为要在步骤中添加的新组件可能是从先前步骤构建的对象。为了解决这两个挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的基于学习的框架，即手动到可执行计划网络（MEPNet），它从一系列手动图像重建组装步骤。关键思想是集成神经 2D 关键点检测模块和 2D-​​3D 投影算法，以实现高精度预测和对不可见组件的强泛化。 MEPNet 在三个新收集的乐高手动数据集和 Minecraft 房屋数据集上的性能优于现有方法。 本文研究将人类设计的基于图像的乐高组装手册转化为机器可执行指令的任务。 Ruocheng Wang,Yunzhi Zhang,Jiayuan Mao,Chin-Yi Cheng,Jiajun Wu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhanghao Sun,Jian Wang,Yicheng Wu,Shree Nayar
title: Seeing Far in the Dark with Patterned Flash
title_zh: 使用图案闪光在黑暗中看到远处
abstract: Flash illumination is widely used in imaging under low-light environments. However, illumination intensity falls off with propagation distance quadratically, which poses significant challenges for flash imaging at a long distance. We propose a new flash technique, named ``patterned flash'', for flash imaging at a long distance. Patterned flash concentrates optical power into a dot array. Compared with the conventional uniform flash where the signal is overwhelmed by the noise everywhere, patterned flash provides stronger signals at sparsely distributed points across the field of view to ensure the signals at those points stand out from the sensor noise. This enables post-processing to resolve important objects and details. Additionally, the patterned flash projects texture onto the scene, which can be treated as a structured light system for depth perception. Given the novel system, we develop a joint image reconstruction and depth estimation algorithm with a convolutional neural network. We build a hardware prototype and test the proposed flash technique on various scenes. The experimental results demonstrate that our patterned flash has significantly better performance at long distances in low-light environments.
summary: Flash illumination is widely used in imaging under low-light environments. However, illumination intensity falls off with propagation distance quadratically, which poses significant challenges for flash imaging at a long distance. We propose a new flash technique, named ``patterned flash'', for flash imaging at a long distance. Patterned flash concentrates optical power into a dot array. Compared with the conventional uniform flash where the signal is overwhelmed by the noise everywhere, patterned flash provides stronger signals at sparsely distributed points across the field of view to ensure the signals at those points stand out from the sensor noise. This enables post-processing to resolve important objects and details. Additionally, the patterned flash projects texture onto the scene, which can be treated as a structured light system for depth perception. Given the novel system, we develop a joint image reconstruction and depth estimation algorithm with a convolutional neural network. We build a hardware prototype and test the proposed flash technique on various scenes. The experimental results demonstrate that our patterned flash has significantly better performance at long distances in low-light environments.
abstract_zh: Flash illumination is widely used in imaging under low-light environments.然而，照明强度随传播距离呈二次方下降，这对长距离闪光成像提出了重大挑战。 We propose a new flash technique, named ``patterned flash'', for flash imaging at a long distance. Patterned flash concentrates optical power into a dot array.与信号被各处噪声淹没的传统均匀闪光相比，图案闪光在视野中稀疏分布的点处提供更强的信号，以确保这些点处的信号从传感器噪声中脱颖而出。 This enables post-processing to resolve important objects and details. Additionally, the patterned flash projects texture onto the scene, which can be treated as a structured light system for depth perception. Given the novel system, we develop a joint image reconstruction and depth estimation algorithm with a convolutional neural network. We build a hardware prototype and test the proposed flash technique on various scenes. The experimental results demonstrate that our patterned flash has significantly better performance at long distances in low-light environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'patterned flash'的新闪光技术，用于在低光环境下实现远距离成像。
AI.motivation: 传统均匀闪光在远距离成像时因信号被噪声淹没而难以捕捉细节，需解决低光远距离成像的信号弱问题。
AI.method: 通过将光学功率集中于点阵实现patterned flash，在稀疏分布点提供更强信号，并利用投影纹理进行深度感知，结合CNN算法实现图像重建与深度估计。
AI.result: 硬件原型实验表明，该技术在低光远距离场景中显著优于传统方法，能有效恢复物体细节并实现深度感知。
AI.conclusion: patterned flash通过结构光与神经网络联合算法，为低光远距离成像提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaoyan Zhou,Adam S. Williams,Francisco R. Ortega
title: Eliciting Multimodal Gesture+Speech Interactions in a Multi-Object Augmented Reality Environment
title_zh: 在多对象增强现实环境中引发多模式手势+语音交互
abstract: As augmented reality technology and hardware become more mature and affordable, researchers have been exploring more intuitive and discoverable interaction techniques for immersive environments. In this paper, we investigate multimodal interaction for 3D object manipulation in a multi-object virtual environment. To identify the user-defined gestures, we conducted an elicitation study involving 24 participants for 22 referents with an augmented reality headset. It yielded 528 proposals and generated a winning gesture set with 25 gestures after binning and ranking all gesture proposals. We found that for the same task, the same gesture was preferred for both one and two object manipulation, although both hands were used in the two object scenario. We presented the gestures and speech results, and the differences compared to similar studies in a single object virtual environment. The study also explored the association between speech expressions and gesture stroke during object manipulation, which could improve the recognizer efficiency in augmented reality headsets.
summary: As augmented reality technology and hardware become more mature and affordable, researchers have been exploring more intuitive and discoverable interaction techniques for immersive environments. In this paper, we investigate multimodal interaction for 3D object manipulation in a multi-object virtual environment. To identify the user-defined gestures, we conducted an elicitation study involving 24 participants for 22 referents with an augmented reality headset. It yielded 528 proposals and generated a winning gesture set with 25 gestures after binning and ranking all gesture proposals. We found that for the same task, the same gesture was preferred for both one and two object manipulation, although both hands were used in the two object scenario. We presented the gestures and speech results, and the differences compared to similar studies in a single object virtual environment. The study also explored the association between speech expressions and gesture stroke during object manipulation, which could improve the recognizer efficiency in augmented reality headsets.
abstract_zh: As augmented reality technology and hardware become more mature and affordable, researchers have been exploring more intuitive and discoverable interaction techniques for immersive environments.在本文中，我们研究了多对象虚拟环境中 3D 对象操纵的多模态交互。 To identify the user-defined gestures, we conducted an elicitation study involving 24 participants for 22 referents with an augmented reality headset.它产生了 528 个提案，并在对所有手势提案进行分箱和排名后生成了包含 25 个手势的获胜手势集。 We found that for the same task, the same gesture was preferred for both one and two object manipulation, although both hands were used in the two object scenario.我们展示了手势和语音结果，以及与单个对象虚拟环境中的类似研究相比的差异。 The study also explored the association between speech expressions and gesture stroke during object manipulation, which could improve the recognizer efficiency in augmented reality headsets.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在多物体增强现实环境中通过多模态手势与语音交互进行3D物体操作的直观交互方法。
AI.motivation: 随着增强现实技术的成熟，研究者需探索更直观的交互方式以提升多物体虚拟环境中的操作效率与用户体验。
AI.method: 通过24名参与者的22个参考对象的诱发研究，使用AR头显收集528个手势提案，并通过聚类和排序生成25个最优手势集，分析手势与语音表达的关联性。
AI.result: 发现单物体与双物体操作中用户偏好相同手势，双物体场景下双手协同使用；语音与手势轨迹的关联性可提升AR设备识别效率。
AI.conclusion: 用户自定义手势能有效支持多物体交互，手势与语音的协同分析为AR交互设计提供了优化方向，且与单物体研究存在显著差异。

As augmented reality technology and hardware become more mature and affordable, researchers have been exploring more intuitive and discoverable interaction techniques for immersive environments.在本文中，我们研究了多对象虚拟环境中 3D 对象操纵的多模态交互。 To identify the user-defined gestures, we conducted an elicitation study involving 24 participants for 22 referents with an augmented reality headset.它产生了 528 个提案，并在对所有手势提案进行分箱和排名后生成了包含 25 个手势的获胜手势集。 We found that for the same task, the same gesture was preferred for both one and two object manipulation, although both hands were used in the two object scenario.我们展示了手势和语音结果，以及与单个对象虚拟环境中的类似研究相比的差异。 The study also explored the association between speech expressions and gesture stroke during object manipulation, which could improve the recognizer efficiency in augmented reality headsets. 本文研究了在多物体增强现实环境中通过多模态手势与语音交互进行3D物体操作的直观交互方法。 Xiaoyan Zhou,Adam S. Williams,Francisco R. Ortega cs.HC

authors_text: MohammadReza Mohammadi,Peyton Chandarana,James Seekings,Sara Hendrix,Ramtin Zand
title: Static Hand Gesture Recognition for American Sign Language using Neuromorphic Hardware
title_zh: 使用神经形态硬件对美国手语进行静态手势识别
comment: Authors MohammedReza Mohammadi, and Peyton Chandarana contributed equally
comments: Authors MohammedReza Mohammadi, and Peyton Chandarana contributed equally
abstract: In this paper, we develop four spiking neural network (SNN) models for two static American Sign Language (ASL) hand gesture classification tasks, i.e., the ASL Alphabet and ASL Digits. The SNN models are deployed on Intel's neuromorphic platform, Loihi, and then compared against equivalent deep neural network (DNN) models deployed on an edge computing device, the Intel Neural Compute Stick 2 (NCS2). We perform a comprehensive comparison between the two systems in terms of accuracy, latency, power consumption, and energy. The best DNN model achieves an accuracy of 99.93% on the ASL Alphabet dataset, whereas the best performing SNN model has an accuracy of 99.30%. For the ASL-Digits dataset, the best DNN model achieves an accuracy of 99.76% accuracy while the SNN achieves 99.03%. Moreover, our obtained experimental results show that the Loihi neuromorphic hardware implementations achieve up to 20.64x and 4.10x reduction in power consumption and energy, respectively, when compared to NCS2.
summary: In this paper, we develop four spiking neural network (SNN) models for two static American Sign Language (ASL) hand gesture classification tasks, i.e., the ASL Alphabet and ASL Digits. The SNN models are deployed on Intel's neuromorphic platform, Loihi, and then compared against equivalent deep neural network (DNN) models deployed on an edge computing device, the Intel Neural Compute Stick 2 (NCS2). We perform a comprehensive comparison between the two systems in terms of accuracy, latency, power consumption, and energy. The best DNN model achieves an accuracy of 99.93% on the ASL Alphabet dataset, whereas the best performing SNN model has an accuracy of 99.30%. For the ASL-Digits dataset, the best DNN model achieves an accuracy of 99.76% accuracy while the SNN achieves 99.03%. Moreover, our obtained experimental results show that the Loihi neuromorphic hardware implementations achieve up to 20.64x and 4.10x reduction in power consumption and energy, respectively, when compared to NCS2.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们为两个静态美国手语 (ASL) 手势分类任务（即 ASL 字母和 ASL 数字）开发了四种尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 模型。 SNN 模型部署在英特尔的神经拟态平台 Loihi 上，然后与部署在边缘计算设备英特尔神经计算棒 2 (NCS2) 上的等效深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型进行比较。我们对两个系统在准确性、延迟、功耗和能耗方面进行了全面比较。最好的 DNN 模型在 ASL Alphabet 数据集上的准确率达到 99.93%，而性能最好的 SNN 模型的准确率达到 99.30%。对于 ASL-Digits 数据集，最好的 DNN 模型的准确率达到 99.76%，而 SNN 的准确率达到 99.03%。此外，我们获得的实验结果表明，与 NCS2 相比，Loihi 神经拟态硬件实现的功耗和能耗分别降低了 20.64 倍和 4.10 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用类脑硬件实现静态美国手语（ASL）手势识别，并比较其与传统深度神经网络在性能和能效上的差异。
AI.motivation: 传统深度神经网络（DNN）在边缘设备上虽然准确率高，但功耗较大，而类脑硬件（如Loihi）可能在能效方面具有优势，因此本文旨在评估其在ASL手势识别中的可行性。
AI.method: 通过构建四个脉冲神经网络（SNN）模型并部署在Intel Loihi类脑芯片上，同时将等效的深度神经网络（DNN）部署在Intel NCS2边缘计算设备，对比两者在准确率、延迟、功耗和能耗方面的表现。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，SNN在ASL字母和数字数据集上的准确率分别为99.30%和99.03%，略低于DNN的99.93%和99.76%；但Loihi在功耗和能耗上分别降低了20.64倍和4.10倍。
AI.conclusion: 尽管SNN的准确率略逊于DNN，但Loihi类脑硬件在能效方面显著优于NCS2，表明其在低功耗实时手势识别应用中的潜力。

authors_text: Adam S. Williams,Xiaoyan Zhou,Michel Pahud,Francisco R. Ortega
title: A Pilot Study on The Impact of Stereoscopic Display Type on User Interactions Within A Immersive Analytics Environment
title_zh: 关于立体显示类型对沉浸式分析环境中用户交互影响的初步研究
abstract: Immersive Analytics (IA) and consumer adoption of augmented reality (AR) and virtual reality (VR) head-mounted displays (HMDs) are both rapidly growing. When used in conjunction, stereoscopic IA environments can offer improved user understanding and engagement; however, it is unclear how the choice of stereoscopic display impacts user interactions within an IA environment. This paper presents a pilot study that examines the impact of stereoscopic display type on object manipulation and environmental navigation using consumer-available AR and VR displays. This work finds that the display type can impact how users manipulate virtual content, how they navigate the environment, and how able they are to answer questions about the represented data.
summary: Immersive Analytics (IA) and consumer adoption of augmented reality (AR) and virtual reality (VR) head-mounted displays (HMDs) are both rapidly growing. When used in conjunction, stereoscopic IA environments can offer improved user understanding and engagement; however, it is unclear how the choice of stereoscopic display impacts user interactions within an IA environment. This paper presents a pilot study that examines the impact of stereoscopic display type on object manipulation and environmental navigation using consumer-available AR and VR displays. This work finds that the display type can impact how users manipulate virtual content, how they navigate the environment, and how able they are to answer questions about the represented data.
abstract_zh: 沉浸式分析 (IA) 以及消费者对增强现实 (AR) 和虚拟现实 (VR) 头戴式显示器 (HMD) 的采用都在快速增长。当结合使用时，立体 IA 环境可以提高用户的理解和参与度；然而，目前尚不清楚立体显示的选择如何影响 IA 环境中的用户交互。本文提出了一项试点研究，利用消费者可用的 AR 和 VR 显示器检验立体显示类型对对象操纵和环境导航的影响。这项工作发现，显示类型会影响用户操作虚拟内容的方式、他们在环境中导航的方式以及他们回答有关所表示数据的问题的能力。

AI.tldr: 探讨立体显示类型对沉浸式分析环境中用户交互的影响
AI.motivation: 随着AR/VR头显的普及，立体显示类型对用户交互的影响尚不明确，需进一步研究以优化沉浸式分析体验
AI.method: 通过消费级AR和VR头显进行实验，分析不同立体显示类型对用户操作和导航的影响
AI.result: 发现显示类型显著影响用户的虚拟内容操作、环境导航能力及数据理解准确性
AI.conclusion: 立体显示类型的选择对沉浸式分析环境中的用户交互表现有显著影响，需根据任务需求优化显示技术

authors_text: Júlia Pareto Boada,Begoña Román Maestre,Carme Torras
title: Ethics for social robotics: A critical analysis
title_zh: 社交机器人伦理：批判性分析
comment: in TRAITS Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2206.08270) held in conjunction with Companion of the 2022 ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction, March 2022, Pages 1284-1286
comments: in TRAITS Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2206.08270) held in conjunction with Companion of the 2022 ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction, March 2022, Pages 1284-1286
abstract: Social robotics development for the practice of care and European prospects to incorporate these AI-based systems in institutional healthcare contexts call for an urgent ethical reflection to (re)configurate our practical life according to human values and rights. Despite the growing attention to the ethical implications of social robotics, the current debate on one of its central branches, social assistive robotics (SAR), rests upon an impoverished ethical approach. This paper presents and examines some tendencies of this prevailing approach, which have been identified as a result of a critical literature review. Based on this analysis of a representative case of how ethical reflection is being led towards social robotics, some future research lines are outlined, which may help reframe and deepen in its ethical implications.
summary: Social robotics development for the practice of care and European prospects to incorporate these AI-based systems in institutional healthcare contexts call for an urgent ethical reflection to (re)configurate our practical life according to human values and rights. Despite the growing attention to the ethical implications of social robotics, the current debate on one of its central branches, social assistive robotics (SAR), rests upon an impoverished ethical approach. This paper presents and examines some tendencies of this prevailing approach, which have been identified as a result of a critical literature review. Based on this analysis of a representative case of how ethical reflection is being led towards social robotics, some future research lines are outlined, which may help reframe and deepen in its ethical implications.
abstract_zh: 用于护理实践的社交机器人技术的开发以及欧洲将这些基于人工智能的系统纳入机构医疗保健环境的前景要求紧急的伦理反思，以根据人类价值观和权利（重新）配置我们的实际生活。尽管人们越来越关注社交机器人技术的伦理影响，但目前对其核心分支之一社交辅助机器人（SAR）的争论却建立在一种贫乏的伦理方法之上。本文介绍并研究了这种流行方法的一些趋势，这些趋势是通过批判性文献综述确定的。基于对社交机器人如何进行伦理反思的代表性案例的分析，概述了一些未来的研究方向，这可能有助于重新构建和深化其伦理影响。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在批判性分析社会机器人伦理的现状，并提出未来研究方向，以应对机构医疗环境中社会辅助机器人（SAR）的伦理挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着社会机器人（尤其是SAR）在医疗护理中的应用增加，现有伦理框架不足，需重新配置伦理以符合人类价值观和权利。
AI.method: 通过批判性文献综述分析现有社会机器人伦理讨论的局限性，并结合机构医疗环境中的实际案例进行探讨。
AI.result: 识别出现有伦理讨论的局限性，如过度技术化忽视人文价值，并提出需加强跨学科合作和伦理框架动态调整的未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 当前社会机器人伦理研究需超越技术视角，整合人文和社会科学视角，以构建符合人类价值观的伦理框架，确保技术发展与伦理原则协调。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在批判性分析社会机器人伦理的现状，并提出未来研究方向，以应对机构医疗环境中社会辅助机器人（SAR）的伦理挑战。
ai_content.motivation: 随着社会机器人（尤其是SAR）在医疗护理中的应用增加，现有伦理框架不足，需重新配置伦理以符合人类价值观和权利。
ai_content.method: 通过批判性文献综述分析现有社会机器人伦理讨论的局限性，并结合机构医疗环境中的实际案例进行探讨。
ai_content.result: 识别出现有伦理讨论的局限性，如过度技术化忽视人文价值，并提出需加强跨学科合作和伦理框架动态调整的未来研究方向。
ai_content.conclusion: 当前社会机器人伦理研究需超越技术视角，整合人文和社会科学视角，以构建符合人类价值观的伦理框架，确保技术发展与伦理原则协调。

search_text: Ethics for social robotics: A critical analysis 社交机器人伦理：批判性分析 Social robotics development for the practice of care and European prospects to incorporate these AI-based systems in institutional healthcare contexts call for an urgent ethical reflection to (re)configurate our practical life according to human values and rights. Despite the growing attention to the ethical implications of social robotics, the current debate on one of its central branches, social assistive robotics (SAR), rests upon an impoverished ethical approach. This paper presents and examines some tendencies of this prevailing approach, which have been identified as a result of a critical literature review. Based on this analysis of a representative case of how ethical reflection is being led towards social robotics, some future research lines are outlined, which may help reframe and deepen in its ethical implications. 用于护理实践的社交机器人技术的开发以及欧洲将这些基于人工智能的系统纳入机构医疗保健环境的前景要求紧急的伦理反思，以根据人类价值观和权利（重新）配置我们的实际生活。尽管人们越来越关注社交机器人技术的伦理影响，但目前对其核心分支之一社交辅助机器人（SAR）的争论却建立在一种贫乏的伦理方法之上。本文介绍并研究了这种流行方法的一些趋势，这些趋势是通过批判性文献综述确定的。基于对社交机器人如何进行伦理反思的代表性案例的分析，概述了一些未来的研究方向，这可能有助于重新构建和深化其伦理影响。 本文旨在批判性分析社会机器人伦理的现状，并提出未来研究方向，以应对机构医疗环境中社会辅助机器人（SAR）的伦理挑战。 Júlia Pareto Boada,Begoña Román Maestre,Carme Torras cs.CY,cs.RO

authors_text: Anique Akhtar,Zhu Li,Geert Van der Auwera
title: Inter-Frame Compression for Dynamic Point Cloud Geometry Coding
title_zh: 用于动态点云几何编码的帧间压缩
abstract: Efficient point cloud compression is essential for applications like virtual and mixed reality, autonomous driving, and cultural heritage. This paper proposes a deep learning-based inter-frame encoding scheme for dynamic point cloud geometry compression. We propose a lossy geometry compression scheme that predicts the latent representation of the current frame using the previous frame by employing a novel feature space inter-prediction network. The proposed network utilizes sparse convolutions with hierarchical multiscale 3D feature learning to encode the current frame using the previous frame. The proposed method introduces a novel predictor network for motion compensation in the feature domain to map the latent representation of the previous frame to the coordinates of the current frame to predict the current frame's feature embedding. The framework transmits the residual of the predicted features and the actual features by compressing them using a learned probabilistic factorized entropy model. At the receiver, the decoder hierarchically reconstructs the current frame by progressively rescaling the feature embedding. The proposed framework is compared to the state-of-the-art Video-based Point Cloud Compression (V-PCC) and Geometry-based Point Cloud Compression (G-PCC) schemes standardized by the Moving Picture Experts Group (MPEG). The proposed method achieves more than 88% BD-Rate (Bjontegaard Delta Rate) reduction against G-PCCv20 Octree, more than 56% BD-Rate savings against G-PCCv20 Trisoup, more than 62% BD-Rate reduction against V-PCC intra-frame encoding mode, and more than 52% BD-Rate savings against V-PCC P-frame-based inter-frame encoding mode using HEVC. These significant performance gains are cross-checked and verified in the MPEG working group.

This paper proposes a deep learning-based inter-frame encoding scheme for dynamic point cloud geometry compression. We propose a lossy geometry compression scheme that predicts the latent representation of the current frame using the previous frame by employing a novel feature space inter-prediction network. The proposed network utilizes sparse convolutions with hierarchical multiscale 3D feature learning to encode the current frame using the previous frame. The proposed method introduces a novel predictor network for motion compensation in the feature domain to map the latent representation of the previous frame to the coordinates of the current frame to predict the current frame's feature embedding. The framework transmits the residual of the predicted features and the actual features by compressing them using a learned probabilistic factorized entropy model. At the receiver, the decoder hierarchically reconstructs the current frame by progressively rescaling the feature embedding. The proposed framework is compared to the state-of-the-art Video-based Point Cloud Compression (V-PCC) and Geometry-based Point Cloud Compression (G-PCC) schemes standardized by the Moving Picture Experts Group (MPEG). The proposed method achieves more than 88% BD-Rate (Bjontegaard Delta Rate) reduction against G-PCCv20 Octree, more than 56% BD-Rate savings against G-PCCv20 Trisoup, more than 62% BD-Rate reduction against V-PCC intra-frame encoding mode, and more than 52% BD-Rate savings against V-PCC P-frame-based inter-frame encoding mode using HEVC. These significant performance gains are cross-checked and verified in the MPEG working group.
abstract_zh: 高效的点云压缩对于虚拟和混合现实、自动驾驶和文化遗产等应用至关重要。本文提出了一种基于深度学习的动态点云几何压缩的帧间编码方案。我们提出了一种有损几何压缩方案，通过采用新颖的特征空间帧间预测网络，使用前一帧来预测当前帧的潜在表示。所提出的网络利用稀疏卷积和分层多尺度 3D 特征学习来使用前一帧对当前帧进行编码。该方法引入了一种新颖的预测器网络，用于特征域中的运动补偿，将前一帧的潜在表示映射到当前帧的坐标，以预测当前帧的特征嵌入。该框架通过使用学习的概率因子分解熵模型压缩预测特征和实际特征的残差来传输它们。在接收器处，解码器通过逐步重新调整特征嵌入来分层重建当前帧。将所提出的框架与运动图像专家组 (MPEG) 标准化的最先进的基于视频的点云压缩 (V-PCC) 和基于几何的点云压缩 (G-PCC) 方案进行比较。所提出的方法相对于 G-PCCv20 Octree 实现了超过 88% 的 BD-Rate（Bjontegaard Delta Rate）降低，相对于 G-PCCv20 Trisoup 实现了超过 56% 的 BD-Rate 节省，相对于 V-PCC 帧内编码模式实现了超过 62% 的 BD-Rate 降低，并且相对于 V-PCC 基于 P 帧的帧间编码模式实现了超过 52% 的 BD-Rate 节省HEVC。这些显着的性能提升在 MPEG 工作组中进行了交叉检查和验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的动态点云几何压缩方法，利用帧间预测技术提高压缩效率。
AI.motivation: 动态点云在虚拟现实、自动驾驶等领域的应用需要高效压缩技术，现有标准如V-PCC和G-PCC在压缩率和效率上仍有不足。
AI.method: 设计了一种特征空间帧间预测网络，结合稀疏卷积与多尺度3D特征学习，通过运动补偿预测当前帧特征嵌入，并采用概率因子熵模型压缩残差信息。
AI.result: 相比G-PCCv20和V-PCC标准，该方法在BD-Rate指标上分别实现超过88%、56%、62%和52%的压缩率提升，经MPEG工作组验证。
AI.conclusion: 提出的深度学习帧间压缩框架显著优于现有标准，为动态点云几何编码提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Vishnu Rajendran S,Soran Parsa,Simon Parsons,Amir Ghalamzan Esfahani
title: Peduncle Gripping and Cutting Force for Strawberry Harvesting Robotic End-effector Design
title_zh: 草莓采摘机器人末端执行器设计的花梗抓取和切割力
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication(4th International Conference on Control and Robotics (ICCR 2022))
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication(4th International Conference on Control and Robotics (ICCR 2022))
abstract: Robotic harvesting of strawberries has gained much interest in the recent past. Although there are many innovations, they haven't yet reached a level that is comparable to an expert human picker. The end effector unit plays a major role in defining the efficiency of such a robotic harvesting system. Even though there are reports on various end effectors for strawberry harvesting, but there they lack a picture of certain parameters that the researchers can rely upon to develop new end effectors. These parameters include the limit of gripping force that can be applied on the peduncle for effective gripping, the force required to cut the strawberry peduncle, etc. These estimations would be helpful in the design cycle of the end effectors that target to grip and cut the strawberry peduncle during the harvesting action. This paper studies the estimation and analysis of these parameters experimentally. It has been estimated that the peduncle gripping force can be limited to 10 N. This enables an end effector to grip a strawberry of mass up to 50 grams with a manipulation acceleration of 50 m/s$^2$ without squeezing the peduncle. The study on peduncle cutting force reveals that a force of 15 N is sufficient to cut a strawberry peduncle using a blade with a wedge angle of 16.6 degrees at a 30-degree orientation.
summary: Robotic harvesting of strawberries has gained much interest in the recent past. Although there are many innovations, they haven't yet reached a level that is comparable to an expert human picker. The end effector unit plays a major role in defining the efficiency of such a robotic harvesting system. Even though there are reports on various end effectors for strawberry harvesting, but there they lack a picture of certain parameters that the researchers can rely upon to develop new end effectors. These parameters include the limit of gripping force that can be applied on the peduncle for effective gripping, the force required to cut the strawberry peduncle, etc. These estimations would be helpful in the design cycle of the end effectors that target to grip and cut the strawberry peduncle during the harvesting action. This paper studies the estimation and analysis of these parameters experimentally. It has been estimated that the peduncle gripping force can be limited to 10 N. This enables an end effector to grip a strawberry of mass up to 50 grams with a manipulation acceleration of 50 m/s$^2$ without squeezing the peduncle. The study on peduncle cutting force reveals that a force of 15 N is sufficient to cut a strawberry peduncle using a blade with a wedge angle of 16.6 degrees at a 30-degree orientation.
abstract_zh: 近年来，机器人采摘草莓引起了人们的广泛关注。虽然有很多创新，但还没有达到与人类专家采摘员相媲美的水平。末端执行器单元在定义此类机器人收割系统的效率方面发挥着重要作用。尽管有关于草莓收获的各种末端执行器的报道，但它们缺乏研究人员可以依赖的某些参数的图片来开发新的末端执行器。这些参数包括可施加在花梗上以进行有效夹持的夹持力的限制、切割草莓花梗所需的力等。这些估计将有助于在采摘动作期间以夹持和切割草莓花梗为目标的末端执行器的设计周期。本文通过实验研究了这些参数的估计和分析。据估计，花柄夹持力可限制在 10 N。这使得末端执行器能够以 50 m/s$^2$ 的操纵加速度夹持质量达 50 克的草莓，而不会挤压花梗。对花梗切割力的研究表明，使用楔角为 16.6 度的刀片在 30 度方向切割草莓花序梗时，15 N 的力就足够了。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过实验估算草莓采摘机器人末端执行器设计中所需的茎部夹持力和切割力参数。
AI.motivation: 现有草莓采摘机器人效率尚未达到人类专家水平，末端执行器缺乏关键设计参数，如茎部夹持力和切割力的具体数值，限制了新执行器的开发。
AI.method: 通过实验方法测定茎部夹持力上限及切割力，使用楔角16.6度的刀片在30度方向下测试切割力，并分析不同加速度下的夹持性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，茎部夹持力可限制在10N以内，可安全夹持50克草莓（加速度50m/s²）；切割力需15N即可切断茎部。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为末端执行器设计提供了关键参数，有助于开发更高效、仿生的草莓采摘机器人系统。

search_text: Peduncle Gripping and Cutting Force for Strawberry Harvesting Robotic End-effector Design 草莓采摘机器人末端执行器设计的花梗抓取和切割力 Robotic harvesting of strawberries has gained much interest in the recent past. Although there are many innovations, they haven't yet reached a level that is comparable to an expert human picker. The end effector unit plays a major role in defining the efficiency of such a robotic harvesting system. Even though there are reports on various end effectors for strawberry harvesting, but there they lack a picture of certain parameters that the researchers can rely upon to develop new end effectors. These parameters include the limit of gripping force that can be applied on the peduncle for effective gripping, the force required to cut the strawberry peduncle, etc. These estimations would be helpful in the design cycle of the end effectors that target to grip and cut the strawberry peduncle during the harvesting action. This paper studies the estimation and analysis of these parameters experimentally. It has been estimated that the peduncle gripping force can be limited to 10 N. This enables an end effector to grip a strawberry of mass up to 50 grams with a manipulation acceleration of 50 m/s$^2$ without squeezing the peduncle. The study on peduncle cutting force reveals that a force of 15 N is sufficient to cut a strawberry peduncle using a blade with a wedge angle of 16.6 degrees at a 30-degree orientation. 近年来，机器人采摘草莓引起了人们的广泛关注。虽然有很多创新，但还没有达到与人类专家采摘员相媲美的水平。末端执行器单元在定义此类机器人收割系统的效率方面发挥着重要作用。尽管有关于草莓收获的各种末端执行器的报道，但它们缺乏研究人员可以依赖的某些参数的图片来开发新的末端执行器。这些参数包括可施加在花梗上以进行有效夹持的夹持力的限制、切割草莓花梗所需的力等。这些估计将有助于在采摘动作期间以夹持和切割草莓花梗为目标的末端执行器的设计周期。本文通过实验研究了这些参数的估计和分析。据估计，花柄夹持力可限制在 10 N。这使得末端执行器能够以 50 m/s$^2$ 的操纵加速度夹持质量达 50 克的草莓，而不会挤压花梗。对花梗切割力的研究表明，使用楔角为 16.6 度的刀片在 30 度方向切割草莓花序梗时，15 N 的力就足够了。 本文旨在通过实验估算草莓采摘机器人末端执行器设计中所需的茎部夹持力和切割力参数。 Vishnu Rajendran S,Soran Parsa,Simon Parsons,Amir Ghalamzan Esfahani cs.RO

authors_text: Hongyu Wang,Nikolas Martelaro
title: End-User Puppeteering of Expressive Movements
title_zh: 最终用户操纵富有表现力的动作
abstract: The end-user programming of social robot behavior is usually limited by a predefined set of movements. We are proposing a puppeteering robotic interface that provides a more intuitive method of programming robot expressive movements. As the user manipulates the puppet of a robot, the actual robot replicates the movements, providing real-time visual feedback. Through this proposed interface, even with limited training, a novice user can design and program expressive movements efficiently. We present our preliminary user study results in this extended abstract.
summary: The end-user programming of social robot behavior is usually limited by a predefined set of movements. We are proposing a puppeteering robotic interface that provides a more intuitive method of programming robot expressive movements. As the user manipulates the puppet of a robot, the actual robot replicates the movements, providing real-time visual feedback. Through this proposed interface, even with limited training, a novice user can design and program expressive movements efficiently. We present our preliminary user study results in this extended abstract.
abstract_zh: 社交机器人行为的最终用户编程通常受到一组预定义动作的限制。我们提出了一种木偶操纵机器人界面，它提供了一种更直观的方法来对机器人表达动作进行编程。当用户操纵机器人的木偶时，实际的机器人会复制这些动作，提供实时视觉反馈。通过这个建议的界面，即使训练有限，新手用户也可以有效地设计和编程富有表现力的动作。我们在这份扩展摘要中展示了我们的初步用户研究结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过傀儡操控接口实现社交机器人表达动作编程的方法，使用户能直观地设计机器人动作。
AI.motivation: 现有社交机器人行为编程受限于预定义动作集，缺乏直观的用户交互方式，限制了非专业用户的使用。
AI.method: 开发基于傀儡操控的实时反馈接口，用户通过操控机器人傀儡生成动作，系统实时复制并反馈机器人动作。
AI.result: 初步用户研究显示，即使有限培训，新手用户也能高效设计和编程机器人表达动作。
AI.conclusion: 该接口有效提升了用户编程效率，未来可进一步优化交互方式或扩展至更多应用场景。

authors_text: Zhouping Wang,Sarah Ostadabbas
title: Live Stream Temporally Embedded 3D Human Body Pose and Shape Estimation
title_zh: 直播临时嵌入 3D 人体姿势和形状估计
abstract: 3D Human body pose and shape estimation within a temporal sequence can be quite critical for understanding human behavior. Despite the significant progress in human pose estimation in the recent years, which are often based on single images or videos, human motion estimation on live stream videos is still a rarely-touched area considering its special requirements for real-time output and temporal consistency. To address this problem, we present a temporally embedded 3D human body pose and shape estimation (TePose) method to improve the accuracy and temporal consistency of pose estimation in live stream videos. TePose uses previous predictions as a bridge to feedback the error for better estimation in the current frame and to learn the correspondence between data frames and predictions in the history. A multi-scale spatio-temporal graph convolutional network is presented as the motion discriminator for adversarial training using datasets without any 3D labeling. We propose a sequential data loading strategy to meet the special start-to-end data processing requirement of live stream. We demonstrate the importance of each proposed module with extensive experiments. The results show the effectiveness of TePose on widely-used human pose benchmarks with state-of-the-art performance.
summary: 3D Human body pose and shape estimation within a temporal sequence can be quite critical for understanding human behavior. Despite the significant progress in human pose estimation in the recent years, which are often based on single images or videos, human motion estimation on live stream videos is still a rarely-touched area considering its special requirements for real-time output and temporal consistency. To address this problem, we present a temporally embedded 3D human body pose and shape estimation (TePose) method to improve the accuracy and temporal consistency of pose estimation in live stream videos. TePose uses previous predictions as a bridge to feedback the error for better estimation in the current frame and to learn the correspondence between data frames and predictions in the history. A multi-scale spatio-temporal graph convolutional network is presented as the motion discriminator for adversarial training using datasets without any 3D labeling. We propose a sequential data loading strategy to meet the special start-to-end data processing requirement of live stream. We demonstrate the importance of each proposed module with extensive experiments. The results show the effectiveness of TePose on widely-used human pose benchmarks with state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 时间序列内的 3D 人体姿势和形状估计对于理解人类行为非常重要。尽管近年来人体姿态估计取得了重大进展，并且通常基于单个图像或视频，但考虑到其对实时输出和时间一致性的特殊要求，实时流视频上的人体运动估计仍然是一个很少涉及的领域。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种时间嵌入的 3D 人体姿势和形状估计 (TePose) 方法，以提高实时流视频中姿势估计的准确性和时间一致性。 TePose 使用之前的预测作为桥梁来反馈误差，以便更好地估计当前帧，并学习历史数据帧和预测之间的对应关系。提出了一种多尺度时空图卷积网络作为运动鉴别器，用于使用没有任何 3D 标签的数据集进行对抗训练。我们提出了一种顺序数据加载策略来满足直播流特殊的从头到尾的数据处理要求。我们通过大量的实验证明了每个提出的模块的重要性。结果表明 TePose 在广泛使用的人体姿势基准上具有最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于直播视频中实时嵌入时间信息的3D人体姿态与形状估计方法TePose。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多针对静态图像或常规视频，而直播视频需满足实时性与时间一致性要求，该领域研究尚不充分。
AI.method: 通过前序预测结果反馈误差优化当前帧估计，结合多尺度时空图卷积网络作为对抗训练的运动判别器，并设计顺序数据加载策略。
AI.result: 在主流人体姿态基准测试中达到最先进性能，验证了各模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: TePose有效提升了直播视频中3D人体姿态估计的准确性与时间一致性。

authors_text: James Avery,Mark Runciman,Cristina Fiani,Elena Monfort Sanchez,Saina Akhond,Zhuang Liu,Kirill Aristovich,George Mylonas
title: Lumen Shape Reconstruction using a Soft Robotic Balloon Catheter and Electrical Impedance Tomography
title_zh: 使用软机器人球囊导管和电阻抗断层扫描进行管腔形状重建
comment: Published version in IROS 2022 The IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems. Improved Figure 3, discussion and more concise methods section
comments: Published version in IROS 2022 The IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems. Improved Figure 3, discussion and more concise methods section
abstract: Incorrectly sized balloon catheters can lead to increased post-surgical complications, yet even with preoperative imaging, correct selection remains a challenge. With limited feedback during surgery, it is difficult to verify correct deployment. We propose the use of integrated impedance measurements and Electrical Impedance Tomography (EIT) imaging to assess the deformation of the balloon and determine the size and shape of the surrounding lumen. Previous work using single impedance measurements, or pressure data and analytical models, whilst demonstrating high sizing accuracy, have assumed a circular cross section. Here we extend these methods by adding a multitude of electrodes to detect elliptical and occluded lumen and obtain EIT images to localise deformations. Using a 14 Fr (5.3 mm) catheter as an example, numerical simulations were performed to find the optimal electrode configuration of two rings of 8 electrodes spaced 10 mm apart. The simulations predicted that the maximum detectable aspect ratio decreased from 0.9 for a 14mm balloon to 0.5 at 30mm. The sizing and ellipticity detection results were verified experimentally. A prototype robotic balloon catheter was constructed to automatically inflate a compliant balloon while simultaneously recording EIT and pressure data. Data were collected in experiments replicating stenotic vessels with an elliptical and asymmetrical profile, and the widening of a lumen during angioplasty. After calibration, the system was able to correctly localise the occlusion and detect aspect ratios of 0.75. EIT images further localised the occlusion and visualised the dilation of the lumen during balloon inflation.

The simulations predicted that the maximum detectable aspect ratio decreased from 0.9 for a 14mm balloon to 0.5 at 30mm. The sizing and ellipticity detection results were verified experimentally. A prototype robotic balloon catheter was constructed to automatically inflate a compliant balloon while simultaneously recording EIT and pressure data. After calibration, the system was able to correctly localise the occlusion and detect aspect ratios of 0.75. EIT images further localised the occlusion and visualised the dilation of the lumen during balloon inflation.
abstract_zh: 尺寸不正确的球囊导管可能会导致术后并发症增加，但即使有术前成像，正确的选择仍然是一个挑战。由于手术期间的反馈有限，很难验证部署是否正确。我们建议使用集成阻抗测量和电阻抗断层扫描 (EIT) 成像来评估球囊的变形并确定周围管腔的大小和形状。以前的工作使用单一阻抗测量或压力数据和分析模型，在展示高尺寸精度的同时，假设了圆形横截面。在这里，我们通过添加多个电极来扩展这些方法，以检测椭圆和闭塞管腔并获取 EIT 图像来定位变形。以 14 Fr (5.3 mm) 导管为例，进行数值模拟以找到两个间隔 10 mm 的 8 个电极环的最佳电极配置。模拟预测最大可检测纵横比从 14 毫米气球的 0.9 降至 30 毫米气球的 0.5。尺寸和椭圆度检测结果经过实验验证。原型机器人球囊导管被构建为自动给顺应性球囊充气，同时记录 EIT 和压力数据。在复制具有椭圆形和不对称轮廓的狭窄血管以及血管成形术期间管腔加宽的实验中收集数据。校准后，系统能够正确定位遮挡并检测到 0.75 的纵横比。 EIT 图像进一步定位闭塞并可视化球囊膨胀期间管腔的扩张。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合软体机器人球囊导管和电阻抗断层成像（EIT）技术，用于重建血管腔形状并检测狭窄或阻塞情况。
AI.motivation: 传统球囊导管尺寸选择依赖术前影像，但手术中缺乏实时反馈，难以准确评估扩张效果及腔体变形，导致术后并发症风险增加。
AI.method: 通过在导管上集成多电极环（两环共8个电极），结合EIT成像与压力数据，利用数值模拟优化电极配置，并构建原型系统进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验验证系统可定位阻塞区域，检测椭圆率0.75的腔体，EIT图像成功可视化球囊扩张过程中的腔体变化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多电极EIT技术突破了传统圆形假设，实现了对复杂腔体形状的实时监测，提升了血管介入手术的精准性。
