search_text: Lumen Shape Reconstruction using a Soft Robotic Balloon Catheter and Electrical Impedance Tomography 使用软机器人球囊导管和电阻抗断层扫描进行管腔形状重建 Incorrectly sized balloon catheters can lead to increased post-surgical complications, yet even with preoperative imaging, correct selection remains a challenge. With limited feedback during surgery, it is difficult to verify correct deployment. We propose the use of integrated impedance measurements and Electrical Impedance Tomography (EIT) imaging to assess the deformation of the balloon and determine the size and shape of the surrounding lumen. Previous work using single impedance measurements, or pressure data and analytical models, whilst demonstrating high sizing accuracy, have assumed a circular cross section. Here we extend these methods by adding a multitude of electrodes to detect elliptical and occluded lumen and obtain EIT images to localise deformations. Using a 14 Fr (5.3 mm) catheter as an example, numerical simulations were performed to find the optimal electrode configuration of two rings of 8 electrodes spaced 10 mm apart. The simulations predicted that the maximum detectable aspect ratio decreased from 0.9 for a 14mm balloon to 0.5 at 30mm. The sizing and ellipticity detection results were verified experimentally. A prototype robotic balloon catheter was constructed to automatically inflate a compliant balloon while simultaneously recording EIT and pressure data. Data were collected in experiments replicating stenotic vessels with an elliptical and asymmetrical profile, and the widening of a lumen during angioplasty. After calibration, the system was able to correctly localise the occlusion and detect aspect ratios of 0.75. EIT images further localised the occlusion and visualised the dilation of the lumen during balloon inflation. 尺寸不正确的球囊导管可能会导致术后并发症增加，但即使有术前成像，正确的选择仍然是一个挑战。由于手术期间的反馈有限，很难验证部署是否正确。我们建议使用集成阻抗测量和电阻抗断层扫描 (EIT) 成像来评估球囊的变形并确定周围管腔的大小和形状。以前的工作使用单一阻抗测量或压力数据和分析模型，在展示高尺寸精度的同时，假设了圆形横截面。在这里，我们通过添加多个电极来扩展这些方法，以检测椭圆和闭塞管腔并获取 EIT 图像来定位变形。以 14 Fr (5.3 mm) 导管为例，进行数值模拟以找到两个间隔 10 mm 的 8 个电极环的最佳电极配置。模拟预测最大可检测纵横比从 14 毫米气球的 0.9 降至 30 毫米气球的 0.5。尺寸和椭圆度检测结果经过实验验证。原型机器人球囊导管被构建为自动给顺应性球囊充气，同时记录 EIT 和压力数据。在复制具有椭圆形和不对称轮廓的狭窄血管以及血管成形术期间管腔加宽的实验中收集数据。校准后，系统能够正确定位遮挡并检测到 0.75 的纵横比。 EIT 图像进一步定位闭塞并可视化球囊膨胀期间管腔的扩张。 本文提出结合软体机器人球囊导管和电阻抗断层成像（EIT）技术，用于重建血管腔形状并检测狭窄或阻塞情况。 James Avery,Mark Runciman,Cristina Fiani,Elena Monfort Sanchez,Saina Akhond,Zhuang Liu,Kirill Aristovich,George Mylonas cs.RO

authors_text: Xinlei He,Hongbin Liu,Neil Zhenqiang Gong,Yang Zhang
title: Semi-Leak: Membership Inference Attacks Against Semi-supervised Learning
title_zh: 半泄漏：针对半监督学习的成员推理攻击
abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) leverages both labeled and unlabeled data to train machine learning (ML) models. State-of-the-art SSL methods can achieve comparable performance to supervised learning by leveraging much fewer labeled data. However, most existing works focus on improving the performance of SSL. In this work, we take a different angle by studying the training data privacy of SSL. Specifically, we propose the first data augmentation-based membership inference attacks against ML models trained by SSL. Given a data sample and the black-box access to a model, the goal of membership inference attack is to determine whether the data sample belongs to the training dataset of the model. Our evaluation shows that the proposed attack can consistently outperform existing membership inference attacks and achieves the best performance against the model trained by SSL. Moreover, we uncover that the reason for membership leakage in SSL is different from the commonly believed one in supervised learning, i.e., overfitting (the gap between training and testing accuracy). We observe that the SSL model is well generalized to the testing data (with almost 0 overfitting) but ''memorizes'' the training data by giving a more confident prediction regardless of its correctness. We also explore early stopping as a countermeasure to prevent membership inference attacks against SSL. The results show that early stopping can mitigate the membership inference attack, but with the cost of model's utility degradation.
summary: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) leverages both labeled and unlabeled data to train machine learning (ML) models. State-of-the-art SSL methods can achieve comparable performance to supervised learning by leveraging much fewer labeled data. However, most existing works focus on improving the performance of SSL. In this work, we take a different angle by studying the training data privacy of SSL. Specifically, we propose the first data augmentation-based membership inference attacks against ML models trained by SSL. Given a data sample and the black-box access to a model, the goal of membership inference attack is to determine whether the data sample belongs to the training dataset of the model. Our evaluation shows that the proposed attack can consistently outperform existing membership inference attacks and achieves the best performance against the model trained by SSL. Moreover, we uncover that the reason for membership leakage in SSL is different from the commonly believed one in supervised learning, i.e., overfitting (the gap between training and testing accuracy). We observe that the SSL model is well generalized to the testing data (with almost 0 overfitting) but ''memorizes'' the training data by giving a more confident prediction regardless of its correctness. We also explore early stopping as a countermeasure to prevent membership inference attacks against SSL. The results show that early stopping can mitigate the membership inference attack, but with the cost of model's utility degradation.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习 (SSL) 利用标记和未标记数据来训练机器学习 (ML) 模型。最先进的 SSL 方法可以通过利用更少的标记数据来实现与监督学习相当的性能。然而，大多数现有的工作都集中在提高 SSL 的性能上。在这项工作中，我们从不同的角度研究了 SSL 的训练数据隐私。具体来说，我们提出了第一个针对 SSL 训练的 ML 模型的基于数据增强的成员推理攻击。给定数据样本和对模型的黑盒访问，成员推理攻击的目标是确定数据样本是否属于模型的训练数据集。我们的评估表明，所提出的攻击能够始终优于现有的成员推理攻击，并针对 SSL 训练的模型实现最佳性能。此外，我们发现 SSL 中成员泄漏的原因与监督学习中通常认为的原因不同，即过度拟合（训练和测试准确性之间的差距）。我们观察到 SSL 模型很好地推广到了测试数据（几乎 0 过拟合），但通过给出更自信的预测来“记住”训练数据，而不管其正确性如何。我们还探索提前停止作为防止针对 SSL 的成员推理攻击的对策。结果表明，提前停止可以减轻成员推理攻击，但代价是模型效用下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数据增强的成员推理攻击方法，针对半监督学习（SSL）模型的训练数据隐私问题进行研究。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督学习研究主要关注性能优化，而忽视了训练数据隐私风险。作者发现SSL模型在测试数据上泛化良好但可能存在训练数据泄露，需针对性研究其隐私漏洞。
AI.method: 设计数据增强驱动的成员推理攻击框架，通过黑盒访问模型判断样本是否属于训练集，并分析SSL模型泄露原因及早停策略的防御效果。
AI.result: 所提攻击方法在SSL模型上表现优于现有攻击，发现SSL泄露源于模型对训练数据的置信预测而非过拟合，早停策略可缓解攻击但会降低模型效用。
AI.conclusion: 半监督学习的隐私风险机制与监督学习不同，需针对性防御措施，早停虽有效但存在性能折损，未来需探索更优隐私保护方案。

authors_text: Huan Wang,Yun Fu
title: Trainability Preserving Neural Pruning
title_zh: 可训练性保持神经剪枝
comment: ICLR'23 Camera Ready. 21 Pages. Code: https://github.com/MingSun-Tse/TPP
comments: ICLR'23 Camera Ready. 21 Pages. Code: https://github.com/MingSun-Tse/TPP
abstract: Many recent works have shown trainability plays a central role in neural network pruning -- unattended broken trainability can lead to severe under-performance and unintentionally amplify the effect of retraining learning rate, resulting in biased (or even misinterpreted) benchmark results. This paper introduces trainability preserving pruning (TPP), a scalable method to preserve network trainability against pruning, aiming for improved pruning performance and being more robust to retraining hyper-parameters (e.g., learning rate). Specifically, we propose to penalize the gram matrix of convolutional filters to decorrelate the pruned filters from the retained filters. In addition to the convolutional layers, per the spirit of preserving the trainability of the whole network, we also propose to regularize the batch normalization parameters (scale and bias). Empirical studies on linear MLP networks show that TPP can perform on par with the oracle trainability recovery scheme. On nonlinear ConvNets (ResNet56/VGG19) on CIFAR10/100, TPP outperforms the other counterpart approaches by an obvious margin. Moreover, results on ImageNet-1K with ResNets suggest that TPP consistently performs more favorably against other top-performing structured pruning approaches. Code: https://github.com/MingSun-Tse/TPP.
summary: Many recent works have shown trainability plays a central role in neural network pruning -- unattended broken trainability can lead to severe under-performance and unintentionally amplify the effect of retraining learning rate, resulting in biased (or even misinterpreted) benchmark results. This paper introduces trainability preserving pruning (TPP), a scalable method to preserve network trainability against pruning, aiming for improved pruning performance and being more robust to retraining hyper-parameters (e.g., learning rate). Specifically, we propose to penalize the gram matrix of convolutional filters to decorrelate the pruned filters from the retained filters. In addition to the convolutional layers, per the spirit of preserving the trainability of the whole network, we also propose to regularize the batch normalization parameters (scale and bias). Empirical studies on linear MLP networks show that TPP can perform on par with the oracle trainability recovery scheme. On nonlinear ConvNets (ResNet56/VGG19) on CIFAR10/100, TPP outperforms the other counterpart approaches by an obvious margin. Moreover, results on ImageNet-1K with ResNets suggest that TPP consistently performs more favorably against other top-performing structured pruning approaches. Code: https://github.com/MingSun-Tse/TPP.
abstract_zh: 最近的许多工作表明，可训练性在神经网络修剪中起着核心作用——无人看管的可训练性破坏可能会导致严重的性能不佳，并无意中放大再训练学习率的效果，从而导致有偏差（甚至误解）的基准结果。本文介绍了可训练性保留剪枝（TPP），这是一种保留网络可训练性以防止剪枝的可扩展方法，旨在提高剪枝性能并使重新训练超参数（例如学习率）更加稳健。具体来说，我们建议对卷积滤波器的克矩阵进行惩罚，以将剪枝滤波器与保留滤波器去相关。除了卷积层之外，本着保持整个网络可训练性的精神，我们还建议对批量归一化参数（尺度和偏差）进行正则化。对线性 MLP 网络的实证研究表明，TPP 的性能与预言机可训练性恢复方案相当。在 CIFAR10/100 上的非线性 ConvNets (ResNet56/VGG19) 上，TPP 明显优于其他对应方法。此外，使用 ResNets 在 ImageNet-1K 上的结果表明，TPP 始终比其他性能最佳的结构化修剪方法表现得更好。代码：https://github.com/MingSun-Tse/TPP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TPP的可扩展神经网络剪枝方法，旨在通过保持网络可训练性来提升剪枝效果并增强对重训练超参数的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法因忽视可训练性保护，导致性能下降且重训练时学习率等超参数影响显著，可能引发偏差或错误的基准结果。
AI.method: 通过惩罚卷积滤波器的格拉姆矩阵以解耦剪枝滤波器与保留滤波器，并对批量归一化参数（缩放和偏移）进行正则化。
AI.result: 在MLP、ResNet56/VGG19（CIFAR10/100）及ImageNet-1K（ResNet）上的实验表明，TPP性能优于其他方法，尤其在非线性网络中优势显著。
AI.conclusion: TPP通过保护网络可训练性，在多种架构和数据集上实现了更优的剪枝效果，验证了其有效性与鲁棒性。

search_text: Trainability Preserving Neural Pruning 可训练性保持神经剪枝 Many recent works have shown trainability plays a central role in neural network pruning -- unattended broken trainability can lead to severe under-performance and unintentionally amplify the effect of retraining learning rate, resulting in biased (or even misinterpreted) benchmark results. This paper introduces trainability preserving pruning (TPP), a scalable method to preserve network trainability against pruning, aiming for improved pruning performance and being more robust to retraining hyper-parameters (e.g., learning rate). Specifically, we propose to penalize the gram matrix of convolutional filters to decorrelate the pruned filters from the retained filters. In addition to the convolutional layers, per the spirit of preserving the trainability of the whole network, we also propose to regularize the batch normalization parameters (scale and bias). Empirical studies on linear MLP networks show that TPP can perform on par with the oracle trainability recovery scheme. On nonlinear ConvNets (ResNet56/VGG19) on CIFAR10/100, TPP outperforms the other counterpart approaches by an obvious margin. Moreover, results on ImageNet-1K with ResNets suggest that TPP consistently performs more favorably against other top-performing structured pruning approaches. Code: https://github.com/MingSun-Tse/TPP. 最近的许多工作表明，可训练性在神经网络修剪中起着核心作用——无人看管的可训练性破坏可能会导致严重的性能不佳，并无意中放大再训练学习率的效果，从而导致有偏差（甚至误解）的基准结果。本文介绍了可训练性保留剪枝（TPP），这是一种保留网络可训练性以防止剪枝的可扩展方法，旨在提高剪枝性能并使重新训练超参数（例如学习率）更加稳健。具体来说，我们建议对卷积滤波器的克矩阵进行惩罚，以将剪枝滤波器与保留滤波器去相关。除了卷积层之外，本着保持整个网络可训练性的精神，我们还建议对批量归一化参数（尺度和偏差）进行正则化。对线性 MLP 网络的实证研究表明，TPP 的性能与预言机可训练性恢复方案相当。在 CIFAR10/100 上的非线性 ConvNets (ResNet56/VGG19) 上，TPP 明显优于其他对应方法。此外，使用 ResNets 在 ImageNet-1K 上的结果表明，TPP 始终比其他性能最佳的结构化修剪方法表现得更好。代码：https://github.com/MingSun-Tse/TPP。 本文提出了一种名为TPP的可扩展神经网络剪枝方法，旨在通过保持网络可训练性来提升剪枝效果并增强对重训练超参数的鲁棒性。 Huan Wang,Yun Fu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.NE

authors_text: Albert Swiecicki,Nianyi Li,Jonathan O'Donnell,Nicholas Said,Jichen Yang,Richard C. Mather,William A. Jiranek,Maciej A. Mazurowski
title: Deep learning-based algorithm for assessment of knee osteoarthritis severity in radiographs matches performance of radiologists
title_zh: 基于深度学习的算法用于评估射线照片中膝骨关节炎的严重程度，与放射科医生的表现相匹配
comment: ef:Computers in Biology and Medicine Computers in Biology and Medicine, Volume 133, June 2021, 104334
comments: ef:Computers in Biology and Medicine Computers in Biology and Medicine, Volume 133, June 2021, 104334
abstract: A fully-automated deep learning algorithm matched performance of radiologists in assessment of knee osteoarthritis severity in radiographs using the Kellgren-Lawrence grading system. To develop an automated deep learning-based algorithm that jointly uses Posterior-Anterior (PA) and Lateral (LAT) views of knee radiographs to assess knee osteoarthritis severity according to the Kellgren-Lawrence grading system. We used a dataset of 9739 exams from 2802 patients from Multicenter Osteoarthritis Study (MOST). The dataset was divided into a training set of 2040 patients, a validation set of 259 patients and a test set of 503 patients. A novel deep learning-based method was utilized for assessment of knee OA in two steps: (1) localization of knee joints in the images, (2) classification according to the KL grading system. Our method used both PA and LAT views as the input to the model. The scores generated by the algorithm were compared to the grades provided in the MOST dataset for the entire test set as well as grades provided by 5 radiologists at our institution for a subset of the test set. The model obtained a multi-class accuracy of 71.90% on the entire test set when compared to the ratings provided in the MOST dataset. The quadratic weighted Kappa coefficient for this set was 0.9066. The average quadratic weighted Kappa between all pairs of radiologists from our institution who took a part of study was 0.748. The average quadratic-weighted Kappa between the algorithm and the radiologists at our institution was 0.769. The proposed model performed demonstrated equivalency of KL classification to MSK radiologists, but clearly superior reproducibility. Our model also agreed with radiologists at our institution to the same extent as the radiologists with each other. The algorithm could be used to provide reproducible assessment of knee osteoarthritis severity.

abstract_zh: 全自动深度学习算法与放射科医生使用 Kellgren-Lawrence 分级系统评估 X 光片中膝骨关节炎严重程度的表现相匹配。开发一种基于深度学习的自动化算法，联合使用膝关节 X 光片的后前 (PA) 和侧向 (LAT) 视图，根据 Kellgren-Lawrence 分级系统评估膝骨关节炎的严重程度。我们使用了来自多中心骨关节炎研究 (MOST) 的 2802 名患者的 9739 次检查数据集。数据集分为 2040 名患者的训练集、259 名患者的验证集和 503 名患者的测试集。采用一种基于深度学习的新颖方法分两步评估膝关节骨关节炎：(1) 膝关节在图像中的定位，(2) 根据 KL 分级系统进行分类。我们的方法使用 PA 和 LAT 视图作为模型的输入。将算法生成的分数与 MOST 数据集中提供的整个测试集的评分以及我们机构的 5 名放射科医生提供的测试集子集的评分进行比较。与 MOST 数据集中提供的评级相比，该模型在整个测试集上获得了 71.90% 的多类准确率。该组的二次加权 Kappa 系数为 0.9066。我们机构参与部分研究的所有放射科医生对之间的平均二次加权 Kappa 为 0.748。该算法与我们机构的放射科医生之间的平均二次加权 Kappa 为 0.769。所提出的模型证明了 KL 分类与 MSK 放射科医生的等效性，但再现性明显优越。我们的模型也与我们机构的放射科医生的一致程度与放射科医生之间的一致程度相同。该算法可用于提供膝骨关节炎严重程度的可重复评估。

AI.tldr: 开发基于深度学习的算法，利用膝关节X光片的前后位和侧位视图，根据Kellgren-Lawrence分级系统评估膝关节骨关节炎严重程度，并验证其与放射科医生的性能对比。
AI.motivation: 人工评估膝关节骨关节炎存在主观性和可重复性差异，需开发自动化工具提高评估效率和一致性。
AI.method: 使用包含9739例X光片的数据集，分训练集、验证集和测试集。算法分两步：定位膝关节区域并分类KL分级，输入PA和LAT视图，通过多类准确率和quadratic weighted Kappa系数评估性能。
AI.result: 算法在测试集上达到71.90%多类准确率（Kappa=0.9066），与放射科医生的平均Kappa为0.769，优于放射科医生间的平均Kappa（0.748）。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在KL分级性能上与放射科医生相当，但具有更高可重复性，可作为膝关节骨关节炎严重程度评估的可靠工具。

authors_text: Yifu Tao,Marija Popović,Yiduo Wang,Sundara Tejaswi Digumarti,Nived Chebrolu,Maurice Fallon
title: 3D Lidar Reconstruction with Probabilistic Depth Completion for Robotic Navigation
title_zh: 用于机器人导航的具有概率深度完成的 3D 激光雷达重建
abstract: Safe motion planning in robotics requires planning into space which has been verified to be free of obstacles. However, obtaining such environment representations using lidars is challenging by virtue of the sparsity of their depth measurements. We present a learning-aided 3D lidar reconstruction framework that upsamples sparse lidar depth measurements with the aid of overlapping camera images so as to generate denser reconstructions with more definitively free space than can be achieved with the raw lidar measurements alone. We use a neural network with an encoder-decoder structure to predict dense depth images along with depth uncertainty estimates which are fused using a volumetric mapping system. We conduct experiments on real-world outdoor datasets captured using a handheld sensing device and a legged robot. Using input data from a 16-beam lidar mapping a building network, our experiments showed that the amount of estimated free space was increased by more than 40% with our approach. We also show that our approach trained on a synthetic dataset generalises well to real-world outdoor scenes without additional fine-tuning. Finally, we demonstrate how motion planning tasks can benefit from these denser reconstructions.
summary: Safe motion planning in robotics requires planning into space which has been verified to be free of obstacles. However, obtaining such environment representations using lidars is challenging by virtue of the sparsity of their depth measurements. We present a learning-aided 3D lidar reconstruction framework that upsamples sparse lidar depth measurements with the aid of overlapping camera images so as to generate denser reconstructions with more definitively free space than can be achieved with the raw lidar measurements alone. We use a neural network with an encoder-decoder structure to predict dense depth images along with depth uncertainty estimates which are fused using a volumetric mapping system. We conduct experiments on real-world outdoor datasets captured using a handheld sensing device and a legged robot. Using input data from a 16-beam lidar mapping a building network, our experiments showed that the amount of estimated free space was increased by more than 40% with our approach. We also show that our approach trained on a synthetic dataset generalises well to real-world outdoor scenes without additional fine-tuning. Finally, we demonstrate how motion planning tasks can benefit from these denser reconstructions.
abstract_zh: 机器人技术中的安全运动规划需要规划到已被验证没有障碍物的空间中。然而，由于深度测量的稀疏性，使用激光雷达获得此类环境表示具有挑战性。我们提出了一种学习辅助的 3D 激光雷达重建框架，该框架借助重叠的相机图像对稀疏的激光雷达深度测量进行上采样，从而生成比单独使用原始激光雷达测量更明确的自由空间的更密集的重建。我们使用具有编码器-解码器结构的神经网络来预测密集的深度图像以及使用体积映射系统融合的深度不确定性估计。我们对使用手持传感设备和腿式机器人捕获的真实户外数据集进行实验。使用 16 束激光雷达绘制建筑网络的输入数据，我们的实验表明，通过我们的方法，估计的可用空间量增加了 40% 以上。我们还表明，我们在合成数据集上训练的方法可以很好地推广到现实世界的户外场景，而无需额外的微调。最后，我们演示了运动规划任务如何从这些更密集的重建中受益。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合概率深度补全的3D激光雷达重建框架，用于提升机器人导航中的环境表示精度
AI.motivation: 激光雷达点云存在深度测量稀疏性，导致生成的环境表示中自由空间区域不明确，影响机器人运动规划的安全性
AI.method: 设计编码器-解码器神经网络预测密集深度图像及不确定性估计，通过体素映射系统融合多源传感器数据实现概率深度补全
AI.result: 在真实室外数据集上使估计自由空间增加40%，合成数据训练模型可直接泛化至真实场景且无需额外微调
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升环境重建密度和不确定性估计精度，显著改善机器人运动规划任务的可靠性

authors_text: Sourav Chakraborty,Eldar Fischer,Arijit Ghosh,Gopinath Mishra,Sayantan Sen
title: Testing of Index-Invariant Properties in the Huge Object Model
title_zh: 大对象模型中索引不变属性的测试
comment: 66 pages, substantial changes from previous version, added new lower bound results (Theorem 1.4 and Theorem 1.7)
comments: 66 pages, substantial changes from previous version, added new lower bound results (Theorem 1.4 and Theorem 1.7)
abstract: The study of distribution testing has become ubiquitous in the area of property testing, both for its theoretical appeal, as well as for its applications in other fields of Computer Science. The original distribution testing model relies on samples drawn independently from the distribution to be tested. However, when testing distributions over the $n$-dimensional Hamming cube $\left\{0,1\right\}^{n}$ for a large $n$, even reading a few samples is infeasible. To address this, Goldreich and Ron [ITCS 2022] have defined a model called the huge object model, in which the samples may only be queried in a few places. In this work, we initiate a study of a general class of properties in the huge object model, those that are invariant under a permutation of the indices of the vectors in $\left\{0,1\right\}^{n}$, while still not being necessarily fully symmetric as per the definition used in traditional distribution testing. We prove that every index-invariant property satisfying a bounded VC-dimension restriction admits a property tester with a number of queries independent of n. To complement this result, we argue that satisfying only index-invariance or only a VC-dimension bound is insufficient to guarantee a tester whose query complexity is independent of n. Moreover, we prove that the dependency of sample and query complexities of our tester on the VC-dimension is tight. As a second part of this work, we address the question of the number of queries required for non-adaptive testing. We show that it can be at most quadratic in the number of queries required for an adaptive tester of index-invariant properties. This is in contrast with the tight exponential gap for general non-index-invariant properties. Finally, we provide an index-invariant property for which the quadratic gap between adaptive and non-adaptive query complexities for testing is almost tight.

In this work, we initiate a study of a general class of properties in the huge object model, those that are invariant under a permutation of the indices of the vectors in $\left\{0,1\right\}^{n}$, while still not being necessarily fully symmetric as per the definition used in traditional distribution testing. We prove that every index-invariant property satisfying a bounded VC-dimension restriction admits a property tester with a number of queries independent of n. To complement this result, we argue that satisfying only index-invariance or only a VC-dimension bound is insufficient to guarantee a tester whose query complexity is independent of n. Moreover, we prove that the dependency of sample and query complexities of our tester on the VC-dimension is tight. As a second part of this work, we address the question of the number of queries required for non-adaptive testing. We show that it can be at most quadratic in the number of queries required for an adaptive tester of index-invariant properties. abstract_zh: The study of distribution testing has become ubiquitous in the area of property testing, both for its theoretical appeal, as well as for its applications in other fields of Computer Science.原始的分布测试模型依赖于独立于要测试的分布抽取的样本。 However, when testing distributions over the $n$-dimensional Hamming cube $\left\{0,1\right\}^{n}$ for a large $n$, even reading a few samples is infeasible. To address this, Goldreich and Ron [ITCS 2022] have defined a model called the huge object model, in which the samples may only be queried in a few places. In this work, we initiate a study of a general class of properties in the huge object model, those that are invariant under a permutation of the indices of the vectors in $\left\{0,1\right\}^{n}$, while still not being necessarily fully symmetric as per the definition used in traditional distribution testing. We prove that every index-invariant property satisfying a bounded VC-dimension restriction admits a property tester with a number of queries independent of n. To complement this result, we argue that satisfying only index-invariance or only a VC-dimension bound is insufficient to guarantee a tester whose query complexity is independent of n.此外，我们证明了我们的测试器的样本和查询复杂性对 VC 维度的依赖性是紧密的。作为这项工作的第二部分，我们解决非自适应测试所需的查询数量问题。我们证明，索引不变属性的自适应测试器所需的查询数量至多是二次方。这与一般非索引不变属性的紧密指数差距形成对比。 Finally, we provide an index-invariant property for which the quadratic gap between adaptive and non-adaptive query complexities for testing is almost tight.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在巨大对象模型中对索引不变性质进行分布测试的方法，提出了基于VC维限制的测试器设计，并分析了自适应与非自适应测试的查询复杂度差异。
AI.motivation: 传统分布测试在高维哈明立方体上因采样困难而失效，需引入巨大对象模型。索引不变性质在理论与实际应用中具有重要意义，但其测试复杂度尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过结合索引不变性与VC维限制，设计独立于n的查询次数测试器；利用组合分析证明复杂度下界，并构造实例验证非自适应测试的二次差距。
AI.result: 证明满足VC维限制的索引不变性质可实现n无关的测试，且复杂度对VC维依赖性最优；非自适应测试查询次数至多为自适应的二次方，且存在接近紧的二次差距实例。
AI.conclusion: 本文为巨大对象模型中的分布测试提供了理论框架，明确了索引不变性质测试的复杂度边界，并揭示了自适应与非自适应测试的本质差异。

This is in contrast with the tight exponential gap for general non-index-invariant properties. The study of distribution testing has become ubiquitous in the area of property testing, both for its theoretical appeal, as well as for its applications in other fields of Computer Science.原始的分布测试模型依赖于独立于要测试的分布抽取的样本。 However, when testing distributions over the $n$-dimensional Hamming cube $\left\{0,1\right\}^{n}$ for a large $n$, even reading a few samples is infeasible. To address this, Goldreich and Ron [ITCS 2022] have defined a model called the huge object model, in which the samples may only be queried in a few places. In this work, we initiate a study of a general class of properties in the huge object model, those that are invariant under a permutation of the indices of the vectors in $\left\{0,1\right\}^{n}$, while still not being necessarily fully symmetric as per the definition used in traditional distribution testing. We prove that every index-invariant property satisfying a bounded VC-dimension restriction admits a property tester with a number of queries independent of n. To complement this result, we argue that satisfying only index-invariance or only a VC-dimension bound is insufficient to guarantee a tester whose query complexity is independent of n.此外，我们证明了我们的测试器的样本和查询复杂性对 VC 维度的依赖性是紧密的。作为这项工作的第二部分，我们解决非自适应测试所需的查询数量问题。我们证明，索引不变属性的自适应测试器所需的查询数量至多是二次方。这与一般非索引不变属性的紧密指数差距形成对比。 Finally, we provide an index-invariant property for which the quadratic gap between adaptive and non-adaptive query complexities for testing is almost tight. 本文研究了在巨大对象模型中对索引不变性质进行分布测试的方法，提出了基于VC维限制的测试器设计，并分析了自适应与非自适应测试的查询复杂度差异。 Sourav Chakraborty,Eldar Fischer,Arijit Ghosh,Gopinath Mishra,Sayantan Sen cs.DS,math.ST

authors_text: Riccardo Poiani,Ciprian Stirbu,Alberto Maria Metelli,Marcello Restelli
title: Optimizing Empty Container Repositioning and Fleet Deployment via Configurable Semi-POMDPs
title_zh: 通过可配置的 Semi-POMDP 优化空集装箱重新定位和车队部署
abstract: With the continuous growth of the global economy and markets, resource imbalance has risen to be one of the central issues in real logistic scenarios. In marine transportation, this trade imbalance leads to Empty Container Repositioning (ECR) problems. Once the freight has been delivered from an exporting country to an importing one, the laden will turn into empty containers that need to be repositioned to satisfy new goods requests in exporting countries. In such problems, the performance that any cooperative repositioning policy can achieve strictly depends on the routes that vessels will follow (i.e., fleet deployment). Historically, Operation Research (OR) approaches were proposed to jointly optimize the repositioning policy along with the fleet of vessels. However, the stochasticity of future supply and demand of containers, together with black-box and non-linear constraints that are present within the environment, make these approaches unsuitable for these scenarios. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework, Configurable Semi-POMDPs, to model this type of problems. Furthermore, we provide a two-stage learning algorithm, "Configure & Conquer" (CC), that first configures the environment by finding an approximation of the optimal fleet deployment strategy, and then "conquers" it by learning an ECR policy in this tuned environmental setting. We validate our approach in large and real-world instances of the problem. Our experiments highlight that CC avoids the pitfalls of OR methods and that it is successful at optimizing both the ECR policy and the fleet of vessels, leading to superior performance in world trade environments.
summary: With the continuous growth of the global economy and markets, resource imbalance has risen to be one of the central issues in real logistic scenarios. In marine transportation, this trade imbalance leads to Empty Container Repositioning (ECR) problems. Once the freight has been delivered from an exporting country to an importing one, the laden will turn into empty containers that need to be repositioned to satisfy new goods requests in exporting countries. In such problems, the performance that any cooperative repositioning policy can achieve strictly depends on the routes that vessels will follow (i.e., fleet deployment). Historically, Operation Research (OR) approaches were proposed to jointly optimize the repositioning policy along with the fleet of vessels. However, the stochasticity of future supply and demand of containers, together with black-box and non-linear constraints that are present within the environment, make these approaches unsuitable for these scenarios. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework, Configurable Semi-POMDPs, to model this type of problems. Furthermore, we provide a two-stage learning algorithm, "Configure & Conquer" (CC), that first configures the environment by finding an approximation of the optimal fleet deployment strategy, and then "conquers" it by learning an ECR policy in this tuned environmental setting. We validate our approach in large and real-world instances of the problem. Our experiments highlight that CC avoids the pitfalls of OR methods and that it is successful at optimizing both the ECR policy and the fleet of vessels, leading to superior performance in world trade environments.
abstract_zh: 随着全球经济和市场的不断增长，资源失衡已成为现实物流场景中的核心问题之一。在海运中，这种贸易不平衡会导致空集装箱重新定位（ECR）问题。一旦货物从出口国运送到进口国，满载的货物将变成空集装箱，需要重新定位以满足出口国的新货物需求。在此类问题中，任何合作重新定位策略所能实现的性能严格取决于船只将遵循的路线（即舰队部署）。从历史上看，运筹学（OR）方法被提出来与船队一起共同优化重新定位政策。然而，未来容器供应和需求的随机性，加上环境中存在的黑盒和非线性约束，使得这些方法不适合这些场景。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的框架，可配置的 Semi-POMDP，来对此类问题进行建模。此外，我们提供了一个两阶段学习算法“配置与征服”（CC），它首先通过找到最佳车队部署策略的近似值来配置环境，然后通过在此调整的环境设置中学习 ECR 策略来“征服”它。我们在大型现实世界的问题实例中验证了我们的方法。我们的实验强调，CC 避免了 OR 方法的陷阱，并且成功地优化了 ECR 政策和船队，从而在世界贸易环境中实现卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可配置半部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（Configurable Semi-POMDP）的框架，用于优化空集装箱调运（ECR）与船队部署问题。
AI.motivation: 传统运筹学方法难以处理集装箱供需的随机性及复杂约束，导致ECR与船队部署优化效果不佳，需开发更适应实际场景的智能决策框架。
AI.method: 设计Configurable Semi-POMDP模型，结合两阶段学习算法'Configure & Conquer'（CC），先通过近似最优船队部署策略配置环境，再在此基础上学习ECR策略。
AI.result: 实验表明CC算法在大规模真实场景中优于传统方法，能同时优化ECR策略与船队部署，提升全球贸易环境下的运营效率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了ECR与船队部署的联合优化问题，为应对物流资源失衡提供了新的智能决策工具。

authors_text: Nairen Cao,Jeremy T. Fineman,Shi Li,Julián Mestre,Katina Russell,Seeun William Umboh
title: Nested Active-Time Scheduling
title_zh: 嵌套活动时间调度
abstract: The active-time scheduling problem considers the problem of scheduling preemptible jobs with windows (release times and deadlines) on a parallel machine that can schedule up to $g$ jobs during each timestep. The goal in the active-time problem is to minimize the number of active steps, i.e., timesteps in which at least one job is scheduled. In this way, the active time models parallel scheduling when there is a fixed cost for turning the machine on at each discrete step. This paper presents a 9/5-approximation algorithm for a special case of the active-time scheduling problem in which job windows are laminar (nested). This result improves on the previous best 2-approximation for the general case.
summary: The active-time scheduling problem considers the problem of scheduling preemptible jobs with windows (release times and deadlines) on a parallel machine that can schedule up to $g$ jobs during each timestep. The goal in the active-time problem is to minimize the number of active steps, i.e., timesteps in which at least one job is scheduled. In this way, the active time models parallel scheduling when there is a fixed cost for turning the machine on at each discrete step. This paper presents a 9/5-approximation algorithm for a special case of the active-time scheduling problem in which job windows are laminar (nested). This result improves on the previous best 2-approximation for the general case.
abstract_zh: 活动时间调度问题考虑在并行机器上使用窗口（发布时间和截止日期）调度可抢占作业的问题，该并行机器可以在每个时间步期间调度最多 $g$ 作业。活动时间问题的目标是最小化活动步骤的数量，即至少安排一项作业的时间步骤。通过这种方式，当每个离散步骤打开机器的成本固定时，活动时间就会对并行调度进行建模。本文针对作业窗口是层状（嵌套）的活动时间调度问题的特殊情况提出了一种 9/5 近似算法。该结果比之前针对一般情况的最佳 2 近似得到了改进。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了嵌套窗口下的主动时间调度问题，提出了一种改进的近似算法以减少并行机器的主动步骤数量。
AI.motivation: 在主动时间调度问题中，减少机器开启的主动步骤数可降低固定成本，而现有算法在处理嵌套窗口时性能不足，需更优解法。
AI.method: 针对嵌套窗口的特殊结构，设计了一种9/5近似算法，通过优化任务分配策略提升调度效率。
AI.result: 在嵌套窗口条件下，算法将主动步骤数的近似比从之前的2提升至9/5，优于一般情况下的结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法为嵌套窗口的主动时间调度提供了更优的近似解，推动了相关调度问题的理论进展。

authors_text: Bandhav Veluri,Collin Pernu,Ali Saffari,Joshua Smith,Michael Taylor,Shyamnath Gollakota
title: NeuriCam: Key-Frame Video Super-Resolution and Colorization for IoT Cameras
title_zh: NeuriCam：物联网相机的关键帧视频超分辨率和彩色化
abstract: We present NeuriCam, a novel deep learning-based system to achieve video capture from low-power dual-mode IoT camera systems. Our idea is to design a dual-mode camera system where the first mode is low-power (1.1 mW) but only outputs grey-scale, low resolution, and noisy video and the second mode consumes much higher power (100 mW) but outputs color and higher resolution images. To reduce total energy consumption, we heavily duty cycle the high power mode to output an image only once every second. The data for this camera system is then wirelessly sent to a nearby plugged-in gateway, where we run our real-time neural network decoder to reconstruct a higher-resolution color video. To achieve this, we introduce an attention feature filter mechanism that assigns different weights to different features, based on the correlation between the feature map and the contents of the input frame at each spatial location. We design a wireless hardware prototype using off-the-shelf cameras and address practical issues including packet loss and perspective mismatch. Our evaluations show that our dual-camera approach reduces energy consumption by 7x compared to existing systems. Further, our model achieves an average greyscale PSNR gain of 3.7 dB over prior single and dual-camera video super-resolution methods and 5.6 dB RGB gain over prior color propagation methods. Open-source code: https://github.com/vb000/NeuriCam.
summary: We present NeuriCam, a novel deep learning-based system to achieve video capture from low-power dual-mode IoT camera systems. Our idea is to design a dual-mode camera system where the first mode is low-power (1.1 mW) but only outputs grey-scale, low resolution, and noisy video and the second mode consumes much higher power (100 mW) but outputs color and higher resolution images. To reduce total energy consumption, we heavily duty cycle the high power mode to output an image only once every second. The data for this camera system is then wirelessly sent to a nearby plugged-in gateway, where we run our real-time neural network decoder to reconstruct a higher-resolution color video. To achieve this, we introduce an attention feature filter mechanism that assigns different weights to different features, based on the correlation between the feature map and the contents of the input frame at each spatial location. We design a wireless hardware prototype using off-the-shelf cameras and address practical issues including packet loss and perspective mismatch. Our evaluations show that our dual-camera approach reduces energy consumption by 7x compared to existing systems. Further, our model achieves an average greyscale PSNR gain of 3.7 dB over prior single and dual-camera video super-resolution methods and 5.6 dB RGB gain over prior color propagation methods. Open-source code: https://github.com/vb000/NeuriCam.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 NeuriCam，这是一种基于深度学习的新型系统，可实现低功耗双模物联网摄像头系统的视频捕获。我们的想法是设计一个双模式相机系统，其中第一个模式是低功耗（1.1 mW），但仅输出灰度、低分辨率和嘈杂的视频，第二个模式消耗更高的功率（100 mW），但输出彩色和更高分辨率的图像。为了减少总能耗，我们大量循环使用高功率模式，每秒仅输出一次图像。然后，该摄像头系统的数据被无线发送到附近的插入式网关，在那里我们运行实时神经网络解码器来重建更高分辨率的彩色视频。为了实现这一目标，我们引入了一种注意力特征过滤机制，该机制根据每个空间位置的特征图与输入帧内容之间的相关性，为不同的特征分配不同的权重。我们使用现成的相机设计无线硬件原型，并解决包括数据包丢失和视角不匹配在内的实际问题。我们的评估表明，与现有系统相比，我们的双摄像头方法可将能耗降低 7 倍。此外，我们的模型比之前的单摄像头和双摄像头视频超分辨率方法实现了 3.7 dB 的平均灰度 PSNR 增益，比之前的颜色传播方法实现了 5.6 dB RGB 增益。开源代码：https://github.com/vb000/NeuriCam。

AI.tldr: 提出NeuriCam系统，通过双模式物联网摄像头实现低功耗下的视频超分辨率和着色。
AI.motivation: 现有物联网摄像头难以在低功耗与高质量视频输出间取得平衡，需设计节能且高效的视频处理方案。
AI.method: 设计双模式摄像头（低功耗灰度模式与高功耗彩色模式），结合注意力特征过滤机制及无线传输的实时神经网络解码器。
AI.result: 能耗降低7倍，灰度PSNR提升3.7dB，RGB色彩还原提升5.6dB，开源代码已发布。
AI.conclusion: 双模式架构有效平衡能耗与视频质量，验证了神经网络在物联网视频增强中的可行性。

search_text: NeuriCam: Key-Frame Video Super-Resolution and Colorization for IoT Cameras NeuriCam：物联网相机的关键帧视频超分辨率和彩色化 We present NeuriCam, a novel deep learning-based system to achieve video capture from low-power dual-mode IoT camera systems. Our idea is to design a dual-mode camera system where the first mode is low-power (1.1 mW) but only outputs grey-scale, low resolution, and noisy video and the second mode consumes much higher power (100 mW) but outputs color and higher resolution images. To reduce total energy consumption, we heavily duty cycle the high power mode to output an image only once every second. The data for this camera system is then wirelessly sent to a nearby plugged-in gateway, where we run our real-time neural network decoder to reconstruct a higher-resolution color video. To achieve this, we introduce an attention feature filter mechanism that assigns different weights to different features, based on the correlation between the feature map and the contents of the input frame at each spatial location. We design a wireless hardware prototype using off-the-shelf cameras and address practical issues including packet loss and perspective mismatch. Our evaluations show that our dual-camera approach reduces energy consumption by 7x compared to existing systems. Further, our model achieves an average greyscale PSNR gain of 3.7 dB over prior single and dual-camera video super-resolution methods and 5.6 dB RGB gain over prior color propagation methods. Open-source code: https://github.com/vb000/NeuriCam. 我们推出 NeuriCam，这是一种基于深度学习的新型系统，可实现低功耗双模物联网摄像头系统的视频捕获。我们的想法是设计一个双模式相机系统，其中第一个模式是低功耗（1.1 mW），但仅输出灰度、低分辨率和嘈杂的视频，第二个模式消耗更高的功率（100 mW），但输出彩色和更高分辨率的图像。为了减少总能耗，我们大量循环使用高功率模式，每秒仅输出一次图像。然后，该摄像头系统的数据被无线发送到附近的插入式网关，在那里我们运行实时神经网络解码器来重建更高分辨率的彩色视频。为了实现这一目标，我们引入了一种注意力特征过滤机制，该机制根据每个空间位置的特征图与输入帧内容之间的相关性，为不同的特征分配不同的权重。我们使用现成的相机设计无线硬件原型，并解决包括数据包丢失和视角不匹配在内的实际问题。我们的评估表明，与现有系统相比，我们的双摄像头方法可将能耗降低 7 倍。此外，我们的模型比之前的单摄像头和双摄像头视频超分辨率方法实现了 3.7 dB 的平均灰度 PSNR 增益，比之前的颜色传播方法实现了 5.6 dB RGB 增益。开源代码：https://github.com/vb000/NeuriCam。 提出NeuriCam系统，通过双模式物联网摄像头实现低功耗下的视频超分辨率和着色。 Bandhav Veluri,Collin Pernu,Ali Saffari,Joshua Smith,Michael Taylor,Shyamnath Gollakota cs.CV

authors_text: Emery Pierson,Mohamed Daoudi,Sylvain Arguillere
title: 3D Shape Sequence of Human Comparison and Classification using Current and Varifolds
title_zh: 使用 Current 和 Varfolds 进行人体比较和分类的 3D 形状序列
comment: European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV), Tel Aviv October 23-27 2022
comments: European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV), Tel Aviv October 23-27 2022
abstract: In this paper we address the task of the comparison and the classification of 3D shape sequences of human. The non-linear dynamics of the human motion and the changing of the surface parametrization over the time make this task very challenging. To tackle this issue, we propose to embed the 3D shape sequences in an infinite dimensional space, the space of varifolds, endowed with an inner product that comes from a given positive definite kernel. More specifically, our approach involves two steps: 1) the surfaces are represented as varifolds, this representation induces metrics equivariant to rigid motions and invariant to parametrization; 2) the sequences of 3D shapes are represented by Gram matrices derived from their infinite dimensional Hankel matrices. The problem of comparison of two 3D sequences of human is formulated as a comparison of two Gram-Hankel matrices. Extensive experiments on CVSSP3D and Dyna datasets show that our method is competitive with state-of-the-art in 3D human sequence motion retrieval. Code for the experiments is available at https://github.com/CRISTAL-3DSAM/HumanComparisonVarifolds.
summary: In this paper we address the task of the comparison and the classification of 3D shape sequences of human. The non-linear dynamics of the human motion and the changing of the surface parametrization over the time make this task very challenging. To tackle this issue, we propose to embed the 3D shape sequences in an infinite dimensional space, the space of varifolds, endowed with an inner product that comes from a given positive definite kernel. More specifically, our approach involves two steps: 1) the surfaces are represented as varifolds, this representation induces metrics equivariant to rigid motions and invariant to parametrization; 2) the sequences of 3D shapes are represented by Gram matrices derived from their infinite dimensional Hankel matrices. The problem of comparison of two 3D sequences of human is formulated as a comparison of two Gram-Hankel matrices. Extensive experiments on CVSSP3D and Dyna datasets show that our method is competitive with state-of-the-art in 3D human sequence motion retrieval. Code for the experiments is available at https://github.com/CRISTAL-3DSAM/HumanComparisonVarifolds.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了人体 3D 形状序列的比较和分类任务。人体运动的非线性动力学和表面参数化随时间的变化使得这项任务非常具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们建议将 3D 形状序列嵌入到无限维空间（即多样性空间）中，并赋予来自给定正定核的内积。更具体地说，我们的方法涉及两个步骤：1）将表面表示为varifold，这种表示产生与刚性运动等变且对参数化不变的度量； 2) 3D 形状的序列由源自其无限维 Hankel 矩阵的 Gram 矩阵表示。人类两个 3D 序列的比较问题被表述为两个 Gram-Hankel 矩阵的比较。对 CVSSP3D 和 Dyna 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法与 3D 人体序列运动检索领域最先进的方法具有竞争力。实验代码可在 https://github.com/CRISTAL-3DSAM/HumanComparisonVarifolds 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在比较和分类人类的3D形状序列。
AI.motivation: 人类运动的非线性动态和随时间变化的表面参数化使得比较和分类任务极具挑战性。
AI.method: 将3D形状序列嵌入无限维空间（varifolds空间），并利用Gram矩阵和Hankel矩阵进行序列比较。
AI.result: 在CVSSP3D和Dyna数据集上的实验表明，该方法在3D人类序列运动检索方面具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过varifolds空间和Gram-Hankel矩阵有效解决了3D人类形状序列比较和分类的问题。

authors_text: Shuang Qiu,Xiaohan Wei,Jieping Ye,Zhaoran Wang,Zhuoran Yang
title: Provably Efficient Fictitious Play Policy Optimization for Zero-Sum Markov Games with Structured Transitions
title_zh: 具有结构化转移的零和马尔可夫博弈的可证明有效的虚拟游戏策略优化
abstract: While single-agent policy optimization in a fixed environment has attracted a lot of research attention recently in the reinforcement learning community, much less is known theoretically when there are multiple agents playing in a potentially competitive environment. We take steps forward by proposing and analyzing new fictitious play policy optimization algorithms for zero-sum Markov games with structured but unknown transitions. We consider two classes of transition structures: factored independent transition and single-controller transition. For both scenarios, we prove tight $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{K})$ regret bounds after $K$ episodes in a two-agent competitive game scenario. The regret of each agent is measured against a potentially adversarial opponent who can choose a single best policy in hindsight after observing the full policy sequence. Our algorithms feature a combination of Upper Confidence Bound (UCB)-type optimism and fictitious play under the scope of simultaneous policy optimization in a non-stationary environment. When both players adopt the proposed algorithms, their overall optimality gap is $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{K})$.
summary: While single-agent policy optimization in a fixed environment has attracted a lot of research attention recently in the reinforcement learning community, much less is known theoretically when there are multiple agents playing in a potentially competitive environment. We take steps forward by proposing and analyzing new fictitious play policy optimization algorithms for zero-sum Markov games with structured but unknown transitions. We consider two classes of transition structures: factored independent transition and single-controller transition. For both scenarios, we prove tight $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{K})$ regret bounds after $K$ episodes in a two-agent competitive game scenario. The regret of each agent is measured against a potentially adversarial opponent who can choose a single best policy in hindsight after observing the full policy sequence. Our algorithms feature a combination of Upper Confidence Bound (UCB)-type optimism and fictitious play under the scope of simultaneous policy optimization in a non-stationary environment. When both players adopt the proposed algorithms, their overall optimality gap is $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{K})$.
abstract_zh: While single-agent policy optimization in a fixed environment has attracted a lot of research attention recently in the reinforcement learning community, much less is known theoretically when there are multiple agents playing in a potentially competitive environment. We take steps forward by proposing and analyzing new fictitious play policy optimization algorithms for zero-sum Markov games with structured but unknown transitions.我们考虑两类转换结构：因子独立转换和单控制器转换。 For both scenarios, we prove tight $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{K})$ regret bounds after $K$ episodes in a two-agent competitive game scenario. The regret of each agent is measured against a potentially adversarial opponent who can choose a single best policy in hindsight after observing the full policy sequence. Our algorithms feature a combination of Upper Confidence Bound (UCB)-type optimism and fictitious play under the scope of simultaneous policy optimization in a non-stationary environment.当两个玩家都采用所提出的算法时，他们的整体最优性差距为 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{K})$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对具有结构化转移的零和马尔可夫博弈的拟态博弈策略优化算法，旨在解决多智能体竞争环境中的理论挑战。
AI.motivation: 尽管单智能体策略优化在固定环境中已有较多研究，但多智能体在竞争环境中的理论分析仍不完善，尤其是零和博弈场景下的高效策略优化方法缺乏理论保证。
AI.method: 结合Upper Confidence Bound（UCB）的乐观性与拟态博弈框架，设计适用于非平稳环境的同步策略优化算法，并针对两种结构化转移模型（因子独立转移与单控制器转移）进行分析。
AI.result: 在K轮博弈中，两种转移结构下均证明了每个智能体的遗憾界为~O(√K)，且双方采用该算法时整体最优差距为~O(√K)。
AI.conclusion: 该算法理论上保证了多智能体零和博弈中的高效策略优化，为非平稳竞争环境提供了新的解决方案，并验证了其在结构化转移场景下的有效性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种针对具有结构化转移的零和马尔可夫博弈的拟态博弈策略优化算法，旨在解决多智能体竞争环境中的理论挑战。
motivation: 尽管单智能体策略优化在固定环境中已有较多研究，但多智能体在竞争环境中的理论分析仍不完善，尤其是零和博弈场景下的高效策略优化方法缺乏理论保证。
method: 结合Upper Confidence Bound（UCB）的乐观性与拟态博弈框架，设计适用于非平稳环境的同步策略优化算法，并针对两种结构化转移模型（因子独立转移与单控制器转移）进行分析。
result: 在K轮博弈中，两种转移结构下均证明了每个智能体的遗憾界为~O(√K)，且双方采用该算法时整体最优差距为~O(√K)。
conclusion: 该算法理论上保证了多智能体零和博弈中的高效策略优化，为非平稳竞争环境提供了新的解决方案，并验证了其在结构化转移场景下的有效性。
search_text: Provably Efficient Fictitious Play Policy Optimization for Zero-Sum Markov Games with Structured Transitions 具有结构化转移的零和马尔可夫博弈的可证明有效的虚拟游戏策略优化 While single-agent policy optimization in a fixed environment has attracted a lot of research attention recently in the reinforcement learning community, much less is known theoretically when there are multiple agents playing in a potentially competitive environment. We take steps forward by proposing and analyzing new fictitious play policy optimization algorithms for zero-sum Markov games with structured but unknown transitions. We consider two classes of transition structures: factored independent transition and single-controller transition. For both scenarios, we prove tight $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{K})$ regret bounds after $K$ episodes in a two-agent competitive game scenario. The regret of each agent is measured against a potentially adversarial opponent who can choose a single best policy in hindsight after observing the full policy sequence. Our algorithms feature a combination of Upper Confidence Bound (UCB)-type optimism and fictitious play under the scope of simultaneous policy optimization in a non-stationary environment. When both players adopt the proposed algorithms, their overall optimality gap is $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{K})$. While single-agent policy optimization in a fixed environment has attracted a lot of research attention recently in the reinforcement learning community, much less is known theoretically when there are multiple agents playing in a potentially competitive environment. We take steps forward by proposing and analyzing new fictitious play policy optimization algorithms for zero-sum Markov games with structured but unknown transitions.我们考虑两类转换结构：因子独立转换和单控制器转换。 For both scenarios, we prove tight $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{K})$ regret bounds after $K$ episodes in a two-agent competitive game scenario. The regret of each agent is measured against a potentially adversarial opponent who can choose a single best policy in hindsight after observing the full policy sequence. Our algorithms feature a combination of Upper Confidence Bound (UCB)-type optimism and fictitious play under the scope of simultaneous policy optimization in a non-stationary environment.当两个玩家都采用所提出的算法时，他们的整体最优性差距为 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{K})$。 本文提出了一种针对具有结构化转移的零和马尔可夫博弈的拟态博弈策略优化算法，旨在解决多智能体竞争环境中的理论挑战。 Shuang Qiu,Xiaohan Wei,Jieping Ye,Zhaoran Wang,Zhuoran Yang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.GT

authors_text: Yuhao Zhang,Yasharth Bajpai,Priyanshu Gupta,Ameya Ketkar,Miltiadis Allamanis,Titus Barik,Sumit Gulwani,Arjun Radhakrishna,Mohammad Raza,Gustavo Soares,Ashish Tiwari
title: Overwatch: Learning Patterns in Code Edit Sequences
title_zh: 《守望先锋》：代码编辑序列中的学习模式
abstract: Integrated Development Environments (IDEs) provide tool support to automate many source code editing tasks. Traditionally, IDEs use only the spatial context, i.e., the location where the developer is editing, to generate candidate edit recommendations. However, spatial context alone is often not sufficient to confidently predict the developer's next edit, and thus IDEs generate many suggestions at a location. Therefore, IDEs generally do not actively offer suggestions and instead, the developer is usually required to click on a specific icon or menu and then select from a large list of potential suggestions. As a consequence, developers often miss the opportunity to use the tool support because they are not aware it exists or forget to use it. To better understand common patterns in developer behavior and produce better edit recommendations, we can additionally use the temporal context, i.e., the edits that a developer was recently performing. To enable edit recommendations based on temporal context, we present Overwatch, a novel technique for learning edit sequence patterns from traces of developers' edits performed in an IDE. Our experiments show that Overwatch has 78% precision and that Overwatch not only completed edits when developers missed the opportunity to use the IDE tool support but also predicted new edits that have no tool support in the IDE.
summary: Integrated Development Environments (IDEs) provide tool support to automate many source code editing tasks. Traditionally, IDEs use only the spatial context, i.e., the location where the developer is editing, to generate candidate edit recommendations. However, spatial context alone is often not sufficient to confidently predict the developer's next edit, and thus IDEs generate many suggestions at a location. Therefore, IDEs generally do not actively offer suggestions and instead, the developer is usually required to click on a specific icon or menu and then select from a large list of potential suggestions. As a consequence, developers often miss the opportunity to use the tool support because they are not aware it exists or forget to use it. To better understand common patterns in developer behavior and produce better edit recommendations, we can additionally use the temporal context, i.e., the edits that a developer was recently performing. To enable edit recommendations based on temporal context, we present Overwatch, a novel technique for learning edit sequence patterns from traces of developers' edits performed in an IDE. Our experiments show that Overwatch has 78% precision and that Overwatch not only completed edits when developers missed the opportunity to use the IDE tool support but also predicted new edits that have no tool support in the IDE.
abstract_zh: 集成开发环境 (IDE) 提供工具支持来自动执行许多源代码编辑任务。传统上，IDE 仅使用空间上下文（即开发人员正在编辑的位置）来生成候选编辑建议。然而，仅靠空间上下文通常不足以自信地预测开发人员的下一次编辑，因此 IDE 在某个位置生成许多建议。因此，IDE通常不会主动提供建议，而是通常要求开发人员单击特定的图标或菜单，然后从大量潜在建议中进行选择。因此，开发人员经常错过使用工具支持的机会，因为他们不知道它的存在或忘记使用它。为了更好地理解开发人员行为的常见模式并产生更好的编辑建议，我们还可以使用时间上下文，即开发人员最近执行的编辑。为了实现基于时间上下文的编辑建议，我们提出了《守望先锋》，这是一种新技术，用于从开发人员在 IDE 中执行的编辑痕迹中学习编辑序列模式。我们的实验表明，《守望先锋》的精确度为 78%，《守望先锋》不仅在开发人员错过使用 IDE 工具支持的机会时完成了编辑，而且还预测了 IDE 中没有工具支持的新编辑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Overwatch方法，通过学习代码编辑序列中的时间上下文模式，改进IDE的编辑建议生成机制。
AI.motivation: 传统IDE仅依赖空间上下文生成编辑建议，导致推荐冗余且开发者常忽略工具支持，需结合时间上下文提升推荐准确性。
AI.method: 设计Overwatch技术，从开发者IDE操作轨迹中学习编辑序列模式，利用时间上下文预测后续编辑操作。
AI.result: 实验显示Overwatch达到78%精确率，可补全开发者遗漏的编辑并预测无工具支持的新编辑。
AI.conclusion: 时间上下文分析显著提升编辑推荐质量，Overwatch有助于开发者更高效利用IDE工具，未来可优化模型适应更多场景。

authors_text: Daniel Braun,Kerstin Ebell,Vera Schemann,Laura Pelchmann,Susanne Crewell,Rita Borgo,Tatiana von Landesberger
title: Color Coding of Large Value Ranges Applied to Meteorological Data
title_zh: 应用于气象数据的大值范围的颜色编码
comment: Preprint and Author Version of a Short Paper, accepted to the 2022 IEEE Visualization Conference (VIS)
comments: Preprint and Author Version of a Short Paper, accepted to the 2022 IEEE Visualization Conference (VIS)
abstract: This paper presents a novel color scheme designed to address the challenge of visualizing data series with large value ranges, where scale transformation provides limited support. We focus on meteorological data, where the presence of large value ranges is common. We apply our approach to meteorological scatterplots, as one of the most common plots used in this domain area. Our approach leverages the numerical representation of mantissa and exponent of the values to guide the design of novel "nested" color schemes, able to emphasize differences between magnitudes. Our user study evaluates the new designs, the state of the art color scales and representative color schemes used in the analysis of meteorological data: ColorCrafter, Viridis, and Rainbow. We assess accuracy, time and confidence in the context of discrimination (comparison) and interpretation (reading) tasks. Our proposed color scheme significantly outperforms the others in interpretation tasks, while showing comparable performances in discrimination tasks.
summary: This paper presents a novel color scheme designed to address the challenge of visualizing data series with large value ranges, where scale transformation provides limited support. We focus on meteorological data, where the presence of large value ranges is common. We apply our approach to meteorological scatterplots, as one of the most common plots used in this domain area. Our approach leverages the numerical representation of mantissa and exponent of the values to guide the design of novel "nested" color schemes, able to emphasize differences between magnitudes. Our user study evaluates the new designs, the state of the art color scales and representative color schemes used in the analysis of meteorological data: ColorCrafter, Viridis, and Rainbow. We assess accuracy, time and confidence in the context of discrimination (comparison) and interpretation (reading) tasks. Our proposed color scheme significantly outperforms the others in interpretation tasks, while showing comparable performances in discrimination tasks.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的配色方案，旨在解决可视化具有大值范围的数据系列的挑战，其中尺度变换提供有限的支持。我们关注气象数据，其中大值范围的存在是常见的。我们将我们的方法应用于气象散点图，作为该领域最常用的绘图之一。 Our approach leverages the numerical representation of mantissa and exponent of the values to guide the design of novel "nested" color schemes, able to emphasize differences between magnitudes. Our user study evaluates the new designs, the state of the art color scales and representative color schemes used in the analysis of meteorological data: ColorCrafter, Viridis, and Rainbow.我们评估辨别（比较）和解释（阅读）任务中的准确性、时间和置信度。 Our proposed color scheme significantly outperforms the others in interpretation tasks, while showing comparable performances in discrimination tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对大数值范围的新型颜色编码方案，用于提升气象数据可视化效果。
AI.motivation: 传统颜色映射在处理气象数据大数值范围时难以有效区分数量级差异，需改进可视化方法。
AI.method: 基于数值的尾数与指数设计嵌套式颜色方案，并通过用户实验对比ColorCrafter、Viridis等现有方案。
AI.result: 新方案在数据解释任务中准确率显著提升，在辨别任务中表现与主流方案相当。
AI.conclusion: 该颜色编码方案有效解决了大范围气象数据可视化难题，尤其适合需要强调数量级差异的场景。

authors_text: Cheng-Yen Hsieh,Yu-Chuan Chuang,An-Yeu,Wu
title: C3-SL: Circular Convolution-Based Batch-Wise Compression for Communication-Efficient Split Learning
title_zh: C3-SL：基于循环卷积的批量压缩，用于通信高效的分割学习
abstract: Most existing studies improve the efficiency of Split learning (SL) by compressing the transmitted features. However, most works focus on dimension-wise compression that transforms high-dimensional features into a low-dimensional space. In this paper, we propose circular convolution-based batch-wise compression for SL (C3-SL) to compress multiple features into one single feature. To avoid information loss while merging multiple features, we exploit the quasi-orthogonality of features in high-dimensional space with circular convolution and superposition. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to explore the potential of batch-wise compression under the SL scenario. Based on the simulation results on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, our method achieves a 16x compression ratio with negligible accuracy drops compared with the vanilla SL. Moreover, C3-SL significantly reduces 1152x memory and 2.25x computation overhead compared to the state-of-the-art dimension-wise compression method.
summary: Most existing studies improve the efficiency of Split learning (SL) by compressing the transmitted features. However, most works focus on dimension-wise compression that transforms high-dimensional features into a low-dimensional space. In this paper, we propose circular convolution-based batch-wise compression for SL (C3-SL) to compress multiple features into one single feature. To avoid information loss while merging multiple features, we exploit the quasi-orthogonality of features in high-dimensional space with circular convolution and superposition. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to explore the potential of batch-wise compression under the SL scenario. Based on the simulation results on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, our method achieves a 16x compression ratio with negligible accuracy drops compared with the vanilla SL. Moreover, C3-SL significantly reduces 1152x memory and 2.25x computation overhead compared to the state-of-the-art dimension-wise compression method.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有研究通过压缩传输的特征来提高分割学习（SL）的效率。然而，大多数工作都集中在维度压缩上，将高维特征转换为低维空间。在本文中，我们提出了基于循环卷积的 SL 批量压缩（C3-SL），将多个特征压缩为一个特征。为了避免合并多个特征时的信息丢失，我们通过循环卷积和叠加利用高维空间中特征的准正交性。据我们所知，我们是第一个探索 SL 场景下批量压缩潜力的人。基于 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 上的仿真结果，我们的方法实现了 16 倍的压缩比，与普通 SL 相比，精度下降可以忽略不计。此外，与最先进的维度压缩方法相比，C3-SL 显着减少了 1152 倍的内存和 2.25 倍的计算开销。

AI.tldr: 本文提出C3-SL方法，通过循环卷积实现批量特征压缩，提升分裂学习的通信效率。
AI.motivation: 现有分裂学习研究多采用维度压缩方法，难以有效合并多特征并保持信息完整性，亟需更高效的批量压缩方案。
AI.method: 利用高维特征的准正交性，结合循环卷积与叠加操作，将多个特征合并为单一特征实现批量压缩。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100数据集上实现16倍压缩比且精度损失可忽略，相比最先进方法减少1152倍内存和2.25倍计算开销。
AI.conclusion: C3-SL通过创新的批量压缩机制，在保持模型性能的同时显著降低通信与计算成本，为分裂学习提供新思路。

search_text: C3-SL: Circular Convolution-Based Batch-Wise Compression for Communication-Efficient Split Learning C3-SL：基于循环卷积的批量压缩，用于通信高效的分割学习 Most existing studies improve the efficiency of Split learning (SL) by compressing the transmitted features. However, most works focus on dimension-wise compression that transforms high-dimensional features into a low-dimensional space. In this paper, we propose circular convolution-based batch-wise compression for SL (C3-SL) to compress multiple features into one single feature. To avoid information loss while merging multiple features, we exploit the quasi-orthogonality of features in high-dimensional space with circular convolution and superposition. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to explore the potential of batch-wise compression under the SL scenario. Based on the simulation results on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, our method achieves a 16x compression ratio with negligible accuracy drops compared with the vanilla SL. Moreover, C3-SL significantly reduces 1152x memory and 2.25x computation overhead compared to the state-of-the-art dimension-wise compression method. 大多数现有研究通过压缩传输的特征来提高分割学习（SL）的效率。然而，大多数工作都集中在维度压缩上，将高维特征转换为低维空间。在本文中，我们提出了基于循环卷积的 SL 批量压缩（C3-SL），将多个特征压缩为一个特征。为了避免合并多个特征时的信息丢失，我们通过循环卷积和叠加利用高维空间中特征的准正交性。据我们所知，我们是第一个探索 SL 场景下批量压缩潜力的人。基于 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 上的仿真结果，我们的方法实现了 16 倍的压缩比，与普通 SL 相比，精度下降可以忽略不计。此外，与最先进的维度压缩方法相比，C3-SL 显着减少了 1152 倍的内存和 2.25 倍的计算开销。 本文提出C3-SL方法，通过循环卷积实现批量特征压缩，提升分裂学习的通信效率。 Cheng-Yen Hsieh,Yu-Chuan Chuang,An-Yeu,Wu cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Jianyi Wang,Kelvin C. K. Chan,Chen Change Loy
title: Exploring CLIP for Assessing the Look and Feel of Images
title_zh: 探索 CLIP 来评估图像的外观和感觉
abstract: Measuring the perception of visual content is a long-standing problem in computer vision. Many mathematical models have been developed to evaluate the look or quality of an image. Despite the effectiveness of such tools in quantifying degradations such as noise and blurriness levels, such quantification is loosely coupled with human language. When it comes to more abstract perception about the feel of visual content, existing methods can only rely on supervised models that are explicitly trained with labeled data collected via laborious user study. In this paper, we go beyond the conventional paradigms by exploring the rich visual language prior encapsulated in Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) models for assessing both the quality perception (look) and abstract perception (feel) of images in a zero-shot manner. In particular, we discuss effective prompt designs and show an effective prompt pairing strategy to harness the prior. We also provide extensive experiments on controlled datasets and Image Quality Assessment (IQA) benchmarks. Our results show that CLIP captures meaningful priors that generalize well to different perceptual assessments. Code is avaliable at https://github.com/IceClear/CLIP-IQA.
summary: Measuring the perception of visual content is a long-standing problem in computer vision. Many mathematical models have been developed to evaluate the look or quality of an image. Despite the effectiveness of such tools in quantifying degradations such as noise and blurriness levels, such quantification is loosely coupled with human language. When it comes to more abstract perception about the feel of visual content, existing methods can only rely on supervised models that are explicitly trained with labeled data collected via laborious user study. In this paper, we go beyond the conventional paradigms by exploring the rich visual language prior encapsulated in Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) models for assessing both the quality perception (look) and abstract perception (feel) of images in a zero-shot manner. In particular, we discuss effective prompt designs and show an effective prompt pairing strategy to harness the prior. We also provide extensive experiments on controlled datasets and Image Quality Assessment (IQA) benchmarks. Our results show that CLIP captures meaningful priors that generalize well to different perceptual assessments. Code is avaliable at https://github.com/IceClear/CLIP-IQA.
abstract_zh: 测量视觉内容的感知是计算机视觉中长期存在的问题。已经开发了许多数学模型来评估图像的外观或质量。尽管此类工具在量化噪声和模糊程度等退化方面非常有效，但这种量化与人类语言松散耦合。当涉及到对视觉内容的感觉的更抽象的感知时，现有的方法只能依赖于监督模型，这些模型是通过艰苦的用户研究收集的标记数据进行显式训练的。在本文中，我们超越了传统的范式，探索了对比语言-图像预训练（CLIP）模型中封装的丰富视觉语言，以零样本的方式评估图像的质量感知（外观）和抽象感知（感觉）。特别是，我们讨论了有效的提示设计，并展示了一种有效的提示配对策略来利用先验知识。我们还提供有关受控数据集和图像质量评估 (IQA) 基准的广泛实验。我们的结果表明，CLIP 捕获了有意义的先验，可以很好地推广到不同的感知评估。代码可在 https://github.com/IceClear/CLIP-IQA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨利用CLIP模型以零样本方式评估图像的外观（look）与感知（feel）。
AI.motivation: 传统图像质量评估方法难以捕捉抽象感知，且依赖大量人工标注数据，而CLIP模型蕴含的视觉语言先验可能提供更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过设计有效提示及配对策略，利用CLIP模型的视觉语言先验进行零样本评估。
AI.result: 实验表明CLIP模型在多个数据集和基准测试中能有效评估图像感知，泛化能力良好。
AI.conclusion: CLIP模型无需依赖标注数据即可有效评估图像的视觉感知，为零样本评估提供了新方法。

authors_text: Shengyu Huang,Zan Gojcic,Jiahui Huang,Andreas Wieser,Konrad Schindler
title: Dynamic 3D Scene Analysis by Point Cloud Accumulation
title_zh: 通过点云累积进行动态 3D 场景分析
abstract: Multi-beam LiDAR sensors, as used on autonomous vehicles and mobile robots, acquire sequences of 3D range scans ("frames"). Each frame covers the scene sparsely, due to limited angular scanning resolution and occlusion. The sparsity restricts the performance of downstream processes like semantic segmentation or surface reconstruction. Luckily, when the sensor moves, frames are captured from a sequence of different viewpoints. This provides complementary information and, when accumulated in a common scene coordinate frame, yields a denser sampling and a more complete coverage of the underlying 3D scene. However, often the scanned scenes contain moving objects. Points on those objects are not correctly aligned by just undoing the scanner's ego-motion. In the present paper, we explore multi-frame point cloud accumulation as a mid-level representation of 3D scan sequences, and develop a method that exploits inductive biases of outdoor street scenes, including their geometric layout and object-level rigidity. Compared to state-of-the-art scene flow estimators, our proposed approach aims to align all 3D points in a common reference frame correctly accumulating the points on the individual objects. Our approach greatly reduces the alignment errors on several benchmark datasets. Moreover, the accumulated point clouds benefit high-level tasks like surface reconstruction.
summary: Multi-beam LiDAR sensors, as used on autonomous vehicles and mobile robots, acquire sequences of 3D range scans ("frames"). Each frame covers the scene sparsely, due to limited angular scanning resolution and occlusion. The sparsity restricts the performance of downstream processes like semantic segmentation or surface reconstruction. Luckily, when the sensor moves, frames are captured from a sequence of different viewpoints. This provides complementary information and, when accumulated in a common scene coordinate frame, yields a denser sampling and a more complete coverage of the underlying 3D scene. However, often the scanned scenes contain moving objects. Points on those objects are not correctly aligned by just undoing the scanner's ego-motion. In the present paper, we explore multi-frame point cloud accumulation as a mid-level representation of 3D scan sequences, and develop a method that exploits inductive biases of outdoor street scenes, including their geometric layout and object-level rigidity. Compared to state-of-the-art scene flow estimators, our proposed approach aims to align all 3D points in a common reference frame correctly accumulating the points on the individual objects. Our approach greatly reduces the alignment errors on several benchmark datasets. Moreover, the accumulated point clouds benefit high-level tasks like surface reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 用于自动驾驶车辆和移动机器人的多光束 LiDAR 传感器获取 3D 范围扫描序列（“帧”）。由于角度扫描分辨率和遮挡有限，每一帧都稀疏地覆盖场景。稀疏性限制了语义分割或表面重建等下游过程的性能。幸运的是，当传感器移动时，会从一系列不同的视点捕获帧。 This provides complementary information and, when accumulated in a common scene coordinate frame, yields a denser sampling and a more complete coverage of the underlying 3D scene.然而，扫描的场景通常包含移动物体。仅撤消扫描仪的自我运动就无法正确对齐这些物体上的点。 In the present paper, we explore multi-frame point cloud accumulation as a mid-level representation of 3D scan sequences, and develop a method that exploits inductive biases of outdoor street scenes, including their geometric layout and object-level rigidity. Compared to state-of-the-art scene flow estimators, our proposed approach aims to align all 3D points in a common reference frame correctly accumulating the points on the individual objects.我们的方法大大减少了几个基准数据集上的对齐错误。此外，积累的点云有利于表面重建等高级任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过点云累积进行动态3D场景分析，解决移动物体在多帧LiDAR数据中的对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因无法准确对齐移动物体导致点云累积误差，影响场景重建与语义分割等下游任务性能。
AI.method: 利用户外场景的几何结构与物体刚性特性，开发多帧点云累积方法，通过归纳偏置优化动态物体点云对齐。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上显著降低对齐误差，提升表面重建等高层任务的精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过场景先验约束有效解决动态点云对齐问题，为复杂场景建模提供可靠基础。

Moreover, the accumulated point clouds benefit high-level tasks like surface reconstruction. 用于自动驾驶车辆和移动机器人的多光束 LiDAR 传感器获取 3D 范围扫描序列（“帧”）。由于角度扫描分辨率和遮挡有限，每一帧都稀疏地覆盖场景。稀疏性限制了语义分割或表面重建等下游过程的性能。幸运的是，当传感器移动时，会从一系列不同的视点捕获帧。 This provides complementary information and, when accumulated in a common scene coordinate frame, yields a denser sampling and a more complete coverage of the underlying 3D scene.然而，扫描的场景通常包含移动物体。仅撤消扫描仪的自我运动就无法正确对齐这些物体上的点。 In the present paper, we explore multi-frame point cloud accumulation as a mid-level representation of 3D scan sequences, and develop a method that exploits inductive biases of outdoor street scenes, including their geometric layout and object-level rigidity. Compared to state-of-the-art scene flow estimators, our proposed approach aims to align all 3D points in a common reference frame correctly accumulating the points on the individual objects.我们的方法大大减少了几个基准数据集上的对齐错误。此外，积累的点云有利于表面重建等高级任务。 本文提出通过点云累积进行动态3D场景分析，解决移动物体在多帧LiDAR数据中的对齐问题。 Shengyu Huang,Zan Gojcic,Jiahui Huang,Andreas Wieser,Konrad Schindler cs.CV

authors_text: Hao Zhu,Wayne Wu,Wentao Zhu,Liming Jiang,Siwei Tang,Li Zhang,Ziwei Liu,Chen Change Loy
title: CelebV-HQ: A Large-Scale Video Facial Attributes Dataset
title_zh: CelebV-HQ：大规模视频面部属性数据集
comment: ECCV 2022. Project Page: https://celebv-hq.github.io/ ; Dataset: https://github.com/CelebV-HQ/CelebV-HQ
comments: ECCV 2022. Project Page: https://celebv-hq.github.io/ ; Dataset: https://github.com/CelebV-HQ/CelebV-HQ
abstract: Large-scale datasets have played indispensable roles in the recent success of face generation/editing and significantly facilitated the advances of emerging research fields. However, the academic community still lacks a video dataset with diverse facial attribute annotations, which is crucial for the research on face-related videos. In this work, we propose a large-scale, high-quality, and diverse video dataset with rich facial attribute annotations, named the High-Quality Celebrity Video Dataset (CelebV-HQ). CelebV-HQ contains 35,666 video clips with the resolution of 512x512 at least, involving 15,653 identities. All clips are labeled manually with 83 facial attributes, covering appearance, action, and emotion. We conduct a comprehensive analysis in terms of age, ethnicity, brightness stability, motion smoothness, head pose diversity, and data quality to demonstrate the diversity and temporal coherence of CelebV-HQ. Besides, its versatility and potential are validated on two representative tasks, i.e., unconditional video generation and video facial attribute editing. Furthermore, we envision the future potential of CelebV-HQ, as well as the new opportunities and challenges it would bring to related research directions. Data, code, and models are publicly available. Project page: https://celebv-hq.github.io.

However, the academic community still lacks a video dataset with diverse facial attribute annotations, which is crucial for the research on face-related videos. CelebV-HQ包含至少35,666个分辨率至少为512x512的视频片段，涉及15,653个身份。所有剪辑均手动标记 83 个面部属性，涵盖外观、动作和情感。 We conduct a comprehensive analysis in terms of age, ethnicity, brightness stability, motion smoothness, head pose diversity, and data quality to demonstrate the diversity and temporal coherence of CelebV-HQ. Besides, its versatility and potential are validated on two representative tasks, i.e., unconditional video generation and video facial attribute editing. Furthermore, we envision the future potential of CelebV-HQ, as well as the new opportunities and challenges it would bring to related research directions.数据、代码和模型都是公开的。 Project page: https://celebv-hq.github.io.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为CelebV-HQ的大规模高质量视频人脸属性数据集，包含35,666个高分辨率视频片段和15,653个身份，每个视频均标注83种人脸属性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏包含多样化人脸属性标注的视频数据集，而这类数据对人脸生成/编辑等领域的研究至关重要。
AI.method: 通过收集高分辨率视频片段，人工标注包括外貌、动作、情绪等83种属性，并从年龄、种族、运动平滑度等维度进行数据多样性分析。
AI.result: 验证了数据集在无条件视频生成和视频人脸属性编辑任务中的有效性，数据、代码和模型已公开。
AI.conclusion: CelebV-HQ为相关研究提供了新机遇，同时也带来了新的挑战，未来可推动视频人脸领域的发展。

authors_text: Maryam Sultana,Muzammal Naseer,Muhammad Haris Khan,Salman Khan,Fahad Shahbaz Khan
title: Self-Distilled Vision Transformer for Domain Generalization
title_zh: 用于领域泛化的自蒸馏视觉转换器
abstract: In the recent past, several domain generalization (DG) methods have been proposed, showing encouraging performance, however, almost all of them build on convolutional neural networks (CNNs). There is little to no progress on studying the DG performance of vision transformers (ViTs), which are challenging the supremacy of CNNs on standard benchmarks, often built on i.i.d assumption. This renders the real-world deployment of ViTs doubtful. In this paper, we attempt to explore ViTs towards addressing the DG problem. Similar to CNNs, ViTs also struggle in out-of-distribution scenarios and the main culprit is overfitting to source domains. Inspired by the modular architecture of ViTs, we propose a simple DG approach for ViTs, coined as self-distillation for ViTs. It reduces the overfitting of source domains by easing the learning of input-output mapping problem through curating non-zero entropy supervisory signals for intermediate transformer blocks. Further, it does not introduce any new parameters and can be seamlessly plugged into the modular composition of different ViTs. We empirically demonstrate notable performance gains with different DG baselines and various ViT backbones in five challenging datasets. Moreover, we report favorable performance against recent state-of-the-art DG methods. Our code along with pre-trained models are publicly available at: https://github.com/maryam089/SDViT.
summary: In the recent past, several domain generalization (DG) methods have been proposed, showing encouraging performance, however, almost all of them build on convolutional neural networks (CNNs). There is little to no progress on studying the DG performance of vision transformers (ViTs), which are challenging the supremacy of CNNs on standard benchmarks, often built on i.i.d assumption. This renders the real-world deployment of ViTs doubtful. In this paper, we attempt to explore ViTs towards addressing the DG problem. Similar to CNNs, ViTs also struggle in out-of-distribution scenarios and the main culprit is overfitting to source domains. Inspired by the modular architecture of ViTs, we propose a simple DG approach for ViTs, coined as self-distillation for ViTs. It reduces the overfitting of source domains by easing the learning of input-output mapping problem through curating non-zero entropy supervisory signals for intermediate transformer blocks. Further, it does not introduce any new parameters and can be seamlessly plugged into the modular composition of different ViTs. We empirically demonstrate notable performance gains with different DG baselines and various ViT backbones in five challenging datasets. Moreover, we report favorable performance against recent state-of-the-art DG methods. Our code along with pre-trained models are publicly available at: https://github.com/maryam089/SDViT.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们提出了几种领域泛化（DG）方法，显示出令人鼓舞的性能，但几乎所有这些方法都建立在卷积神经网络（CNN）之上。在研究视觉变换器 (ViT) 的 DG 性能方面几乎没有进展，这正在挑战 CNN 在标准基准上的霸主地位，而标准基准通常建立在独立同分布假设的基础上。这使得 ViT 的实际部署令人怀疑。在本文中，我们尝试探索 ViT 来解决 DG 问题。与 CNN 类似，ViT 也在分布外场景中陷入困境，罪魁祸首是对源域的过度拟合。受 ViT 模块化架构的启发，我们提出了一种简单的 ViT DG 方法，称为 ViT 自蒸馏。它通过为中间变压器块策划非零熵监控信号来简化输入输出映射问题的学习，从而减少源域的过度拟合。此外，它没有引入任何新参数，并且可以无缝插入不同ViT的模块化组合中。我们凭经验证明，在五个具有挑战性的数据集中，不同的 DG 基线和不同的 ViT 主干网具有显着的性能提升。此外，我们报告了与最近最先进的 DG 方法相比的良好性能。我们的代码以及预训练模型可在以下位置公开获取：https://github.com/maryam089/SDViT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自蒸馏视觉Transformer方法，用于提升模型在领域泛化任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有领域泛化方法多基于CNN，而视觉Transformer（ViT）在领域泛化研究中进展有限，其在真实场景中因过拟合源域导致部署效果存疑。
AI.method: 通过自蒸馏机制，为ViT中间Transformer块生成非零熵监督信号，缓解源域过拟合问题，且无需新增参数，可适配多种ViT架构。
AI.result: 在五个挑战性数据集上，该方法在多种DG基线和ViT主干网络中均取得显著性能提升，优于最新SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: 自蒸馏方法有效增强了ViT的领域泛化能力，代码与预训练模型已公开，为ViT在真实场景的应用提供新思路。
