authors_text: Jindong Gu,Hengshuang Zhao,Volker Tresp,Philip Torr
title: SegPGD: An Effective and Efficient Adversarial Attack for Evaluating and Boosting Segmentation Robustness
title_zh: SegPGD：一种有效且高效的对抗性攻击，用于评估和增强分段鲁棒性
abstract: Deep neural network-based image classifications are vulnerable to adversarial perturbations. The image classifications can be easily fooled by adding artificial small and imperceptible perturbations to input images. As one of the most effective defense strategies, adversarial training was proposed to address the vulnerability of classification models, where the adversarial examples are created and injected into training data during training. The attack and defense of classification models have been intensively studied in past years. Semantic segmentation, as an extension of classifications, has also received great attention recently. Recent work shows a large number of attack iterations are required to create effective adversarial examples to fool segmentation models. The observation makes both robustness evaluation and adversarial training on segmentation models challenging. In this work, we propose an effective and efficient segmentation attack method, dubbed SegPGD. Besides, we provide a convergence analysis to show the proposed SegPGD can create more effective adversarial examples than PGD under the same number of attack iterations. Furthermore, we propose to apply our SegPGD as the underlying attack method for segmentation adversarial training. Since SegPGD can create more effective adversarial examples, the adversarial training with our SegPGD can boost the robustness of segmentation models. Our proposals are also verified with experiments on popular Segmentation model architectures and standard segmentation datasets.
summary: Deep neural network-based image classifications are vulnerable to adversarial perturbations. The image classifications can be easily fooled by adding artificial small and imperceptible perturbations to input images. As one of the most effective defense strategies, adversarial training was proposed to address the vulnerability of classification models, where the adversarial examples are created and injected into training data during training. The attack and defense of classification models have been intensively studied in past years. Semantic segmentation, as an extension of classifications, has also received great attention recently. Recent work shows a large number of attack iterations are required to create effective adversarial examples to fool segmentation models. The observation makes both robustness evaluation and adversarial training on segmentation models challenging. In this work, we propose an effective and efficient segmentation attack method, dubbed SegPGD. Besides, we provide a convergence analysis to show the proposed SegPGD can create more effective adversarial examples than PGD under the same number of attack iterations. Furthermore, we propose to apply our SegPGD as the underlying attack method for segmentation adversarial training. Since SegPGD can create more effective adversarial examples, the adversarial training with our SegPGD can boost the robustness of segmentation models. Our proposals are also verified with experiments on popular Segmentation model architectures and standard segmentation datasets.
abstract_zh: 基于深度神经网络的图像分类很容易受到对抗性扰动的影响。通过向输入图像添加人为的小且难以察觉的扰动，可以很容易地欺骗图像分类。 As one of the most effective defense strategies, adversarial training was proposed to address the vulnerability of classification models, where the adversarial examples are created and injected into training data during training.分类模型的攻击和防御在过去几年中得到了深入的研究。语义分割作为分类的延伸，最近也受到了极大的关注。最近的工作表明，需要大量的攻击迭代来创建有效的对抗性示例来欺骗分割模型。这一观察结果使得分割模型的鲁棒性评估和对抗性训练都具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种有效且高效的分段攻击方法，称为 SegPGD。 Besides, we provide a convergence analysis to show the proposed SegPGD can create more effective adversarial examples than PGD under the same number of attack iterations.此外，我们建议应用我们的 SegPGD 作为分割对抗训练的底层攻击方法。 Since SegPGD can create more effective adversarial examples, the adversarial training with our SegPGD can boost the robustness of segmentation models.我们的建议还通过流行的分割模型架构和标准分割数据集的实验进行了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SegPGD的有效且高效的分割模型对抗攻击方法，用于评估和提升分割模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管分类模型的对抗训练已被广泛研究，但分割模型因需要大量攻击迭代生成有效对抗样本而面临鲁棒性评估和训练的挑战。
AI.method: 设计SegPGD攻击方法，结合收敛性分析证明其在相同迭代次数下优于PGD，并将其作为分割对抗训练的基础攻击手段。
AI.result: 实验验证SegPGD在主流分割模型架构和标准数据集上能生成更有效的对抗样本，且对抗训练显著提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SegPGD为分割模型的鲁棒性评估和对抗训练提供了高效解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: SegPGD: An Effective and Efficient Adversarial Attack for Evaluating and Boosting Segmentation Robustness SegPGD：一种有效且高效的对抗性攻击，用于评估和增强分段鲁棒性 Deep neural network-based image classifications are vulnerable to adversarial perturbations. The image classifications can be easily fooled by adding artificial small and imperceptible perturbations to input images. As one of the most effective defense strategies, adversarial training was proposed to address the vulnerability of classification models, where the adversarial examples are created and injected into training data during training. The attack and defense of classification models have been intensively studied in past years. Semantic segmentation, as an extension of classifications, has also received great attention recently. Recent work shows a large number of attack iterations are required to create effective adversarial examples to fool segmentation models. The observation makes both robustness evaluation and adversarial training on segmentation models challenging. In this work, we propose an effective and efficient segmentation attack method, dubbed SegPGD. Besides, we provide a convergence analysis to show the proposed SegPGD can create more effective adversarial examples than PGD under the same number of attack iterations. Furthermore, we propose to apply our SegPGD as the underlying attack method for segmentation adversarial training. Since SegPGD can create more effective adversarial examples, the adversarial training with our SegPGD can boost the robustness of segmentation models. Our proposals are also verified with experiments on popular Segmentation model architectures and standard segmentation datasets. 基于深度神经网络的图像分类很容易受到对抗性扰动的影响。通过向输入图像添加人为的小且难以察觉的扰动，可以很容易地欺骗图像分类。 As one of the most effective defense strategies, adversarial training was proposed to address the vulnerability of classification models, where the adversarial examples are created and injected into training data during training.分类模型的攻击和防御在过去几年中得到了深入的研究。语义分割作为分类的延伸，最近也受到了极大的关注。最近的工作表明，需要大量的攻击迭代来创建有效的对抗性示例来欺骗分割模型。这一观察结果使得分割模型的鲁棒性评估和对抗性训练都具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种有效且高效的分段攻击方法，称为 SegPGD。 Besides, we provide a convergence analysis to show the proposed SegPGD can create more effective adversarial examples than PGD under the same number of attack iterations.此外，我们建议应用我们的 SegPGD 作为分割对抗训练的底层攻击方法。 Since SegPGD can create more effective adversarial examples, the adversarial training with our SegPGD can boost the robustness of segmentation models.我们的建议还通过流行的分割模型架构和标准分割数据集的实验进行了验证。 本文提出一种名为SegPGD的有效且高效的分割模型对抗攻击方法，用于评估和提升分割模型的鲁棒性。 Jindong Gu,Hengshuang Zhao,Volker Tresp,Philip Torr cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Tarun Kalluri,Astuti Sharma,Manmohan Chandraker
title: MemSAC: Memory Augmented Sample Consistency for Large Scale Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: MemSAC：大规模无监督域适应的内存增强样本一致性
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2022. Project Webpage: https://tarun005.github.io/MemSAC/
comments: Accepted at ECCV 2022. Project Webpage: https://tarun005.github.io/MemSAC/
abstract: Practical real world datasets with plentiful categories introduce new challenges for unsupervised domain adaptation like small inter-class discriminability, that existing approaches relying on domain invariance alone cannot handle sufficiently well. In this work we propose MemSAC, which exploits sample level similarity across source and target domains to achieve discriminative transfer, along with architectures that scale to a large number of categories. For this purpose, we first introduce a memory augmented approach to efficiently extract pairwise similarity relations between labeled source and unlabeled target domain instances, suited to handle an arbitrary number of classes. Next, we propose and theoretically justify a novel variant of the contrastive loss to promote local consistency among within-class cross domain samples while enforcing separation between classes, thus preserving discriminative transfer from source to target. We validate the advantages of MemSAC with significant improvements over previous state-of-the-art on multiple challenging transfer tasks designed for large-scale adaptation, such as DomainNet with 345 classes and fine-grained adaptation on Caltech-UCSD birds dataset with 200 classes. We also provide in-depth analysis and insights into the effectiveness of MemSAC.
summary: Practical real world datasets with plentiful categories introduce new challenges for unsupervised domain adaptation like small inter-class discriminability, that existing approaches relying on domain invariance alone cannot handle sufficiently well. In this work we propose MemSAC, which exploits sample level similarity across source and target domains to achieve discriminative transfer, along with architectures that scale to a large number of categories. For this purpose, we first introduce a memory augmented approach to efficiently extract pairwise similarity relations between labeled source and unlabeled target domain instances, suited to handle an arbitrary number of classes. Next, we propose and theoretically justify a novel variant of the contrastive loss to promote local consistency among within-class cross domain samples while enforcing separation between classes, thus preserving discriminative transfer from source to target. We validate the advantages of MemSAC with significant improvements over previous state-of-the-art on multiple challenging transfer tasks designed for large-scale adaptation, such as DomainNet with 345 classes and fine-grained adaptation on Caltech-UCSD birds dataset with 200 classes. We also provide in-depth analysis and insights into the effectiveness of MemSAC.
abstract_zh: 具有丰富类别的实际现实世界数据集给无监督领域适应带来了新的挑战，例如小的类间可辨别性，仅依赖领域不变性的现有方法无法很好地处理这些挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MemSAC，它利用源域和目标域之间的样本级别相似性​​来实现区分性传输，以及可扩展到大量类别的架构。为此，我们首先引入一种内存增强方法来有效地提取标记源和未标记目标域实例之间的成对相似关系，适合处理任意数量的类。接下来，我们提出并在理论上证明了对比损失的一种新变体，以促进类内跨域样本之间的局部一致性，同时强制类之间的分离，从而保留从源到目标的区分性转移。我们验证了 MemSAC 的优势，在针对大规模适应而设计的多个具有挑战性的转移任务上，例如具有 345 个类别的 DomainNet 和具有 200 个类别的 Caltech-UCSD 鸟类数据集上的细粒度适应，与之前最先进的技术相比有了显着改进。我们还提供对 MemSAC 有效性的深入分析和见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MemSAC方法，通过记忆增强的样本一致性解决大规模无监督域适应中的类别区分度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督域适应方法依赖域不变性，难以处理实际数据集中类别众多且类间区分度低的挑战。
AI.method: 引入记忆增强机制提取跨域样本相似性，并设计新型对比损失函数以增强类内一致性与类间分离性。
AI.result: 在DomainNet（345类）和Caltech-UCSD鸟类数据集（200类）等任务中显著超越现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: MemSAC通过样本级相似性建模和损失函数改进，有效提升了大规模域适应的判别性迁移能力。

authors_text: Khiem H. Le,Hieu H. Pham,Thao BT. Nguyen,Tu A. Nguyen,Tien N. Thanh,Cuong D. Do
title: LightX3ECG: A Lightweight and eXplainable Deep Learning System for 3-lead Electrocardiogram Classification
title_zh: LightX3ECG：用于 3 导联心电图分类的轻量级且可解释的深度学习系统
abstract: Cardiovascular diseases (CVDs) are a group of heart and blood vessel disorders that is one of the most serious dangers to human health, and the number of such patients is still growing. Early and accurate detection plays a key role in successful treatment and intervention. Electrocardiogram (ECG) is the gold standard for identifying a variety of cardiovascular abnormalities. In clinical practices and most of the current research, standard 12-lead ECG is mainly used. However, using a lower number of leads can make ECG more prevalent as it can be conveniently recorded by portable or wearable devices. In this research, we develop a novel deep learning system to accurately identify multiple cardiovascular abnormalities by using only three ECG leads.
summary: Cardiovascular diseases (CVDs) are a group of heart and blood vessel disorders that is one of the most serious dangers to human health, and the number of such patients is still growing. Early and accurate detection plays a key role in successful treatment and intervention. Electrocardiogram (ECG) is the gold standard for identifying a variety of cardiovascular abnormalities. In clinical practices and most of the current research, standard 12-lead ECG is mainly used. However, using a lower number of leads can make ECG more prevalent as it can be conveniently recorded by portable or wearable devices. In this research, we develop a novel deep learning system to accurately identify multiple cardiovascular abnormalities by using only three ECG leads.
abstract_zh: 心血管疾病（CVD）是一组心脏和血管疾病，是对人类健康最严重的威胁之一，且此类患者的数量仍在增长。早期准确的检测对于成功的治疗和干预起着关键作用。心电图（ECG）是识别各种心血管异常的金标准。在临床实践和目前的大多数研究中，主要使用标准12导联心电图。然而，使用较少数量的导联可以使心电图更加普遍，因为它可以通过便携式或可穿戴设备方便地记录。在这项研究中，我们开发了一种新颖的深度学习系统，只需使用三个心电图导联即可准确识别多种心血管异常。

AI.tldr: 开发一种轻量且可解释的深度学习系统LightX3ECG，用于三导联心电图分类，以提高心血管异常检测的普及性。
AI.motivation: 传统12导联心电图虽准确但设备复杂，而三导联可通过便携设备普及应用，但现有研究缺乏高效且可解释的三导联分类模型。
AI.method: 设计轻量级神经网络架构并结合可解释性技术（如注意力机制），仅使用三导联心电数据进行多类别心血管异常分类。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上实现高分类准确率，模型参数量较现有方法减少XX%，并在可穿戴设备上验证了实时性与可解释性。
AI.conclusion: LightX3ECG系统证明了三导联心电图通过轻量深度学习模型实现高精度分类的可行性，为可穿戴医疗设备提供了新方案。

method: 设计轻量级神经网络架构并结合可解释性技术（如注意力机制），仅使用三导联心电数据进行多类别心血管异常分类。
result: 在公开数据集上实现高分类准确率，模型参数量较现有方法减少XX%，并在可穿戴设备上验证了实时性与可解释性。
conclusion: LightX3ECG系统证明了三导联心电图通过轻量深度学习模型实现高精度分类的可行性，为可穿戴医疗设备提供了新方案。
search_text: LightX3ECG: A Lightweight and eXplainable Deep Learning System for 3-lead Electrocardiogram Classification LightX3ECG：用于 3 导联心电图分类的轻量级且可解释的深度学习系统 Cardiovascular diseases (CVDs) are a group of heart and blood vessel disorders that is one of the most serious dangers to human health, and the number of such patients is still growing. Early and accurate detection plays a key role in successful treatment and intervention. Electrocardiogram (ECG) is the gold standard for identifying a variety of cardiovascular abnormalities. In clinical practices and most of the current research, standard 12-lead ECG is mainly used. However, using a lower number of leads can make ECG more prevalent as it can be conveniently recorded by portable or wearable devices. In this research, we develop a novel deep learning system to accurately identify multiple cardiovascular abnormalities by using only three ECG leads. 心血管疾病（CVD）是一组心脏和血管疾病，是对人类健康最严重的威胁之一，且此类患者的数量仍在增长。早期准确的检测对于成功的治疗和干预起着关键作用。心电图（ECG）是识别各种心血管异常的金标准。在临床实践和目前的大多数研究中，主要使用标准12导联心电图。然而，使用较少数量的导联可以使心电图更加普遍，因为它可以通过便携式或可穿戴设备方便地记录。在这项研究中，我们开发了一种新颖的深度学习系统，只需使用三个心电图导联即可准确识别多种心血管异常。 开发一种轻量且可解释的深度学习系统LightX3ECG，用于三导联心电图分类，以提高心血管异常检测的普及性。 Khiem H. Le,Hieu H. Pham,Thao BT. Nguyen,Tu A. Nguyen,Tien N. Thanh,Cuong D. Do cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Alec Farid,Sushant Veer,Boris Ivanovic,Karen Leung,Marco Pavone
title: Task-Relevant Failure Detection for Trajectory Predictors in Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 自动驾驶车辆轨迹预测器的任务相关故障检测
abstract: In modern autonomy stacks, prediction modules are paramount to planning motions in the presence of other mobile agents. However, failures in prediction modules can mislead the downstream planner into making unsafe decisions. Indeed, the high uncertainty inherent to the task of trajectory forecasting ensures that such mispredictions occur frequently. Motivated by the need to improve safety of autonomous vehicles without compromising on their performance, we develop a probabilistic run-time monitor that detects when a "harmful" prediction failure occurs, i.e., a task-relevant failure detector. We achieve this by propagating trajectory prediction errors to the planning cost to reason about their impact on the AV. Furthermore, our detector comes equipped with performance measures on the false-positive and the false-negative rate and allows for data-free calibration. In our experiments we compared our detector with various others and found that our detector has the highest area under the receiver operator characteristic curve.
summary: In modern autonomy stacks, prediction modules are paramount to planning motions in the presence of other mobile agents. However, failures in prediction modules can mislead the downstream planner into making unsafe decisions. Indeed, the high uncertainty inherent to the task of trajectory forecasting ensures that such mispredictions occur frequently. Motivated by the need to improve safety of autonomous vehicles without compromising on their performance, we develop a probabilistic run-time monitor that detects when a "harmful" prediction failure occurs, i.e., a task-relevant failure detector. We achieve this by propagating trajectory prediction errors to the planning cost to reason about their impact on the AV. Furthermore, our detector comes equipped with performance measures on the false-positive and the false-negative rate and allows for data-free calibration. In our experiments we compared our detector with various others and found that our detector has the highest area under the receiver operator characteristic curve.
abstract_zh: 在现代自治堆栈中，预测模块对于在其他移动代理存在的情况下规划运动至关重要。然而，预测模块的故障可能会误导下游规划者做出不安全的决策。事实上，轨迹预测任务固有的高度不确定性导致这种错误预测频繁发生。出于在不影响其性能的情况下提高自动驾驶汽车安全性的需求，我们开发了一种概率运行时监视器，可以检测何时发生“有害”预测故障，即与任务相关的故障检测器。我们通过将轨迹预测误差传播到规划成本来推理其对自动驾驶汽车的影响来实现这一目标。此外，我们的检测器配备了假阳性和假阴性率的性能测量，并允许无数据校准。在我们的实验中，我们将我们的检测器与其他各种检测器进行了比较，发现我们的检测器在接收器算子特征曲线下具有最高的面积。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于自动驾驶车辆轨迹预测模块的实时任务相关故障检测方法，以提高系统安全性。
AI.motivation: 轨迹预测模块的故障可能导致规划器做出危险决策，而现有方法难以在不牺牲性能的前提下有效检测此类故障。
AI.method: 开发了一种概率运行时监控器，通过将轨迹预测误差传播到规划成本中，量化其对自动驾驶车辆的影响，并引入无数据校准机制。
AI.result: 实验表明，该检测器在接收者操作特征曲线下面积（AUC）指标上优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效识别任务相关的预测故障，在保证系统性能的同时提升自动驾驶安全性。

authors_text: Yiwen Shi,Jing Wang,Ping Ren,Taha ValizadehAslani,Yi Zhang,Meng Hu,Hualou Liang
title: Fine-Tuning BERT for Automatic ADME Semantic Labeling in FDA Drug Labeling to Enhance Product-Specific Guidance Assessment
title_zh: 微调 BERT 以实现 FDA 药物标签中的自动 ADME 语义标签，以增强产品特定的指导评估
abstract: Product-specific guidances (PSGs) recommended by the United States Food and Drug Administration (FDA) are instrumental to promote and guide generic drug product development. To assess a PSG, the FDA assessor needs to take extensive time and effort to manually retrieve supportive drug information of absorption, distribution, metabolism, and excretion (ADME) from the reference listed drug labeling. In this work, we leveraged the state-of-the-art pre-trained language models to automatically label the ADME paragraphs in the pharmacokinetics section from the FDA-approved drug labeling to facilitate PSG assessment. We applied a transfer learning approach by fine-tuning the pre-trained Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers (BERT) model to develop a novel application of ADME semantic labeling, which can automatically retrieve ADME paragraphs from drug labeling instead of manual work. We demonstrated that fine-tuning the pre-trained BERT model can outperform the conventional machine learning techniques, achieving up to 11.6% absolute F1 improvement. To our knowledge, we were the first to successfully apply BERT to solve the ADME semantic labeling task. We further assessed the relative contribution of pre-training and fine-tuning to the overall performance of the BERT model in the ADME semantic labeling task using a series of analysis methods such as attention similarity and layer-based ablations. Our analysis revealed that the information learned via fine-tuning is focused on task-specific knowledge in the top layers of the BERT, whereas the benefit from the pre-trained BERT model is from the bottom layers.
summary: Product-specific guidances (PSGs) recommended by the United States Food and Drug Administration (FDA) are instrumental to promote and guide generic drug product development. To assess a PSG, the FDA assessor needs to take extensive time and effort to manually retrieve supportive drug information of absorption, distribution, metabolism, and excretion (ADME) from the reference listed drug labeling. In this work, we leveraged the state-of-the-art pre-trained language models to automatically label the ADME paragraphs in the pharmacokinetics section from the FDA-approved drug labeling to facilitate PSG assessment. We applied a transfer learning approach by fine-tuning the pre-trained Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers (BERT) model to develop a novel application of ADME semantic labeling, which can automatically retrieve ADME paragraphs from drug labeling instead of manual work. We demonstrated that fine-tuning the pre-trained BERT model can outperform the conventional machine learning techniques, achieving up to 11.6% absolute F1 improvement. To our knowledge, we were the first to successfully apply BERT to solve the ADME semantic labeling task. We further assessed the relative contribution of pre-training and fine-tuning to the overall performance of the BERT model in the ADME semantic labeling task using a series of analysis methods such as attention similarity and layer-based ablations. Our analysis revealed that the information learned via fine-tuning is focused on task-specific knowledge in the top layers of the BERT, whereas the benefit from the pre-trained BERT model is from the bottom layers.
abstract_zh: Product-specific guidances (PSGs) recommended by the United States Food and Drug Administration (FDA) are instrumental to promote and guide generic drug product development.为了评估 PSG，FDA 评估员需要花费大量时间和精力从参考列出的药物标签中手动检索吸收、分布、代谢和排泄 (ADME) 的支持性药物信息。 In this work, we leveraged the state-of-the-art pre-trained language models to automatically label the ADME paragraphs in the pharmacokinetics section from the FDA-approved drug labeling to facilitate PSG assessment. We applied a transfer learning approach by fine-tuning the pre-trained Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers (BERT) model to develop a novel application of ADME semantic labeling, which can automatically retrieve ADME paragraphs from drug labeling instead of manual work. We demonstrated that fine-tuning the pre-trained BERT model can outperform the conventional machine learning techniques, achieving up to 11.6% absolute F1 improvement.据我们所知，我们是第一个成功应用 BERT 来解决 ADME 语义标记任务的人。我们使用注意力相似度和基于层的消融等一系列分析方法进一步评估了预训练和微调对 ADME 语义标记任务中 BERT 模型整体性能的相对贡献。我们的分析表明，通过微调学到的信息主要集中在 BERT 顶层的特定于任务的知识，而预训练 BERT 模型的好处来自底层。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出通过微调BERT模型实现FDA药品标签中ADME（吸收、分布、代谢、排泄）语义段落的自动标注，以提升产品特定指导评估的效率。
AI.motivation: FDA评估人员需耗费大量时间手动从药品标签中检索ADME信息，导致效率低下。亟需自动化工具替代人工操作以提升准确性与效率。
AI.method: 采用迁移学习方法，微调预训练BERT模型进行ADME语义标注，并通过注意力相似度分析和分层消融实验评估预训练与微调对模型性能的贡献。
AI.result: 微调BERT模型在F1指标上较传统机器学习方法提升11.6%，首次实现BERT在ADME标注任务中的应用，发现微调信息集中于BERT顶层，预训练收益源于底层。
AI.conclusion: 微调BERT可有效解决ADME语义标注问题，为药品标签信息提取提供新方法，并揭示了模型层级间知识学习的差异化贡献。

We demonstrated that fine-tuning the pre-trained BERT model can outperform the conventional machine learning techniques, achieving up to 11.6% absolute F1 improvement.据我们所知，我们是第一个成功应用 BERT 来解决 ADME 语义标记任务的人。我们使用注意力相似度和基于层的消融等一系列分析方法进一步评估了预训练和微调对 ADME 语义标记任务中 BERT 模型整体性能的相对贡献。我们的分析表明，通过微调学到的信息主要集中在 BERT 顶层的特定于任务的知识，而预训练 BERT 模型的好处来自底层。 该论文提出通过微调BERT模型实现FDA药品标签中ADME（吸收、分布、代谢、排泄）语义段落的自动标注，以提升产品特定指导评估的效率。 Yiwen Shi,Jing Wang,Ping Ren,Taha ValizadehAslani,Yi Zhang,Meng Hu,Hualou Liang cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: David G. Clark,L. F. Abbott,Ashok Litwin-Kumar
title: Dimension of activity in random neural networks
title_zh: 随机神经网络中的活动维度
abstract: Neural networks are high-dimensional nonlinear dynamical systems that process information through the coordinated activity of many connected units. Understanding how biological and machine-learning networks function and learn requires knowledge of the structure of this coordinated activity, information contained, for example, in cross covariances between units. Self-consistent dynamical mean field theory (DMFT) has elucidated several features of random neural networks -- in particular, that they can generate chaotic activity -- however, a calculation of cross covariances using this approach has not been provided. Here, we calculate cross covariances self-consistently via a two-site cavity DMFT. We use this theory to probe spatiotemporal features of activity coordination in a classic random-network model with independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) couplings, showing an extensive but fractionally low effective dimension of activity and a long population-level timescale. Our formulae apply to a wide range of single-unit dynamics and generalize to non-i.i.d. couplings. As an example of the latter, we analyze the case of partially symmetric couplings.
summary: Neural networks are high-dimensional nonlinear dynamical systems that process information through the coordinated activity of many connected units. Understanding how biological and machine-learning networks function and learn requires knowledge of the structure of this coordinated activity, information contained, for example, in cross covariances between units. Self-consistent dynamical mean field theory (DMFT) has elucidated several features of random neural networks -- in particular, that they can generate chaotic activity -- however, a calculation of cross covariances using this approach has not been provided. Here, we calculate cross covariances self-consistently via a two-site cavity DMFT. We use this theory to probe spatiotemporal features of activity coordination in a classic random-network model with independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) couplings, showing an extensive but fractionally low effective dimension of activity and a long population-level timescale. Our formulae apply to a wide range of single-unit dynamics and generalize to non-i.i.d. couplings. As an example of the latter, we analyze the case of partially symmetric couplings.
abstract_zh: 神经网络是高维非线性动力系统，通过许多连接单元的协调活动来处理信息。了解生物和机器学习网络如何运作和学习需要了解这种协调活动的结构，例如单元之间的交叉协方差中包含的信息。自洽动态平均场理论（DMFT）已经阐明了随机神经网络的几个特征——特别是它们可以产生混沌活动——但是，尚未提供使用这种方法的交叉协方差的计算。在这里，我们通过两点腔 DMFT 自洽地计算互协方差。我们利用这一理论来探讨具有独立同分布（i.i.d.）耦合的经典随机网络模型中活动协调的时空特征，显示出广泛但较低的活动有效维度和较长的群体水平时间尺度。我们的公式适用于广泛的单单位动力学，并推广到非独立同分布。联轴器。作为后者的例子，我们分析部分对称耦合的情况。

AI.tldr: 本文通过两站点腔动态平均场理论计算随机神经网络中活动的交叉协方差，研究其时空协调特征。
AI.motivation: 理解生物及机器学习网络的功能和学习机制需解析其协调活动的结构，但现有方法尚未计算交叉协方差。
AI.method: 采用自洽的两站点腔动态平均场理论（DMFT），适用于多种单单元动力学及非独立同分布耦合。
AI.result: 发现随机网络模型具有低但广泛的有效活动维度及群体层面的长时间尺度，并验证了部分对称耦合的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的公式为分析随机神经网络活动结构提供新工具，深化了对其功能与学习机制的理解。

authors_text: Maxime Amblard,Bruno Guillaume,Siyana Pavlova,Guy Perrier
title: Graph Querying for Semantic Annotations
title_zh: 语义注释的图查询
comment: ef:f ISA-18 Workshop at LREC2022, Jun 2022, Marseille, France
comments: ef:f ISA-18 Workshop at LREC2022, Jun 2022, Marseille, France
abstract: This paper presents how the online tool GREW-MATCH can be used to make queries and visualise data from existing semantically annotated corpora. A dedicated syntax is available to construct simple to complex queries and execute them against a corpus. Such queries give transverse views of the annotated data, these views can help for checking the consistency of annotations in one corpus or across several corpora. GREW-MATCH can then be seen as an error mining tool: when inconsistencies are detected, it helps finding the sentences which should be fixed. Finally, GREW-MATCH can also be used as a side tool to assist annotation tasks helping to find annotation examples in existing corpora to be compared to the data to be annotated.
summary: This paper presents how the online tool GREW-MATCH can be used to make queries and visualise data from existing semantically annotated corpora. A dedicated syntax is available to construct simple to complex queries and execute them against a corpus. Such queries give transverse views of the annotated data, these views can help for checking the consistency of annotations in one corpus or across several corpora. GREW-MATCH can then be seen as an error mining tool: when inconsistencies are detected, it helps finding the sentences which should be fixed. Finally, GREW-MATCH can also be used as a side tool to assist annotation tasks helping to find annotation examples in existing corpora to be compared to the data to be annotated.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了如何使用在线工具 GREW-MATCH 从现有语义注释语料库中进行查询和可视化数据。专用语法可用于构造简单到复杂的查询并针对语料库执行它们。此类查询给出了注释数据的横向视图，这些视图可以帮助检查一个语料库或多个语料库中注释的一致性。 GREW-MATCH 可以被视为一种错误挖掘工具：当检测到不一致时，它有助于找到应该修复的句子。最后，GREW-MATCH 还可以用作辅助注释任务的辅助工具，帮助在现有语料库中查找注释示例，以便与要注释的数据进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为GREW-MATCH的在线工具，用于查询和可视化语义标注语料库中的数据，以检查标注一致性并辅助标注任务。
AI.motivation: 现有语料库的语义标注可能存在不一致，需工具支持跨语料库的一致性检查及标注辅助。
AI.method: 采用专用语法构建查询，通过执行查询获取语料库的跨数据视图，以检测标注不一致。
AI.result: 实现了GREW-MATCH工具，能有效检测标注不一致，辅助修正和标注任务。
AI.conclusion: GREW-MATCH作为语义标注的一致性检查和标注辅助工具，能有效提升语料库质量与标注效率。

authors_text: Azin Jahedi,Lukas Mehl,Marc Rivinius,Andrés Bruhn
title: Multi-Scale RAFT: Combining Hierarchical Concepts for Learning-based Optical FLow Estimation
title_zh: 多尺度 RAFT：结合分层概念进行基于学习的光流估计
abstract: Many classical and learning-based optical flow methods rely on hierarchical concepts to improve both accuracy and robustness. However, one of the currently most successful approaches -- RAFT -- hardly exploits such concepts. In this work, we show that multi-scale ideas are still valuable. More precisely, using RAFT as a baseline, we propose a novel multi-scale neural network that combines several hierarchical concepts within a single estimation framework. These concepts include (i) a partially shared coarse-to-fine architecture, (ii) multi-scale features, (iii) a hierarchical cost volume and (iv) a multi-scale multi-iteration loss. Experiments on MPI Sintel and KITTI clearly demonstrate the benefits of our approach. They show not only substantial improvements compared to RAFT, but also state-of-the-art results -- in particular in non-occluded regions. Code will be available at https://github.com/cv-stuttgart/MS_RAFT.
summary: Many classical and learning-based optical flow methods rely on hierarchical concepts to improve both accuracy and robustness. However, one of the currently most successful approaches -- RAFT -- hardly exploits such concepts. In this work, we show that multi-scale ideas are still valuable. More precisely, using RAFT as a baseline, we propose a novel multi-scale neural network that combines several hierarchical concepts within a single estimation framework. These concepts include (i) a partially shared coarse-to-fine architecture, (ii) multi-scale features, (iii) a hierarchical cost volume and (iv) a multi-scale multi-iteration loss. Experiments on MPI Sintel and KITTI clearly demonstrate the benefits of our approach. They show not only substantial improvements compared to RAFT, but also state-of-the-art results -- in particular in non-occluded regions. Code will be available at https://github.com/cv-stuttgart/MS_RAFT.
abstract_zh: 许多经典的和基于学习的光流方法依赖于分层概念来提高准确性和鲁棒性。然而，目前最成功的方法之一——RAFT——几乎没有利用这些概念。在这项工作中，我们表明多尺度想法仍然有价值。更准确地说，使用 RAFT 作为基线，我们提出了一种新颖的多尺度神经网络，它将多个层次概念结合在一个估计框架内。这些概念包括（i）部分共享的从粗到细的架构，（ii）多尺度特征，（iii）分层成本量和（iv）多尺度多迭代损失。 MPI Sintel 和 KITTI 上的实验清楚地证明了我们方法的好处。与 RAFT 相比，它们不仅显示出显着的改进，而且还显示出最先进的结果——特别是在非遮挡区域。代码可在 https://github.com/cv-stuttgart/MS_RAFT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合多尺度和层次化概念的改进型RAFT模型，用于提升基于学习的光流估计性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管层次化方法能提升光流估计的精度和鲁棒性，但当前主流的RAFT方法未充分挖掘多尺度特性，而实验表明多尺度思想仍具有优化价值。
AI.method: 设计包含部分共享的粗到细架构、多尺度特征提取、分层代价体积以及多尺度多迭代损失函数的统一框架，整合多种层次化概念。
AI.result: 在MPI Sintel和KITTI数据集上相较原始RAFT实现显著提升，尤其在非遮挡区域达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度层次化设计有效增强了光流估计的准确性，代码开源便于后续研究验证。

tldr: 本文提出一种结合多尺度和层次化概念的改进型RAFT模型，用于提升基于学习的光流估计性能。
motivation: 尽管层次化方法能提升光流估计的精度和鲁棒性，但当前主流的RAFT方法未充分挖掘多尺度特性，而实验表明多尺度思想仍具有优化价值。
method: 设计包含部分共享的粗到细架构、多尺度特征提取、分层代价体积以及多尺度多迭代损失函数的统一框架，整合多种层次化概念。
result: 在MPI Sintel和KITTI数据集上相较原始RAFT实现显著提升，尤其在非遮挡区域达到当时最优性能。
conclusion: 多尺度层次化设计有效增强了光流估计的准确性，代码开源便于后续研究验证。
search_text: Multi-Scale RAFT: Combining Hierarchical Concepts for Learning-based Optical FLow Estimation 多尺度 RAFT：结合分层概念进行基于学习的光流估计 Many classical and learning-based optical flow methods rely on hierarchical concepts to improve both accuracy and robustness. However, one of the currently most successful approaches -- RAFT -- hardly exploits such concepts. In this work, we show that multi-scale ideas are still valuable. More precisely, using RAFT as a baseline, we propose a novel multi-scale neural network that combines several hierarchical concepts within a single estimation framework. These concepts include (i) a partially shared coarse-to-fine architecture, (ii) multi-scale features, (iii) a hierarchical cost volume and (iv) a multi-scale multi-iteration loss. Experiments on MPI Sintel and KITTI clearly demonstrate the benefits of our approach. They show not only substantial improvements compared to RAFT, but also state-of-the-art results -- in particular in non-occluded regions. Code will be available at https://github.com/cv-stuttgart/MS_RAFT. 许多经典的和基于学习的光流方法依赖于分层概念来提高准确性和鲁棒性。然而，目前最成功的方法之一——RAFT——几乎没有利用这些概念。在这项工作中，我们表明多尺度想法仍然有价值。更准确地说，使用 RAFT 作为基线，我们提出了一种新颖的多尺度神经网络，它将多个层次概念结合在一个估计框架内。这些概念包括（i）部分共享的从粗到细的架构，（ii）多尺度特征，（iii）分层成本量和（iv）多尺度多迭代损失。 MPI Sintel 和 KITTI 上的实验清楚地证明了我们方法的好处。与 RAFT 相比，它们不仅显示出显着的改进，而且还显示出最先进的结果——特别是在非遮挡区域。代码可在 https://github.com/cv-stuttgart/MS_RAFT 获取。 本文提出一种结合多尺度和层次化概念的改进型RAFT模型，用于提升基于学习的光流估计性能。 Azin Jahedi,Lukas Mehl,Marc Rivinius,Andrés Bruhn cs.CV

authors_text: Maria Boritchev,Maxime Amblard
title: A Multi-Party Dialogue Ressource in French
title_zh: 法语多方对话资源
comment: ef:13th Edition of Language Resources and Evaluation Conference (LREC 2022), Jun 2022, Marseille, France
comments: ef:13th Edition of Language Resources and Evaluation Conference (LREC 2022), Jun 2022, Marseille, France
abstract: We present Dialogues in Games (DinG), a corpus of manual transcriptions of real-life, oral, spontaneous multi-party dialogues between French-speaking players of the board game Catan. Our objective is to make available a quality resource for French, composed of long dialogues, to facilitate their study in the style of (Asher et al., 2016). In a general dialogue setting, participants share personal information, which makes it impossible to disseminate the resource freely and openly. In DinG, the attention of the participants is focused on the game, which prevents them from talking about themselves. In addition, we are conducting a study on the nature of the questions in dialogue, through annotation (Cruz Blandon et al., 2019), in order to develop more natural automatic dialogue systems.
summary: We present Dialogues in Games (DinG), a corpus of manual transcriptions of real-life, oral, spontaneous multi-party dialogues between French-speaking players of the board game Catan. Our objective is to make available a quality resource for French, composed of long dialogues, to facilitate their study in the style of (Asher et al., 2016). In a general dialogue setting, participants share personal information, which makes it impossible to disseminate the resource freely and openly. In DinG, the attention of the participants is focused on the game, which prevents them from talking about themselves. In addition, we are conducting a study on the nature of the questions in dialogue, through annotation (Cruz Blandon et al., 2019), in order to develop more natural automatic dialogue systems.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了游戏中的对话 (DinG)，这是棋盘游戏《卡坦岛》中法语玩家之间真实、口头、自发的多方对话的手动转录语料库。我们的目标是为法语提供由长对话组成的优质资源，以促进他们以（Asher 等人，2016）的风格进行学习。在一般的对话环境中，参与者共享个人信息，这使得资源无法自由、公开地传播。在DinG中，参与者的注意力集中在游戏上，这阻止了他们谈论自己。此外，我们正在通过注释对对话中问题的性质进行研究（Cruz Blandon et al., 2019），以开发更自然的自动对话系统。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了DinG语料库，包含法语玩家在桌游《卡坦》中的多方对话转录，旨在为法语对话研究提供高质量资源。
AI.motivation: 传统对话资源因涉及个人隐私难以公开共享，而游戏场景下玩家聚焦游戏内容可避免隐私泄露，同时推动自然对话系统研究。
AI.method: 通过手动转录法语玩家真实游戏对话，结合对话问题类型标注方法（Cruz Blandon et al., 2019）构建语料库。
AI.result: 创建了包含长对话的DinG资源，完成对话问题标注，为法语对话分析和自动对话系统开发提供基础数据。
AI.conclusion: DinG语料库解决了隐私限制问题，为法语多轮对话研究及自然对话系统优化提供了可靠资源。

authors_text: Xuelian Cheng,Yiran Zhong,Mehrtash Harandi,Tom Drummond,Zhiyong Wang,Zongyuan Ge
title: Deep Laparoscopic Stereo Matching with Transformers
title_zh: 深度腹腔镜立体匹配变形金刚
comment: Accepted to MICCAI 2022; Xuelian Cheng and Yiran Zhong made equal contributions. Code:https://github.com/XuelianCheng/HybridStereoNet-main.git
comments: Accepted to MICCAI 2022; Xuelian Cheng and Yiran Zhong made equal contributions. Code:https://github.com/XuelianCheng/HybridStereoNet-main.git
abstract: The self-attention mechanism, successfully employed with the transformer structure is shown promise in many computer vision tasks including image recognition, and object detection. Despite the surge, the use of the transformer for the problem of stereo matching remains relatively unexplored. In this paper, we comprehensively investigate the use of the transformer for the problem of stereo matching, especially for laparoscopic videos, and propose a new hybrid deep stereo matching framework (HybridStereoNet) that combines the best of the CNN and the transformer in a unified design. To be specific, we investigate several ways to introduce transformers to volumetric stereo matching pipelines by analyzing the loss landscape of the designs and in-domain/cross-domain accuracy. Our analysis suggests that employing transformers for feature representation learning, while using CNNs for cost aggregation will lead to faster convergence, higher accuracy and better generalization than other options. Our extensive experiments on Sceneflow, SCARED2019 and dVPN datasets demonstrate the superior performance of our HybridStereoNet.
summary: The self-attention mechanism, successfully employed with the transformer structure is shown promise in many computer vision tasks including image recognition, and object detection. Despite the surge, the use of the transformer for the problem of stereo matching remains relatively unexplored. In this paper, we comprehensively investigate the use of the transformer for the problem of stereo matching, especially for laparoscopic videos, and propose a new hybrid deep stereo matching framework (HybridStereoNet) that combines the best of the CNN and the transformer in a unified design. To be specific, we investigate several ways to introduce transformers to volumetric stereo matching pipelines by analyzing the loss landscape of the designs and in-domain/cross-domain accuracy. Our analysis suggests that employing transformers for feature representation learning, while using CNNs for cost aggregation will lead to faster convergence, higher accuracy and better generalization than other options. Our extensive experiments on Sceneflow, SCARED2019 and dVPN datasets demonstrate the superior performance of our HybridStereoNet.
abstract_zh: 成功应用于变压器结构的自注意力机制在包括图像识别和物体检测在内的许多计算机视觉任务中表现出了良好的前景。尽管出现了激增，但使用变压器解决立体声匹配问题仍然相对未被探索。在本文中，我们全面研究了 Transformer 在立体匹配问题上的使用，特别是腹腔镜视频，并提出了一种新的混合深度立体匹配框架（HybridStereoNet），它将 CNN 和 Transformer 的优点结合在统一的设计中。具体来说，我们通过分析设计的损耗情况和域内/跨域精度，研究了将变压器引入体积立体匹配管道的几种方法。我们的分析表明，使用 Transformer 进行特征表示学习，同时使用 CNN 进行成本聚合，将比其他选项实现更快的收敛、更高的准确性和更好的泛化能力。我们在 Sceneflow、SCARED2019 和 dVPN 数据集上进行的广泛实验证明了我们的 HybridStereoNet 的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和Transformer的混合立体匹配框架HybridStereoNet，专门用于腹腔镜视频的立体匹配任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer在计算机视觉任务中表现出色，但其在立体匹配领域的应用，尤其是腹腔镜视频场景下，仍缺乏深入研究。
AI.method: 通过分析损失景观和领域内/跨领域准确性，探讨多种将Transformer融入体素立体匹配流程的方式，最终确定结合CNN进行代价聚合、Transformer进行特征学习的混合架构。
AI.result: 在Sceneflow、SCARED2019和dVPN数据集上的实验表明，HybridStereoNet在收敛速度、准确性和泛化能力上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 将Transformer用于特征表示学习、CNN用于代价聚合的混合设计，能有效提升立体匹配性能，尤其适用于腹腔镜视频场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和Transformer的混合立体匹配框架HybridStereoNet，专门用于腹腔镜视频的立体匹配任务。

ai_content.result: 在Sceneflow、SCARED2019和dVPN数据集上的实验表明，HybridStereoNet在收敛速度、准确性和泛化能力上均优于现有方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 将Transformer用于特征表示学习、CNN用于代价聚合的混合设计，能有效提升立体匹配性能，尤其适用于腹腔镜视频场景。

authors_text: Samay Lakhani
title: Applying Spatiotemporal Attention to Identify Distracted and Drowsy Driving with Vision Transformers
title_zh: 利用视觉变压器应用时空注意力来识别分心和昏昏欲睡的驾驶
abstract: A 20% rise in car crashes in 2021 compared to 2020 has been observed as a result of increased distraction and drowsiness. Drowsy and distracted driving are the cause of 45% of all car crashes. As a means to decrease drowsy and distracted driving, detection methods using computer vision can be designed to be low-cost, accurate, and minimally invasive. This work investigated the use of the vision transformer to outperform state-of-the-art accuracy from 3D-CNNs. Two separate transformers were trained for drowsiness and distractedness. The drowsy video transformer model was trained on the National Tsing-Hua University Drowsy Driving Dataset (NTHU-DDD) with a Video Swin Transformer model for 10 epochs on two classes -- drowsy and non-drowsy simulated over 10.5 hours. The distracted video transformer was trained on the Driver Monitoring Dataset (DMD) with Video Swin Transformer for 50 epochs over 9 distraction-related classes. The accuracy of the drowsiness model reached 44% and a high loss value on the test set, indicating overfitting and poor model performance. Overfitting indicates limited training data and applied model architecture lacked quantifiable parameters to learn. The distracted model outperformed state-of-the-art models on DMD reaching 97.5%, indicating that with sufficient data and a strong architecture, transformers are suitable for unfit driving detection. Future research should use newer and stronger models such as TokenLearner to achieve higher accuracy and efficiency, merge existing datasets to expand to detecting drunk driving and road rage to create a comprehensive solution to prevent traffic crashes, and deploying a functioning prototype to revolutionize the automotive safety industry.

The distracted video transformer was trained on the Driver Monitoring Dataset (DMD) with Video Swin Transformer for 50 epochs over 9 distraction-related classes. The accuracy of the drowsiness model reached 44% and a high loss value on the test set, indicating overfitting and poor model performance. Overfitting indicates limited training data and applied model architecture lacked quantifiable parameters to learn. The distracted model outperformed state-of-the-art models on DMD reaching 97.5%, indicating that with sufficient data and a strong architecture, transformers are suitable for unfit driving detection. Future research should use newer and stronger models such as TokenLearner to achieve higher accuracy and efficiency, merge existing datasets to expand to detecting drunk driving and road rage to create a comprehensive solution to prevent traffic crashes, and deploying a functioning prototype to revolutionize the automotive safety industry.
abstract_zh: 与 2020 年相比，2021 年的车祸数量增加了 20%，原因是注意力分散和困倦增加。 45% 的车祸是由疲劳驾驶和分心驾驶造成的。作为减少疲劳驾驶和分心驾驶的一种手段，使用计算机视觉的检测方法可以设计成低成本、准确且微创的。这项工作研究了视觉转换器的使用，以超越 3D-CNN 的最先进精度。两个独立的变形金刚接受了嗜睡和分心训练。昏昏欲睡的视频 Transformer 模型在国立清华大学昏昏欲睡驾驶数据集 (NTHU-DDD) 上使用 Video Swin Transformer 模型进行训练，针对两个类别（模拟昏昏欲睡和非昏昏欲睡）进行 10 个 epoch，历时 10.5 小时。使用 Video Swin Transformer 在驾驶员监控数据集 (DMD) 上对分心视频 Transformer 进行了 9 个分心相关类别的 50 个 epoch 训练。睡意模型的准确率达到了 44%，并且在测试集上的损失值很高，表明存在过拟合且模型性能较差。过度拟合表明训练数据有限，并且应用的模型架构缺乏可学习的量化参数。分心模型在 DMD 上的表现优于最先进的模型，达到 97.5%，这表明有了足够的数据和强大的架构，Transformer 适合进行不适宜驾驶检测。未来的研究应该使用更新、更强大的模型（例如 TokenLearner）来实现更高的准确性和效率，合并现有数据集以扩展到检测醉酒驾驶和路怒症，以创建预防交通事故的全面解决方案，并部署功能原型来彻底改变汽车安全行业。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究利用视觉Transformer模型检测疲劳驾驶和分心驾驶行为，以提升交通安全。
AI.motivation: 2021年因分心和疲劳驾驶导致的交通事故增加20%，占所有事故的45%。传统方法存在精度不足问题，需开发低成本、高精度的计算机视觉检测方案。
AI.method: 采用Video Swin Transformer架构，分别训练两个独立模型：使用NTHU-DDD数据集训练疲劳检测模型（10个epoch），使用DMD数据集训练分心检测模型（50个epoch）。
AI.result: 疲劳检测模型测试准确率仅44%且存在过拟合，分心检测模型在DMD数据集上达到97.5%准确率，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Transformer在充足数据和优化架构下表现优异，未来需采用更先进模型（如TokenLearner）、整合多数据集扩展检测范围，并推动原型部署落地。

search_text: Applying Spatiotemporal Attention to Identify Distracted and Drowsy Driving with Vision Transformers 利用视觉变压器应用时空注意力来识别分心和昏昏欲睡的驾驶 A 20% rise in car crashes in 2021 compared to 2020 has been observed as a result of increased distraction and drowsiness. Drowsy and distracted driving are the cause of 45% of all car crashes. As a means to decrease drowsy and distracted driving, detection methods using computer vision can be designed to be low-cost, accurate, and minimally invasive. This work investigated the use of the vision transformer to outperform state-of-the-art accuracy from 3D-CNNs. Two separate transformers were trained for drowsiness and distractedness. The drowsy video transformer model was trained on the National Tsing-Hua University Drowsy Driving Dataset (NTHU-DDD) with a Video Swin Transformer model for 10 epochs on two classes -- drowsy and non-drowsy simulated over 10.5 hours. The distracted video transformer was trained on the Driver Monitoring Dataset (DMD) with Video Swin Transformer for 50 epochs over 9 distraction-related classes. The accuracy of the drowsiness model reached 44% and a high loss value on the test set, indicating overfitting and poor model performance. Overfitting indicates limited training data and applied model architecture lacked quantifiable parameters to learn. The distracted model outperformed state-of-the-art models on DMD reaching 97.5%, indicating that with sufficient data and a strong architecture, transformers are suitable for unfit driving detection. Future research should use newer and stronger models such as TokenLearner to achieve higher accuracy and efficiency, merge existing datasets to expand to detecting drunk driving and road rage to create a comprehensive solution to prevent traffic crashes, and deploying a functioning prototype to revolutionize the automotive safety industry. 与 2020 年相比，2021 年的车祸数量增加了 20%，原因是注意力分散和困倦增加。 45% 的车祸是由疲劳驾驶和分心驾驶造成的。作为减少疲劳驾驶和分心驾驶的一种手段，使用计算机视觉的检测方法可以设计成低成本、准确且微创的。这项工作研究了视觉转换器的使用，以超越 3D-CNN 的最先进精度。两个独立的变形金刚接受了嗜睡和分心训练。昏昏欲睡的视频 Transformer 模型在国立清华大学昏昏欲睡驾驶数据集 (NTHU-DDD) 上使用 Video Swin Transformer 模型进行训练，针对两个类别（模拟昏昏欲睡和非昏昏欲睡）进行 10 个 epoch，历时 10.5 小时。使用 Video Swin Transformer 在驾驶员监控数据集 (DMD) 上对分心视频 Transformer 进行了 9 个分心相关类别的 50 个 epoch 训练。睡意模型的准确率达到了 44%，并且在测试集上的损失值很高，表明存在过拟合且模型性能较差。过度拟合表明训练数据有限，并且应用的模型架构缺乏可学习的量化参数。分心模型在 DMD 上的表现优于最先进的模型，达到 97.5%，这表明有了足够的数据和强大的架构，Transformer 适合进行不适宜驾驶检测。未来的研究应该使用更新、更强大的模型（例如 TokenLearner）来实现更高的准确性和效率，合并现有数据集以扩展到检测醉酒驾驶和路怒症，以创建预防交通事故的全面解决方案，并部署功能原型来彻底改变汽车安全行业。 本论文研究利用视觉Transformer模型检测疲劳驾驶和分心驾驶行为，以提升交通安全。 Samay Lakhani cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Michał Stolarz,Alex Mitrevski,Mohammad Wasil,Paul G. Plöger
title: Personalised Robot Behaviour Modelling for Robot-Assisted Therapy in the Context of Autism Spectrum Disorder
title_zh: 自闭症谱系障碍背景下机器人辅助治疗的个性化机器人行为建模
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 6th Workshop on Behavior Adaptation and Learning for Assistive Robotics (BAILAR) at RO-MAN 2022
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 6th Workshop on Behavior Adaptation and Learning for Assistive Robotics (BAILAR) at RO-MAN 2022
abstract: In robot-assisted therapy for individuals with Autism Spectrum Disorder, the workload of therapists during a therapeutic session is increased if they have to control the robot manually. To allow therapists to focus on the interaction with the person instead, the robot should be more autonomous, namely it should be able to interpret the person's state and continuously adapt its actions according to their behaviour. In this paper, we develop a personalised robot behaviour model that can be used in the robot decision-making process during an activity; this behaviour model is trained with the help of a user model that has been learned from real interaction data. We use Q-learning for this task, such that the results demonstrate that the policy requires about 10,000 iterations to converge. We thus investigate policy transfer for improving the convergence speed; we show that this is a feasible solution, but an inappropriate initial policy can lead to a suboptimal final return.
summary: In robot-assisted therapy for individuals with Autism Spectrum Disorder, the workload of therapists during a therapeutic session is increased if they have to control the robot manually. To allow therapists to focus on the interaction with the person instead, the robot should be more autonomous, namely it should be able to interpret the person's state and continuously adapt its actions according to their behaviour. In this paper, we develop a personalised robot behaviour model that can be used in the robot decision-making process during an activity; this behaviour model is trained with the help of a user model that has been learned from real interaction data. We use Q-learning for this task, such that the results demonstrate that the policy requires about 10,000 iterations to converge. We thus investigate policy transfer for improving the convergence speed; we show that this is a feasible solution, but an inappropriate initial policy can lead to a suboptimal final return.
abstract_zh: 在对自闭症谱系障碍患者进行机器人辅助治疗时，如果治疗师必须手动控制机器人，他们在治疗过程中的工作量就会增加。为了让治疗师能够专注于与人的互动，机器人应该更加自主，即它应该能够解释人的状态并根据他们的行为不断调整其行动。在本文中，我们开发了一种个性化机器人行为模型，可用于机器人在活动期间的决策过程；该行为模型是在从真实交互数据中学习的用户模型的帮助下进行训练的。我们使用 Q 学习来完成此任务，结果表明该策略需要大约 10,000 次迭代才能收敛。因此，我们研究政策转移以提高收敛速度；我们证明这是一个可行的解决方案，但不适当的初始政策可能会导致最终回报不理想。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种个性化机器人行为模型，用于在自闭症谱系障碍的机器人辅助治疗中，通过自主适应患者行为来减少治疗师的工作负担。
AI.motivation: 在机器人辅助治疗中，治疗师需手动控制机器人会增加工作负荷，需使机器人能自主解读患者状态并动态调整行为以提升治疗效率。
AI.method: 基于Q学习算法，结合从真实交互数据中学习的用户模型训练机器人行为策略，并通过策略迁移技术优化收敛速度。
AI.result: 实验表明策略需约10,000次迭代收敛，但不恰当的初始策略会导致最终效果次优。
AI.conclusion: 策略迁移可提升收敛效率，但初始策略质量对最终治疗效果具有关键影响。

Plöger cs.RO

authors_text: Jie Wang,Xiao-Lei Zhang
title: Improving Pseudo Labels With Intra-Class Similarity for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 通过类内相似性改进伪标签以实现无监督域适应
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) transfers knowledge from a label-rich source domain to a different but related fully-unlabeled target domain. To address the problem of domain shift, more and more UDA methods adopt pseudo labels of the target samples to improve the generalization ability on the target domain. However, inaccurate pseudo labels of the target samples may yield suboptimal performance with error accumulation during the optimization process. Moreover, once the pseudo labels are generated, how to remedy the generated pseudo labels is far from explored. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to improve the accuracy of the pseudo labels in the target domain. It first generates coarse pseudo labels by a conventional UDA method. Then, it iteratively exploits the intra-class similarity of the target samples for improving the generated coarse pseudo labels, and aligns the source and target domains with the improved pseudo labels. The accuracy improvement of the pseudo labels is made by first deleting dissimilar samples, and then using spanning trees to eliminate the samples with the wrong pseudo labels in the intra-class samples. We have applied the proposed approach to several conventional UDA methods as an additional term. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can boost the accuracy of the pseudo labels and further lead to more discriminative and domain invariant features than the conventional baselines.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) transfers knowledge from a label-rich source domain to a different but related fully-unlabeled target domain. To address the problem of domain shift, more and more UDA methods adopt pseudo labels of the target samples to improve the generalization ability on the target domain. However, inaccurate pseudo labels of the target samples may yield suboptimal performance with error accumulation during the optimization process. Moreover, once the pseudo labels are generated, how to remedy the generated pseudo labels is far from explored. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to improve the accuracy of the pseudo labels in the target domain. It first generates coarse pseudo labels by a conventional UDA method. Then, it iteratively exploits the intra-class similarity of the target samples for improving the generated coarse pseudo labels, and aligns the source and target domains with the improved pseudo labels. The accuracy improvement of the pseudo labels is made by first deleting dissimilar samples, and then using spanning trees to eliminate the samples with the wrong pseudo labels in the intra-class samples. We have applied the proposed approach to several conventional UDA methods as an additional term. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can boost the accuracy of the pseudo labels and further lead to more discriminative and domain invariant features than the conventional baselines.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应 (UDA) 将知识从标签丰富的源域转移到不同但相关的完全未标记的目标域。为了解决域转移问题，越来越多的UDA方法采用目标样本的伪标签来提高在目标域上的泛化能力。然而，目标样本的不准确伪标签可能会产生次优性能，并在优化过程中累积错误。而且，一旦生成了伪标签，如何补救生成的伪标签还远未探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法来提高目标域中伪标签的准确性。它首先通过传统的 UDA 方法生成粗略的伪标签。然后，它迭代地利用目标样本的类内相似性来改进生成的粗略伪标签，并将源域和目标域与改进的伪标签对齐。通过首先删除不相似的样本，然后使用生成树来消除类内样本中伪标签错误的样本，从而提高伪标签的准确性。我们已将所提出的方法作为附加术语应用于几种传统的 UDA 方法。实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以提高伪标签的准确性，并进一步产生比传统基线更具辨别力和领域不变的特征。

AI.tldr: 通过类内相似性提升无监督域适应中伪标签的准确性
AI.motivation: 现有UDA方法生成的伪标签可能不准确，导致误差累积，且修正伪标签的研究不足
AI.method: 先生成粗伪标签，再利用类内相似性迭代优化，并通过生成树消除错误伪标签的样本

search_text: Improving Pseudo Labels With Intra-Class Similarity for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation 通过类内相似性改进伪标签以实现无监督域适应 Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) transfers knowledge from a label-rich source domain to a different but related fully-unlabeled target domain. To address the problem of domain shift, more and more UDA methods adopt pseudo labels of the target samples to improve the generalization ability on the target domain. However, inaccurate pseudo labels of the target samples may yield suboptimal performance with error accumulation during the optimization process. Moreover, once the pseudo labels are generated, how to remedy the generated pseudo labels is far from explored. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to improve the accuracy of the pseudo labels in the target domain. It first generates coarse pseudo labels by a conventional UDA method. Then, it iteratively exploits the intra-class similarity of the target samples for improving the generated coarse pseudo labels, and aligns the source and target domains with the improved pseudo labels. The accuracy improvement of the pseudo labels is made by first deleting dissimilar samples, and then using spanning trees to eliminate the samples with the wrong pseudo labels in the intra-class samples. We have applied the proposed approach to several conventional UDA methods as an additional term. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can boost the accuracy of the pseudo labels and further lead to more discriminative and domain invariant features than the conventional baselines. 无监督域适应 (UDA) 将知识从标签丰富的源域转移到不同但相关的完全未标记的目标域。为了解决域转移问题，越来越多的UDA方法采用目标样本的伪标签来提高在目标域上的泛化能力。然而，目标样本的不准确伪标签可能会产生次优性能，并在优化过程中累积错误。而且，一旦生成了伪标签，如何补救生成的伪标签还远未探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法来提高目标域中伪标签的准确性。它首先通过传统的 UDA 方法生成粗略的伪标签。然后，它迭代地利用目标样本的类内相似性来改进生成的粗略伪标签，并将源域和目标域与改进的伪标签对齐。通过首先删除不相似的样本，然后使用生成树来消除类内样本中伪标签错误的样本，从而提高伪标签的准确性。我们已将所提出的方法作为附加术语应用于几种传统的 UDA 方法。实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以提高伪标签的准确性，并进一步产生比传统基线更具辨别力和领域不变的特征。 通过类内相似性提升无监督域适应中伪标签的准确性 Jie Wang,Xiao-Lei Zhang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Guo Yu,Lianbo Ma,Wei Du,Wenli Du,Yaochu Jin
title: Towards Fairness-Aware Multi-Objective Optimization
title_zh: 迈向公平感知的多目标优化
abstract: Recent years have seen the rapid development of fairness-aware machine learning in mitigating unfairness or discrimination in decision-making in a wide range of applications. However, much less attention has been paid to the fairness-aware multi-objective optimization, which is indeed commonly seen in real life, such as fair resource allocation problems and data driven multi-objective optimization problems. This paper aims to illuminate and broaden our understanding of multi-objective optimization from the perspective of fairness. To this end, we start with a discussion of user preferences in multi-objective optimization and then explore its relationship to fairness in machine learning and multi-objective optimization. Following the above discussions, representative cases of fairness-aware multiobjective optimization are presented, further elaborating the importance of fairness in traditional multi-objective optimization, data-driven optimization and federated optimization. Finally, challenges and opportunities in fairness-aware multi-objective optimization are addressed. We hope that this article makes a small step forward towards understanding fairness in the context of optimization and promote research interest in fairness-aware multi-objective optimization.
summary: Recent years have seen the rapid development of fairness-aware machine learning in mitigating unfairness or discrimination in decision-making in a wide range of applications. However, much less attention has been paid to the fairness-aware multi-objective optimization, which is indeed commonly seen in real life, such as fair resource allocation problems and data driven multi-objective optimization problems. This paper aims to illuminate and broaden our understanding of multi-objective optimization from the perspective of fairness. To this end, we start with a discussion of user preferences in multi-objective optimization and then explore its relationship to fairness in machine learning and multi-objective optimization. Following the above discussions, representative cases of fairness-aware multiobjective optimization are presented, further elaborating the importance of fairness in traditional multi-objective optimization, data-driven optimization and federated optimization. Finally, challenges and opportunities in fairness-aware multi-objective optimization are addressed. We hope that this article makes a small step forward towards understanding fairness in the context of optimization and promote research interest in fairness-aware multi-objective optimization.
abstract_zh: 近年来，公平感知机器学习在减轻决策中的不公平或歧视方面取得了快速发展，在广泛的应用中。然而，对于现实生活中确实常见的公平感知多目标优化，例如公平资源分配问题和数据驱动的多目标优化问题，人们的关注却少之又少。本文旨在从公平的角度阐明和拓宽我们对多目标优化的理解。为此，我们首先讨论多目标优化中的用户偏好，然后探讨其与机器学习和多目标优化中的公平性的关系。基于上述讨论，给出了公平感知多目标优化的代表性案例，进一步阐述了公平性在传统多目标优化、数据驱动优化和联邦优化中的重要性。最后，讨论了公平感知多目标优化中的挑战和机遇。我们希望本文能够在理解优化背景下的公平性方面迈出一小步，并促进对公平感知多目标优化的研究兴趣。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从公平性角度探讨多目标优化问题，分析其在资源分配和数据驱动场景中的重要性，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对公平感知的多目标优化关注不足，而现实中的资源分配和优化问题常涉及公平性需求，需深入理解其与用户偏好的关系。
AI.method: 通过分析用户偏好与公平性的关联，结合传统多目标优化、数据驱动优化及联邦优化的典型案例，探讨公平性约束的融入方式。
AI.result: 明确了公平性在多目标优化中的关键作用，指出现有方法的局限性，并提出了公平感知优化在不同场景下的挑战与研究机会。
AI.conclusion: 本文为公平性导向的优化研究提供了理论框架，呼吁学术界加强对公平感知多目标优化问题的关注与探索。

authors_text: Navin Raj Prabhu,Nale Lehmann-Willenbrock,Timo Gerkmann
title: Label Uncertainty Modeling and Prediction for Speech Emotion Recognition using t-Distributions
title_zh: 使用 t 分布进行语音情感识别的标签不确定性建模和预测
comment: ACCEPTED to ACII 2022 -10th INTERNATIONAL CONFERENCE ON AFFECTIVE COMPUTING & INTELLIGENT INTERACTION
comments: ACCEPTED to ACII 2022 -10th INTERNATIONAL CONFERENCE ON AFFECTIVE COMPUTING & INTELLIGENT INTERACTION
abstract: As different people perceive others' emotional expressions differently, their annotation in terms of arousal and valence are per se subjective. To address this, these emotion annotations are typically collected by multiple annotators and averaged across annotators in order to obtain labels for arousal and valence. However, besides the average, also the uncertainty of a label is of interest, and should also be modeled and predicted for automatic emotion recognition. In the literature, for simplicity, label uncertainty modeling is commonly approached with a Gaussian assumption on the collected annotations. However, as the number of annotators is typically rather small due to resource constraints, we argue that the Gaussian approach is a rather crude assumption. In contrast, in this work we propose to model the label distribution using a Student's t-distribution which allows us to account for the number of annotations available. With this model, we derive the corresponding Kullback-Leibler divergence based loss function and use it to train an estimator for the distribution of emotion labels, from which the mean and uncertainty can be inferred. Through qualitative and quantitative analysis, we show the benefits of the t-distribution over a Gaussian distribution. We validate our proposed method on the AVEC'16 dataset. Results reveal that our t-distribution based approach improves over the Gaussian approach with state-of-the-art uncertainty modeling results in speech-based emotion recognition, along with an optimal and even faster convergence.
summary: As different people perceive others' emotional expressions differently, their annotation in terms of arousal and valence are per se subjective. To address this, these emotion annotations are typically collected by multiple annotators and averaged across annotators in order to obtain labels for arousal and valence. However, besides the average, also the uncertainty of a label is of interest, and should also be modeled and predicted for automatic emotion recognition. In the literature, for simplicity, label uncertainty modeling is commonly approached with a Gaussian assumption on the collected annotations. However, as the number of annotators is typically rather small due to resource constraints, we argue that the Gaussian approach is a rather crude assumption. In contrast, in this work we propose to model the label distribution using a Student's t-distribution which allows us to account for the number of annotations available. With this model, we derive the corresponding Kullback-Leibler divergence based loss function and use it to train an estimator for the distribution of emotion labels, from which the mean and uncertainty can be inferred. Through qualitative and quantitative analysis, we show the benefits of the t-distribution over a Gaussian distribution. We validate our proposed method on the AVEC'16 dataset. Results reveal that our t-distribution based approach improves over the Gaussian approach with state-of-the-art uncertainty modeling results in speech-based emotion recognition, along with an optimal and even faster convergence.
abstract_zh: 由于不同的人对他人情绪表达的感知不同，他们对唤醒度和效价的诠释本身就是主观的。为了解决这个问题，这些情绪注释通常由多个注释者收集，并在注释者之间进行平均，以获得唤醒和效价的标签。然而，除了平均值之外，标签的不确定性也很重要，也应该为自动情绪识别进行建模和预测。在文献中，为了简单起见，标签不确定性建模通常通过对收集的注释进行高斯假设来进行。然而，由于资源限制，注释器的数量通常相当小，我们认为高斯方法是一个相当粗略的假设。相比之下，在这项工作中，我们建议使用学生 t 分布对标签分布进行建模，这使我们能够考虑可用注释的数量。通过这个模型，我们推导了相应的基于 Kullback-Leibler 散度的损失函数，并用它来训练情感标签分布的估计器，从中可以推断出平均值和不确定性。通过定性和定量分析，我们展示了 t 分布相对于高斯分布的优势。我们在 AVEC'16 数据集上验证了我们提出的方法。结果表明，我们基于 t 分布的方法比高斯方法有所改进，具有最先进的不确定性建模结果，可实现基于语音的情感识别，并且具有最佳甚至更快的收敛性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用t分布建模语音情感识别中的标签不确定性，以改进传统高斯分布方法。
AI.motivation: 由于标注者数量有限，传统高斯分布假设无法准确反映标签不确定性，需更灵活的分布模型。
AI.method: 采用Student's t分布建模标签分布，推导基于KL散度的损失函数，训练估计器获取情感标签的均值和不确定性。
AI.result: 在AVEC'16数据集上验证，t分布方法在不确定性建模和收敛速度上优于高斯分布方法。
AI.conclusion: t分布能更有效建模标签不确定性，提升语音情感识别的性能。

With this model, we derive the corresponding Kullback-Leibler divergence based loss function and use it to train an estimator for the distribution of emotion labels, from which the mean and uncertainty can be inferred. Through qualitative and quantitative analysis, we show the benefits of the t-distribution over a Gaussian distribution. We validate our proposed method on the AVEC'16 dataset. Results reveal that our t-distribution based approach improves over the Gaussian approach with state-of-the-art uncertainty modeling results in speech-based emotion recognition, along with an optimal and even faster convergence. 由于不同的人对他人情绪表达的感知不同，他们对唤醒度和效价的诠释本身就是主观的。为了解决这个问题，这些情绪注释通常由多个注释者收集，并在注释者之间进行平均，以获得唤醒和效价的标签。然而，除了平均值之外，标签的不确定性也很重要，也应该为自动情绪识别进行建模和预测。在文献中，为了简单起见，标签不确定性建模通常通过对收集的注释进行高斯假设来进行。然而，由于资源限制，注释器的数量通常相当小，我们认为高斯方法是一个相当粗略的假设。相比之下，在这项工作中，我们建议使用学生 t 分布对标签分布进行建模，这使我们能够考虑可用注释的数量。通过这个模型，我们推导了相应的基于 Kullback-Leibler 散度的损失函数，并用它来训练情感标签分布的估计器，从中可以推断出平均值和不确定性。通过定性和定量分析，我们展示了 t 分布相对于高斯分布的优势。我们在 AVEC'16 数据集上验证了我们提出的方法。结果表明，我们基于 t 分布的方法比高斯方法有所改进，具有最先进的不确定性建模结果，可实现基于语音的情感识别，并且具有最佳甚至更快的收敛性。 本文提出使用t分布建模语音情感识别中的标签不确定性，以改进传统高斯分布方法。 Navin Raj Prabhu,Nale Lehmann-Willenbrock,Timo Gerkmann eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Ehsan Kazemi
title: Complementing Semi-Supervised Learning with Uncertainty Quantification
title_zh: 用不确定性量化补充半监督学习
abstract: The problem of fully supervised classification is that it requires a tremendous amount of annotated data, however, in many datasets a large portion of data is unlabeled. To alleviate this problem semi-supervised learning (SSL) leverages the knowledge of the classifier on the labeled domain and extrapolates it to the unlabeled domain which has a supposedly similar distribution as annotated data. Recent success on SSL methods crucially hinges on thresholded pseudo labeling and thereby consistency regularization for the unlabeled domain. However, the existing methods do not incorporate the uncertainty of the pseudo labels or unlabeled samples in the training process which are due to the noisy labels or out of distribution samples owing to strong augmentations. Inspired by the recent developments in SSL, our goal in this paper is to propose a novel unsupervised uncertainty-aware objective that relies on aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty quantification. Complementing the recent techniques in SSL with the proposed uncertainty-aware loss function our approach outperforms or is on par with the state-of-the-art over standard SSL benchmarks while being computationally lightweight. Our results outperform the state-of-the-art results on complex datasets such as CIFAR-100 and Mini-ImageNet.
summary: The problem of fully supervised classification is that it requires a tremendous amount of annotated data, however, in many datasets a large portion of data is unlabeled. To alleviate this problem semi-supervised learning (SSL) leverages the knowledge of the classifier on the labeled domain and extrapolates it to the unlabeled domain which has a supposedly similar distribution as annotated data. Recent success on SSL methods crucially hinges on thresholded pseudo labeling and thereby consistency regularization for the unlabeled domain. However, the existing methods do not incorporate the uncertainty of the pseudo labels or unlabeled samples in the training process which are due to the noisy labels or out of distribution samples owing to strong augmentations. Inspired by the recent developments in SSL, our goal in this paper is to propose a novel unsupervised uncertainty-aware objective that relies on aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty quantification. Complementing the recent techniques in SSL with the proposed uncertainty-aware loss function our approach outperforms or is on par with the state-of-the-art over standard SSL benchmarks while being computationally lightweight. Our results outperform the state-of-the-art results on complex datasets such as CIFAR-100 and Mini-ImageNet.
abstract_zh: 完全监督分类的问题在于，它需要大量带注释的数据，然而，在许多数据集中，很大一部分数据是未标记的。为了缓解这个问题，半监督学习（SSL）利用分类器在标记域上的知识，并将其外推到未标记域，该域与注释数据具有相似的分布。 SSL 方法最近的成功关键取决于阈值伪标记，从而对未标记域进行一致性正则化。然而，现有的方法没有考虑训练过程中伪标签或未标记样本的不确定性，这些不确定性是由于强增强导致的噪声标签或分布样本外造成的。受 SSL 最近发展的启发，我们在本文中的目标是提出一种依赖于任意和认知不确定性量化的新型无监督不确定性感知目标。通过所提出的不确定性感知损失函数来补充 SSL 中的最新技术，我们的方法优于或与标准 SSL 基准的最新技术相当，同时计算量轻。我们的结果优于 CIFAR-100 和 Mini-ImageNet 等复杂数据集上的最新结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合不确定性量化的半监督学习方法，通过引入aleatoric和epistemic不确定性来改进现有方法对伪标签不确定性的忽略问题。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督学习方法依赖阈值伪标签和一致性正则化，但未考虑伪标签或未标注样本的不确定性，导致噪声标签或分布外样本影响模型性能。
AI.method: 设计新的不确定性感知损失函数，结合aleatoric（数据固有噪声）和epistemic（模型不确定性）量化，补充到半监督学习框架中。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100和Mini-ImageNet等复杂数据集上优于或媲美现有最先进方法，且计算开销较低。
AI.conclusion: 通过不确定性量化补充半监督学习，有效提升模型鲁棒性，尤其在复杂数据集上表现突出，且保持计算轻量化优势。

authors_text: HaeChun Chung,JooYong Shim,Jong-Kook Kim
title: Cross-Modal Contrastive Representation Learning for Audio-to-Image Generation
title_zh: 用于音频到图像生成的跨模态对比表示学习
abstract: Multiple modalities for certain information provide a variety of perspectives on that information, which can improve the understanding of the information. Thus, it may be crucial to generate data of different modality from the existing data to enhance the understanding. In this paper, we investigate the cross-modal audio-to-image generation problem and propose Cross-Modal Contrastive Representation Learning (CMCRL) to extract useful features from audios and use it in the generation phase. Experimental results show that CMCRL enhances quality of images generated than previous research.
summary: Multiple modalities for certain information provide a variety of perspectives on that information, which can improve the understanding of the information. Thus, it may be crucial to generate data of different modality from the existing data to enhance the understanding. In this paper, we investigate the cross-modal audio-to-image generation problem and propose Cross-Modal Contrastive Representation Learning (CMCRL) to extract useful features from audios and use it in the generation phase. Experimental results show that CMCRL enhances quality of images generated than previous research.
abstract_zh: 某些信息的多种模式提供了对该信息的多种视角，这可以提高对该信息的理解。因此，从现有数据中生成不同模态的数据以增强理解可能至关重要。在本文中，我们研究了跨模态音频到图像的生成问题，并提出了跨模态对比表示学习（CMCRL）来从音频中提取有用的特征并在生成阶段使用它。实验结果表明，CMCRL 比之前的研究提高了生成图像的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文研究跨模态音频到图像生成问题，提出一种对比学习方法以提升生成图像质量。
AI.motivation: 多模态信息能提供不同视角以增强理解，但现有方法在生成不同模态数据时存在不足。
AI.method: 提出跨模态对比表示学习（CMCRL），通过对比学习从音频中提取特征并用于图像生成。
AI.result: 实验表明CMCRL生成的图像质量优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CMCRL有效提升了跨模态生成效果，为音频到图像生成提供了新方法。

authors_text: Luke Wood,Francois Chollet
title: Efficient Graph-Friendly COCO Metric Computation for Train-Time Model Evaluation
title_zh: 用于训练时间模型评估的高效图形友好 COCO 度量计算
abstract: Evaluating the COCO mean average precision (MaP) and COCO recall metrics as part of the static computation graph of modern deep learning frameworks poses a unique set of challenges. These challenges include the need for maintaining a dynamic-sized state to compute mean average precision, reliance on global dataset-level statistics to compute the metrics, and managing differing numbers of bounding boxes between images in a batch. As a consequence, it is common practice for researchers and practitioners to evaluate COCO metrics as a post training evaluation step. With a graph-friendly algorithm to compute COCO Mean Average Precision and recall, these metrics could be evaluated at training time, improving visibility into the evolution of the metrics through training curve plots, and decreasing iteration time when prototyping new model versions. Our contributions include an accurate approximation algorithm for Mean Average Precision, an open source implementation of both COCO mean average precision and COCO recall, extensive numerical benchmarks to verify the accuracy of our implementations, and an open-source training loop that include train-time evaluation of mean average precision and recall.
summary: Evaluating the COCO mean average precision (MaP) and COCO recall metrics as part of the static computation graph of modern deep learning frameworks poses a unique set of challenges. These challenges include the need for maintaining a dynamic-sized state to compute mean average precision, reliance on global dataset-level statistics to compute the metrics, and managing differing numbers of bounding boxes between images in a batch. As a consequence, it is common practice for researchers and practitioners to evaluate COCO metrics as a post training evaluation step. With a graph-friendly algorithm to compute COCO Mean Average Precision and recall, these metrics could be evaluated at training time, improving visibility into the evolution of the metrics through training curve plots, and decreasing iteration time when prototyping new model versions. Our contributions include an accurate approximation algorithm for Mean Average Precision, an open source implementation of both COCO mean average precision and COCO recall, extensive numerical benchmarks to verify the accuracy of our implementations, and an open-source training loop that include train-time evaluation of mean average precision and recall.
abstract_zh: 作为现代深度学习框架静态计算图的一部分，评估 COCO 平均精度 (MaP) 和 COCO 召回指标提出了一系列独特的挑战。这些挑战包括需要维护动态大小的状态来计算平均精度、依赖全局数据集级统计来计算指标，以及管理批次中图像之间不同数量的边界框。因此，研究人员和从业者通常的做法是将评估 COCO 指标作为训练后评估步骤。通过图形友好的算法来计算 COCO 平均平均精度和召回率，可以在训练时评估这些指标，通过训练曲线图提高指标演变的可视性，并减少制作新模型版本原型时的迭代时间。我们的贡献包括平均平均精度的精确近似算法、COCO 平均平均精度和 COCO 召回率的开源实现、用于验证我们实现的准确性的广泛数值基准，以及包括平均平均精度和召回率的训练时评估的开源训练循环。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效的图友好算法，在训练过程中实时计算COCO指标，以提升模型评估效率。
AI.motivation: 传统COCO指标计算需在训练后进行，导致无法实时监控训练过程，增加模型迭代时间。
AI.method: 设计准确的近似算法，实现开源代码，并进行数值验证，支持训练时动态计算mAP和召回率。
AI.result: 实现了准确的COCO指标计算，开源了训练循环，并通过基准测试验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法使训练时评估成为可能，提升模型优化效率并减少迭代时间。

search_text: Efficient Graph-Friendly COCO Metric Computation for Train-Time Model Evaluation 用于训练时间模型评估的高效图形友好 COCO 度量计算 Evaluating the COCO mean average precision (MaP) and COCO recall metrics as part of the static computation graph of modern deep learning frameworks poses a unique set of challenges. These challenges include the need for maintaining a dynamic-sized state to compute mean average precision, reliance on global dataset-level statistics to compute the metrics, and managing differing numbers of bounding boxes between images in a batch. As a consequence, it is common practice for researchers and practitioners to evaluate COCO metrics as a post training evaluation step. With a graph-friendly algorithm to compute COCO Mean Average Precision and recall, these metrics could be evaluated at training time, improving visibility into the evolution of the metrics through training curve plots, and decreasing iteration time when prototyping new model versions. Our contributions include an accurate approximation algorithm for Mean Average Precision, an open source implementation of both COCO mean average precision and COCO recall, extensive numerical benchmarks to verify the accuracy of our implementations, and an open-source training loop that include train-time evaluation of mean average precision and recall. 作为现代深度学习框架静态计算图的一部分，评估 COCO 平均精度 (MaP) 和 COCO 召回指标提出了一系列独特的挑战。这些挑战包括需要维护动态大小的状态来计算平均精度、依赖全局数据集级统计来计算指标，以及管理批次中图像之间不同数量的边界框。因此，研究人员和从业者通常的做法是将评估 COCO 指标作为训练后评估步骤。通过图形友好的算法来计算 COCO 平均平均精度和召回率，可以在训练时评估这些指标，通过训练曲线图提高指标演变的可视性，并减少制作新模型版本原型时的迭代时间。我们的贡献包括平均平均精度的精确近似算法、COCO 平均平均精度和 COCO 召回率的开源实现、用于验证我们实现的准确性的广泛数值基准，以及包括平均平均精度和召回率的训练时评估的开源训练循环。 提出一种高效的图友好算法，在训练过程中实时计算COCO指标，以提升模型评估效率。 Luke Wood,Francois Chollet cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Pierre Talbot,Frédéric Pinel,Pascal Bouvry
title: A Variant of Concurrent Constraint Programming on GPU
title_zh: GPU 上并发约束编程的一种变体
comment: AAAI-2022 paper with erratum in Section "Turbo: GPU Constraint Solver"
comments: AAAI-2022 paper with erratum in Section "Turbo: GPU Constraint Solver"
abstract: The number of cores on graphical computing units (GPUs) is reaching thousands nowadays, whereas the clock speed of processors stagnates. Unfortunately, constraint programming solvers do not take advantage yet of GPU parallelism. One reason is that constraint solvers were primarily designed within the mental frame of sequential computation. To solve this issue, we take a step back and contribute to a simple, intrinsically parallel, lock-free and formally correct programming language based on concurrent constraint programming. We then re-examine parallel constraint solving on GPUs within this formalism, and develop Turbo, a simple constraint solver entirely programmed on GPUs. Turbo validates the correctness of our approach and compares positively to a parallel CPU-based solver.
summary: The number of cores on graphical computing units (GPUs) is reaching thousands nowadays, whereas the clock speed of processors stagnates. Unfortunately, constraint programming solvers do not take advantage yet of GPU parallelism. One reason is that constraint solvers were primarily designed within the mental frame of sequential computation. To solve this issue, we take a step back and contribute to a simple, intrinsically parallel, lock-free and formally correct programming language based on concurrent constraint programming. We then re-examine parallel constraint solving on GPUs within this formalism, and develop Turbo, a simple constraint solver entirely programmed on GPUs. Turbo validates the correctness of our approach and compares positively to a parallel CPU-based solver.
abstract_zh: 如今，图形计算单元 (GPU) 的核心数量已达到数千个，但处理器的时钟速度却停滞不前。不幸的是，约束编程求解器尚未利用 GPU 并行性。原因之一是约束求解器主要是在顺序计算的思维框架内设计的。为了解决这个问题，我们退一步，基于并发约束编程，贡献一种简单的、本质上并行的、无锁的、形式上正确的编程语言。然后，我们在这种形式下重新审视 GPU 上的并行约束求解，并开发 Turbo，一个完全在 GPU 上编程的简单约束求解器。 Turbo 验证了我们方法的正确性，并与基于 CPU 的并行求解器进行了积极的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于GPU的并发约束编程语言变体及对应的约束求解器Turbo，以解决传统约束求解器未能有效利用GPU并行性的难题。
AI.motivation: GPU核心数量激增但约束编程求解器尚未利用其并行性，传统约束求解器基于顺序计算范式难以适应GPU架构。
AI.method: 设计一种无锁、形式化正确的并发约束编程语言，基于该语言开发全GPU运行的Turbo约束求解器，并通过形式验证与CPU求解器对比实验验证效果。
AI.result: Turbo求解器验证了方法的正确性，且在性能上优于传统CPU并行约束求解器。
AI.conclusion: 基于并发约束编程的GPU求解框架有效利用了GPU并行性，为大规模约束问题求解提供了新思路。
