authors_text: Xiaotian Guo,Andy D. Pimentel,Todor Stefanov
title: AutoDiCE: Fully Automated Distributed CNN Inference at the Edge
title_zh: AutoDiCE：边缘全自动分布式 CNN 推理
abstract: Deep Learning approaches based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are extensively utilized and very successful in a wide range of application areas, including image classification and speech recognition. For the execution of trained CNNs, i.e. model inference, we nowadays witness a shift from the Cloud to the Edge. Unfortunately, deploying and inferring large, compute and memory intensive CNNs on edge devices is challenging because these devices typically have limited power budgets and compute/memory resources. One approach to address this challenge is to leverage all available resources across multiple edge devices to deploy and execute a large CNN by properly partitioning the CNN and running each CNN partition on a separate edge device. Although such distribution, deployment, and execution of large CNNs on multiple edge devices is a desirable and beneficial approach, there currently does not exist a design and programming framework that takes a trained CNN model, together with a CNN partitioning specification, and fully automates the CNN model splitting and deployment on multiple edge devices to facilitate distributed CNN inference at the Edge. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a novel framework, called AutoDiCE, for automated splitting of a CNN model into a set of sub-models and automated code generation for distributed and collaborative execution of these sub-models on multiple, possibly heterogeneous, edge devices, while supporting the exploitation of parallelism among and within the edge devices. Our experimental results show that AutoDiCE can deliver distributed CNN inference with reduced energy consumption and memory usage per edge device, and improved overall system throughput at the same time.
summary: Deep Learning approaches based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are extensively utilized and very successful in a wide range of application areas, including image classification and speech recognition. For the execution of trained CNNs, i.e. model inference, we nowadays witness a shift from the Cloud to the Edge. Unfortunately, deploying and inferring large, compute and memory intensive CNNs on edge devices is challenging because these devices typically have limited power budgets and compute/memory resources. One approach to address this challenge is to leverage all available resources across multiple edge devices to deploy and execute a large CNN by properly partitioning the CNN and running each CNN partition on a separate edge device. Although such distribution, deployment, and execution of large CNNs on multiple edge devices is a desirable and beneficial approach, there currently does not exist a design and programming framework that takes a trained CNN model, together with a CNN partitioning specification, and fully automates the CNN model splitting and deployment on multiple edge devices to facilitate distributed CNN inference at the Edge. Therefore, in this paper, we propose a novel framework, called AutoDiCE, for automated splitting of a CNN model into a set of sub-models and automated code generation for distributed and collaborative execution of these sub-models on multiple, possibly heterogeneous, edge devices, while supporting the exploitation of parallelism among and within the edge devices. Our experimental results show that AutoDiCE can deliver distributed CNN inference with reduced energy consumption and memory usage per edge device, and improved overall system throughput at the same time.
abstract_zh: 基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的深度学习方法在图像分类和语音识别等广泛的应用领域得到了广泛的应用和非常成功。对于训练有素的 CNN 的执行，即模型推理，我们现在见证了从云端到边缘的转变。不幸的是，在边缘设备上部署和推断大型计算和内存密集型 CNN 具有挑战性，因为这些设备通常具有有限的功率预算和计算/内存资源。解决这一挑战的一种方法是，通过正确划分 CNN 并在单独的边缘设备上运行每个 CNN 分区，利用多个边缘设备上的所有可用资源来部署和执行大型 CNN。尽管在多个边缘设备上这种大型 CNN 的分布、部署和执行是一种理想且有益的方法，但目前不存在一种设计和编程框架，该框架采用经过训练的 CNN 模型以及 CNN 分区规范，并在多个边缘设备上完全自动化 CNN 模型分割和部署，以促进边缘的分布式 CNN 推理。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 AutoDiCE 的新颖框架，用于将 CNN 模型自动拆分为一组子模型，并自动生成代码，以便在多个（可能是异构的）边缘设备上分布式协作执行这些子模型，同时支持边缘设备之间和内部并行性的利用。我们的实验结果表明，AutoDiCE 可以提供分布式 CNN 推理，同时降低每个边缘设备的能耗和内存使用量，同时提高整体系统吞吐量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AutoDiCE的框架，用于在边缘设备上自动分割和部署卷积神经网络（CNN）模型，以实现分布式CNN推理。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习模型在边缘设备上的应用增加，由于边缘设备计算和存储资源有限，部署和运行大型CNN模型面临挑战。现有的框架无法自动分割和部署CNN模型，因此需要一种新的解决方案。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为AutoDiCE的框架，能够自动分割CNN模型为子模型，并生成代码以在多个异构边缘设备上进行分布式协作推理，同时支持设备间的并行计算。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，AutoDiCE能够减少每个边缘设备的能耗和内存使用，同时提高系统的整体吞吐量。
AI.conclusion: AutoDiCE框架提供了一种自动化分割和部署CNN模型的方法，能够在边缘设备上实现高效的分布式推理，为边缘计算提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Huy V. Vo,Oriane Siméoni,Spyros Gidaris,Andrei Bursuc,Patrick Pérez,Jean Ponce
title: Active Learning Strategies for Weakly-supervised Object Detection
title_zh: 弱监督目标检测的主动学习策略
comment: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022. Contains 27 pages, 9 tables and 6 figures
comments: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022. Contains 27 pages, 9 tables and 6 figures
abstract: Object detectors trained with weak annotations are affordable alternatives to fully-supervised counterparts. However, there is still a significant performance gap between them. We propose to narrow this gap by fine-tuning a base pre-trained weakly-supervised detector with a few fully-annotated samples automatically selected from the training set using ``box-in-box'' (BiB), a novel active learning strategy designed specifically to address the well-documented failure modes of weakly-supervised detectors. Experiments on the VOC07 and COCO benchmarks show that BiB outperforms other active learning techniques and significantly improves the base weakly-supervised detector's performance with only a few fully-annotated images per class. BiB reaches 97% of the performance of fully-supervised Fast RCNN with only 10% of fully-annotated images on VOC07. On COCO, using on average 10 fully-annotated images per class, or equivalently 1% of the training set, BiB also reduces the performance gap (in AP) between the weakly-supervised detector and the fully-supervised Fast RCNN by over 70%, showing a good trade-off between performance and data efficiency. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/huyvvo/BiB.
summary: Object detectors trained with weak annotations are affordable alternatives to fully-supervised counterparts. However, there is still a significant performance gap between them. We propose to narrow this gap by fine-tuning a base pre-trained weakly-supervised detector with a few fully-annotated samples automatically selected from the training set using ``box-in-box'' (BiB), a novel active learning strategy designed specifically to address the well-documented failure modes of weakly-supervised detectors. Experiments on the VOC07 and COCO benchmarks show that BiB outperforms other active learning techniques and significantly improves the base weakly-supervised detector's performance with only a few fully-annotated images per class. BiB reaches 97% of the performance of fully-supervised Fast RCNN with only 10% of fully-annotated images on VOC07. On COCO, using on average 10 fully-annotated images per class, or equivalently 1% of the training set, BiB also reduces the performance gap (in AP) between the weakly-supervised detector and the fully-supervised Fast RCNN by over 70%, showing a good trade-off between performance and data efficiency. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/huyvvo/BiB.
abstract_zh: 经过弱注释训练的对象检测器是完全监督的对象检测器的经济替代品。然而，它们之间仍然存在显着的性能差距。我们建议通过使用“盒中盒”（BiB）从训练集中自动选择一些完全注释的样本来微调基本的预训练弱监督检测器来缩小这一差距，“盒中盒”（BiB）是一种新颖的主动学习策略，专门设计用于解决弱监督检测器的有据可查的故障模式。 VOC07 ​​和 COCO 基准测试表明，BiB 优于其他主动学习技术，并且每个类仅需要少量完全注释的图像即可显着提高基础弱监督检测器的性能。 BiB 在 VOC07 ​​上仅用 10% 的完全注释图像就达到了完全监督的 Fast RCNN 的 97% 的性能。在 COCO 上，平均每类使用 10 个完全注释的图像，或者相当于训练集的 1%，BiB 还将弱监督检测器和完全监督的 Fast RCNN 之间的性能差距（以 AP 为单位）减少了 70% 以上，显示了性能和数据效率之间的良好权衡。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/huyvvo/BiB 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为BiB的主动学习策略，通过自动选择少量全标注样本微调弱监督目标检测器，以缩小其与全监督检测器的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 弱监督目标检测器与全监督检测器之间存在显著性能差距，而全标注数据获取成本高，需探索高效利用少量标注数据提升弱监督模型性能的方法。
AI.method: 设计'box-in-box'（BiB）主动学习策略，从训练集中自动筛选具有代表性的全标注样本，用于微调预训练的弱监督检测器。
AI.result: 在VOC07上，使用每类仅10%全标注图像时，BiB达到全监督Fast RCNN 97%的性能；在COCO上，用1%训练数据使性能差距（AP）缩小超70%。
AI.conclusion: BiB策略在减少标注数据需求的同时显著提升弱监督检测性能，证明了主动学习在弱监督场景下的有效性与数据效率优势。

authors_text: Dang Nguyen,Sunil Gupta,Kien Do,Svetha Venkatesh
title: Black-box Few-shot Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 黑盒少量知识蒸馏
abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) is an efficient approach to transfer the knowledge from a large "teacher" network to a smaller "student" network. Traditional KD methods require lots of labeled training samples and a white-box teacher (parameters are accessible) to train a good student. However, these resources are not always available in real-world applications. The distillation process often happens at an external party side where we do not have access to much data, and the teacher does not disclose its parameters due to security and privacy concerns. To overcome these challenges, we propose a black-box few-shot KD method to train the student with few unlabeled training samples and a black-box teacher. Our main idea is to expand the training set by generating a diverse set of out-of-distribution synthetic images using MixUp and a conditional variational auto-encoder. These synthetic images along with their labels obtained from the teacher are used to train the student. We conduct extensive experiments to show that our method significantly outperforms recent SOTA few/zero-shot KD methods on image classification tasks. The code and models are available at: https://github.com/nphdang/FS-BBT
summary: Knowledge distillation (KD) is an efficient approach to transfer the knowledge from a large "teacher" network to a smaller "student" network. Traditional KD methods require lots of labeled training samples and a white-box teacher (parameters are accessible) to train a good student. However, these resources are not always available in real-world applications. The distillation process often happens at an external party side where we do not have access to much data, and the teacher does not disclose its parameters due to security and privacy concerns. To overcome these challenges, we propose a black-box few-shot KD method to train the student with few unlabeled training samples and a black-box teacher. Our main idea is to expand the training set by generating a diverse set of out-of-distribution synthetic images using MixUp and a conditional variational auto-encoder. These synthetic images along with their labels obtained from the teacher are used to train the student. We conduct extensive experiments to show that our method significantly outperforms recent SOTA few/zero-shot KD methods on image classification tasks. The code and models are available at: https://github.com/nphdang/FS-BBT
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）是将知识从大型“教师”网络转移到较小的“学生”网络的有效方法。传统的KD方法需要大量标记的训练样本和白盒老师（参数可访问）来训练一个好的学生。然而，这些资源在实际应用中并不总是可用。蒸馏过程通常发生在外部一方，我们无法访问太多数据，并且出于安全和隐私考虑，老师不会透露其参数。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了一种黑盒少样本 KD 方法，用少量未标记的训练样本和黑盒教师来训练学生。我们的主要想法是通过使用 MixUp 和条件变分自动编码器生成一组不同的分布外合成图像来扩展训练集。这些合成图像及其从教师处获得的标签用于训练学生。我们进行了大量的实验，表明我们的方法在图像分类任务上显着优于最近的 SOTA 少样本/零样本 KD 方法。代码和模型可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/nphdang/FS-BBT

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种黑盒少样本知识蒸馏方法，在无标签数据和无法访问教师模型参数的情况下训练学生模型。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏依赖大量标注数据和可访问的教师模型参数，但在实际应用中数据和参数可能受限，需解决黑盒场景下的知识迁移问题。
AI.method: 通过MixUp和条件变分自编码器生成分布外合成图像，结合教师模型预测的标签训练学生模型，实现少样本蒸馏。
AI.result: 在图像分类任务中显著优于现有最先进少样本/零样本知识蒸馏方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了黑盒环境下数据和参数受限的知识蒸馏挑战，为实际应用提供了新方案。

authors_text: Zitong Huang,Yiping Bao,Bowen Dong,Erjin Zhou,Wangmeng Zuo
title: W2N:Switching From Weak Supervision to Noisy Supervision for Object Detection
title_zh: W2N：目标检测从弱监督切换到噪声监督
abstract: Weakly-supervised object detection (WSOD) aims to train an object detector only requiring the image-level annotations. Recently, some works have managed to select the accurate boxes generated from a well-trained WSOD network to supervise a semi-supervised detection framework for better performance. However, these approaches simply divide the training set into labeled and unlabeled sets according to the image-level criteria, such that sufficient mislabeled or wrongly localized box predictions are chosen as pseudo ground-truths, resulting in a sub-optimal solution of detection performance. To overcome this issue, we propose a novel WSOD framework with a new paradigm that switches from weak supervision to noisy supervision (W2N). Generally, with given pseudo ground-truths generated from the well-trained WSOD network, we propose a two-module iterative training algorithm to refine pseudo labels and supervise better object detector progressively. In the localization adaptation module, we propose a regularization loss to reduce the proportion of discriminative parts in original pseudo ground-truths, obtaining better pseudo ground-truths for further training. In the semi-supervised module, we propose a two tasks instance-level split method to select high-quality labels for training a semi-supervised detector. Experimental results on different benchmarks verify the effectiveness of W2N, and our W2N outperforms all existing pure WSOD methods and transfer learning methods. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/1170300714/w2n_wsod.
summary: Weakly-supervised object detection (WSOD) aims to train an object detector only requiring the image-level annotations. Recently, some works have managed to select the accurate boxes generated from a well-trained WSOD network to supervise a semi-supervised detection framework for better performance. However, these approaches simply divide the training set into labeled and unlabeled sets according to the image-level criteria, such that sufficient mislabeled or wrongly localized box predictions are chosen as pseudo ground-truths, resulting in a sub-optimal solution of detection performance. To overcome this issue, we propose a novel WSOD framework with a new paradigm that switches from weak supervision to noisy supervision (W2N). Generally, with given pseudo ground-truths generated from the well-trained WSOD network, we propose a two-module iterative training algorithm to refine pseudo labels and supervise better object detector progressively. In the localization adaptation module, we propose a regularization loss to reduce the proportion of discriminative parts in original pseudo ground-truths, obtaining better pseudo ground-truths for further training. In the semi-supervised module, we propose a two tasks instance-level split method to select high-quality labels for training a semi-supervised detector. Experimental results on different benchmarks verify the effectiveness of W2N, and our W2N outperforms all existing pure WSOD methods and transfer learning methods. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/1170300714/w2n_wsod.
abstract_zh: 弱监督目标检测（WSOD）旨在训练仅需要图像级注释的目标检测器。最近，一些工作已经成功地选择从训练有素的 WSOD 网络生成的准确框来监督半监督检测框架以获得更好的性能。然而，这些方法只是根据图像级标准将训练集分为标记集和未标记集，从而选择足够多的错误标记或错误定位的框预测作为伪真实值，从而导致检测性能的次优解决方案。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的 WSOD 框架，该框架具有从弱监督切换到噪声监督（W2N）的新范式。一般来说，根据训练有素的 WSOD 网络生成的给定伪真实情况，我们提出了一种双模块迭代训练算法来细化伪标签并逐步监督更好的对象检测器。在定位适应模块中，我们提出了正则化损失来减少原始伪地面事实中判别部分的比例，获得更好的伪地面事实以进行进一步的训练。在半监督模块中，我们提出了一种两个任务实例级分割方法来选择高质量标签来训练半监督检测器。不同基准上的实验结果验证了 W2N 的有效性，我们的 W2N 优于所有现有的纯 WSOD 方法和迁移学习方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/1170300714/w2n_wsod 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为W2N的新型弱监督目标检测框架，通过从弱监督转向噪声监督来优化伪标签质量，提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督目标检测方法在生成伪标签时易包含误标或定位错误，导致检测性能受限，需改进伪标签筛选与优化机制。
AI.method: 设计包含定位适应模块和半监督模块的两阶段迭代训练算法，前者通过正则化损失降低伪标签中判别性区域比例，后者采用实例级任务分割策略筛选高质量标签。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上验证了W2N的有效性，其性能优于所有现有纯弱监督方法和迁移学习方法。
AI.conclusion: W2N框架通过优化伪标签生成与筛选流程显著提升了弱监督目标检测效果，代码已开源。

search_text: W2N:Switching From Weak Supervision to Noisy Supervision for Object Detection W2N：目标检测从弱监督切换到噪声监督 Weakly-supervised object detection (WSOD) aims to train an object detector only requiring the image-level annotations. Recently, some works have managed to select the accurate boxes generated from a well-trained WSOD network to supervise a semi-supervised detection framework for better performance. However, these approaches simply divide the training set into labeled and unlabeled sets according to the image-level criteria, such that sufficient mislabeled or wrongly localized box predictions are chosen as pseudo ground-truths, resulting in a sub-optimal solution of detection performance. To overcome this issue, we propose a novel WSOD framework with a new paradigm that switches from weak supervision to noisy supervision (W2N). Generally, with given pseudo ground-truths generated from the well-trained WSOD network, we propose a two-module iterative training algorithm to refine pseudo labels and supervise better object detector progressively. In the localization adaptation module, we propose a regularization loss to reduce the proportion of discriminative parts in original pseudo ground-truths, obtaining better pseudo ground-truths for further training. In the semi-supervised module, we propose a two tasks instance-level split method to select high-quality labels for training a semi-supervised detector. Experimental results on different benchmarks verify the effectiveness of W2N, and our W2N outperforms all existing pure WSOD methods and transfer learning methods. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/1170300714/w2n_wsod. 弱监督目标检测（WSOD）旨在训练仅需要图像级注释的目标检测器。最近，一些工作已经成功地选择从训练有素的 WSOD 网络生成的准确框来监督半监督检测框架以获得更好的性能。然而，这些方法只是根据图像级标准将训练集分为标记集和未标记集，从而选择足够多的错误标记或错误定位的框预测作为伪真实值，从而导致检测性能的次优解决方案。为了克服这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的 WSOD 框架，该框架具有从弱监督切换到噪声监督（W2N）的新范式。一般来说，根据训练有素的 WSOD 网络生成的给定伪真实情况，我们提出了一种双模块迭代训练算法来细化伪标签并逐步监督更好的对象检测器。在定位适应模块中，我们提出了正则化损失来减少原始伪地面事实中判别部分的比例，获得更好的伪地面事实以进行进一步的训练。在半监督模块中，我们提出了一种两个任务实例级分割方法来选择高质量标签来训练半监督检测器。不同基准上的实验结果验证了 W2N 的有效性，我们的 W2N 优于所有现有的纯 WSOD 方法和迁移学习方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/1170300714/w2n_wsod 上公开获取。 本文提出一种名为W2N的新型弱监督目标检测框架，通过从弱监督转向噪声监督来优化伪标签质量，提升检测性能。 Zitong Huang,Yiping Bao,Bowen Dong,Erjin Zhou,Wangmeng Zuo cs.CV

authors_text: Pietro Bongini,Federico Becattini,Alberto Del Bimbo
title: Is GPT-3 all you need for Visual Question Answering in Cultural Heritage?
title_zh: GPT-3 是文化遗产视觉问答所需要的全部吗？
abstract: The use of Deep Learning and Computer Vision in the Cultural Heritage domain is becoming highly relevant in the last few years with lots of applications about audio smart guides, interactive museums and augmented reality. All these technologies require lots of data to work effectively and be useful for the user. In the context of artworks, such data is annotated by experts in an expensive and time consuming process. In particular, for each artwork, an image of the artwork and a description sheet have to be collected in order to perform common tasks like Visual Question Answering. In this paper we propose a method for Visual Question Answering that allows to generate at runtime a description sheet that can be used for answering both visual and contextual questions about the artwork, avoiding completely the image and the annotation process. For this purpose, we investigate on the use of GPT-3 for generating descriptions for artworks analyzing the quality of generated descriptions through captioning metrics. Finally we evaluate the performance for Visual Question Answering and captioning tasks.
summary: The use of Deep Learning and Computer Vision in the Cultural Heritage domain is becoming highly relevant in the last few years with lots of applications about audio smart guides, interactive museums and augmented reality. All these technologies require lots of data to work effectively and be useful for the user. In the context of artworks, such data is annotated by experts in an expensive and time consuming process. In particular, for each artwork, an image of the artwork and a description sheet have to be collected in order to perform common tasks like Visual Question Answering. In this paper we propose a method for Visual Question Answering that allows to generate at runtime a description sheet that can be used for answering both visual and contextual questions about the artwork, avoiding completely the image and the annotation process. For this purpose, we investigate on the use of GPT-3 for generating descriptions for artworks analyzing the quality of generated descriptions through captioning metrics. Finally we evaluate the performance for Visual Question Answering and captioning tasks.
abstract_zh: 过去几年，深度学习和计算机视觉在文化遗产领域的应用变得越来越重要，在音频智能指南、互动博物馆和增强现实方面有大量应用。所有这些技术都需要大量数据才能有效工作并对用户有用。在艺术品方面，此类数据由专家以昂贵且耗时的过程进行注释。特别是，对于每件艺术品，必须收集艺术品的图像和描述表，以便执行视觉问答等常见任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种视觉问答方法，该方法允许在运行时生成一个描述表，该描述表可用于回答有关艺术品的视觉和上下文问题，完全避免图像和注释过程。为此，我们研究了使用 GPT-3 生成艺术品描述，并通过字幕指标分析生成的描述的质量。最后，我们评估视觉问答和字幕任务的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了使用GPT-3模型在文化遗产领域实现视觉问答（VQA）的方法，无需依赖传统的人工标注数据。
AI.motivation: 文化遗产领域需要大量标注数据来支持视觉问答等任务，但人工标注过程耗时且成本高昂。
AI.method: 通过GPT-3生成艺术品描述文本，结合生成的描述进行视觉和上下文问题的回答，并使用字幕质量指标评估生成效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，GPT-3生成的描述在字幕任务中表现良好，且能有效支持视觉问答任务，减少了对人工标注数据的依赖。
AI.conclusion: GPT-3可作为文化遗产领域视觉问答任务的可行解决方案，降低数据标注成本并提升任务效率。

authors_text: Yunsheng Pang,Qiuhong Ke,Hossein Rahmani,James Bailey,Jun Liu
title: IGFormer: Interaction Graph Transformer for Skeleton-based Human Interaction Recognition
title_zh: IGFormer：用于基于骨架的人体交互识别的交互图转换器
abstract: Human interaction recognition is very important in many applications. One crucial cue in recognizing an interaction is the interactive body parts. In this work, we propose a novel Interaction Graph Transformer (IGFormer) network for skeleton-based interaction recognition via modeling the interactive body parts as graphs. More specifically, the proposed IGFormer constructs interaction graphs according to the semantic and distance correlations between the interactive body parts, and enhances the representation of each person by aggregating the information of the interactive body parts based on the learned graphs. Furthermore, we propose a Semantic Partition Module to transform each human skeleton sequence into a Body-Part-Time sequence to better capture the spatial and temporal information of the skeleton sequence for learning the graphs. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art with a significant margin.
summary: Human interaction recognition is very important in many applications. One crucial cue in recognizing an interaction is the interactive body parts. In this work, we propose a novel Interaction Graph Transformer (IGFormer) network for skeleton-based interaction recognition via modeling the interactive body parts as graphs. More specifically, the proposed IGFormer constructs interaction graphs according to the semantic and distance correlations between the interactive body parts, and enhances the representation of each person by aggregating the information of the interactive body parts based on the learned graphs. Furthermore, we propose a Semantic Partition Module to transform each human skeleton sequence into a Body-Part-Time sequence to better capture the spatial and temporal information of the skeleton sequence for learning the graphs. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art with a significant margin.
abstract_zh: 人类交互识别在许多应用中非常重要。识别交互的一个关键线索是交互的身体部位。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的交互图变换器（IGFormer）网络，通过将交互身体部位建模为图来进行基于骨架的交互识别。更具体地说，所提出的 IGFormer 根据交互身体部位之间的语义和距离相关性构建交互图，并通过基于学习的图聚合交互身体部位的信息来增强每个人的表示。此外，我们提出了一个语义分区模块，将每个人体骨骼序列转换为身体部分时间序列，以更好地捕获骨骼序列的空间和时间信息以学习图。对三个基准数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的模型明显优于最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于骨架数据的多人互动识别方法，利用交互图 Transformer 模型（IGFormer）建模互动身体部位的关系。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效建模互动身体部位的语义和空间关系，导致识别性能受限。
AI.method: 提出 IGFormer 网络，通过构建基于语义和距离关联的交互图，并设计语义分割模块将骨架序列转换为体部分时序列，以增强空间-时间特征表示。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上显著优于现有最优方法，验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过图建模和时序处理有效提升了骨架数据的互动识别性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Song Zhang,Ken Zheng,Xiaoxu Zhu,Baoxiang Li
title: A Polyphone BERT for Polyphone Disambiguation in Mandarin Chinese
title_zh: 用于普通话多音素消歧的多音素 BERT
abstract: Grapheme-to-phoneme (G2P) conversion is an indispensable part of the Chinese Mandarin text-to-speech (TTS) system, and the core of G2P conversion is to solve the problem of polyphone disambiguation, which is to pick up the correct pronunciation for several candidates for a Chinese polyphonic character. In this paper, we propose a Chinese polyphone BERT model to predict the pronunciations of Chinese polyphonic characters. Firstly, we create 741 new Chinese monophonic characters from 354 source Chinese polyphonic characters by pronunciation. Then we get a Chinese polyphone BERT by extending a pre-trained Chinese BERT with 741 new Chinese monophonic characters and adding a corresponding embedding layer for new tokens, which is initialized by the embeddings of source Chinese polyphonic characters. In this way, we can turn the polyphone disambiguation task into a pre-training task of the Chinese polyphone BERT. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model, and the polyphone BERT model obtain 2% (from 92.1% to 94.1%) improvement of average accuracy compared with the BERT-based classifier model, which is the prior state-of-the-art in polyphone disambiguation.
summary: Grapheme-to-phoneme (G2P) conversion is an indispensable part of the Chinese Mandarin text-to-speech (TTS) system, and the core of G2P conversion is to solve the problem of polyphone disambiguation, which is to pick up the correct pronunciation for several candidates for a Chinese polyphonic character. In this paper, we propose a Chinese polyphone BERT model to predict the pronunciations of Chinese polyphonic characters. Firstly, we create 741 new Chinese monophonic characters from 354 source Chinese polyphonic characters by pronunciation. Then we get a Chinese polyphone BERT by extending a pre-trained Chinese BERT with 741 new Chinese monophonic characters and adding a corresponding embedding layer for new tokens, which is initialized by the embeddings of source Chinese polyphonic characters. In this way, we can turn the polyphone disambiguation task into a pre-training task of the Chinese polyphone BERT. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model, and the polyphone BERT model obtain 2% (from 92.1% to 94.1%) improvement of average accuracy compared with the BERT-based classifier model, which is the prior state-of-the-art in polyphone disambiguation.
abstract_zh: 字音转换（G2P）是中文普通话文本转语音（TTS）系统中不可或缺的一部分，G2P转换的核心是解决多音字消歧问题，即为一个中文多音字的多个候选字挑选出正确的发音。在本文中，我们提出了一种中文多音字 BERT 模型来预测中文多音字的发音。首先，我们根据发音从354个源汉语多音字中创造出741个新的单音字。然后，我们通过使用 741 个新的中文单音字符扩展预训练的中文 BERT，并为新标记添加相应的嵌入层（由源中文多音字的嵌入来初始化），得到中文多音字 BERT。这样，我们就可以将多音素消歧任务转化为中文多音素BERT的预训练任务。实验结果证明了该模型的有效性，与基于 BERT 的分类器模型相比，多音素 BERT 模型的平均准确率提高了 2%（从 92.1% 到 94.1%），这是多音素消歧领域的最新技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种中文多音字BERT模型，用于解决中文多音字在文本到语音系统中的歧义消解问题。
AI.motivation: 中文多音字歧义消解是图形到语音转换的核心难题，现有方法在准确率和效率上存在不足，需探索更有效的模型架构。
AI.method: 通过从354个多音字生成741个单音字，扩展预训练BERT模型并添加新词嵌入层，将多音字消歧任务转化为BERT的预训练任务。
AI.result: 相比基于BERT的分类器模型，新模型在平均准确率上提升2%（从92.1%至94.1%），超越现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过构建专用BERT模型有效提升了多音字消歧性能，为中文语音合成系统提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Azhar Mohammed,Dang Nguyen,Bao Duong,Thin Nguyen
title: Efficient Classification with Counterfactual Reasoning and Active Learning
title_zh: 通过反事实推理和主动学习进行高效分类
abstract: Data augmentation is one of the most successful techniques to improve the classification accuracy of machine learning models in computer vision. However, applying data augmentation to tabular data is a challenging problem since it is hard to generate synthetic samples with labels. In this paper, we propose an efficient classifier with a novel data augmentation technique for tabular data. Our method called CCRAL combines causal reasoning to learn counterfactual samples for the original training samples and active learning to select useful counterfactual samples based on a region of uncertainty. By doing this, our method can maximize our model's generalization on the unseen testing data. We validate our method analytically, and compare with the standard baselines. Our experimental results highlight that CCRAL achieves significantly better performance than those of the baselines across several real-world tabular datasets in terms of accuracy and AUC. Data and source code are available at: https://github.com/nphdang/CCRAL.
summary: Data augmentation is one of the most successful techniques to improve the classification accuracy of machine learning models in computer vision. However, applying data augmentation to tabular data is a challenging problem since it is hard to generate synthetic samples with labels. In this paper, we propose an efficient classifier with a novel data augmentation technique for tabular data. Our method called CCRAL combines causal reasoning to learn counterfactual samples for the original training samples and active learning to select useful counterfactual samples based on a region of uncertainty. By doing this, our method can maximize our model's generalization on the unseen testing data. We validate our method analytically, and compare with the standard baselines. Our experimental results highlight that CCRAL achieves significantly better performance than those of the baselines across several real-world tabular datasets in terms of accuracy and AUC. Data and source code are available at: https://github.com/nphdang/CCRAL.
abstract_zh: 数据增强是提高计算机视觉中机器学习模型分类准确性的最成功的技术之一。然而，将数据增强应用于表格数据是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为很难生成带有标签的合成样本。在本文中，我们提出了一种高效的分类器，采用新颖的表格数据数据增强技术。我们称为 CCRAL 的方法结合了因果推理来学习原始训练样本的反事实样本，并结合主动学习来根据不确定性区域选择有用的反事实样本。通过这样做，我们的方法可以最大限度地提高模型对未见过的测试数据的泛化能力。我们通过分析验证我们的方法，并与标准基线进行比较。我们的实验结果强调，CCRAL 在准确性和 AUC 方面比几个现实世界表格数据集的基线取得了显着更好的性能。数据和源代码可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/nphdang/CCRAL。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合反事实推理和主动学习的高效分类方法CCRAL，用于解决表格数据分类中数据增强的挑战。
AI.motivation: 表格数据难以生成带标签的合成样本，传统数据增强方法效果有限，需探索新的增强策略以提升分类性能。
AI.method: CCRAL通过因果推理生成反事实样本，并利用主动学习基于不确定性区域筛选有用样本，从而优化模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在多个真实表格数据集上，CCRAL在准确率和AUC指标上显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: CCRAL通过反事实推理与主动学习结合，有效提升了表格数据分类性能，代码已开源。

authors_text: Barak Or,Itzik Klein
title: A Hybrid Model and Learning-Based Adaptive Navigation Filter
title_zh: 混合模型和基于学习的自适应导航滤波器
comment: 11 pages. This is a preprint version
comments: 11 pages. This is a preprint version
abstract: The fusion between an inertial navigation system and global navigation satellite systems is regularly used in many platforms such as drones, land vehicles, and marine vessels. The fusion is commonly carried out in a model-based extended Kalman filter framework. One of the critical parameters of the filter is the process noise covariance. It is responsible for the real-time solution accuracy, as it considers both vehicle dynamics uncertainty and the inertial sensors quality. In most situations, the process noise is covariance assumed to be constant. Yet, due to vehicle dynamics and sensor measurement variations throughout the trajectory, the process noise covariance is subject to change. To cope with such situations, several adaptive model-based Kalman filters were suggested in the literature. In this paper, we propose a hybrid model and learning-based adaptive navigation filter. We rely on the model-based Kalman filter and design a deep neural network model to tune the momentary system noise covariance matrix, based only on the inertial sensor readings. Once the process noise covariance is learned, it is plugged into the well-established, model-based Kalman filter. After deriving the proposed hybrid framework, field experiment results using a quadrotor are presented and a comparison to model-based adaptive approaches is given. We show that the proposed method obtained an improvement of 25% in the position error. Furthermore, the proposed hybrid learning method can be used in any navigation filter and also in any relevant estimation problem.
summary: The fusion between an inertial navigation system and global navigation satellite systems is regularly used in many platforms such as drones, land vehicles, and marine vessels. The fusion is commonly carried out in a model-based extended Kalman filter framework. One of the critical parameters of the filter is the process noise covariance. It is responsible for the real-time solution accuracy, as it considers both vehicle dynamics uncertainty and the inertial sensors quality. In most situations, the process noise is covariance assumed to be constant. Yet, due to vehicle dynamics and sensor measurement variations throughout the trajectory, the process noise covariance is subject to change. To cope with such situations, several adaptive model-based Kalman filters were suggested in the literature. In this paper, we propose a hybrid model and learning-based adaptive navigation filter. We rely on the model-based Kalman filter and design a deep neural network model to tune the momentary system noise covariance matrix, based only on the inertial sensor readings. Once the process noise covariance is learned, it is plugged into the well-established, model-based Kalman filter. After deriving the proposed hybrid framework, field experiment results using a quadrotor are presented and a comparison to model-based adaptive approaches is given. We show that the proposed method obtained an improvement of 25% in the position error. Furthermore, the proposed hybrid learning method can be used in any navigation filter and also in any relevant estimation problem.
abstract_zh: 惯性导航系统和全球导航卫星系统之间的融合经常用于无人机、陆地车辆和船舶等许多平台。融合通常在基于模型的扩展卡尔曼滤波器框架中进行。滤波器的关键参数之一是过程噪声协方差。它负责实时解算的准确性，因为它考虑了车辆动力学不确定性和惯性传感器质量。在大多数情况下，过程噪声是假定为常数的协方差。然而，由于整个轨迹中的车辆动力学和传感器测量变化，过程噪声协方差可能会发生变化。为了应对这种情况，文献中提出了几种基于自适应模型的卡尔曼滤波器。在本文中，我们提出了一种混合模型和基于学习的自适应导航滤波器。我们依靠基于模型的卡尔曼滤波器，并设计一个深度神经网络模型，仅基于惯性传感器读数来调整瞬时系统噪声协方差矩阵。一旦了解了过程噪声协方差，就会将其插入完善的、基于模型的卡尔曼滤波器中。在推导所提出的混合框架后，提出了使用四旋翼飞行器的现场实验结果，并与基于模型的自适应方法进行了比较。我们表明，所提出的方法在位置误差方面获得了 25% 的改进。此外，所提出的混合学习方法可以用于任何导航滤波器以及任何相关的估计问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合模型与深度学习的自适应导航滤波器，通过动态调整过程噪声协方差矩阵提升导航精度。
AI.motivation: 传统基于模型的卡尔曼滤波器假设过程噪声协方差为常数，无法适应车辆动态变化和传感器测量波动，导致导航精度受限。
AI.method: 设计深度神经网络模型，仅基于惯性传感器数据实时调整个性化噪声协方差矩阵，并将其嵌入经典卡尔曼滤波框架中。
AI.result: 在四旋翼飞行器实地实验中，该方法使定位误差降低25%，且适用于其他导航滤波及估计问题。
AI.conclusion: 混合模型与学习方法有效解决了动态环境下的噪声协方差自适应问题，具有广泛的应用潜力。

search_text: A Hybrid Model and Learning-Based Adaptive Navigation Filter 混合模型和基于学习的自适应导航滤波器 The fusion between an inertial navigation system and global navigation satellite systems is regularly used in many platforms such as drones, land vehicles, and marine vessels. The fusion is commonly carried out in a model-based extended Kalman filter framework. One of the critical parameters of the filter is the process noise covariance. It is responsible for the real-time solution accuracy, as it considers both vehicle dynamics uncertainty and the inertial sensors quality. In most situations, the process noise is covariance assumed to be constant. Yet, due to vehicle dynamics and sensor measurement variations throughout the trajectory, the process noise covariance is subject to change. To cope with such situations, several adaptive model-based Kalman filters were suggested in the literature. In this paper, we propose a hybrid model and learning-based adaptive navigation filter. We rely on the model-based Kalman filter and design a deep neural network model to tune the momentary system noise covariance matrix, based only on the inertial sensor readings. Once the process noise covariance is learned, it is plugged into the well-established, model-based Kalman filter. After deriving the proposed hybrid framework, field experiment results using a quadrotor are presented and a comparison to model-based adaptive approaches is given. We show that the proposed method obtained an improvement of 25% in the position error. Furthermore, the proposed hybrid learning method can be used in any navigation filter and also in any relevant estimation problem. 惯性导航系统和全球导航卫星系统之间的融合经常用于无人机、陆地车辆和船舶等许多平台。融合通常在基于模型的扩展卡尔曼滤波器框架中进行。滤波器的关键参数之一是过程噪声协方差。它负责实时解算的准确性，因为它考虑了车辆动力学不确定性和惯性传感器质量。在大多数情况下，过程噪声是假定为常数的协方差。然而，由于整个轨迹中的车辆动力学和传感器测量变化，过程噪声协方差可能会发生变化。为了应对这种情况，文献中提出了几种基于自适应模型的卡尔曼滤波器。在本文中，我们提出了一种混合模型和基于学习的自适应导航滤波器。我们依靠基于模型的卡尔曼滤波器，并设计一个深度神经网络模型，仅基于惯性传感器读数来调整瞬时系统噪声协方差矩阵。一旦了解了过程噪声协方差，就会将其插入完善的、基于模型的卡尔曼滤波器中。在推导所提出的混合框架后，提出了使用四旋翼飞行器的现场实验结果，并与基于模型的自适应方法进行了比较。我们表明，所提出的方法在位置误差方面获得了 25% 的改进。此外，所提出的混合学习方法可以用于任何导航滤波器以及任何相关的估计问题。 本文提出了一种结合模型与深度学习的自适应导航滤波器，通过动态调整过程噪声协方差矩阵提升导航精度。 Barak Or,Itzik Klein eess.SY,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Esteve Valls Mascaro,Hyemin Ahn,Dongheui Lee
title: Intention-Conditioned Long-Term Human Egocentric Action Forecasting
title_zh: 意图条件长期人类自我中心行为预测
comment: Winner of CVPR@2022 and ECCV@2022 EGO4D LTA Challenge. Accepted in WACV2023. Webpage: https://evm7.github.io/icvae-page/
comments: Winner of CVPR@2022 and ECCV@2022 EGO4D LTA Challenge. Accepted in WACV2023. Webpage: https://evm7.github.io/icvae-page/
abstract: To anticipate how a human would act in the future, it is essential to understand the human intention since it guides the human towards a certain goal. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical architecture which assumes a sequence of human action (low-level) can be driven from the human intention (high-level). Based on this, we deal with Long-Term Action Anticipation task in egocentric videos. Our framework first extracts two level of human information over the N observed videos human actions through a Hierarchical Multi-task MLP Mixer (H3M). Then, we condition the uncertainty of the future through an Intention-Conditioned Variational Auto-Encoder (I-CVAE) that generates K stable predictions of the next Z=20 actions that the observed human might perform. By leveraging human intention as high-level information, we claim that our model is able to anticipate more time-consistent actions in the long-term, thus improving the results over baseline methods in EGO4D Challenge. This work ranked first in both CVPR@2022 and ECVV@2022 EGO4D LTA Challenge by providing more plausible anticipated sequences, improving the anticipation of nouns and overall actions. Webpage: https://evm7.github.io/icvae-page/

abstract_zh: 为了预测人类未来的行为，了解人类的意图至关重要，因为它引导人类实现某个目标。在本文中，我们提出了一种分层架构，它假设一系列人类行为（低级）可以由人类意图（高级）驱动。基于此，我们处理以自我为中心的视频中的长期行动预期任务。我们的框架首先通过分层多任务 MLP 混合器 (H3M) 在 N 个观察到的人类行为视频中提取两个级别的人类信息。然后，我们通过意图条件变分自动编码器 (I-CVAE) 来调节未来的不确定性，该编码器生成被观察的人类可能执行的下一个 Z=20 动作的 K 个稳定预测。通过利用人类意图作为高级信息，我们声称我们的模型能够预测长期内时间一致的行为，从而改善 EGO4D 挑战赛中基线方法的结果。这项工作通过提供更合理的预期序列、提高对名词和整体动作的预期，在 CVPR@2022 和 ECVV@2022 EGO4D LTA 挑战赛中排名第一。网页：https://evm7.github.io/icvae-page/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人类意图的分层架构，用于在第一人称视角视频中进行长期动作预测。
AI.motivation: 人类意图是指导行动的关键因素，但现有方法难以在长期预测中保持动作的一致性。
AI.method: 通过分层多任务MLP混合器（H3M）提取动作信息，结合意图条件变分自编码器（I-CVAE）生成稳定预测序列。
AI.result: 在CVPR@2022和ECVV@2022 EGO4D LTA挑战赛中排名第一，显著提升名词和整体动作预测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 将意图作为高层信息可有效提升长期动作预测的时间一致性与合理性。

authors_text: Xinxing Chen,Chuheng Chen,Yuxuan Wang,Bowen Yang,Teng Ma,Yuquan Leng,Chenglong Fu
title: A Piecewise Monotonic Gait Phase Estimation Model for Controlling a Powered Transfemoral Prosthesis in Various Locomotion Modes
title_zh: 用于控制各种运动模式下动力经股假体的分段单调步态相位估计模型
comment: ef:in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 7, no. 4, pp. 9549-9556, Oct. 2022
comments: ef:in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, vol. 7, no. 4, pp. 9549-9556, Oct. 2022
abstract: Gait phase-based control is a trending research topic for walking-aid robots, especially robotic lower-limb prostheses. Gait phase estimation is a challenge for gait phase-based control. Previous researches used the integration or the differential of the human's thigh angle to estimate the gait phase, but accumulative measurement errors and noises can affect the estimation results. In this paper, a more robust gait phase estimation method is proposed using a unified form of piecewise monotonic gait phase-thigh angle models for various locomotion modes. The gait phase is estimated from only the thigh angle, which is a stable variable and avoids phase drifting. A Kalman filter-based smoother is designed to further suppress the mutations of the estimated gait phase. Based on the proposed gait phase estimation method, a gait phase-based joint angle tracking controller is designed for a transfemoral prosthesis. The proposed gait estimation method, the gait phase smoother, and the controller are evaluated through offline analysis on walking data in various locomotion modes. And the real-time performance of the gait phase-based controller is validated in an experiment on the transfemoral prosthesis.
summary: Gait phase-based control is a trending research topic for walking-aid robots, especially robotic lower-limb prostheses. Gait phase estimation is a challenge for gait phase-based control. Previous researches used the integration or the differential of the human's thigh angle to estimate the gait phase, but accumulative measurement errors and noises can affect the estimation results. In this paper, a more robust gait phase estimation method is proposed using a unified form of piecewise monotonic gait phase-thigh angle models for various locomotion modes. The gait phase is estimated from only the thigh angle, which is a stable variable and avoids phase drifting. A Kalman filter-based smoother is designed to further suppress the mutations of the estimated gait phase. Based on the proposed gait phase estimation method, a gait phase-based joint angle tracking controller is designed for a transfemoral prosthesis. The proposed gait estimation method, the gait phase smoother, and the controller are evaluated through offline analysis on walking data in various locomotion modes. And the real-time performance of the gait phase-based controller is validated in an experiment on the transfemoral prosthesis.
abstract_zh: 基于步态阶段的控制是助行机器人，尤其是机器人下肢假肢的一个热门研究课题。步态相位估计是基于步态相位的控制的一个挑战。以往的研究利用人体大腿角度的积分或微分来估计步态相位，但累积的测量误差和噪声会影响估计结果。在本文中，提出了一种更鲁棒的步态相位估计方法，使用针对各种运动模式的统一形式的分段单调步态相位-大腿角模型。步态相位仅根据大腿角度进行估计，这是一个稳定的变量，可以避免相位漂移。基于卡尔曼滤波器的平滑器旨在进一步抑制估计步态阶段的突变。基于所提出的步态相位估计方法，为经股假肢设计了一种基于步态相位的关节角度跟踪控制器。通过对各种运动模式下的步行数据进行离线分析来评估所提出的步态估计方法、步态相位平滑器和控制器。并在经股假体的实验中验证了基于步态相位的控制器的实时性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分段单调模型的步态相位估计方法，用于控制多种运动模式下的膝关节假肢。
AI.motivation: 传统步态相位估计方法依赖股骨角度积分或微分，易受累积误差和噪声影响，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建统一的分段单调步态相位-股骨角度模型，结合卡尔曼滤波平滑器抑制估计突变，并设计基于步态相位的关节角跟踪控制器。
AI.result: 离线分析验证了方法在多种运动模式下的有效性，实时实验表明控制器性能达标。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过稳定股骨角度变量和滤波优化，提升了步态相位估计的鲁棒性与准确性，适用于假肢实时控制。

Based on the proposed gait phase estimation method, a gait phase-based joint angle tracking controller is designed for a transfemoral prosthesis. The proposed gait estimation method, the gait phase smoother, and the controller are evaluated through offline analysis on walking data in various locomotion modes. And the real-time performance of the gait phase-based controller is validated in an experiment on the transfemoral prosthesis. 基于步态阶段的控制是助行机器人，尤其是机器人下肢假肢的一个热门研究课题。步态相位估计是基于步态相位的控制的一个挑战。以往的研究利用人体大腿角度的积分或微分来估计步态相位，但累积的测量误差和噪声会影响估计结果。在本文中，提出了一种更鲁棒的步态相位估计方法，使用针对各种运动模式的统一形式的分段单调步态相位-大腿角模型。步态相位仅根据大腿角度进行估计，这是一个稳定的变量，可以避免相位漂移。基于卡尔曼滤波器的平滑器旨在进一步抑制估计步态阶段的突变。基于所提出的步态相位估计方法，为经股假肢设计了一种基于步态相位的关节角度跟踪控制器。通过对各种运动模式下的步行数据进行离线分析来评估所提出的步态估计方法、步态相位平滑器和控制器。并在经股假体的实验中验证了基于步态相位的控制器的实时性能。 本文提出一种基于分段单调模型的步态相位估计方法，用于控制多种运动模式下的膝关节假肢。 Xinxing Chen,Chuheng Chen,Yuxuan Wang,Bowen Yang,Teng Ma,Yuquan Leng,Chenglong Fu cs.RO

authors_text: Tarun Krishna,Ayush K. Rai,Yasser A. D. Djilali,Alan F. Smeaton,Kevin McGuinness,Noel E. O'Connor
title: Dynamic Channel Selection in Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 自监督学习中的动态通道选择
comment: Accepted in Irish Machine Vision and Image Processing Conference 2022
comments: Accepted in Irish Machine Vision and Image Processing Conference 2022
abstract: Whilst computer vision models built using self-supervised approaches are now commonplace, some important questions remain. Do self-supervised models learn highly redundant channel features? What if a self-supervised network could dynamically select the important channels and get rid of the unnecessary ones? Currently, convnets pre-trained with self-supervision have obtained comparable performance on downstream tasks in comparison to their supervised counterparts in computer vision. However, there are drawbacks to self-supervised models including their large numbers of parameters, computationally expensive training strategies and a clear need for faster inference on downstream tasks. In this work, our goal is to address the latter by studying how a standard channel selection method developed for supervised learning can be applied to networks trained with self-supervision. We validate our findings on a range of target budgets $t_{d}$ for channel computation on image classification task across different datasets, specifically CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet-100, obtaining comparable performance to that of the original network when selecting all channels but at a significant reduction in computation reported in terms of FLOPs.
summary: Whilst computer vision models built using self-supervised approaches are now commonplace, some important questions remain. Do self-supervised models learn highly redundant channel features? What if a self-supervised network could dynamically select the important channels and get rid of the unnecessary ones? Currently, convnets pre-trained with self-supervision have obtained comparable performance on downstream tasks in comparison to their supervised counterparts in computer vision. However, there are drawbacks to self-supervised models including their large numbers of parameters, computationally expensive training strategies and a clear need for faster inference on downstream tasks. In this work, our goal is to address the latter by studying how a standard channel selection method developed for supervised learning can be applied to networks trained with self-supervision. We validate our findings on a range of target budgets $t_{d}$ for channel computation on image classification task across different datasets, specifically CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet-100, obtaining comparable performance to that of the original network when selecting all channels but at a significant reduction in computation reported in terms of FLOPs.
abstract_zh: 虽然使用自我监督方法构建的计算机视觉模型现在很常见，但仍然存在一些重要问题。自监督模型是否学习高度冗余的通道特征？如果一个自监督网络可以动态选择重要的通道并去除不必要的通道会怎么样？目前，经过自我监督预训练的卷积网络在下游任务上与计算机视觉中的监督网络相比，已经获得了相当的性能。然而，自监督模型也存在缺点，包括大量参数、计算成本高昂的训练策略以及对下游任务更快推理的明确需求。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过研究如何将为监督学习开发的标准通道选择方法应用于经过自我监督训练的网络来解决后者。我们在不同数据集（特别是 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet-100）的图像分类任务通道计算的一系列目标预算 $t_{d}$ 上验证了我们的发现，在选择所有通道时获得了与原始网络相当的性能，但以 FLOP 为单位报告的计算量显着减少。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何将监督学习中的动态通道选择方法应用于自监督学习模型，以减少计算量并提升推理效率。
AI.motivation: 自监督模型存在参数冗余、计算成本高及推理速度慢的问题，需探索更高效的通道选择策略以优化性能。
AI.method: 采用监督学习中标准的通道选择方法，针对自监督预训练网络进行动态通道筛选，通过控制计算预算缩减冗余通道。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和ImageNet-100数据集上，通道选择后模型在保持原性能的同时，计算量（FLOPs）显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 动态通道选择方法可有效减少自监督模型的计算开销，为高效部署提供可行方案，同时保持下游任务性能。

authors_text: Payam Zahadat,Ada Diaconescu
title: Multi-Scale Asset Distribution Model for Dynamic Environments
title_zh: 动态环境的多尺度资产分配模型
abstract: In many self-organising systems the ability to extract necessary resources from the external environment is essential to the system's growth and survival. Examples include the extraction of sunlight and nutrients in organic plants, of monetary income in business organisations and of mobile robots in swarm intelligence actions. When operating within competitive, ever-changing environments, such systems must distribute their internal assets wisely so as to improve and adapt their ability to extract available resources. As the system size increases, the asset-distribution process often gets organised around a multi-scale control topology. This topology may be static (fixed) or dynamic (enabling growth and structural adaptation) depending on the system's internal constraints and adaptive mechanisms. In this paper, we expand on a plant-inspired asset-distribution model and introduce a more general multi-scale model applicable across a wider range of natural and artificial system domains. We study the impact that the topology of the multi-scale control process has upon the system's ability to self-adapt asset distribution when resource availability changes within the environment. Results show how different topological characteristics and different competition levels between system branches impact overall system profitability, adaptation delays and disturbances when environmental changes occur. These findings provide a basis for system designers to select the most suitable topology and configuration for their particular application and execution environment.
summary: In many self-organising systems the ability to extract necessary resources from the external environment is essential to the system's growth and survival. Examples include the extraction of sunlight and nutrients in organic plants, of monetary income in business organisations and of mobile robots in swarm intelligence actions. When operating within competitive, ever-changing environments, such systems must distribute their internal assets wisely so as to improve and adapt their ability to extract available resources. As the system size increases, the asset-distribution process often gets organised around a multi-scale control topology. This topology may be static (fixed) or dynamic (enabling growth and structural adaptation) depending on the system's internal constraints and adaptive mechanisms. In this paper, we expand on a plant-inspired asset-distribution model and introduce a more general multi-scale model applicable across a wider range of natural and artificial system domains. We study the impact that the topology of the multi-scale control process has upon the system's ability to self-adapt asset distribution when resource availability changes within the environment. Results show how different topological characteristics and different competition levels between system branches impact overall system profitability, adaptation delays and disturbances when environmental changes occur. These findings provide a basis for system designers to select the most suitable topology and configuration for their particular application and execution environment.
abstract_zh: 在许多自组织系统中，从外部环境中提取必要资源的能力对于系统的成长和生存至关重要。例子包括有机植物中的阳光和营养物质的提取、商业组织中的货币收入以及群体智能行动中的移动机器人。当在竞争激烈、不断变化的环境中运行时，此类系统必须明智地分配其内部资产，以提高和调整其提取可用资源的能力。随着系统规模的增加，资产分配过程通常围绕多尺度控制拓扑进行组织。该拓扑可以是静态（固定）或动态（实现增长和结构适应），具体取决于系统的内部约束和自适应机制。在本文中，我们扩展了植物启发的资产分配模型，并引入了一种更通用的多尺度模型，适用于更广泛的自然和人工系统领域。我们研究了当环境中资源可用性发生变化时，多尺度控制过程的拓扑对系统自适应资产分配的能力的影响。结果表明，当环境发生变化时，系统分支之间不同的拓扑特征和不同的竞争水平如何影响整个系统的盈利能力、适应延迟和干扰。这些发现为系统设计人员为其特定应用和执行环境选择最合适的拓扑和配置提供了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度资产分配模型，用于动态环境中的自组织系统，以提升资源获取与适应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有系统在竞争性动态环境中需高效分配内部资源以应对环境变化，但传统模型缺乏通用性与适应性。
AI.method: 基于植物启发模型，构建跨自然与人工系统的通用多尺度控制拓扑模型，分析拓扑结构与竞争水平对系统适应性的影响。
AI.result: 不同拓扑结构与分支竞争水平显著影响系统盈利能力、适应延迟及环境变化下的扰动表现。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为系统设计者提供了选择适配拓扑结构与配置的理论依据，以优化动态环境中的资源分配策略。

Examples include the extraction of sunlight and nutrients in organic plants, of monetary income in business organisations and of mobile robots in swarm intelligence actions. When operating within competitive, ever-changing environments, such systems must distribute their internal assets wisely so as to improve and adapt their ability to extract available resources. As the system size increases, the asset-distribution process often gets organised around a multi-scale control topology. Results show how different topological characteristics and different competition levels between system branches impact overall system profitability, adaptation delays and disturbances when environmental changes occur. These findings provide a basis for system designers to select the most suitable topology and configuration for their particular application and execution environment. 在许多自组织系统中，从外部环境中提取必要资源的能力对于系统的成长和生存至关重要。例子包括有机植物中的阳光和营养物质的提取、商业组织中的货币收入以及群体智能行动中的移动机器人。当在竞争激烈、不断变化的环境中运行时，此类系统必须明智地分配其内部资产，以提高和调整其提取可用资源的能力。随着系统规模的增加，资产分配过程通常围绕多尺度控制拓扑进行组织。该拓扑可以是静态（固定）或动态（实现增长和结构适应），具体取决于系统的内部约束和自适应机制。在本文中，我们扩展了植物启发的资产分配模型，并引入了一种更通用的多尺度模型，适用于更广泛的自然和人工系统领域。我们研究了当环境中资源可用性发生变化时，多尺度控制过程的拓扑对系统自适应资产分配的能力的影响。结果表明，当环境发生变化时，系统分支之间不同的拓扑特征和不同的竞争水平如何影响整个系统的盈利能力、适应延迟和干扰。这些发现为系统设计人员为其特定应用和执行环境选择最合适的拓扑和配置提供了基础。 本文提出一种多尺度资产分配模型，用于动态环境中的自组织系统，以提升资源获取与适应能力。 Payam Zahadat,Ada Diaconescu cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.SI,eess.SY

authors_text: Achkan Salehi,Steffen Rühl,Stephane Doncieux
title: Adaptive Asynchronous Control Using Meta-learned Neural Ordinary Differential Equations
title_zh: 使用元学习神经常微分方程的自适应异步控制
abstract: Model-based Reinforcement Learning and Control have demonstrated great potential in various sequential decision making problem domains, including in robotics settings. However, real-world robotics systems often present challenges that limit the applicability of those methods. In particular, we note two problems that jointly happen in many industrial systems: 1) Irregular/asynchronous observations and actions and 2) Dramatic changes in environment dynamics from an episode to another (e.g. varying payload inertial properties). We propose a general framework that overcomes those difficulties by meta-learning adaptive dynamics models for continuous-time prediction and control. The proposed approach is task-agnostic and can be adapted to new tasks in a straight-forward manner. We present evaluations in two different robot simulations and on a real industrial robot.
summary: Model-based Reinforcement Learning and Control have demonstrated great potential in various sequential decision making problem domains, including in robotics settings. However, real-world robotics systems often present challenges that limit the applicability of those methods. In particular, we note two problems that jointly happen in many industrial systems: 1) Irregular/asynchronous observations and actions and 2) Dramatic changes in environment dynamics from an episode to another (e.g. varying payload inertial properties). We propose a general framework that overcomes those difficulties by meta-learning adaptive dynamics models for continuous-time prediction and control. The proposed approach is task-agnostic and can be adapted to new tasks in a straight-forward manner. We present evaluations in two different robot simulations and on a real industrial robot.
abstract_zh: 基于模型的强化学习和控制在各种顺序决策问题领域（包括机器人设置）中表现出了巨大的潜力。然而，现实世界的机器人系统经常面临限制这些方法的适用性的挑战。特别是，我们注意到许多工业系统中共同发生的两个问题：1）不规则/异步观察和行动，2）环境动态从一个事件到另一个事件的巨大变化（例如，不同的有效负载惯性特性）。我们提出了一个通用框架，通过元学习自适应动力学模型进行连续时间预测和控制来克服这些困难。所提出的方法与任务无关，可以直接适应新任务。我们对两种不同的机器人模拟和真实的工业机器人进行了评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元学习的神经常微分方程框架，用于解决工业机器人中的异步控制与动态变化问题。
AI.motivation: 实际工业机器人系统存在异步观测动作和动态突变两大挑战，传统模型难以适应这种非稳态环境。
AI.method: 通过元学习训练自适应动力学模型，利用神经常微分方程实现连续时间预测，构建任务无关的控制框架。
AI.result: 在双机器人模拟环境和真实工业机器人实验中验证了方法的有效性，成功应对异步性和动态变化问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂工业场景提供了通用的自适应控制方案，具有良好的迁移能力和实际应用价值。

search_text: Adaptive Asynchronous Control Using Meta-learned Neural Ordinary Differential Equations 使用元学习神经常微分方程的自适应异步控制 Model-based Reinforcement Learning and Control have demonstrated great potential in various sequential decision making problem domains, including in robotics settings. However, real-world robotics systems often present challenges that limit the applicability of those methods. In particular, we note two problems that jointly happen in many industrial systems: 1) Irregular/asynchronous observations and actions and 2) Dramatic changes in environment dynamics from an episode to another (e.g. varying payload inertial properties). We propose a general framework that overcomes those difficulties by meta-learning adaptive dynamics models for continuous-time prediction and control. The proposed approach is task-agnostic and can be adapted to new tasks in a straight-forward manner. We present evaluations in two different robot simulations and on a real industrial robot. 基于模型的强化学习和控制在各种顺序决策问题领域（包括机器人设置）中表现出了巨大的潜力。然而，现实世界的机器人系统经常面临限制这些方法的适用性的挑战。特别是，我们注意到许多工业系统中共同发生的两个问题：1）不规则/异步观察和行动，2）环境动态从一个事件到另一个事件的巨大变化（例如，不同的有效负载惯性特性）。我们提出了一个通用框架，通过元学习自适应动力学模型进行连续时间预测和控制来克服这些困难。所提出的方法与任务无关，可以直接适应新任务。我们对两种不同的机器人模拟和真实的工业机器人进行了评估。 本文提出一种基于元学习的神经常微分方程框架，用于解决工业机器人中的异步控制与动态变化问题。 Achkan Salehi,Steffen Rühl,Stephane Doncieux cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Yajing Kong,Liu Liu,Zhen Wang,Dacheng Tao
title: Balancing Stability and Plasticity through Advanced Null Space in Continual Learning
title_zh: 通过持续学习中的高级零空间平衡稳定性和可塑性
abstract: Continual learning is a learning paradigm that learns tasks sequentially with resources constraints, in which the key challenge is stability-plasticity dilemma, i.e., it is uneasy to simultaneously have the stability to prevent catastrophic forgetting of old tasks and the plasticity to learn new tasks well. In this paper, we propose a new continual learning approach, Advanced Null Space (AdNS), to balance the stability and plasticity without storing any old data of previous tasks. Specifically, to obtain better stability, AdNS makes use of low-rank approximation to obtain a novel null space and projects the gradient onto the null space to prevent the interference on the past tasks. To control the generation of the null space, we introduce a non-uniform constraint strength to further reduce forgetting. Furthermore, we present a simple but effective method, intra-task distillation, to improve the performance of the current task. Finally, we theoretically find that null space plays a key role in plasticity and stability, respectively. Experimental results show that the proposed method can achieve better performance compared to state-of-the-art continual learning approaches.
summary: Continual learning is a learning paradigm that learns tasks sequentially with resources constraints, in which the key challenge is stability-plasticity dilemma, i.e., it is uneasy to simultaneously have the stability to prevent catastrophic forgetting of old tasks and the plasticity to learn new tasks well. In this paper, we propose a new continual learning approach, Advanced Null Space (AdNS), to balance the stability and plasticity without storing any old data of previous tasks. Specifically, to obtain better stability, AdNS makes use of low-rank approximation to obtain a novel null space and projects the gradient onto the null space to prevent the interference on the past tasks. To control the generation of the null space, we introduce a non-uniform constraint strength to further reduce forgetting. Furthermore, we present a simple but effective method, intra-task distillation, to improve the performance of the current task. Finally, we theoretically find that null space plays a key role in plasticity and stability, respectively. Experimental results show that the proposed method can achieve better performance compared to state-of-the-art continual learning approaches.
abstract_zh: 持续学习是一种在资源限制下顺序学习任务的学习范式，其关键挑战是稳定性-可塑性困境，即很难同时具有防止旧任务发生灾难性遗忘的稳定性和很好地学习新任务的可塑性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的持续学习方法，即高级零空间（AdNS），以平衡稳定性和可塑性，而不存储先前任务的任何旧数据。具体来说，为了获得更好的稳定性，AdNS利用低秩近似来获得新的零空间，并将梯度投影到零空间上以防止对过去任务的干扰。为了控制零空间的生成，我们引入了非均匀约束强度以进一步减少遗忘。此外，我们提出了一种简单但有效的方法，即任务内蒸馏，来提高当前任务的性能。最后，我们从理论上发现零空间分别在可塑性和稳定性中起着关键作用。实验结果表明，与最先进的持续学习方法相比，所提出的方法可以获得更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Advanced Null Space (AdNS)的持续学习方法，旨在在不存储旧任务数据的情况下平衡稳定性与可塑性。
AI.motivation: 持续学习面临稳定性-可塑性困境，即难以同时防止旧任务灾难性遗忘并有效学习新任务。
AI.method: 通过低秩近似构建新颖的零空间并投影梯度以减少干扰，引入非均匀约束强度控制零空间生成，并采用任务内知识蒸馏提升当前任务性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个基准数据集上优于现有最先进的持续学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 零空间在平衡稳定性与可塑性中起关键作用，AdNS为持续学习提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Chong Wang,Rongkai Zhang,Saiprasad Ravishankar,Bihan Wen
title: REPNP: Plug-and-Play with Deep Reinforcement Learning Prior for Robust Image Restoration
title_zh: REPNP：即插即用，具有深度强化学习先验，可实现稳健的图像恢复
abstract: Image restoration schemes based on the pre-trained deep models have received great attention due to their unique flexibility for solving various inverse problems. In particular, the Plug-and-Play (PnP) framework is a popular and powerful tool that can integrate an off-the-shelf deep denoiser for different image restoration tasks with known observation models. However, obtaining the observation model that exactly matches the actual one can be challenging in practice. Thus, the PnP schemes with conventional deep denoisers may fail to generate satisfying results in some real-world image restoration tasks. We argue that the robustness of the PnP framework is largely limited by using the off-the-shelf deep denoisers that are trained by deterministic optimization. To this end, we propose a novel deep reinforcement learning (DRL) based PnP framework, dubbed RePNP, by leveraging a light-weight DRL-based denoiser for robust image restoration tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed RePNP is robust to the observation model used in the PnP scheme deviating from the actual one. Thus, RePNP can generate more reliable restoration results for image deblurring and super resolution tasks. Compared with several state-of-the-art deep image restoration baselines, RePNP achieves better results subjective to model deviation with fewer model parameters.
summary: Image restoration schemes based on the pre-trained deep models have received great attention due to their unique flexibility for solving various inverse problems. In particular, the Plug-and-Play (PnP) framework is a popular and powerful tool that can integrate an off-the-shelf deep denoiser for different image restoration tasks with known observation models. However, obtaining the observation model that exactly matches the actual one can be challenging in practice. Thus, the PnP schemes with conventional deep denoisers may fail to generate satisfying results in some real-world image restoration tasks. We argue that the robustness of the PnP framework is largely limited by using the off-the-shelf deep denoisers that are trained by deterministic optimization. To this end, we propose a novel deep reinforcement learning (DRL) based PnP framework, dubbed RePNP, by leveraging a light-weight DRL-based denoiser for robust image restoration tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed RePNP is robust to the observation model used in the PnP scheme deviating from the actual one. Thus, RePNP can generate more reliable restoration results for image deblurring and super resolution tasks. Compared with several state-of-the-art deep image restoration baselines, RePNP achieves better results subjective to model deviation with fewer model parameters.
abstract_zh: 基于预训练深度模型的图像恢复方案由于其解决各种逆问题的独特灵活性而受到广泛关注。特别是，即插即用（PnP）框架是一种流行且强大的工具，可以将现成的深度降噪器集成到已知的观察模型中，用于不同的图像恢复任务。然而，获得与实际情况完全匹配的观测模型在实践中可能具有挑战性。因此，使用传统深度降噪器的 PnP 方案可能无法在某些现实世界的图像恢复任务中产生令人满意的结果。我们认为，PnP 框架的鲁棒性在很大程度上受到使用通过确定性优化训练的现成深度降噪器的限制。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的基于深度强化学习（DRL）的 PnP 框架，称为 RePNP，利用轻量级的基于 DRL 的降噪器来执行鲁棒的图像恢复任务。实验结果表明，所提出的 RePNP 对于 PnP 方案中使用的观测模型与实际模型的偏差具有鲁棒性。因此，RePNP 可以为图像去模糊和超分辨率任务生成更可靠的恢复结果。与几种最先进的深度图像恢复基线相比，RePNP 用更少的模型参数在模型偏差主观上取得了更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的新型PnP框架RePNP，用于提升图像修复任务中对观测模型偏差的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统PnP框架依赖确定性优化训练的现成去噪器，难以应对实际观测模型与理论模型不匹配的问题，导致修复效果不稳定。
AI.method: 设计轻量级深度强化学习去噪器，替代传统确定性优化模型，构建新型RePNP框架以适应观测模型偏差。
AI.result: 实验表明RePNP在图像去模糊和超分辨率任务中，相比现有方法在模型偏差场景下表现更优且参数量更少。
AI.conclusion: RePNP通过引入深度强化学习先验，有效提升了PnP框架对观测模型不确定性的鲁棒性，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: REPNP: Plug-and-Play with Deep Reinforcement Learning Prior for Robust Image Restoration REPNP：即插即用，具有深度强化学习先验，可实现稳健的图像恢复 Image restoration schemes based on the pre-trained deep models have received great attention due to their unique flexibility for solving various inverse problems. In particular, the Plug-and-Play (PnP) framework is a popular and powerful tool that can integrate an off-the-shelf deep denoiser for different image restoration tasks with known observation models. However, obtaining the observation model that exactly matches the actual one can be challenging in practice. Thus, the PnP schemes with conventional deep denoisers may fail to generate satisfying results in some real-world image restoration tasks. We argue that the robustness of the PnP framework is largely limited by using the off-the-shelf deep denoisers that are trained by deterministic optimization. To this end, we propose a novel deep reinforcement learning (DRL) based PnP framework, dubbed RePNP, by leveraging a light-weight DRL-based denoiser for robust image restoration tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed RePNP is robust to the observation model used in the PnP scheme deviating from the actual one. Thus, RePNP can generate more reliable restoration results for image deblurring and super resolution tasks. Compared with several state-of-the-art deep image restoration baselines, RePNP achieves better results subjective to model deviation with fewer model parameters. 基于预训练深度模型的图像恢复方案由于其解决各种逆问题的独特灵活性而受到广泛关注。特别是，即插即用（PnP）框架是一种流行且强大的工具，可以将现成的深度降噪器集成到已知的观察模型中，用于不同的图像恢复任务。然而，获得与实际情况完全匹配的观测模型在实践中可能具有挑战性。因此，使用传统深度降噪器的 PnP 方案可能无法在某些现实世界的图像恢复任务中产生令人满意的结果。我们认为，PnP 框架的鲁棒性在很大程度上受到使用通过确定性优化训练的现成深度降噪器的限制。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的基于深度强化学习（DRL）的 PnP 框架，称为 RePNP，利用轻量级的基于 DRL 的降噪器来执行鲁棒的图像恢复任务。实验结果表明，所提出的 RePNP 对于 PnP 方案中使用的观测模型与实际模型的偏差具有鲁棒性。因此，RePNP 可以为图像去模糊和超分辨率任务生成更可靠的恢复结果。与几种最先进的深度图像恢复基线相比，RePNP 用更少的模型参数在模型偏差主观上取得了更好的结果。 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的新型PnP框架RePNP，用于提升图像修复任务中对观测模型偏差的鲁棒性。 Chong Wang,Rongkai Zhang,Saiprasad Ravishankar,Bihan Wen eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Luka Abb,Jana-Rebecca Rehse
title: A Reference Data Model for Process-Related User Interaction Logs
title_zh: 流程相关用户交互日志的参考数据模型
comment: Pre-print, to be published at BPM 2022
comments: Pre-print, to be published at BPM 2022
abstract: User interaction (UI) logs are high-resolution event logs that record low-level activities performed by a user during the execution of a task in an information system. Each event in a UI log corresponds to a single interaction between the user and the interface, such as clicking a button or entering a string into a text field. UI logs are used for purposes like task mining or robotic process automation (RPA), but each study and tool relies on a different conceptualization and implementation of the elements and attributes that constitute user interactions. This lack of standardization makes it difficult to integrate UI logs from different sources and to combine tools for UI data collection with downstream analytics or automation solutions. To address this, we propose a universally applicable reference data model for process-related UI logs. Based on a review of scientific literature and industry solutions, this model includes the core attributes of UI logs, but remains flexible with regard to the scope, level of abstraction, and case notion. We provide an implementation of the model as an extension to the XES interchange standard for event logs and demonstrate its practical applicability in a real-life RPA scenario.
summary: User interaction (UI) logs are high-resolution event logs that record low-level activities performed by a user during the execution of a task in an information system. Each event in a UI log corresponds to a single interaction between the user and the interface, such as clicking a button or entering a string into a text field. UI logs are used for purposes like task mining or robotic process automation (RPA), but each study and tool relies on a different conceptualization and implementation of the elements and attributes that constitute user interactions. This lack of standardization makes it difficult to integrate UI logs from different sources and to combine tools for UI data collection with downstream analytics or automation solutions. To address this, we propose a universally applicable reference data model for process-related UI logs. Based on a review of scientific literature and industry solutions, this model includes the core attributes of UI logs, but remains flexible with regard to the scope, level of abstraction, and case notion. We provide an implementation of the model as an extension to the XES interchange standard for event logs and demonstrate its practical applicability in a real-life RPA scenario.
abstract_zh: 用户交互 (UI) 日志是高分辨率事件日志，记录用户在信息系统中执行任务期间执行的低级活动。 UI 日志中的每个事件对应于用户和界面之间的一次交互，例如单击按钮或在文本字段中输入字符串。 UI 日志用于任务挖掘或机器人流程自动化 (RPA) 等目的，但每种研究和工具都依赖于构成用户交互的元素和属性的不同概念化和实现。由于缺乏标准化，因此很难集成来自不同来源的 UI 日志，也很难将 UI 数据收集工具与下游分析或自动化解决方案相结合。为了解决这个问题，我们为流程相关的 UI 日志提出了一个普遍适用的参考数据模型。基于对科学文献和行业解决方案的回顾，该模型包含了 UI 日志的核心属性，但在范围、抽象级别和案例概念方面保持了灵活性。我们提供该模型的实现作为事件日志 XES 交换标准的扩展，并展示其在现实 RPA 场景中的实际适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个面向流程的用户交互日志通用参考数据模型，以解决不同系统间日志标准化不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有用户交互日志因缺乏统一标准，导致跨系统整合及自动化工具链对接困难，阻碍了任务挖掘与RPA技术的高效应用。
AI.method: 基于文献综述与行业方案分析，构建包含核心属性且保持灵活性的参考模型，并将其扩展为XES事件日志标准的子集。
AI.result: 模型在真实RPA场景中成功验证，证明其可有效支持跨工具的数据采集与后续分析自动化流程。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为用户交互日志提供了标准化框架，可促进异构系统间的数据互通与自动化技术的集成应用。

authors_text: Ali Faqihi,Shah J Miah
title: Designing an AI-Driven Talent Intelligence Solution: Exploring Big Data to extend the TOE Framework
title_zh: 设计人工智能驱动的人才智能解决方案：探索大数据以扩展 TOE 框架
abstract: AI has the potential to improve approaches to talent management enabling dynamic provisions through implementing advanced automation. This study aims to identify the new requirements for developing AI-oriented artifacts to address talent management issues. Focusing on enhancing interactions between professional assessment and planning attributes, the design artifact is an intelligent employment automation solution for career guidance that is largely dependent on a talent intelligent module and an individuals growth needs. A design science method is adopted for conducting the experimental study with structured machine learning techniques which is the primary element of a comprehensive AI solution framework informed through a proposed moderation of the technology-organization-environment theory.
summary: AI has the potential to improve approaches to talent management enabling dynamic provisions through implementing advanced automation. This study aims to identify the new requirements for developing AI-oriented artifacts to address talent management issues. Focusing on enhancing interactions between professional assessment and planning attributes, the design artifact is an intelligent employment automation solution for career guidance that is largely dependent on a talent intelligent module and an individuals growth needs. A design science method is adopted for conducting the experimental study with structured machine learning techniques which is the primary element of a comprehensive AI solution framework informed through a proposed moderation of the technology-organization-environment theory.
abstract_zh: 人工智能有潜力改进人才管理方法，通过实施先进的自动化实现动态配置。本研究旨在确定开发面向人工智能的工件以解决人才管理问题的新要求。该设计神器专注于增强专业评估与规划属性之间的交互，是一种很大程度上依赖于人才智能模块和个人成长需求的职业指导智能就业自动化解决方案。采用设计科学方法用结构化机器学习技术进行实验研究，这是通过技术-组织-环境理论的拟议调节而提供的综合人工智能解决方案框架的主要要素。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个基于人工智能的人才智能解决方案，通过大数据扩展TOE框架，以优化人才管理中的职业指导和自动化流程。
AI.motivation: 传统人才管理方法难以满足动态需求，需借助AI和大数据提升效率与个性化，但缺乏针对AI导向工件的具体设计框架。
AI.method: 采用设计科学方法，结合结构化机器学习技术，对技术-组织-环境（TOE）理论进行调整，构建综合AI解决方案框架。
AI.result: 提出智能就业自动化解决方案，依赖人才智能模块与个人成长需求，实现动态职业规划与管理效率提升。
AI.conclusion: 验证了AI与大数据在人才管理中的有效性，扩展了TOE框架，为未来研究提供了理论与实践基础。

authors_text: Wenjie Pei,Shuang Wu,Dianwen Mei,Fanglin Chen,Jiandong Tian,Guangming Lu
title: Few-Shot Object Detection by Knowledge Distillation Using Bag-of-Visual-Words Representations
title_zh: 使用视觉词袋表示通过知识蒸馏进行少样本目标检测
abstract: While fine-tuning based methods for few-shot object detection have achieved remarkable progress, a crucial challenge that has not been addressed well is the potential class-specific overfitting on base classes and sample-specific overfitting on novel classes. In this work we design a novel knowledge distillation framework to guide the learning of the object detector and thereby restrain the overfitting in both the pre-training stage on base classes and fine-tuning stage on novel classes. To be specific, we first present a novel Position-Aware Bag-of-Visual-Words model for learning a representative bag of visual words (BoVW) from a limited size of image set, which is used to encode general images based on the similarities between the learned visual words and an image. Then we perform knowledge distillation based on the fact that an image should have consistent BoVW representations in two different feature spaces. To this end, we pre-learn a feature space independently from the object detection, and encode images using BoVW in this space. The obtained BoVW representation for an image can be considered as distilled knowledge to guide the learning of object detector: the extracted features by the object detector for the same image are expected to derive the consistent BoVW representations with the distilled knowledge. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our method and demonstrate the superiority over other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: While fine-tuning based methods for few-shot object detection have achieved remarkable progress, a crucial challenge that has not been addressed well is the potential class-specific overfitting on base classes and sample-specific overfitting on novel classes. In this work we design a novel knowledge distillation framework to guide the learning of the object detector and thereby restrain the overfitting in both the pre-training stage on base classes and fine-tuning stage on novel classes. To be specific, we first present a novel Position-Aware Bag-of-Visual-Words model for learning a representative bag of visual words (BoVW) from a limited size of image set, which is used to encode general images based on the similarities between the learned visual words and an image. Then we perform knowledge distillation based on the fact that an image should have consistent BoVW representations in two different feature spaces. To this end, we pre-learn a feature space independently from the object detection, and encode images using BoVW in this space. The obtained BoVW representation for an image can be considered as distilled knowledge to guide the learning of object detector: the extracted features by the object detector for the same image are expected to derive the consistent BoVW representations with the distilled knowledge. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our method and demonstrate the superiority over other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 虽然基于微调的少镜头目标检测方法取得了显着的进展，但尚未得到很好解决的一个关键挑战是基类上潜在的特定于类的过度拟合和新类上的特定于样本的过度拟合。在这项工作中，我们设计了一种新颖的知识蒸馏框架来指导目标检测器的学习，从而抑制基类的预训练阶段和新类的微调阶段的过度拟合。具体来说，我们首先提出了一种新颖的位置感知视觉词袋模型，用于从有限大小的图像集中学习代表性视觉词袋（BoVW），该模型用于根据学习的视觉词与图像之间的相似性对一般图像进行编码。然后，我们基于图像在两个不同特征空间中应具有一致的 BoVW 表示这一事实进行知识蒸馏。为此，我们预先学习一个独立于目标检测的特征空间，并在该空间中使用 BoVW 对图像进行编码。获得的图像的 BoVW 表示可以被视为指导目标检测器学习的蒸馏知识：目标检测器对同一图像提取的特征预计会导出与蒸馏知识一致的 BoVW 表示。大量的实验验证了我们的方法的有效性，并证明了相对于其他最先进方法的优越性。

AI.motivation: 现有少样本目标检测方法在基础类和新类上易出现过拟合，需通过知识蒸馏约束模型学习过程。
AI.method: 设计Position-Aware BoVW模型生成视觉词袋表示，并在独立特征空间中进行知识蒸馏，使检测器特征与蒸馏知识保持一致。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法的有效性，性能优于其他先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效抑制了过拟合，提升了少样本检测性能，展示了知识蒸馏在该领域的潜力。

search_text: Few-Shot Object Detection by Knowledge Distillation Using Bag-of-Visual-Words Representations 使用视觉词袋表示通过知识蒸馏进行少样本目标检测 While fine-tuning based methods for few-shot object detection have achieved remarkable progress, a crucial challenge that has not been addressed well is the potential class-specific overfitting on base classes and sample-specific overfitting on novel classes. In this work we design a novel knowledge distillation framework to guide the learning of the object detector and thereby restrain the overfitting in both the pre-training stage on base classes and fine-tuning stage on novel classes. To be specific, we first present a novel Position-Aware Bag-of-Visual-Words model for learning a representative bag of visual words (BoVW) from a limited size of image set, which is used to encode general images based on the similarities between the learned visual words and an image. Then we perform knowledge distillation based on the fact that an image should have consistent BoVW representations in two different feature spaces. To this end, we pre-learn a feature space independently from the object detection, and encode images using BoVW in this space. The obtained BoVW representation for an image can be considered as distilled knowledge to guide the learning of object detector: the extracted features by the object detector for the same image are expected to derive the consistent BoVW representations with the distilled knowledge. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of our method and demonstrate the superiority over other state-of-the-art methods. 虽然基于微调的少镜头目标检测方法取得了显着的进展，但尚未得到很好解决的一个关键挑战是基类上潜在的特定于类的过度拟合和新类上的特定于样本的过度拟合。在这项工作中，我们设计了一种新颖的知识蒸馏框架来指导目标检测器的学习，从而抑制基类的预训练阶段和新类的微调阶段的过度拟合。具体来说，我们首先提出了一种新颖的位置感知视觉词袋模型，用于从有限大小的图像集中学习代表性视觉词袋（BoVW），该模型用于根据学习的视觉词与图像之间的相似性对一般图像进行编码。然后，我们基于图像在两个不同特征空间中应具有一致的 BoVW 表示这一事实进行知识蒸馏。为此，我们预先学习一个独立于目标检测的特征空间，并在该空间中使用 BoVW 对图像进行编码。获得的图像的 BoVW 表示可以被视为指导目标检测器学习的蒸馏知识：目标检测器对同一图像提取的特征预计会导出与蒸馏知识一致的 BoVW 表示。大量的实验验证了我们的方法的有效性，并证明了相对于其他最先进方法的优越性。 本文提出一种基于知识蒸馏和视觉词袋表示的少样本目标检测方法，以解决类别和样本过拟合问题。 Wenjie Pei,Shuang Wu,Dianwen Mei,Fanglin Chen,Jiandong Tian,Guangming Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Dongli Xu,Jinhong Deng,Wen Li
title: Revisiting AP Loss for Dense Object Detection: Adaptive Ranking Pair Selection
title_zh: 重新审视密集目标检测的 AP 损失：自适应排名对选择
comment: Appearing in the Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2022
comments: Appearing in the Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2022
abstract: Average precision (AP) loss has recently shown promising performance on the dense object detection task. However,a deep understanding of how AP loss affects the detector from a pairwise ranking perspective has not yet been developed.In this work, we revisit the average precision (AP)loss and reveal that the crucial element is that of selecting the ranking pairs between positive and negative samples.Based on this observation, we propose two strategies to improve the AP loss. The first of these is a novel Adaptive Pairwise Error (APE) loss that focusing on ranking pairs in both positive and negative samples. Moreover,we select more accurate ranking pairs by exploiting the normalized ranking scores and localization scores with a clustering algorithm. Experiments conducted on the MSCOCO dataset support our analysis and demonstrate the superiority of our proposed method compared with current classification and ranking loss. The code is available at https://github.com/Xudangliatiger/APE-Loss.
summary: Average precision (AP) loss has recently shown promising performance on the dense object detection task. However,a deep understanding of how AP loss affects the detector from a pairwise ranking perspective has not yet been developed.In this work, we revisit the average precision (AP)loss and reveal that the crucial element is that of selecting the ranking pairs between positive and negative samples.Based on this observation, we propose two strategies to improve the AP loss. The first of these is a novel Adaptive Pairwise Error (APE) loss that focusing on ranking pairs in both positive and negative samples. Moreover,we select more accurate ranking pairs by exploiting the normalized ranking scores and localization scores with a clustering algorithm. Experiments conducted on the MSCOCO dataset support our analysis and demonstrate the superiority of our proposed method compared with current classification and ranking loss. The code is available at https://github.com/Xudangliatiger/APE-Loss.
abstract_zh: 平均精度（AP）损失最近在密集目标检测任务中表现出了良好的性能。然而，尚未从成对排序的角度深入理解 AP 损失如何影响检测器。在这项工作中，我们重新审视平均精度（AP）损失，并揭示关键因素是选择正样本和负样本之间的排序对。基于这一观察，我们提出了两种改善 AP 损失的策略。第一个是一种新颖的自适应成对误差（APE）损失，专注于对正样本和负样本中的对进行排序。此外，我们通过聚类算法利用归一化排名分数和定位分数来选择更准确的排名对。在 MSCOCO 数据集上进行的实验支持了我们的分析，并证明了我们提出的方法与当前分类和排名损失相比的优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/Xudangliatiger/APE-Loss 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视平均精度（AP）损失在密集目标检测中的应用，提出通过自适应排序对选择优化检测性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有AP损失缺乏对正负样本排序对机制的深入理解，限制了其在密集目标检测中的表现，需改进排序对选择策略以提升效果。
AI.method: 提出自适应成对误差（APE）损失，结合归一化排序分与定位分，利用聚类算法筛选更精确的正负样本排序对。
AI.result: 在MSCOCO数据集上实验表明，所提方法优于当前分类与排序损失，验证了排序对优化的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化排序对选择机制，AP损失在密集目标检测中的性能显著提升，为后续研究提供了新思路。
