authors_text: Dror Ozeri
title: Riemannian Geometry Approach for Minimizing Distortion and its Applications
title_zh: 最小化畸变的黎曼几何方法及其应用
abstract: Given an affine transformation $T$, we define its Fisher distortion $Dist_F(T)$. We show that the Fisher distortion has Riemannian metric structure and provide an algorithm for finding mean distorting transformation -- namely -- for a given set $\{T_{i}\}_{i=1}^N$ of affine transformations, find an affine transformation $T$ that minimize the overall distortion $\sum_{i=1}^NDist_F^{2}(T^{-1}T_{i}).$ The mean distorting transformation can be useful in some fields -- in particular, we apply it for rendering affine panoramas.
summary: Given an affine transformation $T$, we define its Fisher distortion $Dist_F(T)$. We show that the Fisher distortion has Riemannian metric structure and provide an algorithm for finding mean distorting transformation -- namely -- for a given set $\{T_{i}\}_{i=1}^N$ of affine transformations, find an affine transformation $T$ that minimize the overall distortion $\sum_{i=1}^NDist_F^{2}(T^{-1}T_{i}).$ The mean distorting transformation can be useful in some fields -- in particular, we apply it for rendering affine panoramas.
abstract_zh: 给定仿射变换 $T$，我们定义其费舍尔畸变 $Dist_F(T)$。我们证明费舍尔畸变具有黎曼度量结构，并提供了一种寻找平均畸变变换的算法——即，对于给定的仿射变换集$\{T_{i}\}_{i=1}^N$，找到一个仿射变换$T$，使整体畸变最小化$\sum_{i=1}^NDist_F^{2}(T^{-1}T_{i})。$平均畸变变换在某些领域可能很有用-- 特别是，我们将其应用于渲染仿射全景图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于黎曼几何的方法，用于最小化Fisher失真，并开发了一种算法来寻找平均失真变换，应用于仿射全景图渲染。
AI.motivation: 为了解决图像处理中由于仿射变换导致的失真问题，提升全景图渲染的质量和一致性。
AI.method: 通过将Fisher失真定义为黎曼度量结构，利用黎曼几何中的几何平均计算技术，设计优化算法求解平均失真变换。
AI.result: 成功构建了Fisher失真的黎曼度量框架，并验证了算法在仿射全景图渲染中的有效性，降低了整体失真程度。
AI.conclusion: 基于黎曼几何的方法能有效处理仿射变换失真问题，为全景图渲染等应用提供了新的数学工具和解决方案。

search_text: Riemannian Geometry Approach for Minimizing Distortion and its Applications 最小化畸变的黎曼几何方法及其应用 Given an affine transformation $T$, we define its Fisher distortion $Dist_F(T)$. We show that the Fisher distortion has Riemannian metric structure and provide an algorithm for finding mean distorting transformation -- namely -- for a given set $\{T_{i}\}_{i=1}^N$ of affine transformations, find an affine transformation $T$ that minimize the overall distortion $\sum_{i=1}^NDist_F^{2}(T^{-1}T_{i}).$ The mean distorting transformation can be useful in some fields -- in particular, we apply it for rendering affine panoramas. 给定仿射变换 $T$，我们定义其费舍尔畸变 $Dist_F(T)$。我们证明费舍尔畸变具有黎曼度量结构，并提供了一种寻找平均畸变变换的算法——即，对于给定的仿射变换集$\{T_{i}\}_{i=1}^N$，找到一个仿射变换$T$，使整体畸变最小化$\sum_{i=1}^NDist_F^{2}(T^{-1}T_{i})。$平均畸变变换在某些领域可能很有用-- 特别是，我们将其应用于渲染仿射全景图。 本文提出了一种基于黎曼几何的方法，用于最小化Fisher失真，并开发了一种算法来寻找平均失真变换，应用于仿射全景图渲染。 Dror Ozeri cs.CV,cs.GR,math.DG

authors_text: Shiyu Gao,Zhaoxin Li,Zhaoqi Wang
title: Cost Volume Pyramid Network with Multi-strategies Range Searching for Multi-view Stereo
title_zh: 多视角立体多策略范围搜索的成本量金字塔网络
abstract: Multi-view stereo is an important research task in computer vision while still keeping challenging. In recent years, deep learning-based methods have shown superior performance on this task. Cost volume pyramid network-based methods which progressively refine depth map in coarse-to-fine manner, have yielded promising results while consuming less memory. However, these methods fail to take fully consideration of the characteristics of the cost volumes in each stage, leading to adopt similar range search strategies for each cost volume stage. In this work, we present a novel cost volume pyramid based network with different searching strategies for multi-view stereo. By choosing different depth range sampling strategies and applying adaptive unimodal filtering, we are able to obtain more accurate depth estimation in low resolution stages and iteratively upsample depth map to arbitrary resolution. We conducted extensive experiments on both DTU and BlendedMVS datasets, and results show that our method outperforms most state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Multi-view stereo is an important research task in computer vision while still keeping challenging. In recent years, deep learning-based methods have shown superior performance on this task. Cost volume pyramid network-based methods which progressively refine depth map in coarse-to-fine manner, have yielded promising results while consuming less memory. However, these methods fail to take fully consideration of the characteristics of the cost volumes in each stage, leading to adopt similar range search strategies for each cost volume stage. In this work, we present a novel cost volume pyramid based network with different searching strategies for multi-view stereo. By choosing different depth range sampling strategies and applying adaptive unimodal filtering, we are able to obtain more accurate depth estimation in low resolution stages and iteratively upsample depth map to arbitrary resolution. We conducted extensive experiments on both DTU and BlendedMVS datasets, and results show that our method outperforms most state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 多视点立体是计算机视觉领域的一项重要研究任务，同时仍然具有挑战性。近年来，基于深度学习的方法在这项任务上表现出了优越的性能。基于成本体积金字塔网络的方法以从粗到细的方式逐步细化深度图，在消耗更少内存的同时产生了有希望的结果。然而，这些方法未能充分考虑每个阶段成本量的特征，导致每个成本量阶段都采用相似的范围搜索策略。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于成本体积金字塔的网络，具有不同的多视图立体搜索策略。通过选择不同的深度范围采样策略并应用自适应单峰滤波，我们能够在低分辨率阶段获得更准确的深度估计，并迭代地将深度图上采样到任意分辨率。我们对 DTU 和 BlendedMVS 数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果表明我们的方法优于大多数最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于成本体积金字塔网络和多策略范围搜索的多视角立体视觉方法，以提高深度估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于成本体积金字塔的方法在各阶段采用相似的范围搜索策略，未能充分考虑各阶段成本体积的特性，导致深度估计精度受限。
AI.method: 设计多策略范围搜索机制，结合自适应单峰滤波，在低分辨率阶段采用不同深度范围采样策略，并迭代上采样至任意分辨率。
AI.result: 在DTU和BlendedMVS数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于大多数现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对性优化各阶段搜索策略和滤波机制，提出的网络能有效提升多视角立体视觉的深度估计性能。

search_text: Cost Volume Pyramid Network with Multi-strategies Range Searching for Multi-view Stereo 多视角立体多策略范围搜索的成本量金字塔网络 Multi-view stereo is an important research task in computer vision while still keeping challenging. In recent years, deep learning-based methods have shown superior performance on this task. Cost volume pyramid network-based methods which progressively refine depth map in coarse-to-fine manner, have yielded promising results while consuming less memory. However, these methods fail to take fully consideration of the characteristics of the cost volumes in each stage, leading to adopt similar range search strategies for each cost volume stage. In this work, we present a novel cost volume pyramid based network with different searching strategies for multi-view stereo. By choosing different depth range sampling strategies and applying adaptive unimodal filtering, we are able to obtain more accurate depth estimation in low resolution stages and iteratively upsample depth map to arbitrary resolution. We conducted extensive experiments on both DTU and BlendedMVS datasets, and results show that our method outperforms most state-of-the-art methods. 多视点立体是计算机视觉领域的一项重要研究任务，同时仍然具有挑战性。近年来，基于深度学习的方法在这项任务上表现出了优越的性能。基于成本体积金字塔网络的方法以从粗到细的方式逐步细化深度图，在消耗更少内存的同时产生了有希望的结果。然而，这些方法未能充分考虑每个阶段成本量的特征，导致每个成本量阶段都采用相似的范围搜索策略。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于成本体积金字塔的网络，具有不同的多视图立体搜索策略。通过选择不同的深度范围采样策略并应用自适应单峰滤波，我们能够在低分辨率阶段获得更准确的深度估计，并迭代地将深度图上采样到任意分辨率。我们对 DTU 和 BlendedMVS 数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果表明我们的方法优于大多数最先进的方法。 本文提出一种基于成本体积金字塔网络和多策略范围搜索的多视角立体视觉方法，以提高深度估计的准确性。 Shiyu Gao,Zhaoxin Li,Zhaoqi Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Guangjing Huang,Xu Chen,Tao Ouyang,Qian Ma,Lin Chen,Junshan Zhang
title: Collaboration in Participant-Centric Federated Learning: A Game-Theoretical Perspective
title_zh: 以参与者为中心的联邦学习中的协作：博弈论的视角
comment: The paper has been accepted by IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing
comments: The paper has been accepted by IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing
abstract: Federated learning (FL) is a promising distributed framework for collaborative artificial intelligence model training while protecting user privacy. A bootstrapping component that has attracted significant research attention is the design of incentive mechanism to stimulate user collaboration in FL. The majority of works adopt a broker-centric approach to help the central operator to attract participants and further obtain a well-trained model. Few works consider forging participant-centric collaboration among participants to pursue an FL model for their common interests, which induces dramatic differences in incentive mechanism design from the broker-centric FL. To coordinate the selfish and heterogeneous participants, we propose a novel analytic framework for incentivizing effective and efficient collaborations for participant-centric FL. Specifically, we respectively propose two novel game models for contribution-oblivious FL (COFL) and contribution-aware FL (CAFL), where the latter one implements a minimum contribution threshold mechanism. We further analyze the uniqueness and existence for Nash equilibrium of both COFL and CAFL games and design efficient algorithms to achieve equilibrium solutions. Extensive performance evaluations show that there exists free-riding phenomenon in COFL, which can be greatly alleviated through the adoption of CAFL model with the optimized minimum threshold.
summary: Federated learning (FL) is a promising distributed framework for collaborative artificial intelligence model training while protecting user privacy. A bootstrapping component that has attracted significant research attention is the design of incentive mechanism to stimulate user collaboration in FL. The majority of works adopt a broker-centric approach to help the central operator to attract participants and further obtain a well-trained model. Few works consider forging participant-centric collaboration among participants to pursue an FL model for their common interests, which induces dramatic differences in incentive mechanism design from the broker-centric FL. To coordinate the selfish and heterogeneous participants, we propose a novel analytic framework for incentivizing effective and efficient collaborations for participant-centric FL. Specifically, we respectively propose two novel game models for contribution-oblivious FL (COFL) and contribution-aware FL (CAFL), where the latter one implements a minimum contribution threshold mechanism. We further analyze the uniqueness and existence for Nash equilibrium of both COFL and CAFL games and design efficient algorithms to achieve equilibrium solutions. Extensive performance evaluations show that there exists free-riding phenomenon in COFL, which can be greatly alleviated through the adoption of CAFL model with the optimized minimum threshold.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）是一种很有前途的分布式框架，用于协作人工智能模型训练，同时保护用户隐私。引起广泛研究关注的一个引导组件是设计激励 FL 中用户协作的激励机制。大多数作品采用以经纪人为中心的方式，帮助中心运营商吸引参与者，并进一步获得训练有素的模型。很少有研究考虑在参与者之间建立以参与者为中心的协作，以追求共同利益的 FL 模型，这导致激励机制设计与以经纪人为中心的 FL 存在巨大差异。为了协调自私和异质的参与者，我们提出了一种新颖的分析框架，用于激励以参与者为中心的 FL 的有效和高效的协作。具体来说，我们分别提出了两种新颖的游戏模型：贡献忽略 FL (COFL) 和贡献感知 FL (CAFL)，其中后者实现了最小贡献阈值机制。我们进一步分析了 COFL 和 CAFL 博弈纳什均衡的唯一性和存在性，并设计了有效的算法来实现均衡解。大量的性能评估表明COFL存在搭便车现象，通过采用最小阈值优化的CAFL模型可以大大缓解这种现象。

AI.tldr: 设计激励机制以促进参与者在联邦学习中的有效协作
AI.motivation: 现有研究多采用经纪人中心方法，缺乏针对参与者间协作的激励机制设计，需解决自私和异构参与者的协调问题
AI.method: 提出贡献无关（COFL）和贡献感知（CAFL）的博弈模型，CAFL引入最低贡献阈值机制，分析纳什均衡并设计算法求解
AI.result: 实验表明COFL存在搭便车现象，CAFL模型通过优化阈值显著缓解该问题
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效激励参与者协作，CAFL机制通过贡献感知和阈值优化提升协作效率

authors_text: Chanho Park,Rehan Ahmad,Thomas Hain
title: Unsupervised data selection for Speech Recognition with contrastive loss ratios
title_zh: 具有对比损失率的语音识别的无监督数据选择
abstract: This paper proposes an unsupervised data selection method by using a submodular function based on contrastive loss ratios of target and training data sets. A model using a contrastive loss function is trained on both sets. Then the ratio of frame-level losses for each model is used by a submodular function. By using the submodular function, a training set for automatic speech recognition matching the target data set is selected. Experiments show that models trained on the data sets selected by the proposed method outperform the selection method based on log-likelihoods produced by GMM-HMM models, in terms of word error rate (WER). When selecting a fixed amount, e.g. 10 hours of data, the difference between the results of two methods on Tedtalks was 20.23% WER relative. The method can also be used to select data with the aim of minimising negative transfer, while maintaining or improving on performance of models trained on the whole training set. Results show that the WER on the WSJCAM0 data set was reduced by 6.26% relative when selecting 85% from the whole data set.
summary: This paper proposes an unsupervised data selection method by using a submodular function based on contrastive loss ratios of target and training data sets. A model using a contrastive loss function is trained on both sets. Then the ratio of frame-level losses for each model is used by a submodular function. By using the submodular function, a training set for automatic speech recognition matching the target data set is selected. Experiments show that models trained on the data sets selected by the proposed method outperform the selection method based on log-likelihoods produced by GMM-HMM models, in terms of word error rate (WER). When selecting a fixed amount, e.g. 10 hours of data, the difference between the results of two methods on Tedtalks was 20.23% WER relative. The method can also be used to select data with the aim of minimising negative transfer, while maintaining or improving on performance of models trained on the whole training set. Results show that the WER on the WSJCAM0 data set was reduced by 6.26% relative when selecting 85% from the whole data set.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于目标数据集和训练数据集对比损失率的子模函数的无监督数据选择方法。使用对比损失函数的模型在这两个集合上进行训练。然后，子模函数使用每个模型的帧级损失比率。通过使用子模函数，选择与目标数据集匹配的自动语音识别训练集。实验表明，在字错误率 (WER) 方面，在所提出的方法选择的数据集上训练的模型优于基于 GMM-HMM 模型生成的对数似然的选择方法。当选择固定金额时，例如10小时的数据，两种方法在Tedtalks上的结果相对WER相差20.23%。该方法还可用于选择数据，以最大限度地减少负迁移，同时保持或改进在整个训练集上训练的模型的性能。结果表明，WSJCAM0数据集上的WER相对于从整个数据集中选择85%时降低了6.26%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比损失比的无监督数据选择方法，用于改进语音识别模型的训练集选择。
AI.motivation: 传统基于GMM-HMM对数似然的数据选择方法在语音识别任务中存在性能局限，需探索更有效的无监督数据筛选策略。
AI.method: 通过训练对比损失函数模型，计算目标数据集与训练数据集的帧级损失比，并利用子模函数进行数据选择，构建与目标数据集匹配的训练集。

search_text: Unsupervised data selection for Speech Recognition with contrastive loss ratios 具有对比损失率的语音识别的无监督数据选择 This paper proposes an unsupervised data selection method by using a submodular function based on contrastive loss ratios of target and training data sets. A model using a contrastive loss function is trained on both sets. Then the ratio of frame-level losses for each model is used by a submodular function. By using the submodular function, a training set for automatic speech recognition matching the target data set is selected. Experiments show that models trained on the data sets selected by the proposed method outperform the selection method based on log-likelihoods produced by GMM-HMM models, in terms of word error rate (WER). When selecting a fixed amount, e.g. 10 hours of data, the difference between the results of two methods on Tedtalks was 20.23% WER relative. The method can also be used to select data with the aim of minimising negative transfer, while maintaining or improving on performance of models trained on the whole training set. Results show that the WER on the WSJCAM0 data set was reduced by 6.26% relative when selecting 85% from the whole data set. 本文提出了一种基于目标数据集和训练数据集对比损失率的子模函数的无监督数据选择方法。使用对比损失函数的模型在这两个集合上进行训练。然后，子模函数使用每个模型的帧级损失比率。通过使用子模函数，选择与目标数据集匹配的自动语音识别训练集。实验表明，在字错误率 (WER) 方面，在所提出的方法选择的数据集上训练的模型优于基于 GMM-HMM 模型生成的对数似然的选择方法。当选择固定金额时，例如10小时的数据，两种方法在Tedtalks上的结果相对WER相差20.23%。该方法还可用于选择数据，以最大限度地减少负迁移，同时保持或改进在整个训练集上训练的模型的性能。结果表明，WSJCAM0数据集上的WER相对于从整个数据集中选择85%时降低了6.26%。 本文提出一种基于对比损失比的无监督数据选择方法，用于改进语音识别模型的训练集选择。 Chanho Park,Rehan Ahmad,Thomas Hain eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Wang Lu,Jindong Wang,Haoliang Li,Yiqiang Chen,Xing Xie
title: Domain-invariant Feature Exploration for Domain Generalization
title_zh: 领域泛化的领域不变特征探索
comment: Accepted by Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR) 2022; 20 pages; code: https://github.com/jindongwang/transferlearning/tree/master/code/DeepDG
comments: Accepted by Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR) 2022; 20 pages; code: https://github.com/jindongwang/transferlearning/tree/master/code/DeepDG
abstract: Deep learning has achieved great success in the past few years. However, the performance of deep learning is likely to impede in face of non-IID situations. Domain generalization (DG) enables a model to generalize to an unseen test distribution, i.e., to learn domain-invariant representations. In this paper, we argue that domain-invariant features should be originating from both internal and mutual sides. Internal invariance means that the features can be learned with a single domain and the features capture intrinsic semantics of data, i.e., the property within a domain, which is agnostic to other domains. Mutual invariance means that the features can be learned with multiple domains (cross-domain) and the features contain common information, i.e., the transferable features w.r.t. other domains. We then propose DIFEX for Domain-Invariant Feature EXploration. DIFEX employs a knowledge distillation framework to capture the high-level Fourier phase as the internally-invariant features and learn cross-domain correlation alignment as the mutually-invariant features. We further design an exploration loss to increase the feature diversity for better generalization. Extensive experiments on both time-series and visual benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed DIFEX achieves state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Deep learning has achieved great success in the past few years. However, the performance of deep learning is likely to impede in face of non-IID situations. Domain generalization (DG) enables a model to generalize to an unseen test distribution, i.e., to learn domain-invariant representations. In this paper, we argue that domain-invariant features should be originating from both internal and mutual sides. Internal invariance means that the features can be learned with a single domain and the features capture intrinsic semantics of data, i.e., the property within a domain, which is agnostic to other domains. Mutual invariance means that the features can be learned with multiple domains (cross-domain) and the features contain common information, i.e., the transferable features w.r.t. other domains. We then propose DIFEX for Domain-Invariant Feature EXploration. DIFEX employs a knowledge distillation framework to capture the high-level Fourier phase as the internally-invariant features and learn cross-domain correlation alignment as the mutually-invariant features. We further design an exploration loss to increase the feature diversity for better generalization. Extensive experiments on both time-series and visual benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed DIFEX achieves state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在过去几年中取得了巨大成功。然而，面对非独立同分布的情况，深度学习的性能可能会受到阻碍。域泛化（DG）使模型能够泛化到未见过的测试分布，即学习域不变表示。在本文中，我们认为域不变特征应该源自内部和相互双方。内部不变性意味着可以使用单个域来学习特征，并且特征捕获数据的内在语义，即域内的属性，这与其他域无关。互不变性意味着特征可以在多个域（跨域）中学习，并且特征包含公共信息，即可转移的特征。其他域。然后，我们提出用于域不变特征探索的 DIFEX。 DIFEX 采用知识蒸馏框架来捕获高级傅立叶相位作为内部不变特征，并学习跨域相关对齐作为互不变特征。我们进一步设计了一个探索损失来增加特征多样性以获得更好的泛化能力。对时间序列和视觉基准的大量实验表明，所提出的 DIFEX 实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DIFEX方法，通过探索领域不变特征来提升领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在非独立同分布场景下表现不佳，传统领域泛化方法未能充分结合单一领域内在语义与跨领域共性特征。
AI.method: DIFEX采用知识蒸馏框架，利用傅里叶相位提取内部不变特征，通过跨领域相关性对齐学习相互不变特征，并设计探索损失提升特征多样性。
AI.result: 在时间序列和视觉基准测试中，DIFEX达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: DIFEX通过联合优化内部与相互不变特征，为领域泛化提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Sathvik Bhaskarpandit,Priyanka Gupta,Manik Gupta
title: LETS-GZSL: A Latent Embedding Model for Time Series Generalized Zero Shot Learning
title_zh: LETS-GZSL：时间序列广义零样本学习的潜在嵌入模型
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, 6 tables. Accepted at the IJCAI 2022 workshop on Artificial Intelligence for Time Series (AI4TS)
comments: 9 pages, 5 figures, 6 tables. Accepted at the IJCAI 2022 workshop on Artificial Intelligence for Time Series (AI4TS)
abstract: One of the recent developments in deep learning is generalized zero-shot learning (GZSL), which aims to recognize objects from both seen and unseen classes, when only the labeled examples from seen classes are provided. Over the past couple of years, GZSL has picked up traction and several models have been proposed to solve this problem. Whereas an extensive amount of research on GZSL has been carried out in fields such as computer vision and natural language processing, no such research has been carried out to deal with time series data. GZSL is used for applications such as detecting abnormalities from ECG and EEG data and identifying unseen classes from sensor, spectrograph and other devices' data. In this regard, we propose a Latent Embedding for Time Series - GZSL (LETS-GZSL) model that can solve the problem of GZSL for time series classification (TSC). We utilize an embedding-based approach and combine it with attribute vectors to predict the final class labels. We report our results on the widely popular UCR archive datasets. Our framework is able to achieve a harmonic mean value of at least 55% on most of the datasets except when the number of unseen classes is greater than 3 or the amount of data is very low (less than 100 training examples).
summary: One of the recent developments in deep learning is generalized zero-shot learning (GZSL), which aims to recognize objects from both seen and unseen classes, when only the labeled examples from seen classes are provided. Over the past couple of years, GZSL has picked up traction and several models have been proposed to solve this problem. Whereas an extensive amount of research on GZSL has been carried out in fields such as computer vision and natural language processing, no such research has been carried out to deal with time series data. GZSL is used for applications such as detecting abnormalities from ECG and EEG data and identifying unseen classes from sensor, spectrograph and other devices' data. In this regard, we propose a Latent Embedding for Time Series - GZSL (LETS-GZSL) model that can solve the problem of GZSL for time series classification (TSC). We utilize an embedding-based approach and combine it with attribute vectors to predict the final class labels. We report our results on the widely popular UCR archive datasets. Our framework is able to achieve a harmonic mean value of at least 55% on most of the datasets except when the number of unseen classes is greater than 3 or the amount of data is very low (less than 100 training examples).
abstract_zh: 深度学习的最新发展之一是广义零样本学习（GZSL），其目的是在仅提供已见类中的标记示例时识别已见类和未见类中的对象。在过去的几年里，GZSL 得到了越来越多的关注，并且已经提出了几种模型来解决这个问题。尽管在计算机视觉和自然语言处理等领域已经对 GZSL 进行了大量研究，但尚未针对处理时间序列数据进行此类研究。 GZSL 用于检测心电图和脑电图数据异常以及识别传感器、摄谱仪和其他设备数据中看不见的类别等应用。对此，我们提出了一种时间序列的潜在嵌入 - GZSL（LETS-GZSL）模型，可以解决 GZSL 用于时间序列分类（TSC）的问题。我们利用基于嵌入的方法并将其与属性向量相结合来预测最终的类标签。我们报告了广泛流行的 UCR 存档数据集的结果。我们的框架能够在大多数数据集上实现至少 55% 的调和平均值，除非未见类别的数量大于 3 或数据量非常低（少于 100 个训练示例）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LETS-GZSL模型，用于解决时间序列分类中的广义零样本学习（GZSL）问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管GZSL在计算机视觉和自然语言处理领域已有研究，但针对时间序列数据（如ECG、EEG传感器数据）的GZSL方法尚未被探索。
AI.method: 采用基于嵌入的方法，结合属性向量预测最终类别标签，利用UCR数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 在大多数数据集中达到至少55%的调和平均值，但在未见类别超过3个或训练样本少于100时表现下降。
AI.conclusion: LETS-GZSL为时间序列GZSL提供了可行方案，但需进一步优化以应对高未见类别数或小样本场景。

In this regard, we propose a Latent Embedding for Time Series - GZSL (LETS-GZSL) model that can solve the problem of GZSL for time series classification (TSC). We utilize an embedding-based approach and combine it with attribute vectors to predict the final class labels. We report our results on the widely popular UCR archive datasets. Our framework is able to achieve a harmonic mean value of at least 55% on most of the datasets except when the number of unseen classes is greater than 3 or the amount of data is very low (less than 100 training examples). 深度学习的最新发展之一是广义零样本学习（GZSL），其目的是在仅提供已见类中的标记示例时识别已见类和未见类中的对象。在过去的几年里，GZSL 得到了越来越多的关注，并且已经提出了几种模型来解决这个问题。尽管在计算机视觉和自然语言处理等领域已经对 GZSL 进行了大量研究，但尚未针对处理时间序列数据进行此类研究。 GZSL 用于检测心电图和脑电图数据异常以及识别传感器、摄谱仪和其他设备数据中看不见的类别等应用。对此，我们提出了一种时间序列的潜在嵌入 - GZSL（LETS-GZSL）模型，可以解决 GZSL 用于时间序列分类（TSC）的问题。我们利用基于嵌入的方法并将其与属性向量相结合来预测最终的类标签。我们报告了广泛流行的 UCR 存档数据集的结果。我们的框架能够在大多数数据集上实现至少 55% 的调和平均值，除非未见类别的数量大于 3 或数据量非常低（少于 100 个训练示例）。 本文提出LETS-GZSL模型，用于解决时间序列分类中的广义零样本学习（GZSL）问题。 Sathvik Bhaskarpandit,Priyanka Gupta,Manik Gupta cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Syeda Roshana Ali,Anis Ur Rahman,Muhammad Shahzad
title: Deep dual stream residual network with contextual attention for pansharpening of remote sensing images
title_zh: 具有上下文注意的深度双流残差网络用于遥感图像的全色锐化
abstract: Pansharpening enhances spatial details of high spectral resolution multispectral images using features of high spatial resolution panchromatic image. There are a number of traditional pansharpening approaches but producing an image exhibiting high spectral and spatial fidelity is still an open problem. Recently, deep learning has been used to produce promising pansharpened images; however, most of these approaches apply similar treatment to both multispectral and panchromatic images by using the same network for feature extraction. In this work, we present present a novel dual attention-based two-stream network. It starts with feature extraction using two separate networks for both images, an encoder with attention mechanism to recalibrate the extracted features. This is followed by fusion of the features forming a compact representation fed into an image reconstruction network to produce a pansharpened image. The experimental results on the Pléiades dataset using standard quantitative evaluation metrics and visual inspection demonstrates that the proposed approach performs better than other approaches in terms of pansharpened image quality.
summary: Pansharpening enhances spatial details of high spectral resolution multispectral images using features of high spatial resolution panchromatic image. There are a number of traditional pansharpening approaches but producing an image exhibiting high spectral and spatial fidelity is still an open problem. Recently, deep learning has been used to produce promising pansharpened images; however, most of these approaches apply similar treatment to both multispectral and panchromatic images by using the same network for feature extraction. In this work, we present present a novel dual attention-based two-stream network. It starts with feature extraction using two separate networks for both images, an encoder with attention mechanism to recalibrate the extracted features. This is followed by fusion of the features forming a compact representation fed into an image reconstruction network to produce a pansharpened image. The experimental results on the Pléiades dataset using standard quantitative evaluation metrics and visual inspection demonstrates that the proposed approach performs better than other approaches in terms of pansharpened image quality.
abstract_zh: 全色锐化利用高空间分辨率全色图像的特征增强高光谱分辨率多光谱图像的空间细节。有许多传统的全色锐化方法，但生成具有高光谱和空间保真度的图像仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。最近，深度学习已被用于生成有前景的全色锐化图像。然而，这些方法中的大多数通过使用相同的网络进行特征提取，对多光谱和全色图像进行类似的处理。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于双重注意力的双流网络。它首先使用两个独立的网络对两个图像进行特征提取，一个具有注意机制的编码器来重新校准提取的特征。接下来是融合形成紧凑表示的特征，并将其输入图像重建网络以生成全色锐化图像。使用标准定量评估指标和视觉检查在 Pléiades 数据集上进行的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在全色锐化图像质量方面比其他方法表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双流残差网络和上下文注意力机制的深度学习方法，用于提升遥感图像的全色锐化效果。
AI.motivation: 传统全色锐化方法及现有深度学习模型未能有效区分多光谱与全色图像的特征差异，导致融合后图像的光谱与空间保真度不足。
AI.method: 设计双流网络分别提取多光谱与全色图像特征，引入注意力机制优化特征校准，融合后通过重建网络生成高质量全色锐化图像。
AI.result: 在Pléiades数据集上，该方法在定量指标和视觉评估中均优于现有方法，证明其在图像质量上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 双流网络结合上下文注意力机制能有效提升遥感图像全色锐化性能，为该领域提供新的解决方案。

authors_text: Zhitao Song,Linzhu Yue,Guangli Sun,Yihu Ling,Hongshuo Wei,Linhai Gui,Yun-Hui Liu
title: An Optimal Motion Planning Framework for Quadruped Jumping
title_zh: 四足跳跃的最优运动规划框架
abstract: This paper presents an optimal motion planning framework to generate versatile energy-optimal quadrupedal jumping motions automatically (e.g., flips, spin). The jumping motions via the centroidal dynamics are formulated as a 12-dimensional black-box optimization problem subject to the robot kino-dynamic constraints. Gradient-based approaches offer great success in addressing trajectory optimization (TO), yet, prior knowledge (e.g., reference motion, contact schedule) is required and results in sub-optimal solutions. The new proposed framework first employed a heuristics-based optimization method to avoid these problems. Moreover, a prioritization fitness function is created for heuristics-based algorithms in robot ground reaction force (GRF) planning, enhancing convergence and searching performance considerably. Since heuristics-based algorithms often require significant time, motions are planned offline and stored as a pre-motion library. A selector is designed to automatically choose motions with user-specified or perception information as input. The proposed framework has been successfully validated only with a simple continuously tracking PD controller in an open-source Mini-Cheetah by several challenging jumping motions, including jumping over a window-shaped obstacle with 30 cm height and left-flipping over a rectangle obstacle with 27 cm height.
summary: This paper presents an optimal motion planning framework to generate versatile energy-optimal quadrupedal jumping motions automatically (e.g., flips, spin). The jumping motions via the centroidal dynamics are formulated as a 12-dimensional black-box optimization problem subject to the robot kino-dynamic constraints. Gradient-based approaches offer great success in addressing trajectory optimization (TO), yet, prior knowledge (e.g., reference motion, contact schedule) is required and results in sub-optimal solutions. The new proposed framework first employed a heuristics-based optimization method to avoid these problems. Moreover, a prioritization fitness function is created for heuristics-based algorithms in robot ground reaction force (GRF) planning, enhancing convergence and searching performance considerably. Since heuristics-based algorithms often require significant time, motions are planned offline and stored as a pre-motion library. A selector is designed to automatically choose motions with user-specified or perception information as input. The proposed framework has been successfully validated only with a simple continuously tracking PD controller in an open-source Mini-Cheetah by several challenging jumping motions, including jumping over a window-shaped obstacle with 30 cm height and left-flipping over a rectangle obstacle with 27 cm height.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个最佳运动规划框架，可以自动生成多功能能量最佳四足跳跃运动（例如翻转、旋转）。通过质心动力学的跳跃运动被表述为受机器人运动动力学约束的 12 维黑盒优化问题。基于梯度的方法在解决轨迹优化（TO）方面取得了巨大成功，但是需要先验知识（例如参考运动、接触时间表），并且会导致次优解决方案。新提出的框架首先采用基于启发式的优化方法来避免这些问题。此外，为机器人地面反作用力（GRF）规划中基于启发式的算法创建了优先适应度函数，显着增强了收敛和搜索性能。由于基于启发式的算法通常需要大量时间，因此离线规划运动并将其存储为预运动库。选择器被设计为以用户指定的或感知信息作为输入来自动选择动作。所提出的框架仅通过开源 Mini-Cheetah 中的简单连续跟踪 PD 控制器通过几个具有挑战性的跳跃动作成功验证，包括跳过 30 厘米高的窗口形障碍物和左翻转越过 27 厘米高的矩形障碍物。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于质心动力学的12维黑箱优化框架，用于自动生成四足机器人跳跃运动（如翻滚、旋转）的最优能量解决方案。
AI.motivation: 传统梯度优化方法依赖先验知识（如参考运动、接触计划）且易陷入次优解，难以满足复杂跳跃任务的自动化需求。
AI.method: 采用启发式优化方法结合优先级适应度函数优化地面反作用力规划，并通过离线预规划运动库与智能选择器实现运动自动匹配。
AI.result: 在开源Mini-Cheetah机器人上验证了框架有效性，成功完成30cm窗形障碍跳跃和27cm矩形障碍左翻滚等高难度动作。
AI.conclusion: 该框架无需先验知识即可生成能量最优跳跃运动，通过离线预规划与在线选择机制实现了复杂地形的适应性运动控制。

authors_text: Yuehui Han,Le Hui,Haobo Jiang,Jianjun Qian,Jin Xie
title: Generative Subgraph Contrast for Self-Supervised Graph Representation Learning
title_zh: 自监督图表示学习的生成子图对比
abstract: Contrastive learning has shown great promise in the field of graph representation learning. By manually constructing positive/negative samples, most graph contrastive learning methods rely on the vector inner product based similarity metric to distinguish the samples for graph representation. However, the handcrafted sample construction (e.g., the perturbation on the nodes or edges of the graph) may not effectively capture the intrinsic local structures of the graph. Also, the vector inner product based similarity metric cannot fully exploit the local structures of the graph to characterize the graph difference well. To this end, in this paper, we propose a novel adaptive subgraph generation based contrastive learning framework for efficient and robust self-supervised graph representation learning, and the optimal transport distance is utilized as the similarity metric between the subgraphs. It aims to generate contrastive samples by capturing the intrinsic structures of the graph and distinguish the samples based on the features and structures of subgraphs simultaneously. Specifically, for each center node, by adaptively learning relation weights to the nodes of the corresponding neighborhood, we first develop a network to generate the interpolated subgraph. We then construct the positive and negative pairs of subgraphs from the same and different nodes, respectively. Finally, we employ two types of optimal transport distances (i.e., Wasserstein distance and Gromov-Wasserstein distance) to construct the structured contrastive loss. Extensive node classification experiments on benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness of our graph contrastive learning method.
summary: Contrastive learning has shown great promise in the field of graph representation learning. By manually constructing positive/negative samples, most graph contrastive learning methods rely on the vector inner product based similarity metric to distinguish the samples for graph representation. However, the handcrafted sample construction (e.g., the perturbation on the nodes or edges of the graph) may not effectively capture the intrinsic local structures of the graph. Also, the vector inner product based similarity metric cannot fully exploit the local structures of the graph to characterize the graph difference well. To this end, in this paper, we propose a novel adaptive subgraph generation based contrastive learning framework for efficient and robust self-supervised graph representation learning, and the optimal transport distance is utilized as the similarity metric between the subgraphs. It aims to generate contrastive samples by capturing the intrinsic structures of the graph and distinguish the samples based on the features and structures of subgraphs simultaneously. Specifically, for each center node, by adaptively learning relation weights to the nodes of the corresponding neighborhood, we first develop a network to generate the interpolated subgraph. We then construct the positive and negative pairs of subgraphs from the same and different nodes, respectively. Finally, we employ two types of optimal transport distances (i.e., Wasserstein distance and Gromov-Wasserstein distance) to construct the structured contrastive loss. Extensive node classification experiments on benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness of our graph contrastive learning method.
abstract_zh: 对比学习在图表示学习领域显示出了巨大的前景。通过手动构建正/负样本，大多数图对比学习方法依赖于基于向量内积的相似性度量来区分样本以进行图表示。然而，手工制作的样本构造（例如，图的节点或边上的扰动）可能无法有效地捕获图的内在局部结构。此外，基于向量内积的相似性度量不能充分利用图的局部结构来很好地表征图的差异。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于自适应子图生成的对比学习框架，用于高效且鲁棒的自监督图表示学习，并利用最佳传输距离作为子图之间的相似性度量。它的目的是通过捕获图的内在结构来生成对比样本，并同时根据子图的特征和结构来区分样本。具体来说，对于每个中心节点，通过自适应学习与相应邻域的节点的关系权重，我们首先开发一个网络来生成插值子图。然后，我们分别从相同和不同的节点构建正负子图对。最后，我们采用两种类型的最佳传输距离（即 Wasserstein 距离和 Gromov-Wasserstein 距离）来构建结构化对比损失。在基准数据集上进行的广泛的节点分类实验验证了我们的图对比学习方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于生成子图对比的自监督图表示学习方法，以更有效地捕捉图的内在结构并提升表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法在构造正负样本时可能无法有效捕捉图的内在局部结构，且向量内积无法充分利用局部结构表征图差异。
AI.method: 提出自适应子图生成框架，利用最优传输距离（Wasserstein和Gromov-Wasserstein）作为相似度度量，通过生成子图对并构建结构化对比损失，同时考虑子图的特征和结构信息。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的节点分类实验验证了该方法的有效性，表明其优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效捕捉图的内在结构和利用最优传输距离，显著提升了自监督图表示学习的效果，为相关领域提供了新的研究方向。

search_text: Generative Subgraph Contrast for Self-Supervised Graph Representation Learning 自监督图表示学习的生成子图对比 Contrastive learning has shown great promise in the field of graph representation learning. By manually constructing positive/negative samples, most graph contrastive learning methods rely on the vector inner product based similarity metric to distinguish the samples for graph representation. However, the handcrafted sample construction (e.g., the perturbation on the nodes or edges of the graph) may not effectively capture the intrinsic local structures of the graph. Also, the vector inner product based similarity metric cannot fully exploit the local structures of the graph to characterize the graph difference well. To this end, in this paper, we propose a novel adaptive subgraph generation based contrastive learning framework for efficient and robust self-supervised graph representation learning, and the optimal transport distance is utilized as the similarity metric between the subgraphs. It aims to generate contrastive samples by capturing the intrinsic structures of the graph and distinguish the samples based on the features and structures of subgraphs simultaneously. Specifically, for each center node, by adaptively learning relation weights to the nodes of the corresponding neighborhood, we first develop a network to generate the interpolated subgraph. We then construct the positive and negative pairs of subgraphs from the same and different nodes, respectively. Finally, we employ two types of optimal transport distances (i.e., Wasserstein distance and Gromov-Wasserstein distance) to construct the structured contrastive loss. Extensive node classification experiments on benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness of our graph contrastive learning method. 对比学习在图表示学习领域显示出了巨大的前景。通过手动构建正/负样本，大多数图对比学习方法依赖于基于向量内积的相似性度量来区分样本以进行图表示。然而，手工制作的样本构造（例如，图的节点或边上的扰动）可能无法有效地捕获图的内在局部结构。此外，基于向量内积的相似性度量不能充分利用图的局部结构来很好地表征图的差异。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于自适应子图生成的对比学习框架，用于高效且鲁棒的自监督图表示学习，并利用最佳传输距离作为子图之间的相似性度量。它的目的是通过捕获图的内在结构来生成对比样本，并同时根据子图的特征和结构来区分样本。具体来说，对于每个中心节点，通过自适应学习与相应邻域的节点的关系权重，我们首先开发一个网络来生成插值子图。然后，我们分别从相同和不同的节点构建正负子图对。最后，我们采用两种类型的最佳传输距离（即 Wasserstein 距离和 Gromov-Wasserstein 距离）来构建结构化对比损失。在基准数据集上进行的广泛的节点分类实验验证了我们的图对比学习方法的有效性。 提出一种基于生成子图对比的自监督图表示学习方法，以更有效地捕捉图的内在结构并提升表示学习效果。 Yuehui Han,Le Hui,Haobo Jiang,Jianjun Qian,Jin Xie cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Le Hui,Lingpeng Wang,Linghua Tang,Kaihao Lan,Jin Xie,Jian Yang
title: 3D Siamese Transformer Network for Single Object Tracking on Point Clouds
title_zh: 用于点云上单个对象跟踪的 3D 连体变压器网络
abstract: Siamese network based trackers formulate 3D single object tracking as cross-correlation learning between point features of a template and a search area. Due to the large appearance variation between the template and search area during tracking, how to learn the robust cross correlation between them for identifying the potential target in the search area is still a challenging problem. In this paper, we explicitly use Transformer to form a 3D Siamese Transformer network for learning robust cross correlation between the template and the search area of point clouds. Specifically, we develop a Siamese point Transformer network to learn shape context information of the target. Its encoder uses self-attention to capture non-local information of point clouds to characterize the shape information of the object, and the decoder utilizes cross-attention to upsample discriminative point features. After that, we develop an iterative coarse-to-fine correlation network to learn the robust cross correlation between the template and the search area. It formulates the cross-feature augmentation to associate the template with the potential target in the search area via cross attention. To further enhance the potential target, it employs the ego-feature augmentation that applies self-attention to the local k-NN graph of the feature space to aggregate target features. Experiments on the KITTI, nuScenes, and Waymo datasets show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the 3D single object tracking task.
summary: Siamese network based trackers formulate 3D single object tracking as cross-correlation learning between point features of a template and a search area. Due to the large appearance variation between the template and search area during tracking, how to learn the robust cross correlation between them for identifying the potential target in the search area is still a challenging problem. In this paper, we explicitly use Transformer to form a 3D Siamese Transformer network for learning robust cross correlation between the template and the search area of point clouds. Specifically, we develop a Siamese point Transformer network to learn shape context information of the target. Its encoder uses self-attention to capture non-local information of point clouds to characterize the shape information of the object, and the decoder utilizes cross-attention to upsample discriminative point features. After that, we develop an iterative coarse-to-fine correlation network to learn the robust cross correlation between the template and the search area. It formulates the cross-feature augmentation to associate the template with the potential target in the search area via cross attention. To further enhance the potential target, it employs the ego-feature augmentation that applies self-attention to the local k-NN graph of the feature space to aggregate target features. Experiments on the KITTI, nuScenes, and Waymo datasets show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the 3D single object tracking task.
abstract_zh: 基于连体网络的跟踪器将 3D 单对象跟踪制定为模板和搜索区域的点特征之间的互相关学习。由于跟踪过程中模板和搜索区域之间存在较大的外观变化，如何学习它们之间的鲁棒互相关性以识别搜索区域中的潜在目标仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们明确使用 Transformer 形成 3D Siamese Transformer 网络，用于学习模板和点云搜索区域之间的鲁棒互相关性。具体来说，我们开发了一个连体点变压器网络来学习目标的形状上下文信息。其编码器利用自注意力捕获点云的非局部信息来表征物体的形状信息，解码器利用交叉注意力对判别性点特征进行上采样。之后，我们开发了一个迭代的从粗到细的相关网络来学习模板和搜索区域之间的鲁棒互相关性。它制定交叉特征增强，通过交叉注意将模板与搜索区域中的潜在目标相关联。为了进一步增强潜在目标，它采用了自我特征增强，将自注意力应用于特征空间的局部 k-NN 图以聚合目标特征。在 KITTI、nuScenes 和 Waymo 数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法在 3D 单目标跟踪任务上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的3D Siamese网络，用于点云中的单目标跟踪任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理点云模板与搜索区域间的显著外观变化时，难以学习鲁棒的交叉相关性以准确识别目标。
AI.method: 设计Siamese点Transformer网络：编码器通过自注意力捕获点云非局部形状信息，解码器利用交叉注意力上采样特征；再通过迭代粗到细相关网络结合交叉特征增强与自注意力的局部特征聚合。
AI.result: 在KITTI、nuScenes和Waymo数据集上达到3D单目标跟踪的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: Transformer结构有效解决了点云跟踪中跨帧外观变化带来的挑战，验证了该方法在复杂场景下的鲁棒性。

After that, we develop an iterative coarse-to-fine correlation network to learn the robust cross correlation between the template and the search area. authors_text: Mu He,Le Hui,Yikai Bian,Jian Ren,Jin Xie,Jian Yang
title: RA-Depth: Resolution Adaptive Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation
title_zh: RA-Depth：分辨率自适应自监督单目深度估计
abstract: Existing self-supervised monocular depth estimation methods can get rid of expensive annotations and achieve promising results. However, these methods suffer from severe performance degradation when directly adopting a model trained on a fixed resolution to evaluate at other different resolutions. In this paper, we propose a resolution adaptive self-supervised monocular depth estimation method (RA-Depth) by learning the scale invariance of the scene depth. Specifically, we propose a simple yet efficient data augmentation method to generate images with arbitrary scales for the same scene. Then, we develop a dual high-resolution network that uses the multi-path encoder and decoder with dense interactions to aggregate multi-scale features for accurate depth inference. Finally, to explicitly learn the scale invariance of the scene depth, we formulate a cross-scale depth consistency loss on depth predictions with different scales. Extensive experiments on the KITTI, Make3D and NYU-V2 datasets demonstrate that RA-Depth not only achieves state-of-the-art performance, but also exhibits a good ability of resolution adaptation.
summary: Existing self-supervised monocular depth estimation methods can get rid of expensive annotations and achieve promising results. However, these methods suffer from severe performance degradation when directly adopting a model trained on a fixed resolution to evaluate at other different resolutions. In this paper, we propose a resolution adaptive self-supervised monocular depth estimation method (RA-Depth) by learning the scale invariance of the scene depth. Specifically, we propose a simple yet efficient data augmentation method to generate images with arbitrary scales for the same scene. Then, we develop a dual high-resolution network that uses the multi-path encoder and decoder with dense interactions to aggregate multi-scale features for accurate depth inference. Finally, to explicitly learn the scale invariance of the scene depth, we formulate a cross-scale depth consistency loss on depth predictions with different scales. Extensive experiments on the KITTI, Make3D and NYU-V2 datasets demonstrate that RA-Depth not only achieves state-of-the-art performance, but also exhibits a good ability of resolution adaptation.
abstract_zh: 现有的自监督单目深度估计方法可以摆脱昂贵的注释并取得有希望的结果。然而，当直接采用在固定分辨率上训练的模型来在其他不同分辨率下进行评估时，这些方法会遭受严重的性能下降。在本文中，我们通过学习场景深度的尺度不变性，提出了一种分辨率自适应自监督单目深度估计方法（RA-Depth）。具体来说，我们提出了一种简单而有效的数据增强方法来为同一场景生成任意尺度的图像。然后，我们开发了一个双高分辨率网络，该网络使用具有密集交互的多路径编码器和解码器来聚合多尺度特征以进行准确的深度推理。最后，为了明确学习场景深度的尺度不变性，我们对不同尺度的深度预测制定了跨尺度深度一致性损失。在 KITTI、Make3D 和 NYU-V2 数据集上的大量实验表明，RA-Depth 不仅实现了最先进的性能，而且还表现出了良好的分辨率适应能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应分辨率的自监督单目深度估计方法RA-Depth，解决模型在不同分辨率下性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督单目深度估计方法在固定分辨率训练后难以适应其他分辨率，导致性能显著下降，需提升模型的分辨率适应能力。
AI.method: 设计任意尺度数据增强生成多分辨率图像，构建双高分辨率网络通过多路径编解码器与密集交互融合多尺度特征，并引入跨尺度深度一致性损失显式学习尺度不变性。
AI.result: 在KITTI、Make3D和NYU-V2数据集上达到SOTA性能，且在不同分辨率下保持良好适应性。
AI.conclusion: RA-Depth通过尺度不变性建模有效解决了跨分辨率性能退化问题，为实际应用中动态分辨率场景提供了可靠方案。

search_text: RA-Depth: Resolution Adaptive Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation RA-Depth：分辨率自适应自监督单目深度估计 Existing self-supervised monocular depth estimation methods can get rid of expensive annotations and achieve promising results. However, these methods suffer from severe performance degradation when directly adopting a model trained on a fixed resolution to evaluate at other different resolutions. In this paper, we propose a resolution adaptive self-supervised monocular depth estimation method (RA-Depth) by learning the scale invariance of the scene depth. Specifically, we propose a simple yet efficient data augmentation method to generate images with arbitrary scales for the same scene. Then, we develop a dual high-resolution network that uses the multi-path encoder and decoder with dense interactions to aggregate multi-scale features for accurate depth inference. Finally, to explicitly learn the scale invariance of the scene depth, we formulate a cross-scale depth consistency loss on depth predictions with different scales. Extensive experiments on the KITTI, Make3D and NYU-V2 datasets demonstrate that RA-Depth not only achieves state-of-the-art performance, but also exhibits a good ability of resolution adaptation. 现有的自监督单目深度估计方法可以摆脱昂贵的注释并取得有希望的结果。然而，当直接采用在固定分辨率上训练的模型来在其他不同分辨率下进行评估时，这些方法会遭受严重的性能下降。在本文中，我们通过学习场景深度的尺度不变性，提出了一种分辨率自适应自监督单目深度估计方法（RA-Depth）。具体来说，我们提出了一种简单而有效的数据增强方法来为同一场景生成任意尺度的图像。然后，我们开发了一个双高分辨率网络，该网络使用具有密集交互的多路径编码器和解码器来聚合多尺度特征以进行准确的深度推理。最后，为了明确学习场景深度的尺度不变性，我们对不同尺度的深度预测制定了跨尺度深度一致性损失。在 KITTI、Make3D 和 NYU-V2 数据集上的大量实验表明，RA-Depth 不仅实现了最先进的性能，而且还表现出了良好的分辨率适应能力。 本文提出一种自适应分辨率的自监督单目深度估计方法RA-Depth，解决模型在不同分辨率下性能下降的问题。 Mu He,Le Hui,Yikai Bian,Jian Ren,Jin Xie,Jian Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Chong Mou,Jian Zhang
title: TransCL: Transformer Makes Strong and Flexible Compressive Learning
title_zh: TransCL：Transformer 实现强大而灵活的压缩学习
abstract: Compressive learning (CL) is an emerging framework that integrates signal acquisition via compressed sensing (CS) and machine learning for inference tasks directly on a small number of measurements. It can be a promising alternative to classical image-domain methods and enjoys great advantages in memory saving and computational efficiency. However, previous attempts on CL are not only limited to a fixed CS ratio, which lacks flexibility, but also limited to MNIST/CIFAR-like datasets and do not scale to complex real-world high-resolution (HR) data or vision tasks. In this paper, a novel transformer-based compressive learning framework on large-scale images with arbitrary CS ratios, dubbed TransCL, is proposed. Specifically, TransCL first utilizes the strategy of learnable block-based compressed sensing and proposes a flexible linear projection strategy to enable CL to be performed on large-scale images in an efficient block-by-block manner with arbitrary CS ratios. Then, regarding CS measurements from all blocks as a sequence, a pure transformer-based backbone is deployed to perform vision tasks with various task-oriented heads. Our sufficient analysis presents that TransCL exhibits strong resistance to interference and robust adaptability to arbitrary CS ratios. Extensive experiments for complex HR data demonstrate that the proposed TransCL can achieve state-of-the-art performance in image classification and semantic segmentation tasks. In particular, TransCL with a CS ratio of $10\%$ can obtain almost the same performance as when operating directly on the original data and can still obtain satisfying performance even with an extremely low CS ratio of $1\%$. The source codes of our proposed TransCL is available at \url{https://github.com/MC-E/TransCL/}.
summary: Compressive learning (CL) is an emerging framework that integrates signal acquisition via compressed sensing (CS) and machine learning for inference tasks directly on a small number of measurements. It can be a promising alternative to classical image-domain methods and enjoys great advantages in memory saving and computational efficiency. However, previous attempts on CL are not only limited to a fixed CS ratio, which lacks flexibility, but also limited to MNIST/CIFAR-like datasets and do not scale to complex real-world high-resolution (HR) data or vision tasks. In this paper, a novel transformer-based compressive learning framework on large-scale images with arbitrary CS ratios, dubbed TransCL, is proposed. Specifically, TransCL first utilizes the strategy of learnable block-based compressed sensing and proposes a flexible linear projection strategy to enable CL to be performed on large-scale images in an efficient block-by-block manner with arbitrary CS ratios. Then, regarding CS measurements from all blocks as a sequence, a pure transformer-based backbone is deployed to perform vision tasks with various task-oriented heads. Our sufficient analysis presents that TransCL exhibits strong resistance to interference and robust adaptability to arbitrary CS ratios. Extensive experiments for complex HR data demonstrate that the proposed TransCL can achieve state-of-the-art performance in image classification and semantic segmentation tasks. In particular, TransCL with a CS ratio of $10\%$ can obtain almost the same performance as when operating directly on the original data and can still obtain satisfying performance even with an extremely low CS ratio of $1\%$. The source codes of our proposed TransCL is available at \url{https://github.com/MC-E/TransCL/}.
abstract_zh: 压缩学习 (CL) 是一种新兴框架，它集成了通过压缩感知 (CS) 进行的信号采集和机器学习，以便直接在少量测量上执行推理任务。它可以成为经典图像域方法的有前途的替代方案，并且在节省内存和计算效率方面具有巨大的优势。然而，之前对 CL 的尝试不仅限于固定的 CS 比率，缺乏灵活性，而且仅限于类似 MNIST/CIFAR 的数据集，不能扩展到复杂的现实世界高分辨率 (HR) 数据或视觉任务。在本文中，提出了一种新颖的基于 Transformer 的压缩学习框架，用于具有任意 CS 比率的大规模图像，称为 TransCL。具体来说，TransCL首先利用可学习的基于块的压缩感知策略，并提出了一种灵活的线性投影策略，使得CL能够在任意CS比率下以高效的逐块方式在大规模图像上执行。然后，将所有块的 CS 测量视为一个序列，部署一个纯粹的基于变压器的主干，以使用各种面向任务的头来执行视觉任务。我们的充分分析表明，TransCL 具有很强的抗干扰能力和对任意 CS 比率的强大适应性。针对复杂 HR 数据的大量实验表明，所提出的 TransCL 可以在图像分类和语义分割任务中实现最先进的性能。特别是，CS比率为$10\%$的TransCL可以获得与直接操作原始数据几乎相同的性能，并且即使在$1\%$的极低CS比率下仍然可以获得令人满意的性能。我们提出的 TransCL 的源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/MC-E/TransCL/} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的压缩学习框架TransCL，用于在大规模图像上实现灵活且高效的压缩感知学习。
AI.motivation: 传统压缩学习方法受限于固定压缩比和简单数据集，难以处理高分辨率真实场景数据，且缺乏灵活性。
AI.method: TransCL采用可学习的分块压缩感知策略和灵活线性投影方法，结合纯Transformer架构处理分块压缩测量序列，支持任意压缩比和多任务头。
AI.result: 在高分辨率数据集上实现图像分类和语义分割的最先进性能，10%压缩比下性能接近原始数据，1%压缩比仍保持满意效果。
AI.conclusion: TransCL通过分块处理与Transformer结合，实现了强鲁棒性和任意压缩比适应性，为真实场景压缩学习提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Yingyi Chen,Xi Shen,Yahui Liu,Qinghua Tao,Johan A. K. Suykens
title: Jigsaw-ViT: Learning Jigsaw Puzzles in Vision Transformer
title_zh: Jigsaw-ViT：在 Vision Transformer 中学习拼图游戏
comment: Accepted to Pattern Recognition Letters 2022. Project page: https://yingyichen-cyy.github.io/Jigsaw-ViT/
comments: Accepted to Pattern Recognition Letters 2022. Project page: https://yingyichen-cyy.github.io/Jigsaw-ViT/
abstract: The success of Vision Transformer (ViT) in various computer vision tasks has promoted the ever-increasing prevalence of this convolution-free network. The fact that ViT works on image patches makes it potentially relevant to the problem of jigsaw puzzle solving, which is a classical self-supervised task aiming at reordering shuffled sequential image patches back to their natural form. Despite its simplicity, solving jigsaw puzzle has been demonstrated to be helpful for diverse tasks using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), such as self-supervised feature representation learning, domain generalization, and fine-grained classification. In this paper, we explore solving jigsaw puzzle as a self-supervised auxiliary loss in ViT for image classification, named Jigsaw-ViT. We show two modifications that can make Jigsaw-ViT superior to standard ViT: discarding positional embeddings and masking patches randomly. Yet simple, we find that Jigsaw-ViT is able to improve both in generalization and robustness over the standard ViT, which is usually rather a trade-off. Experimentally, we show that adding the jigsaw puzzle branch provides better generalization than ViT on large-scale image classification on ImageNet. Moreover, the auxiliary task also improves robustness to noisy labels on Animal-10N, Food-101N, and Clothing1M as well as adversarial examples. Our implementation is available at https://yingyichen-cyy.github.io/Jigsaw-ViT/.
summary: The success of Vision Transformer (ViT) in various computer vision tasks has promoted the ever-increasing prevalence of this convolution-free network. The fact that ViT works on image patches makes it potentially relevant to the problem of jigsaw puzzle solving, which is a classical self-supervised task aiming at reordering shuffled sequential image patches back to their natural form. Despite its simplicity, solving jigsaw puzzle has been demonstrated to be helpful for diverse tasks using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), such as self-supervised feature representation learning, domain generalization, and fine-grained classification. In this paper, we explore solving jigsaw puzzle as a self-supervised auxiliary loss in ViT for image classification, named Jigsaw-ViT. We show two modifications that can make Jigsaw-ViT superior to standard ViT: discarding positional embeddings and masking patches randomly. Yet simple, we find that Jigsaw-ViT is able to improve both in generalization and robustness over the standard ViT, which is usually rather a trade-off. Experimentally, we show that adding the jigsaw puzzle branch provides better generalization than ViT on large-scale image classification on ImageNet. Moreover, the auxiliary task also improves robustness to noisy labels on Animal-10N, Food-101N, and Clothing1M as well as adversarial examples. Our implementation is available at https://yingyichen-cyy.github.io/Jigsaw-ViT/.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformer（ViT）在各种计算机视觉任务中的成功推动了这种无卷积网络的不断普及。 ViT 作用于图像块的事实使其可能与拼图游戏解决问题相关，这是一种经典的自我监督任务，旨在将打乱的顺序图像块重新排序回其自然形式。尽管拼图游戏很简单，但已被证明有助于使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 完成各种任务，例如自监督特征表示学习、领域泛化和细粒度分类。在本文中，我们探索将拼图游戏作为 ViT 中用于图像分类的自监督辅助损失来解决，称为 Jigsaw-ViT。我们展示了两种可以使 Jigsaw-ViT 优于标准 ViT 的修改：丢弃位置嵌入和随机屏蔽补丁。然而很简单，我们发现 Jigsaw-ViT 能够比标准 ViT 提高泛化性和鲁棒性，这通常是一种权衡。实验表明，在 ImageNet 上的大规模图像分类上，添加拼图分支可以提供比 ViT 更好的泛化能力。此外，辅助任务还提高了 Animal-10N、Food-101N 和 Clothing1M 以及对抗性示例上的噪声标签的鲁棒性。我们的实现可以在 https://yingyichen-cyy.github.io/Jigsaw-ViT/ 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Jigsaw-ViT，通过将拼图任务作为自监督辅助损失函数整合到视觉Transformer中，以提升图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管ViT在图像分类中表现优异，但其泛化能力和鲁棒性仍有提升空间。拼图任务作为经典自监督方法，在CNN中已被证明能有效提升特征学习、领域泛化和细粒度分类能力，因此尝试将其引入ViT。
AI.method: 对标准ViT进行两处改进：移除位置嵌入并随机屏蔽图像块，将拼图任务作为辅助损失函数与主分类任务联合训练。
AI.result: Jigsaw-ViT在ImageNet大规模分类任务中优于标准ViT，在Animal-10N、Food-101N、Clothing1M等噪声标签数据集及对抗样本测试中展现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 拼图任务作为简单有效的自监督辅助任务，能同时提升ViT的泛化能力与鲁棒性，且实现成本低廉。

search_text: Jigsaw-ViT: Learning Jigsaw Puzzles in Vision Transformer Jigsaw-ViT：在 Vision Transformer 中学习拼图游戏 The success of Vision Transformer (ViT) in various computer vision tasks has promoted the ever-increasing prevalence of this convolution-free network. The fact that ViT works on image patches makes it potentially relevant to the problem of jigsaw puzzle solving, which is a classical self-supervised task aiming at reordering shuffled sequential image patches back to their natural form. Despite its simplicity, solving jigsaw puzzle has been demonstrated to be helpful for diverse tasks using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), such as self-supervised feature representation learning, domain generalization, and fine-grained classification. In this paper, we explore solving jigsaw puzzle as a self-supervised auxiliary loss in ViT for image classification, named Jigsaw-ViT. We show two modifications that can make Jigsaw-ViT superior to standard ViT: discarding positional embeddings and masking patches randomly. Yet simple, we find that Jigsaw-ViT is able to improve both in generalization and robustness over the standard ViT, which is usually rather a trade-off. Experimentally, we show that adding the jigsaw puzzle branch provides better generalization than ViT on large-scale image classification on ImageNet. Moreover, the auxiliary task also improves robustness to noisy labels on Animal-10N, Food-101N, and Clothing1M as well as adversarial examples. Our implementation is available at https://yingyichen-cyy.github.io/Jigsaw-ViT/. Vision Transformer（ViT）在各种计算机视觉任务中的成功推动了这种无卷积网络的不断普及。 ViT 作用于图像块的事实使其可能与拼图游戏解决问题相关，这是一种经典的自我监督任务，旨在将打乱的顺序图像块重新排序回其自然形式。尽管拼图游戏很简单，但已被证明有助于使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 完成各种任务，例如自监督特征表示学习、领域泛化和细粒度分类。在本文中，我们探索将拼图游戏作为 ViT 中用于图像分类的自监督辅助损失来解决，称为 Jigsaw-ViT。我们展示了两种可以使 Jigsaw-ViT 优于标准 ViT 的修改：丢弃位置嵌入和随机屏蔽补丁。然而很简单，我们发现 Jigsaw-ViT 能够比标准 ViT 提高泛化性和鲁棒性，这通常是一种权衡。实验表明，在 ImageNet 上的大规模图像分类上，添加拼图分支可以提供比 ViT 更好的泛化能力。此外，辅助任务还提高了 Animal-10N、Food-101N 和 Clothing1M 以及对抗性示例上的噪声标签的鲁棒性。我们的实现可以在 https://yingyichen-cyy.github.io/Jigsaw-ViT/ 上找到。 本文提出Jigsaw-ViT，通过将拼图任务作为自监督辅助损失函数整合到视觉Transformer中，以提升图像分类性能。 Yingyi Chen,Xi Shen,Yahui Liu,Qinghua Tao,Johan A. K. Suykens cs.CV

authors_text: Yasunori Ohishi,Marc Delcroix,Tsubasa Ochiai,Shoko Araki,Daiki Takeuchi,Daisuke Niizumi,Akisato Kimura,Noboru Harada,Kunio Kashino
title: ConceptBeam: Concept Driven Target Speech Extraction
title_zh: ConceptBeam：概念驱动的目标语音提取
abstract: We propose a novel framework for target speech extraction based on semantic information, called ConceptBeam. Target speech extraction means extracting the speech of a target speaker in a mixture. Typical approaches have been exploiting properties of audio signals, such as harmonic structure and direction of arrival. In contrast, ConceptBeam tackles the problem with semantic clues. Specifically, we extract the speech of speakers speaking about a concept, i.e., a topic of interest, using a concept specifier such as an image or speech. Solving this novel problem would open the door to innovative applications such as listening systems that focus on a particular topic discussed in a conversation. Unlike keywords, concepts are abstract notions, making it challenging to directly represent a target concept. In our scheme, a concept is encoded as a semantic embedding by mapping the concept specifier to a shared embedding space. This modality-independent space can be built by means of deep metric learning using paired data consisting of images and their spoken captions. We use it to bridge modality-dependent information, i.e., the speech segments in the mixture, and the specified, modality-independent concept. As a proof of our scheme, we performed experiments using a set of images associated with spoken captions. That is, we generated speech mixtures from these spoken captions and used the images or speech signals as the concept specifiers. We then extracted the target speech using the acoustic characteristics of the identified segments. We compare ConceptBeam with two methods: one based on keywords obtained from recognition systems and another based on sound source separation. We show that ConceptBeam clearly outperforms the baseline methods and effectively extracts speech based on the semantic representation.
summary: We propose a novel framework for target speech extraction based on semantic information, called ConceptBeam. Target speech extraction means extracting the speech of a target speaker in a mixture. Typical approaches have been exploiting properties of audio signals, such as harmonic structure and direction of arrival. In contrast, ConceptBeam tackles the problem with semantic clues. Specifically, we extract the speech of speakers speaking about a concept, i.e., a topic of interest, using a concept specifier such as an image or speech. Solving this novel problem would open the door to innovative applications such as listening systems that focus on a particular topic discussed in a conversation. Unlike keywords, concepts are abstract notions, making it challenging to directly represent a target concept. In our scheme, a concept is encoded as a semantic embedding by mapping the concept specifier to a shared embedding space. This modality-independent space can be built by means of deep metric learning using paired data consisting of images and their spoken captions. We use it to bridge modality-dependent information, i.e., the speech segments in the mixture, and the specified, modality-independent concept. As a proof of our scheme, we performed experiments using a set of images associated with spoken captions. That is, we generated speech mixtures from these spoken captions and used the images or speech signals as the concept specifiers. We then extracted the target speech using the acoustic characteristics of the identified segments. We compare ConceptBeam with two methods: one based on keywords obtained from recognition systems and another based on sound source separation. We show that ConceptBeam clearly outperforms the baseline methods and effectively extracts speech based on the semantic representation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于语义信息的目标语音提取新框架，称为 ConceptBeam。目标语音提取是指提取混合中的目标说话人的语音。典型的方法是利用音频信号的特性，例如谐波结构和到达方向。相比之下，ConceptBeam 通过语义线索来解决问题。具体来说，我们使用图像或语音等概念说明符来提取谈论某个概念（即感兴趣的主题）的说话者的语音。解决这个新问题将为创新应用打开大门，例如专注于对话中讨论的特定主题的监听系统。与关键字不同，概念是抽象概念，因此很难直接表示目标概念。在我们的方案中，通过将概念说明符映射到共享嵌入空间，将概念编码为语义嵌入。这种独立于模态的空间可以通过深度度量学习使用由图像及其语音字幕组成的配对数据来构建。我们用它来桥接模态相关的信息，即混合中的语音片段和指定的、模态无关的概念。作为我们方案的证明，我们使用一组与语音字幕相关的图像进行了实验。也就是说，我们从这些语音字幕生成语音混合物，并使用图像或语音信号作为概念说明符。然后，我们使用已识别片段的声学特征提取目标语音。我们将 ConceptBeam 与两种方法进行比较：一种基于从识别系统获得的关键字，另一种基于声源分离。我们表明，ConceptBeam 明显优于基线方法，并基于语义表示有效地提取语音。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ConceptBeam框架，通过语义信息实现目标语音提取，即从混合语音中提取特定概念相关说话人的语音。
AI.motivation: 传统目标语音提取方法依赖音频信号特性（如谐波结构），难以捕捉语义关联。本文旨在利用语义线索（如概念）提升提取效果，支持基于话题的语音监听等应用。
AI.method: 通过概念指定符（如图像或语音）生成语义嵌入，利用深度度量学习构建跨模态共享嵌入空间，将语音片段与概念关联，结合声学特征实现目标语音提取。
AI.result: 实验表明ConceptBeam显著优于基于关键词识别和声源分离的基线方法，能有效根据语义表示提取目标语音。
AI.conclusion: ConceptBeam通过语义嵌入实现概念驱动的语音提取，在语义相关性任务中表现优于传统方法，为话题聚焦型语音系统提供新思路。

authors_text: Sanjeev Saxena
title: Simpler O(1) Query Algorithm for Level Ancestors
title_zh: 更简单的 O(1) 级别祖先查询算法
abstract: This note describes a very simple O(1) query time algorithm for finding level ancestors. This is basically a serial (re)-implementation of the parallel algorithm of Berkman and Vishkin (O.Berkman and U.Vishkin, Finding level-ancestors in trees, JCSS, 48, 214--230, 1994). Although the basic algorithm has preprocessing time of O(n log n), by having additional levels or using table lookup, the preprocessing time can be reduced to almost linear or linear. The table lookup algorithm can be built in O(1) parallel time with $n$ processors and can also be used to simplify the parallel algorithm of Berkman and Vishkin and make it optimal.
summary: This note describes a very simple O(1) query time algorithm for finding level ancestors. This is basically a serial (re)-implementation of the parallel algorithm of Berkman and Vishkin (O.Berkman and U.Vishkin, Finding level-ancestors in trees, JCSS, 48, 214--230, 1994). Although the basic algorithm has preprocessing time of O(n log n), by having additional levels or using table lookup, the preprocessing time can be reduced to almost linear or linear. The table lookup algorithm can be built in O(1) parallel time with $n$ processors and can also be used to simplify the parallel algorithm of Berkman and Vishkin and make it optimal.
abstract_zh: 本说明描述了一种非常简单的 O(1) 查询时间算法，用于查找级别祖先。这基本上是 Berkman 和 Vishkin 并行算法的串行（重新）实现（O.Berkman 和 U.Vishkin，Finding level-ancestors in trees，JCSS，48, 214--230, 1994）。虽然基本算法的预处理时间为 O(n log n)，但通过增加级别或使用查表，可以将预处理时间减少到几乎线性或线性。查表算法可以用$n$个处理器以O(1)并行时间构建，也可以用来简化Berkman和Vishkin的并行算法并使其最优。

AI.tldr: 提出一种更简单的O(1)查询时间算法，用于在树结构中高效查找层级祖先。
AI.motivation: 优化层级祖先查询算法的预处理时间，并简化并行算法实现。
AI.method: 基于Berkman和Vishkin的并行算法，采用查找表技术减少预处理时间至线性，并简化并行处理流程。
AI.result: 实现O(1)查询时间，预处理时间降至接近线性，同时简化并行算法结构。
AI.conclusion: 在保持查询效率的同时，通过简化算法结构提升了实用性和并行处理性能。

tldr: 提出一种更简单的O(1)查询时间算法，用于在树结构中高效查找层级祖先。
motivation: 优化层级祖先查询算法的预处理时间，并简化并行算法实现。
method: 基于Berkman和Vishkin的并行算法，采用查找表技术减少预处理时间至线性，并简化并行处理流程。
result: 实现O(1)查询时间，预处理时间降至接近线性，同时简化并行算法结构。
conclusion: 在保持查询效率的同时，通过简化算法结构提升了实用性和并行处理性能。
search_text: Simpler O(1) Query Algorithm for Level Ancestors 更简单的 O(1) 级别祖先查询算法 This note describes a very simple O(1) query time algorithm for finding level ancestors. This is basically a serial (re)-implementation of the parallel algorithm of Berkman and Vishkin (O.Berkman and U.Vishkin, Finding level-ancestors in trees, JCSS, 48, 214--230, 1994). Although the basic algorithm has preprocessing time of O(n log n), by having additional levels or using table lookup, the preprocessing time can be reduced to almost linear or linear. The table lookup algorithm can be built in O(1) parallel time with $n$ processors and can also be used to simplify the parallel algorithm of Berkman and Vishkin and make it optimal. 本说明描述了一种非常简单的 O(1) 查询时间算法，用于查找级别祖先。这基本上是 Berkman 和 Vishkin 并行算法的串行（重新）实现（O.Berkman 和 U.Vishkin，Finding level-ancestors in trees，JCSS，48, 214--230, 1994）。虽然基本算法的预处理时间为 O(n log n)，但通过增加级别或使用查表，可以将预处理时间减少到几乎线性或线性。查表算法可以用$n$个处理器以O(1)并行时间构建，也可以用来简化Berkman和Vishkin的并行算法并使其最优。 提出一种更简单的O(1)查询时间算法，用于在树结构中高效查找层级祖先。 Sanjeev Saxena cs.DS

authors_text: Viorica Rozina Chifu,Cristina Bianca Pop,Emil St. Chifu,Horatiu Barleanu
title: Deep Learning for Forecasting the Energy Consumption in Public Buildings
title_zh: 深度学习预测公共建筑能源消耗
comment: ef:2021 20th RoEduNet Conference: Networking in Education and Research (RoEduNet), 2021, pp. 1-6
comments: ef:2021 20th RoEduNet Conference: Networking in Education and Research (RoEduNet), 2021, pp. 1-6
abstract: In this paper we propose a Long Short-Term Memory Network based method to forecast the energy consumption in public buildings, based on past measurements. Our approach consists of three main steps: data processing step, training and validation step, and finally the forecasting step. We tested our method on a data set consisting of measurements taken every half an hour from the main building of the National Archives of the United Kingdom, in Kew and as evaluation metrics we have used Mean Absolute Error (MAE) and Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE).
summary: In this paper we propose a Long Short-Term Memory Network based method to forecast the energy consumption in public buildings, based on past measurements. Our approach consists of three main steps: data processing step, training and validation step, and finally the forecasting step. We tested our method on a data set consisting of measurements taken every half an hour from the main building of the National Archives of the United Kingdom, in Kew and as evaluation metrics we have used Mean Absolute Error (MAE) and Mean Absolute Percentage Error (MAPE).
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于长短期记忆网络的方法，根据过去的测量来预测公共建筑的能源消耗。我们的方法包括三个主要步骤：数据处理步骤、训练和验证步骤以及最后的预测步骤。我们在一个数据集上测试了我们的方法，该数据集包括每半小时从位于英国邱园的英国国家档案馆主楼进行的测量，并使用平均绝对误差 (MAE) 和平均绝对百分比误差 (MAPE) 作为评估指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的方法，用于预测公共建筑的能源消耗。
AI.motivation: 公共建筑的能源消耗预测对于优化能源管理、降低运营成本具有重要意义，而传统方法在处理时序数据时存在局限性。
AI.method: 方法包含三个步骤：数据预处理、模型训练与验证、以及能源消耗预测，核心采用LSTM网络进行时序建模。
AI.result: 在英国国家档案馆每半小时采集的数据集上，通过MAE和MAPE指标验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LSTM网络能够有效捕捉能源消耗的时序特征，为公共建筑能源预测提供了可行的深度学习解决方案。

authors_text: Cristina Bianca Pop,Viorica Rozina Chifu,Corina Cordea,Emil Stefan Chifu,Octav Barsan
title: Forecasting the Short-Term Energy Consumption Using Random Forests and Gradient Boosting
title_zh: 使用随机森林和梯度提升预测短期能源消耗
comment: ef:2021 20th RoEduNet Conference: Networking in Education and Research (RoEduNet), 2021, pp. 1-6
comments: ef:2021 20th RoEduNet Conference: Networking in Education and Research (RoEduNet), 2021, pp. 1-6
abstract: This paper analyzes comparatively the performance of Random Forests and Gradient Boosting algorithms in the field of forecasting the energy consumption based on historical data. The two algorithms are applied in order to forecast the energy consumption individually, and then combined together by using a Weighted Average Ensemble Method. The comparison among the achieved experimental results proves that the Weighted Average Ensemble Method provides more accurate results than each of the two algorithms applied alone.
summary: This paper analyzes comparatively the performance of Random Forests and Gradient Boosting algorithms in the field of forecasting the energy consumption based on historical data. The two algorithms are applied in order to forecast the energy consumption individually, and then combined together by using a Weighted Average Ensemble Method. The comparison among the achieved experimental results proves that the Weighted Average Ensemble Method provides more accurate results than each of the two algorithms applied alone.
abstract_zh: 本文比较分析了随机森林和梯度提升算法在基于历史数据预测能耗领域的性能。应用这两种算法来单独预测能源消耗，然后使用加权平均集成方法将其组合在一起。所获得的实验结果之间的比较证明，加权平均集成方法比单独应用两种算法提供了更准确的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了随机森林和梯度提升算法在短期能源消耗预测中的性能，并通过加权平均集成方法结合两者以提高预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 准确预测能源消耗对能源管理至关重要，而单一算法可能存在预测偏差，需探索更有效的组合方法。
AI.method: 分别应用随机森林和梯度提升算法进行预测，再通过加权平均集成方法融合两者结果。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，加权平均集成方法的预测精度优于单独使用随机森林或梯度提升算法。
AI.conclusion: 集成方法能有效提升短期能源消耗预测的准确性，建议在能源预测领域推广使用。

authors_text: Kenji Koide,Shuji Oishi,Masashi Yokozuka,Atsuhiko Banno
title: Scalable Fiducial Tag Localization on a 3D Prior Map via Graph-Theoretic Global Tag-Map Registration
title_zh: 通过图论全局标签映射注册在 3D 先验地图上进行可扩展基准标签定位
comment: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS2022)
comments: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS2022)
abstract: This paper presents an accurate and scalable method for fiducial tag localization on a 3D prior environmental map. The proposed method comprises three steps: 1) visual odometry-based landmark SLAM for estimating the relative poses between fiducial tags, 2) geometrical matching-based global tag-map registration via maximum clique finding, and 3) tag pose refinement based on direct camera-map alignment with normalized information distance. Through simulation-based evaluations, the proposed method achieved a 98 \% global tag-map registration success rate and an average tag pose estimation accuracy of a few centimeters. Experimental results in a real environment demonstrated that it enables to localize over 110 fiducial tags placed in an environment in 25 minutes for data recording and post-processing.
summary: This paper presents an accurate and scalable method for fiducial tag localization on a 3D prior environmental map. The proposed method comprises three steps: 1) visual odometry-based landmark SLAM for estimating the relative poses between fiducial tags, 2) geometrical matching-based global tag-map registration via maximum clique finding, and 3) tag pose refinement based on direct camera-map alignment with normalized information distance. Through simulation-based evaluations, the proposed method achieved a 98 \% global tag-map registration success rate and an average tag pose estimation accuracy of a few centimeters. Experimental results in a real environment demonstrated that it enables to localize over 110 fiducial tags placed in an environment in 25 minutes for data recording and post-processing.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种在 3D 先验环境地图上进行基准标记定位的准确且可扩展的方法。所提出的方法包括三个步骤：1）基于视觉里程计的地标 SLAM，用于估计基准标签之间的相对姿势；2）通过最大团查找进行基于几何匹配的全局标签地图配准；3）基于具有归一化信息距离的直接相机地图对齐的标签姿势细化。通过基于仿真的评估，所提出的方法实现了 98% 的全局标签图配准成功率和几厘米的平均标签姿态估计精度。真实环境中的实验结果表明，它能够在 25 分钟内定位环境中放置的 110 多个基准标签，以进行数据记录和后处理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在3D先验地图上进行可扩展的标记定位方法，结合图论全局注册技术。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在大规模环境中标记定位存在精度不足和可扩展性差的问题，需更高效可靠的解决方案。
AI.method: 分三步：1）基于视觉里程计的地标SLAM估计标记相对位姿；2）通过最大团寻找的几何匹配实现全局标记-地图注册；3）基于直接相机-地图对齐的归一化信息距离进行标记位姿优化。
AI.result: 仿真测试达到98%全局注册成功率，平均定位精度为几厘米；实际环境中25分钟内可定位110个标记。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过图论优化显著提升了大规模3D环境中标记定位的准确性和可扩展性，适用于实际场景部署。

search_text: Scalable Fiducial Tag Localization on a 3D Prior Map via Graph-Theoretic Global Tag-Map Registration 通过图论全局标签映射注册在 3D 先验地图上进行可扩展基准标签定位 This paper presents an accurate and scalable method for fiducial tag localization on a 3D prior environmental map. The proposed method comprises three steps: 1) visual odometry-based landmark SLAM for estimating the relative poses between fiducial tags, 2) geometrical matching-based global tag-map registration via maximum clique finding, and 3) tag pose refinement based on direct camera-map alignment with normalized information distance. Through simulation-based evaluations, the proposed method achieved a 98 \% global tag-map registration success rate and an average tag pose estimation accuracy of a few centimeters. Experimental results in a real environment demonstrated that it enables to localize over 110 fiducial tags placed in an environment in 25 minutes for data recording and post-processing. 本文提出了一种在 3D 先验环境地图上进行基准标记定位的准确且可扩展的方法。所提出的方法包括三个步骤：1）基于视觉里程计的地标 SLAM，用于估计基准标签之间的相对姿势；2）通过最大团查找进行基于几何匹配的全局标签地图配准；3）基于具有归一化信息距离的直接相机地图对齐的标签姿势细化。通过基于仿真的评估，所提出的方法实现了 98% 的全局标签图配准成功率和几厘米的平均标签姿态估计精度。真实环境中的实验结果表明，它能够在 25 分钟内定位环境中放置的 110 多个基准标签，以进行数据记录和后处理。 本文提出了一种在3D先验地图上进行可扩展的标记定位方法，结合图论全局注册技术。 Kenji Koide,Shuji Oishi,Masashi Yokozuka,Atsuhiko Banno cs.RO

authors_text: Zhan Liu,Ziwei Wang,Sichao Huang,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu
title: GE-Grasp: Efficient Target-Oriented Grasping in Dense Clutter
title_zh: GE-Grasp：密集杂乱中高效的目标导向抓取
abstract: Grasping in dense clutter is a fundamental skill for autonomous robots. However, the crowdedness and occlusions in the cluttered scenario cause significant difficulties to generate valid grasp poses without collisions, which results in low efficiency and high failure rates. To address these, we present a generic framework called GE-Grasp for robotic motion planning in dense clutter, where we leverage diverse action primitives for occluded object removal and present the generator-evaluator architecture to avoid spatial collisions. Therefore, our GE-Grasp is capable of grasping objects in dense clutter efficiently with promising success rates. Specifically, we define three action primitives: target-oriented grasping for target capturing, pushing, and nontarget-oriented grasping to reduce the crowdedness and occlusions. The generators effectively provide various action candidates referring to the spatial information. Meanwhile, the evaluators assess the selected action primitive candidates, where the optimal action is implemented by the robot. Extensive experiments in simulated and real-world environments show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods of grasping in clutter with respect to motion efficiency and success rates. Moreover, we achieve comparable performance in the real world as that in the simulation environment, which indicates the strong generalization ability of our GE-Grasp. Supplementary material is available at: https://github.com/CaptainWuDaoKou/GE-Grasp.
summary: Grasping in dense clutter is a fundamental skill for autonomous robots. However, the crowdedness and occlusions in the cluttered scenario cause significant difficulties to generate valid grasp poses without collisions, which results in low efficiency and high failure rates. To address these, we present a generic framework called GE-Grasp for robotic motion planning in dense clutter, where we leverage diverse action primitives for occluded object removal and present the generator-evaluator architecture to avoid spatial collisions. Specifically, we define three action primitives: target-oriented grasping for target capturing, pushing, and nontarget-oriented grasping to reduce the crowdedness and occlusions. The generators effectively provide various action candidates referring to the spatial information. Meanwhile, the evaluators assess the selected action primitive candidates, where the optimal action is implemented by the robot. Extensive experiments in simulated and real-world environments show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art methods of grasping in clutter with respect to motion efficiency and success rates. Moreover, we achieve comparable performance in the real world as that in the simulation environment, which indicates the strong generalization ability of our GE-Grasp. Supplementary material is available at: https://github.com/CaptainWuDaoKou/GE-Grasp.
abstract_zh: 在密集的杂乱中抓取是自主机器人的一项基本技能。然而，杂乱场景中的拥挤和遮挡导致在不发生碰撞的情况下生成有效的抓取姿势变得非常困难，从而导致效率低下和失败率高。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个名为 GE-Grasp 的通用框架，用于在密集杂乱中进行机器人运动规划，其中我们利用不同的动作基元来去除遮挡的对象，并提出生成器评估器架构以避免空间碰撞。因此，我们的 GE-Grasp 能够有效地抓取密集杂乱中的物体，并且成功率很高。具体来说，我们定义了三个动作原语：面向目标的抓取，用于目标捕获、推动，以及非面向目标的抓取，以减少拥挤和遮挡。生成器有效地提供参考空间信息的各种候选动作。同时，评估者评估选定的候选动作原语，其中最佳动作由机器人执行。在模拟和现实环境中进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法在运动效率和成功率方面优于杂乱中抓取的最先进方法。此外，我们在现实世界中实现了与模拟环境中相当的性能，这表明我们的 GE-Grasp 具有很强的泛化能力。补充材料可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/CaptainWuDaoKou/GE-Grasp。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GE-Grasp的通用框架，用于在密集杂乱环境中实现高效的目标导向抓取。
AI.motivation: 在密集杂乱场景中，物体遮挡和拥挤导致传统方法生成有效抓取姿态时效率低且失败率高，亟需改进。
AI.method: 定义三种动作原语（目标抓取、推动、非目标抓取），结合生成器-评估器架构，利用空间信息生成动作候选并评估最优动作。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实环境中均优于现有方法，运动效率和成功率显著提升，且真实环境性能与仿真结果一致。
AI.conclusion: GE-Grasp通过动作原语与架构设计有效解决杂乱环境抓取难题，展现出强大的泛化能力。
